-	Vehículos a medida

Name: Forkardt Hardinge Americas
Description: For over a combined 230 years, Forkardt Hardinge has been the premiere Workholding supplier across the globe.  With the most comprehensive Workholding product portfolio, our solutions can be found in almost every industry and manufacturer.  Our customer first approach, coupled with industry leading quality and technology makes Forkardt Hardinge the easy choice when looking for a Workholding partner.  With over 200,000 SKUs our team is confident we have a solution that can handle almost any manufacturing requirement.  From being challenged with the tightest tolerances to requiring automated changeovers our products have been tested and validated in some of the most difficult manufacturing environments. Whether you need collets, chucks, rotary tables, or custom workholding solutions, our team of engineers can help specify the correct workholding solution to your specific need. Through continued innovation, we bring you the latest advancements in workholding technology that is trusted by small and large machining professionals worldwide.

Name: Kadant
Description:
We are a global supplier of technologies and engineered systems that drive Sustainable Industrial Processing. Our products and services play an integral role in enhancing efficiency, optimizing energy utilization, and maximizing productivity in process industries while helping our customers advance their sustainability initiatives with products that reduce waste or generate more yield with fewer inputs, particularly fiber, energy, and water. Our operations are comprised of three reportable operating segments, Flow Control, Industrial Processing, and Material Handling.

We have a long and well-established history of developing, manufacturing, and servicing a range of products and equipment used in process industries such as paper, packaging, and tissue; wood products; mining; metals; food processing; and recycling and waste management, among others. Some of our businesses or their predecessor companies have been in operation for more than 100 years. Our diverse customer base includes global and regional industrial manufacturers and distributors who participate in the broader resource transformation sector. We believe we have one of the largest installed bases of equipment in the markets we serve around the globe. 

Kadant is based in Westford, Massachusetts, USA, and our stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol KAI. Kadant brand products and services are sold to industries worldwide through our subsidiaries located in North America, South America, Europe, and Asia.

Name: SAMP Group
Description:
SAMP Group is headquartered in Bologna, Italy, where for more than 85 years we have crafted and maintained the world’s finest wire and cable machines.
We partner with customers worldwide working in energy, infrastructure, construction, data, and transport, collaborating to solve their technical challenges and to create efficient, high-quality solutions for them to better power, construct, and connect the world.
SAMP offers global coverage with production sites in Italy, China, and Brazil and a sales and service unit in the USA, allowing us to provide sales, service, and expert support to our clients wherever they are based.
We are business partners for all our customers, working to maximize their competitive advantage and commercial success. SAMP products deliver superior technology to boost productivity and performance, carefully designed and constructed to meet our customers’ expectations while providing genuine value for money and best-in-class ROI through their entire lifetime.

JOIN US IN THE FOLLOWING FAIRS:

- ArabCab - Egypt Cairo: 4th-6th February 2026
- Wire Dusseldorf: 13th-17th April 2026
- Wire China: 21st-24th September 2026

Name: SANY Marine
Description:
SANY Marine is one of the core business units of SANY Group, mainly engaged in container mobile equipment (reach stacker, empty container handler, electric terminal tractor), port equipment (quayside crane, yard crane, jib crane), logistics equipment (material handler, heavy-duty forklift, telehandler), bulk equipment (ship unloader, ship loader, stacker reclaimer), wind tower barrel and other products. We are committed to becoming a global port machinery leader and terminal automation solution provider.
Sany Marine Zhuhai Industrial Park is located in Zhuhai Special Economic District, with a total land area of 2 million square meters and a coastline of 1.5 km. Intelligent as the core, the introduction of cutting, machining, welding, painting and assembly robots and other intelligent equipment create an intelligent manufacturing lighthouse factory that leads the industry with an annual planned output value of 30 billion yuan.

Name: Cocamar Máquinas
Description:
Com atuação em todo Norte e Noroeste do Paraná, a Cocamar Máquinas, Concessionária John Deere, busca atender todas as necessidades do pequeno ao grande produtor, ressaltando a importância do uso de peças originais John Deere, a disponibilidade oferecida em todos os seus pontos de atendimento e uma equipe técnica altamente qualificada.

Através da conectividade dos equipamentos, da telemetria e do desenvolvimento de um ecossistema completo de aplicações, a Cocamar Máquinas promove uma gestão avançada de dados para que os produtores possam extrair o máximo resultado de suas operações, aumentando assim, a sua produtividade, lucratividade e rentabilidade, de forma sustentável.

John Deere: Tecnologia e conectividade no campo.

Name: BluePrint Automation (BPA)
Description:
BluePrint Automation (BPA) is a world leader in end-of-line packaging automation. With a diverse and innovative team of experts in consumer goods packaging, BPA designs, develops and manufactures packaging solutions for flexible and other tough-to-handle packages.

• Vision Guided Robotics: Picking individual packaged and
unpackaged (naked) items for loading into your containers, wrappers or hffs machines.  Solutions include Stacking and Loading, Variety Packs into Sack or Case, Dinner Tray Loading and Kit Assembly.
• Secondary Packaging: Horizontal and vertical pack solutions for flexible packages and more!  Solutions include case and tray packing, wrap around case packing, end-load cartoning and retail ready solutions. BPA packs a variety of products into a variety of secondary containers.
ready, three-sided display, totes, bags and more!
• Turnkey Packaging Systems: Total control of your packaging line from the end of processing through palletizing.

Backed by thousands of successful installations in over 60 countries, BPA has three full-service manufacturing facilities in the USA and Europe, an additional facility in Hangzhou China and ten additional subsidiaries throughout the world for sales and service.

BPA is all about innovation and know it is their reputation that makes them successful. Based on requirements of their customers, BPA develops innovative technologies and machines designed to exceed expectations. Starting from initial contact through project management and commissioning, including service and support, BPA aims to please. Their sales and engineering teams work closely with you to develop the optimal solution for your specific packaging needs, ensuring maximum line productivity.

BPA has extensive experience in the following markets:
• Bakery • Confectionery • Dairy • Dry Food • Fresh Produce • Frozen • Ice Cream • Personal Care • Pet Food • Pharmaceutical • Protein • Snacks

Name: Blue Machinery
Description:
Blue Machinery is a leading supplier of materials processing and handling equipment, serving a wide range of industries across the UK, including Quarrying & Demolition, Recycling & Energy, Construction, Scrap, Ports & Rail, and Forestry & Arboriculture.

With a strong commitment to excellence and a deep understanding of our customers' needs, we work with world-renowned manufacturers to provide innovative solutions that maximise productivity, efficiency, and sustainability.

Our team of industry experts, strategically located across the UK, are dedicated to delivering tailored solutions supported by outstanding local service and support, ensuring your operations run seamlessly. The Blue Machinery Group operates from five key locations: Blue Machinery (Scotland) and Murray Plant (A Blue Scotland Company) in Stirling; Blue Machinery (Central) with depots in Northwich and Nantwich; Blue Machinery (Southern) in Portishead; and Blue Machinery (Spares), serving customers from Warrington and Stirling.

At Blue Machinery, we prioritise building lasting partnerships, empowering our customers to achieve their operational goals through innovation, dependability, and a customer-focused approach.

Name: Colfax Fluid Handling
Description: Colfax Fluid Handling, is a world leader in the development, engineering, manufacturing, distribution, service and support of pumps and systems for demanding fluid handling applications. Specializing in positive displacement and centrifugal pump technologies, Colfax Fluid Handling supports a global customer base in the commercial marine, defense, oil & gas, power generation and industrial markets. Through its Reliability Services business, a full spectrum of lubrication systems equipment and services provides mission-critical uptime resources. Colfax Fluid Handling provides the most efficient and reliable solutions with the lowest total cost of ownership through trusted product brands Allweiler, COT-PURITECH℠, Houttuin, Imo, LSC, Lubritech, Rosscor, Sicelub, Tushaco,  Warren and Zenith. These global brands have led their markets throughout The Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa and Asia-Pacific for decades.

Name: Frigel Group
Description:
The Frigel group is made up of Italian and foreign companies whose purpose is the design, production, installation, sales and service of systems & solutions for process cooling and temperature control used to control temperatures of industrial processes.

Frigel products and solutions are designed to fit specific cooling and temperature control requirements of several industries, such as Plastic & Rubber, Food & Beverage, Power Generation & Transmission, Data Centers, Chemical & Pharma, Metals, and others.
Frigel has matured in-depth knowledge of thermodynamic requirements in these industrial processes, allowing it to design “application-tailored” equipment and systems, to suit the peculiarities and needs of each specific application.
Four key factors are driving the design of optimal solutions for each Customer, namely productivity, efficiency, sustainability and reliability.

Frigel Purpose is that of “Engineering a more efficient and sustainable industry”

Frigel Vision is to “Be a global innovator of high performance, sustainable and quality engineered solutions for process cooling and temperature control technologies”.

The Frigel group includes several manufacturing as well as sales, engineering and service sites in four continents:

Frigel Firenze S.p.A., (Florence - Italy) - headquarter, manufacturing, engineering, sales and service
Frigel Firenze S.p.A., (Padua - Italy) - manufacturing
Frigel Eastern Europe Sp. z o.o. (Poland) - engineering, sales and service
Frigel North America Inc., (U.S.A.) - engineering, sales and service
Frigel Asia Pacific Ltd, (Thailand) - manufacturing, engineering, sales and service
Frigel Latino America Ltda, (Brazil) - engineering, sales and service
Frigel Intelligent Cooling Systems Pvt Ltd (India) - manufacturing, engineering, sales and service.

Furthermore, Frigel operates through a worldwide network of agents and distributors.

Name: Fraisa
Description:
Spitzentechnologie für höchste Präzision!
FRAISA produziert Hochleistungswerkzeuge für die Metallbearbeitung und zählt zu den führenden Herstellern der Zerspanungsbranche. Mit rund 545 Mitarbeitenden agieren wir weltweit an sieben Standorten. Seit der Gründung im Jahre 1934 steht FRAISA für höchsten technologischen Anspruch, kreative Ingenieurskunst, Qualität und Teamwork.
Unser Unternehmensleitbild interpretieren wir im Sinne der dreifachen Nachhaltigkeit – sozial, ökologisch und ökonomisch. Kontinuierliche Investitionen in die Produkt- und Technologieentwicklung garantieren zukunftsweisende Innovationen. Dabei sind unsere gut ausgebildeten Mitarbeitenden der Schlüssel zum wirtschaftlichen Erfolg.
Bei FRAISA steht der Kunde im Mittelpunkt: Unser Ziel ist es, mit hochqualitativen Werkzeugen und Serviceangeboten die Fertigungskosten unserer Kunden zu minimieren und die Produktivität in den Betrieben zu steigern. 
Wir betrachten unsere Kunden als Partner. Daher legen wir grossen Wert auf die Analyse von Kundenbedürfnissen, den persönlichen Kontakt durch unsere Anwendungstechniker sowie eine individuelle Beratung – für einen maximalen Kundennutzen mit Mehrwert.

Name: R.A Jones, a Coesia company
Description:
R.A Jones is one of the world’s leading providers of primary and secondary packaging machinery to the food, pharmaceutical, dairy and consumer goods industries. The company holds more than 70 worldwide patents across seven machinery brands, covering a wide range of solutions from improving shelf life of fresh meats to efficient filling of pouches, cups and bottles, as well as aerosol production and creative carton construction.  The North American resources include four manufacturing plants and more than 800 US-based staff members.  Brands that are part of the R.A Jones portfolio include: KartridgPak, Autoprod, Holmatic, Aerofill, Dawson and Map Systems, as well as Jones, our namesake brand.

R.A Jones is part of Coesia, a group of innovation-based, industrial solutions companies, operating globally and headquartered in Bologna, Italy.

Name: TRAPP
Description:
A história da TRAPP tem início em 10 de agosto de 1950. O jovem Eugênio Trapp começa naquele dia a fabricar serpentinas, tachos, alambiques, fornos para fabricação de farinha, bombas de água manuais e outros itens. Em 1964, lança no mercado um pulverizador para agricultura e três anos depois passa a produzir também máquinas de cortar grama.

Com mais de sete décadas de atuação, a Trapp ativa agora uma nova e moderna planta industrial, ampliando sua capacidade produtiva e atingindo um novo patamar de evolução tecnológica.

Name: Tractafric Equipment Maroc
Description:
Tractafric Equipment est le concessionnaire exclusif des produits Caterpillar au Maroc. Depuis son siège social situé à Casablanca et son solide réseau de 8 agences réparties à travers le pays, Tractafric offre à ses clients un service de proximité et une gamme de matériel de premier rang dans les domaines : BTP, MINIERS et INDUSTRIELS avec plus de 20 ans d’expérience et une position de leader sur le marché.
Tractafric Equipment vous accompagne tout au long de la vie de votre équipement : du financement à l'achat, de l'optimisation de votre machine et la fourniture de pièces détachées, tout en vous offrant la garantie d'une démarche qualité au service de clients considérés aujourd’hui parmi les fleurons de l’économie nationale  avec un parc de milliers de machines Caterpillar actives au Maroc dont nous assurons : la maintenance, la réparation et les pièces de rechange à travers toutes les régions du Royaume.

Name: Zegla
Description:
O Ecossistema completo para sua indústria.
Tecnologia competitiva para envase, embalagem e processos.

Name: P.E. LABELLERS SPA
Description:
P.E. LABELLERS S.p.A is a company specialized in designing and producing leading labelling machines, using all the existing technologies (cold glue, self-adhesive, hot melt, roll-fed and combination systems) and suggesting new ones.
P.E. LABELLERS can answer the needs of their customers in the different targets proposing low speed, medium speed and high speed labelling machines in the various sectors (beverage, wine and spirits, food, dairy, personal-care, chemical, pharmaceutical, pet-food and packaging), in different countries and continents. Thanks to the technical experience, accrued over the years by the R&D Department, and to the 360° total versatility of the produced labelling equipments, P.E. LABELLERS is able to satisfy everyone needs, from the small maker to the multinational company.

Name: Barloworld Mongolia
Description:
Уул уурхай бол Caterpillar юм.
Barloworld Mongolia LLC is the Official Dealer for Caterpillar Inc, which is the world's largest mining, road, and construction equipment manufacturer, in Mongolia. Barloworld Mongolia is a 100% South African invested private company that provides products and support services to the Mining, Road, Construction, Infrastructure, and Energy sectors. 

Since its establishment in 1996, with 100% South African conglomerate Barloworld Limited, Barloworld Mongolia sells and rents quality Caterpillar machines used in mining, construction, road, and railroad construction, infrastructure, agricultural, energy, and industrial industries of Mongolia.  It is officially authorized to offer our customers a full product line of Sales, Parts, and Repair Services for the following manufacturers: CAT, SEM, Michelin, and other products.

We are also an authorized provider of Trimble construction, Cat MineStar, S.O.S℠, CAT Product Link, Trimble VisionLink (SITECH), CAT Accu Grade technologies in Mongolia. We have about 600 employees and our branches are located in Tuv province's Zaamar, Darkhan city, Umnugovi province’s Tsogttsetsii & Khanbogd and Dornogovi province’s Zamiin Uud city. 

Barloworld Mongolia was positioned as 18th of the "Top Company of Mongolia" in 2019 by the metrics of the Government of Mongolia and the Mongolian Chamber of Commerce and Industry in its contribution to the national economy, business development, and social responsibilities. We are one of the largest taxpayers in Mongolia. Barloworld Mongolia is an indisputable market leader, realizing the best business practices, introducing new technologies and NPI products and services in Mongolia.

Name: Trek Rental
Description:
Somos una Empresa líder en Arriendos mensuales de Camiones y Maquinarias con 20 años de trayectoria con cobertura en toda la Zona Norte y Centro del país, teniendo como principales clientes el sector de la Minería, Construcción y empresas Energéticas. Actualmente contamos con una flota de más de 800 equipos compuesta principalmente de equipos con una edad promedio de 3 años, y una amplia gama de categorías, tanto en Camiones como en Maquinarias equipados con el más alto nivel de seguridad, GPS, un completo estándar minero y sistema de telemetría de última generación lo que nos permite estar presentes en los principales conglomerados Mineros del país, como lo son Antofagasta Minerals, Divisiones de Codelco, Angloamerican, BHP Billiton, Xtrata Copper y Freeport-McMoRan, por nombrar algunos. 

Tenemos 5 talleres propios para asistencia técnica en Santiago, Copiapó, Antofagasta, Calama y Pozo Almonte con más de 150 mecánicos calificados lo que nos permite prestar atención técnica rápida y oportuna a todos nuestros clientes frente a cualquier eventualidad los 365 días del año.
Además, trabajamos en forma conjunta con las mejores marcas a nivel mundial, como lo son Mercedes Benz, Caterpillar, Komatsu, John Deere, Hamm, JCB y Mitsubishi Fuso, lo que nos permite garantizar a nuestros clientes la más alta productividad del Mercado. En su afán de seguir creciendo, la empresa ha apostado firmemente por la incorporación de nuevas categorías de productos para el arriendo y ventas de equipos usados, esto se logra gracias a la confianza depositada por los clientes, quienes manifiestan abiertamente que se sienten tranquilos confiando en una empresa como Trek Rental, en donde el servicio, la disponibilidad mecánica, y el convertirse en socios estratégicos de sus clientes, son de los atributos más destacados y valorados por nuestros usuarios.

Name: ARGO-HYTOS
Description:
The ARGO-HYTOS Group, held by the ARGO-HYTOS Group AG, is an innovative, medium-sized group of companies. With around 1,600 employees at six production sites in Germany, the Czech Republic, India, Poland and China, it develops and produces standard components and intelligent system solutions for fluid technology. 
The group operates several own sales companies in Europe, North and South America and Asia. The company has developed into one of the international market leaders, particularly in the field of mobile hydraulics. The ARGO-HYTOS Group AG is the operational management unit of the group.

Name: HD Hyundai Infracore
Description:
HD Hyundai Infracore was founded in 1937 as the first large-scale machine-manufacturing factory in Korea. Our product line-up includes construction equipment, engines, a variety of attachments, and utility equipment. HD Hyundai Infracore is a subsidiary of HD Hyundai.

Our construction equipment business manufactures and distributes excavators, wheel loaders, and articulated dump trucks that are widely used in various industrial job sites, such as construction, quarrying, and mining.

Opened in 1958, our engine business is Korea’s first diesel engine manufacturer and has continued to expand its business portfolio. It supplies diesel and gas engines for buses, trucks, construction equipment, power generators, ships, and various industrial equipment across the world. Based on its product line-up that meets increasingly stringent worldwide environmental regulations, our engine business is quickly emerging as the world’s top-tier engine manufacturer.

Name: AMOB
Description:
Tube, Pipe and Profile Bending Technology

More than 60 years of experience and one of the biggest ranges of specialised equipment for the tube, pipe and profile bending industry worldwide.

Founded in 1960 by António Martins Oliveira Barros (AMOB) and followed now by his son Manuel Barros and by their grandchildren Inês Barros and Manuel António Barros, AMOB has progressively become the world’s leading manufacturer of metalworking technologies, providing one of the biggest ranges of specialised equipment for the tube and pipe bending industry worldwide. We serve the global market with exceptional machinery and tooling for tube and pipe bending, section bending and swaging purposes – ranging from simple, 
AMOB designs, develops, retails and services a variety of products for a range of leading industrial industries including automobile and shipping, aeronautics and construction amongst others.

Our products are designed in our technical department by a team of highly-skilled engineers – we offer competitive solutions without compromising on quality. Over the years, AMOB has grown with our customers’ requirements and the market demand. We’re just as passionate about growing and developing our products as we are about our client relationships.

“One day I will have friends in the four corners of the world, friends that the others tend to call costumers” (António Martins de Oliveira Barros)

Name: Kitamura Machinery
Description: For over 90 years, Kitamura Machinery has created innovative machining centers that meet the strictest demands of manufacturers worldwide. With state-of-the-art manufacturing headquarters in Japan and offices in the USA and Germany, Kitamura combines the best practices from decades of hands-on experience, extreme personal attention to detail and the latest technology advances.  Kitamura's slogan being "Machining Challenges-Simplified" says it all as this is Kitamura's core philosophy and commitment to its clients.  Kitamura Machinery delivers on this commitment having created a line of horizontal, vertical and 5-axis machining centers that provide improved productivity through easy adaptability, reductions in defects, and accurate, reliable long-term performance. Kitamura has made customer service a priority since the very beginning and around the world, you can count on the most knowledgeable machining-center service and support as our total commitment to quality, performance and value.

Name: NEXAT
Description: NEXAT is the synergy of 50 years of development expertise and cutting-edge technology from market-leading agricultural machinery manufacturers. The result is NEXAT revolution: the world’s first and only holistic crop production system that can answer the challenges of the future in technical, economic and ecological terms; a milestone for the development of CO2-neutral agriculture in Germany, Europe and worldwide.

Name: DN Solutions Global
Description:
DN Solutions is a leading global manufacturer of high precision, high value CNC machine tools, software, and automation.


We've been building machines since 1976. With a sales network spanning 66 countries, we lead the way in smart manufacturing with our competitive 5-axis, multi-functional and hybrid machines.

With our own in-house software and R&D department, we ensure continuous innovation and smart technology. 

We also offer comprehensive automation solutions. Using our extensive experience to deliver the best results for our customers, we are pioneering the field of artificial intelligence and autonomous manufacturing. 

With climate change in mind, we're committed to developing environmentally friendly products and technologies, with a vision of achieving zero carbon emissions by 2050.

Name: ROSTA Group
Description:
Engineering Good Vibes – Worldwide.
ROSTA is the global leader in torsional rubber spring and vibration damping systems for industrial applications. Since 1944, we have been developing innovative, maintenance-free solutions for controlling vibration, oscillation, energy absorption, tensioning, and motion control – efficient, durable, and virtually silent.
With 120 experts around the globe, locations in Europe, North America, Asia, and Australia, and a strong international partner network, we are your go-to vibration specialist and multifunctional solution provider. We deliver tailor-made vibration solutions for OEMs, machine builders, and end-users – boosting productivity, enhancing operational safety, and reducing total cost of ownership. Our components are maintenance-free, noiseless, long-lasting, and versatile. Combined with custom-fit systems and worldwide service, we offer full-scope value.
ROSTA solutions are trusted across core industries such as mechanical and plant engineering, mining, recycling, e-mobility, agriculture, food & beverage, and material handling. With simulation technology, digital engineering (ROSTA Digital), and Swiss manufacturing excellence, we’re setting new standards for Industry 4.0.
 Productivity increased. Costs reduced.
 CH-5502 Hunzenschwil | www.rosta.com
#Rosta #TorsionalRubber #VibrationDamping #MotionControl #MaintenanceFree #SmartEngineering #Industry40 #ROSTADigital #ProductivityBoost #SwissManufacturing #OEMSolutions #SimulationEngineering #ElastomerTechnology #VibrationControl #MiningSolutions #RecyclingTechnology

Name: Niverplast
Description:
What can we do for you?
Niverplast develops innovative film packaging solutions to protect and transport a wide range of products. From bread and meat to semi-liquids and non-food. Our primary focus lies in packaging products that require bag in box enclosures. Specific knowledge of the internal logistical process is the pillar of most Niverplast solutions.

Who we are
We are Niverplast. A Dutch packaging company determined to find the best solution to your packaging problem. We are passionate experts that understand your business like no other. We think differently and are continuously developing ourselves and the products we deliver. 

Our passion
So yes, we’re in an industry that has its focus on automation, machinery and products. And yes, we do build the most durable, efficient and reliable machines. But we’re also a people’s business. Without our people, we would be nowhere. We want them to be happy, because we believe that happy people create happy customers. We guarantee you a 100% happiness with Niverplast as well and we won’t stop until you’re satisfied with your packaging solution.

Name: Air Separation Unit l Air Separation Plant l Oxygen Plant l Modular Nitrogen Plant l Argon Plant
Description: Founded in 2018, Hangzhou Lianghuan Technology Co., Ltd. is mainly engaged in developing and manufacturing major high-tech equipment in the areas of air separation unit ，oxygen plant and LNG plant.

Name: TRITON
Description:
Somos una empresa peruana distribuidora oficial de marcas líderes en maquinaría como Bobcat, Crown y Hyundai. Ofrecemos alquiler y venta de maquinaria pesada, servicio técnico y repuestos  para los sectores minero, de la construcción, logístico, industrial y portuario.

 Nuestros clientes confían en nosotros y es por eso que actualmente cuentan con más de 4000 equipos trabajando en las operaciones más exigentes del mercado, lo que nos hace sentir cada vez más orgullosos y comprometidos con su crecimiento.

 Estamos preparados para brindar la mayor cobertura de atención en todo el país, atendiendo las 24 horas del día, los 365 días del año.

Name: ANDRITZ Chile
Description:
ANDRITZ Group Company.
Santiago (Head Quarter), Concepción, and specialized workshops in Talcahuano and Colina, ANDRITZ Chile supplies technology, digitalization, products, and services for the following industries: mining, energy, desalination, pulp and paper, board, steel, environment (chemical industry, polluting processes, and water treatment plants), food (pelletizing, extrusion and beverages) and biomass.

Name: DEVELON Europe
Description: DEVELON is a brand of construction equipment with a focus on innovation and progress with a core ambition to relentlessly change the world with innovative products and solutions.

Name: Papé Group
Description:
Keeps You Moving

As a fourth-generation, family-owned business with more than 160 locations and 4,000 employee members, Papé serves the capital equipment needs of the construction, forestry, agriculture, warehousing, material handling, and trucking industries throughout the West.

Papé is dedicated to keeping your equipment running. We accomplish this through a single, shared mission of providing consistent, quality customer service—coupled with a giant network of resourceful operations throughout Alaska, Hawaii, California, Idaho, Montana, Nevada, Arizona, Oregon, and Washington. That's what makes each Papé operation unique and that's why you can count on Papé.

We're always on the lookout for strong talent, so please check our Careers page to see current openings: https://www.pape.com/careers/

Follow us here too!
TikTok - @pape.group
Instagram - @pape.group
Facebook - /papegroup
YouTube - @papegroup

Name: Bolzoni Group
Description:
Bolzoni is one of the worldwide leading manufacturers of lift truck attachments, forks and lift tables, with the most extensive product range in the market.
The Bolzoni Group has been active for almost seventyfive years in the design, production and distribution of lift truck attachments and industrial material handling equipments.
Today, the Bolzoni Group is present globally thanks to 19 direct branches with over 1.500 employees and independent dealers covering all continents, holding a leading position in lift truck attachments market.
The Group offers a wide range of products utilized in industrial material handling, in particular lift truck attachments, forks and lift tables.

Our History
BOLZONI
Founded in 1945 by Luigi and Livio Bolzoni for the production of agricultural machinery. In the early 50s BOLZONI entered the attachment world with a brick transportation system and subsequently, fork lift truck attachments became the core business. 
  
AURAMO
Founded in Finland by Hannu Auramo in 1947 originally as an engineering agency, AURAMO started manufacturing industrial cylinders and developing warehouse floor materials solutions. In the 60s AURAMO began producing a whole range of attachments for all industrial material handling applications, with specific focus on the forest products and the paper industry. Since 2001 AURAMO is a BOLZONI Group company.
 
MEYER
Founded in Germany by Hans H. Meyer in 1953, MEYER represents a long tradition in the lift truck attachment industry with an excellent brand image. Many attachments such as rotators, fork positioners, clamps and, in particular, the highly successful and greatly appreciated multiple pallet handler range, were initially invented and further developed by MEYER. Since 2006 MEYER is a Bolzoni Group company.

Name: CNH de México
Description:
La compañía es uno de los principales proveedores de tractores agrícolas en México. CNH de México fabrica, ensambla, comercializa y distribuye tractores e implementos para el sector agrícola. Así mismo, es importador exclusivo de todos los equipos y maquinaria agrícola de CNH incluyendo las marcas New Holland y Case IH, fabricante exclusivo en México de los tractores New Holland e importador exclusivo de los equipos y maquinaria de construcción de casi todas las marcas de CNH. 

Los productos fabricados por la compañía incluyen tractores de tracción sencilla y doble tracción con rangos de potencia de 50 a 120 caballos principalmente, equipo forrajero, empacadoras, equipo de arado, segadoras y otros productos. CNH de México distribuye sus productos a través de una extensa red de distribuidores con la más amplia cobertura nacional. La compañía también exporta a más de 25 países alrededor del mundo, incluyendo Estados Unidos, Canadá, Centro y Sudamérica, África y Asia. Su planta de producción está ubicada en Querétaro y tiene alrededor de 1,500 empleados.

CNH de México es una coinversión 50-50% de Grupo Quimmco y CNH Global, N.V. (subsidiaria del Grupo FIAT).

Name: Food Processing Technologies
Description:
Over the past decade, Kiron Food Processing Technologies (KFPT) has played a vital role in finding innovative solutions by representing and connecting the best food processing systems manufacturers from around the world to India's flourishing processed food Industry.

With our forte in broad-spectrum Engineering and Indigenous knowledge, we have set high standards in our core values of Global Technology, Project Engineering Capabilities, Simplified Solutions, prompt support, and after-sales service, thus maintaining a long-term association with our clients.

Our involvements cover a wide variety of Snacks, dairy products, Dried Fruits and Nuts, Fruits and Vegetables, Grains, Bakery and baked goods, candy and other Product Categories such as Powders, Frozen, etc.

We also deal with vibratory feeders and conveyors that are capable of conveying a wide range of particle sizes. Designed to be robust, either of an open or enclosed trough design. The trough-shaped structure is particularly suitable for conveyors in extreme environmental conditions, because of its easy cleaning ability, but also suitable in the chemical and food industries.

Based on our product knowledge, our sincere relationship with the industry and thanks to our in-house group of Engineers and Designers, we also carry out license manufacturing for global equipment manufacturers including Lindor, Intralox, etc., at our 85,000 sq. ft. state-of-the-art facility in Ahmedabad.

Headquartered in Mumbai and with our regional presence in Ahmadabad, Chennai, Kolhapur, New Delhi, and Pune, we also have a well-equipped testing facility for our customers to test and validate their products with our solutions.

For further information please do visit www.fptindia.com, and for specific inquiries do drop a message to sales@fptindia.com and we will be delighted to respond to you.

Please follow us on our - 

LinkedIn page : 
https://www.linkedin.com/company/981210/admin

Facebook page :
https://bit.ly/2BqRBPo

Name: MEKA Crushing & Screening and Concrete Batching Technologies
Description:
30 Years in the Aggregate and Concrete Production Industry
MEKA was established in Ankara in 1987 by a well-educated, visionary and enthusiastic team with the aim of providing professional engineering services and manufacturing quality construction machinery. 
Since its establishment, MEKA has been focusing on concrete batching plants and crushing and screening plants and has gained significant experience in these sectors. With the importance it attaches to R&D studies and the increase in its production capacity in the 2000s, MEKA has succeeded in becoming one of the first brands in its field on a global scale. 
MEKA, one of Europe's largest manufacturers in its field, offers customer needs identification, design and production of the most suitable facility, personnel training and after-sales services all over the world with the philosophy of unconditional customer satisfaction. 

MEKA in Ready-Mixed Concrete Production, Concrete Batching Plants and Equipment Production for Construction and Precast Industries

We have the ability and experience to design and manufacture concrete batching plants and equipment for any capacity and type of production. We are among the global leaders in this field with concrete batching plant expertise from the roots of the MEKA brand and more than 3000 active batching plants we have installed around the world. We have a wide range of mobile, stationary, compact, site type, RCC, precast concrete batching plants to meet the needs of the entire spectrum from the smallest construction site to the largest projects, from the ready-mixed concrete industry to the precast industry. 

MEKA in the production of crushing, screening and washing equipment for aggregate production, mining and recycling industries

We offer solutions that meet all the needs of aggregate producers, recycling plants, industrial mineral processing plant investors and various mines by designing and manufacturing complete, all-capacity feeders, crushers, screens and more..

Name: Bellmer
Description:
Bellmer is an international high-class technology supplier with two divisions: Paper Technology focused on paper & board machines and Separation Technology for water and sludge treatment. 
Bellmer’s mission is to be the customer's personal and flexible partner, a care-taker contributing to the customer's corporate success with innovative solutions. In both divisions sustainibility is playing a big role: the use of natural growing fibers and the cleaning of water serve our environment and at the same time leads to success, because Bellmer focuses on the future growth of bio economy. 

Paper Technology:
Our specialists design, customize and manufacture in Germany and Finland systems and upgrades for paper and board machines. We install complete production lines as well as single products from our TurboLine for perfect production of paper, board or specialty fiber products.

Separation Technology:
In 1972 our second division Bellmer Separation Technology was founded. Here, we focus on perfect separation of liquids and solids. Our products clean water, filter almost any liquid, press sludges to highest dryness or produce best quality food juices.


The family-owned company, founded 1842 in Germany, is worldwide installing high-class equipment in more than 60 industries. So, over the years the Bellmer group has been growing: Today there are 10 official Bellmer sites and service sites with more than 700 highly qualified specialist all over the world. 

Customer and employee orientation have the highest priority at Bellmer. Our corporate success is based on the know-how and committed cooperation of our employees. Specialized training concepts ensure a good basis for the individual employee development.

Take the opportunity to use our team spirit for your success:
https://www.bellmer.com/career/

Name: Romaco Tecpharm
Description:
With more than 30 years of experience in the pharmaceutical sector Romaco Tecpharm is today an innovation leader for perforated coating pan machines, designed to produce film coating of tablets or pellets, suitable in aqueous and organic coatings. Romaco Tecpharm's patented variable batch size Optima coater are setting new industry standards with its fully automatic batch size adjustment between 10%-100%.
Since March 2021 Tecpharm belongs to the Romaco Group

Name: Thermoplan AG
Description:
Thermoplan AG was founded by Esther and Domenic Steiner in 1974. Originally dedicated to the development and production of milk foaming and cream whipping machines for the food service and catering industry, Thermoplan had its crucial breakthrough with the Black&White coffee machine in the mid-1990s. The result is an innovative, sophisticated fully automatic coffee machine, which is unique due to its modular construction. This principle ensures maximum service friendliness and combines ease of use with the highest product quality. The advantages of this construction, as well as the high reliability are well known far beyond the Swiss borders. 

As another innovative world premiere, Thermoplan developed in 2007 as the first company a revolutionary milk system which prepares beside hot milk foam for cappuccino and latte macchiato, cold milk foam at the touch of a button. This innovative system is leading till today and is used in all Thermoplan Black&White coffee machines. 

Thermoplan is a “Swiss-made” operation and is rooted in Central Switzerland. Representing an export share of over 97%, Thermoplan is delivering its high quality products in more than 80 countries. About 530 employees are employed at the headquarters in Weggis (CH) and subsidiaries in Germany and the United States.

Name: McElroy Manufacturing, Inc.
Description:
McElroy began operations in 1954 as a two-person start-up in an Oklahoma garage. In the 1960s, McElroy became a forerunner in the Fintube Machinery market, with a strong presence continuing today. In 1969, McElroy designed its first Polyethylene Fusion Machine. That line has now expanded to the industry's most complete line of fusion equipment, used with a variety of thermoplastic pipe, from HDPE and Fusible PVC to Polypropylene-Random. 

McElroy has placed its stamp on the world as a leader in engineering and manufacturing. Throughout its history, there has been a strong emphasis on product development and continuous improvement to provide the customer with the most technologically advanced, rugged and durable fusion equipment on the market. This is why McElroy is known as the ‘The Leader by Design.’

Name: Forza JMalucelli
Description:
Desde a sua fundação em 1992, a Forza JMalucelli, pertencente ao Grupo JMalucelli, tem se comprometido a oferecer as melhores soluções do mercado aos seus clientes. Inicialmente, sob o nome de JMalucelli Equipamentos, a empresa consolidou sua posição no mercado como revendedora da marca CASE CE, atendendo aos clientes no Paraná. Desde 2013, a Forza JMalucelli tem expandido sua atuação para todos os estados do Sul do Brasil.

A partir de 2011, a empresa passou a ser distribuidora de Pneus Multimarcas, fortalecendo a área de peças da empresa. Em 2017, a Forza JMalucelli ampliou seu portfólio ao tornar-se revendedora da marca FPT, incluindo geradores e motores em sua oferta de produtos. Em 2018, a marca Case IH foi adicionada ao vasto portfólio da empresa, atendendo toda a região noroeste do estado do Paraná. A Forza JMalucelli tornou-se uma das poucas revendas do Brasil a representar ambas as marcas: CASE CE e Case IH.

Em busca de um crescimento constante, a empresa adquiriu dez concessionárias Case IH no estado do Rio Grande do Sul no início de 2021, ampliando sua atuação e visando atender às necessidades dos produtores rurais gaúchos. Nesse mesmo ano, a Forza JMalucelli uniu as marcas JMalucelli Equipamentos, JMalucelli Agromáquinas e Rental sob um único nome: Forza JMalucelli, fortalecendo sua identidade no mercado.

A partir de 2022, a Forza JMalucelli firmou uma parceria com a GTS do Brasil, ampliando ainda mais seu portfólio de marcas que oferecem qualidade e produtividade para seus clientes. Ao longo de seus 30 anos de história, a Forza JMalucelli tem mantido seu compromisso de oferecer máquinas e peças de qualidade, buscando sempre a excelência na prestação de serviços e atendendo às expectativas de seus clientes.

Name: ROQ
Description:
ROQ is a European industrial company with a vertically integrated structure, specializing in the design, manufacturing, and commercialization of advanced textile printing solutions for piece-by-piece production. With over 40 years of experience, ROQ has established itself as a global industry leader, exporting 85% of its machines to more than 80 countries and employing over 550 professionals.

Headquartered in Portugal, with offices in the United States and Brazil, ROQ operates through a worldwide network of partners, ensuring comprehensive distribution and dedicated post-sales support in all active markets. The company’s foundation is built on continuous innovation, engineering excellence, and a commitment to precision manufacturing, resulting in technologically advanced, reliable, and user-friendly printing solutions.

Serving both the fashion and promotional markets, ROQ offers a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance equipment, including screen printing, digital printing, hybrid printing, packaging solutions, and drying systems. Driven by a commitment to quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, ROQ continues to set new benchmarks in textile printing technology, providing integrated solutions that enhance productivity and performance worldwide.
Location: Oliveira de S. Mateus, Vila Nova de Famalicão

Name: BAUER Equipment Australia
Description:
Machinery and equipment from BAUER has been a byword for top performance and quality as well as for continuous innovation since the late 1960s. BAUER Maschinen GmbH designs and manufactures rotary drilling rigs, foundation cranes, diaphragm wall equipment and all related tools. The Bauer Group and its different branches offer a very versatile equipment portfolio for the special foundation, mining and exploration industry.

Our brands include BAUER, RTG, KLEMM, MAT, Obermann MAT, PRAKLA, EURODRILL, HAUSHERR, TracMec, NEORig and SPANTEC

Based in Sydney, BAUER Equipment Australia Pty Ltd was founded in 2010 and is a subsidiary of the BAUER Maschinen GmbH. Together with the other companies of the BAUER Maschinen Group, we are able to provide the full range of specialist foundation engineering equipment.

Name: Kärcher South Africa
Description:
We offer cleaning systems, cleaning products and services for leisure, home, trade and industry with outstanding value for money. 

As leading innovators, we set standards in technology, service and design aimed at providing maximum benefit to our customers and meeting our customers' needs. Our innovations impress and inspire our customers.

Our product range includes high-pressure cleaners, vacuum cleaners, carpet cleaners, floor scrubbers,  steam cleaners.  Visit our web site for more details https://www.kaercher.com/za

Name: Cashman Equipment
Description: Cashman Equipment was acquired by Empire Cat in December 2022. This page is no longer active. Follow Empire Cat at https://www.linkedin.com/company/empire-southwest/

Name: Binks
Description: At Binks, we are experts in material application—designing industry-leading products that move, meter, mix, spray, and dispense a wide range of paints, powder, sealants, and adhesives. You’ll find our commitment to customer service is unwavering and our approach to quality, precision and efficiency is unmatched.

Name: Baumer hhs GmbH
Description:
Baumer hhs – 
Your competent partner 
Baumer hhs, based in Krefeld, Germany, is your worldwide partner for reliable and innovative glue application and quality assurance systems. 
For us, quality and precision are basic principles of engineering and manufacturing, and professional services are an integral part of our products. We maintain a constructive and collaborative dialogue with our customers and suppliers, which forms the basis for solutions that optimally meet their individual needs.
Our trained sales staff and technicians support you with any issues you encounter in production. The Baumer hhs solution centre in Krefeld offers you assistance with new applications and in selecting the right adhesives. 
We want our customers to be excited – with our premium products and our impeccable all-round service. 
But it’s best to see our products for yourself! 
Just call or send us an e-mail. 
We’d be happy to help you with your next project!

Name: Glaston Corporation
Description:
Glaston is the glass processing industry’s innovative technology leader supplying equipment, services and solutions to the architectural, automotive, solar and display industries. The company also supports the development of new technologies integrating intelligence to glass.  

Glaston is committed to providing its clients with both the best know-how and the latest technologies in glass processing, with the purpose of building a better tomorrow through safer, smarter, and more energy efficient glass solutions. Glaston operates globally with manufacturing, services and sales offices in 10 countries and its shares (GLA1V) are listed on NASDAQ Helsinki Ltd.

Name: USNR
Description:
USNR is the world’s largest, most comprehensive supplier of equipment and technologies for the wood processing industry. Our systems produce dimensional lumber, plywood and panels, finger-jointed components and engineered wood products. We supply systems, service and support for plants around the globe including the United States, Canada, Sweden, Finland, Norway, Germany, the United Kingdom, Chile, Japan, Australia, New Zealand, and many other countries.

When customers buy equipment from USNR they have much more than one product line to choose from. Our extensive family of brands now includes Söderhamn Eriksson, and our team offers the expertise and experience of hundreds of talented individuals the world over. Our customers can access the broadest range of locally-supported systems that will serve them for decades.

Name: Minas Verde  John Deere
Description:
Quem Somos
Concessionário Autorizado John Deere na região Sul e Sudoeste de Minas Gerais.

A Minas Verde traz toda a tradição e confiança de uma empresa que há quinze anos oferece soluções integradas ao agronegócio através de produtos e serviços que geram valor e proporciona melhores resultados aos agricultores e pecuaristas.

Atualmente contamos com 9 concessionários John Deere estrategicamente distribuídas com o objetivo de proporcionar uma experiência memorável, atendimento personalizado e entrega de valor.

Junto à John Deere trabalhamos com o conceito de Sistemas Mecanizados onde a escolha adequada de Tratores, Plantadeiras, Pulverizadores, Colhedoras e Colheitadeiras resultam em confiabilidade e maior produtividade, proporcionando economia e melhores resultados aos clientes. 

Assumimos nosso papel com seriedade e comprometimento, com a certeza de que fazemos parte do agronegócio em constante evolução, recomendando e acompanhando o correto uso dos equipamentos, com o objetivo de assegurar seu máximo desempenho, proporcionando resultados e a plena satisfação de nossos clientes.

O atendimento Pós-Venda é realizado em nossas oficinas ou no campo. Nossos técnicos são profissionais capacitados e treinados pela própria fábrica e estão preparados para atender os produtores rurais. Possuímos também em nossas lojas, um estoque de peças originais, além de contar com o estoque John Deere, maior estoque de peças da América Latina, que irão manter a qualidade John Deere dos equipamentos.

MINAS VERDE JOHN DEERE SEMPRE AO SEU LADO!

Name: HoseXperts
Description:
We are a family owned company incorporated in 1979, present in India with Head office in Delhi. With

the intent of being a one stop solution for it’s customers for all their hose requirements, Team

Hosexperts laid it’s foundation on Honesty, Transparency, Quality Assurance & Customer Service. Since

then, we have enhanced and upgraded ourselves from basic to develop neck and neck.

Hosexperts Group is one of India's leading distributor of hoses & fluid components with it's logistic

center located in Delhi. We secure fast & reliable deliveries. Our branch has a locally adapted stock to

service our own market & complete equipment to assemble hose & fittings. For the preeminent

assistance, we offer our services to diverse diligences which encompass: Food, Pharma, Steel, Printing,

Transport, Construction, Mining & many more.

Our Business Concept

Team Hosexperts shall provide assembly, distribution of hose & fluid components from a centralized &

customer oriented organization. Our vision is to be the market leader, the customer's first choice

supplier of hoses & fluid components. We will retain market leadership by constantly developing &

offering solutions within hoses, hose couplings & fittings & associated services to meet the market's

increasing demands for environmental friendliness, sustainability, efficiency & profitability.

Team Hosexperts does not only add value for themselves but they look to contribute to the personal &

the organizational growth of its customers by strictly adhering to the principles it laid it’s foundation on.

Our Strategy

It is to build long lasting & strong relationships with our customers. Our product & services will meet or

exceed customer requirements for product features, delivery reliability & economy.

Browse our website and get tangled with the diverse range of products that our company offers to you.

Name: TechnoAlpin
Description:
TechnoAlpin has been designing and building turnkey snowmaking systems for ski resorts all over the world since 1990. The company’s passion for snow and its enthusiasm for innovative solutions have made it the world’s leading supplier. The top priority of the company is to find the ideal solution for each individual customer. Every system is designed with painstaking attention to detail and is tailored to the customer’s specific needs. The product range is constantly growing, with a view to producing top-quality snow and maximizing energy efficiency. In addition to turnkey outdoor solutions, TechnoAlpin also offers various options for indoor snowmaking, opening doors for unique adventures in the snow all over the world. 
Over 2,400 customers in over 50 countries in the world trust in the know-how of TechnoAlpin. Over 700 employees at 16 sites represent the company at the local level.

Name: Gorman-Rupp Pumps
Description:
Gorman-Rupp has been at the forefront of manufacturing high-performance, high-quality pumps and pumping systems that provide lasting service across various industries for more than nine decades. From municipal, water, wastewater, and sewage sectors to industrial, construction, petroleum, fire, and OEM markets, our robust solutions have been trusted by customers worldwide.

 Global Impact:
With a global presence, we proudly serve customers worldwide, offering a comprehensive range of pump models, including self-priming centrifugal, standard centrifugal, submersible, rotary gear, and diaphragm pumps. 

 Our Mission Continues:
As we continue to provide cutting-edge pumps and pumping systems, we remain dedicated to upholding the original philosophy that founded our company: INNOVATION, IMPROVEMENT, AND SUPERIOR PRODUCTS. Our unwavering commitment to engineering excellence with the highest quality stands and continuous improvement has earned us recognition as an industry leader.

 Sustainability and Responsibility:
At Gorman-Rupp, we understand the importance of sustainability and environmental responsibility. Our pumps are designed with energy efficiency in mind, contributing to reducing the environmental impact of fluid handling operations. We are proud to play a role in shaping a greener and more sustainable future.

Name: ETEC
Description:
ETEC is a leading global provider of professional-grade 3D printing solutions.

As the original inventor of digital light processing (DLP) 3D printing technology, ETEC has one of the most advanced portfolios of precision polymer printers and materials in the market today. 

Supported by more than 140 issued and pending patents, ETEC also has more than 190 qualified materials for its platforms. In all thousands of customers across a broad range of industries, including automotive, aerospace, medical devices, and jewelry have relied on ETEC solutions for more than two decades. The company’s solutions are used for prototypes, tooling and low-volume to mass production.

Name: Manitou in India
Description:
Welcome to the official Manitou in India page!

This is the only dedicated #Manitou page for #India, follow our page for: 
  New products, services and spare parts
  Professional applications of our handling solutions
  Your local news
 National and local events 
 
You can also discover our page @Manitou Across the World dedicated to sharing the latest #Manitou news and challenges from all around the globe

Name: Zoomlion Colombia
Description:
Somos ZOOMLION, una de las empresas chinas en fabricación de maquinaria pesada, más grandes del mundo.

Atendemos los sectores de la construcción, minería y agricultura, u otros que requieran de maquinaria de elevación y carga, movimiento de tierras, concreto, y mucho más!

Contamos con 30 años de experiencia en desarrollo e innovación de maquinaria, estamos presentes en más de 21 países, 15 centros de servicios, 9 bases (fuera de China) y 200 distribuidoras alrededor del mundo.

Ahora en Colombia!

Name: Mantrac Kenya
Description:
Mantrac Kenya is the authorised dealer representative in Kenya for the full range of Caterpillar, SEM and Perkins products. We are proud to supply the best equipment to the most demanding industries and to keep your equipment running at peak productivity.

Mantrac Kenya is not only a supplier, but a solution provider. We offer integrated business solutions backed by technical expertise and local knowledge.

E-mail: contactus@mantrackenya.com

Name: Gansons
Description:
The Gansons Group companies focus on the manufacture and distribution of a wide range of process equipment. The Group holds a leading position offering both standard and custom-manufactured equipment and support services for industries including:

    Pharmaceuticals
    Foods
    Agrochemicals
    Mineral Processing
    Petrochemicals
    Energy

The Gansons Group employs over 400 people across the following companies:

    Gansons Private Limited
    Gansons Engineers Private Limited
    Minerals Process Equipment Private Limited
    Gansons Marketing Private Limited
    West View Innovation Services Private Limited

Gansons has multiple facilities across India with headquarters in Thane (near Mumbai). In addition, we have offices in Mumbai, New Delhi, and Chennai. We have manufacturing facilities in Thane, Digha, and two in Nashik with combined floor space of 200,000+ sq.ft. We also have a network of sales agents globally to sell and support our international clients.

Name: OPTORG
Description:
MÉTIERS

DISTRIBUTION AUTOMOBILE
Le groupe Optorg offre via ses filiales des solutions de transport pour tous les publics, professionnels et particuliers :

pour les professionnels du transport : distribution de camions et bus, assortie d’un service d’accompagnement professionnel (maintenance, formation…)
pour les clients particuliers et les entreprises locales : distribution de véhicules particuliers (berlines, 4×4, SUV…) accompagnée d’un service aux standards internationaux (garantie, SAV…)
pour les grands groupes et ONG : vente directe de véhicules de toutes marques, avec possibilité d’adaptation à la carte (ambulances, véhicules miniers, etc.)

ÉQUIPEMENT DE CHANTIERS
Le groupe accompagne les opérateurs dans l’équipement de leurs chantiers avec une offre de matériels incluant équipement spécialisé (construction, mines, forêt), poids lourds, groupes électrogènes et centrales électriques. Le groupe offre un service intégré (de l’étude de chantier au SAV en passant par le conseil en financement) et personnalisé (intervention sur site, adaptation de véhicules sur-mesure…), particulièrement adapté aux besoins des clients Grands comptes, notamment dans les secteurs de la construction, des mines et du Oil&Gas.

Name: Pradman Group
Description:
Pradman group is a professionally run organization that provides technical sales and services in heavy engineering equipment in India and S E Asia.

Established in 1969 by Mr. Pradip Bhatia, the organization has been deeply involved with the iron and steel industry, forging industry and the power transmission industry within the country.

The company initially started as a sales representation organization, representing companies from Russia in the forging industry and has since expanded with representation of organizations from USA, Germany, UK, Italy and Spain.

Over the years the company has evolved to add on support services like :
Installation and Commission Services
After Sales Support Services
Customer Maintenance Contracts
Warehousing and Spare Parts Supplies
Manufacturing to Support Project and Spare Parts Requirements
Pradman has a strong tradition of customer support and service that is the essence of the organization. Pradman works with the customer from the project concept and development stage, through the selection of equipment, purchasing, supply and up to the installation and commissioning of the equipment at the customer site. Once the plant is commissioned, Pradman continues to support the customer through after sales service support and warehousing of critical parts in complete coordination of the OEM.

Being a family owned business, Pradman has a strong tradition and reputation of socially responsible behavior and conduct in all aspects of our business. Pradman is focused on growing the capabilities, skills and respect of all the people that work within and external to the organization.

Pradman Group

Name: Pall - Energy+
Description: Pall Corporation is a global leader in filtration, separation and purification. Pall’s innovative solutions are widely used across a broad spectrum of industries, including oil and gas, chemicals, power, automotive and general industrial. Pall’s solutions help customers ensure their final products are purer and processes are more efficient and safe, while protecting critical assets that maximize production output. To learn more about Pall, please visit us at http://www.pall.com.

Name: Royal Kaak
Description: Kaak has been gaining knowledge and experience in the field of bakery technology since 1846, ranging from stand-alone machines to an integrated approach for complex and automated bakery lines. Every day, we use the expertise we have built up over the years to ensure that your expectations are met and exceeded - from silo to truck.

Name: Rollomatic SA
Description:
Rollomatic is a private Swiss company specializing in the design and manufacturing of high precision CNC machines for production grinding of cutting tools, cylindrical grinding, and laser cutting of ultra-hard materials. 

We are customer-oriented and we provide complete manufacturing solutions for the grinding of precision tools and parts, including wheel dressing and measuring finished parts. 

Our manufacturing methods and our precision assembly are based on our passion for Swiss engineering and craftsmanship. Our philosophy is demonstrated by our teams in all stages over the life of the products, from design, through assembly and Lean Manufacturing, and all the way to service and client advice and support. We strive to build a relationship of trust and cordiality with our customers in a spirit of partnership.

Our 12,000 m² production site located in Landeron incorporates ultra-modern manufacturing equipment and technology. Sustainable development is part of our values— photovoltaic panels cover all of our buildings and produce 50% of our own energy consumption.

Name: Watson-Marlow Andina
Description:
Watson-Marlow Fluid Technology Solutions (WMFTS) es el líder mundial en bombas peristálticas y tecnologías asociadas de paso de fluido para la industria medioambiental, alimentaria, farmacéutica y química. Está formado por diez marcas consolidadas, cada una de ellas con su propia especialidad, que en conjunto ofrecen a nuestros clientes soluciones inigualables para sus aplicaciones de bombeo y transferencia de fluidos.

Visite nuestra página web para mayor información

We’re Watson-Marlow Fluid Technology Solutions - part of Spirax Group, a FTSE 100 Company.
Location: Cali, Valle del Cauca,, Valle de Cauca

Name: AriensCo
Description:
Headquartered in Brillion, Wisconsin, AriensCo is a family-owned manufacturer of outdoor power equipment for both consumer and commercial markets. Established in 1933 by Henry Ariens, the company manufactures equipment under the Ariens, Gravely, and AS-Motor brand names. Its RapidCare division provides service and support to dealers with parts, a call center and trained field service technicians.It started Henry’s Parts & Equipment in 2023, a will-fit aftermarket parts business. AriensCo Hospitality began in 2020 with two luxury event venues, Stone Prairie and Round Lake Farms. It opened Ariens Nordic Center in December 2022. These venues are part of the mission to create reasons to visit the Brillion community.
 
Visit www.ariensco.com to learn more about AriensCo's history and brands. 
 
About Ariens
Ariens is the original brand of AriensCo, based in Brillion, Wisconsin. Ariens is known as The King of Snow, a title earned for its Sno-Thro lineup. With more than 4 million produced since 1960, Ariens is the #1 selling brand of two-stage snow blowers in the world. Ariens machines are often passed down from one generation to the next due to their durability and reliability. The brand also features a full line of zero-turn and walk-behind lawn mowers available at dealers and retailers. For more information, visit www.ariens.com.
 
About Gravely
Gravely features a full line of commercial zero-turn lawn mowers and job site equipment available at dealers nationally. Designed for exceptional comfort and made with rock-solid dependability, Gravely is Built to Mow the Distance and has helped shape the American landscape for more than 100 years. For more information, visit www.gravely.com.

Name: Kurt Manufacturing
Description:
At Kurt, we are more than manufacturers. We are owners who make a difference. Driven by a deep-rooted responsibility to deliver the unexpected. To do what it takes to answer your demands at the highest level. Every time.

If there’s a time to rest on our laurels, we don’t know it. Because we’re not here to do what’s been done, or to just meet industry standards. We’re here to elevate them to our own. Constantly innovating and improving. Revising and redefining. Never settling for good enough. Because when we do our job right, you won’t have to worry about yours.

We do this through processes that lead to incredible precision. Passion that leads to profound pride. And quality products that lead to unbreakable loyalty. This is the difference we bring to work every day. This is Kurt Manufacturing.

Name: ExOne
Description:
ExOne provides sand 3D printing systems and services utilizing binder jetting technology for manufacturers in multiple industries around the world. Our sand 3D printing systems enable the production of complex cores and molds for sandcastings for use cases from prototyping to serial production.

ExOne was unified with voxeljet under ExOne Global Holdings, a portfolio company of Anzu Partners, operating with a global footprint across China, Japan, India, the United States, and Germany.

Name: LANG Technik GmbH
Description:
LANG Technik, a family-owned company from Stuttgart/ Germany, is regarded as one of the world-wide technology leaders in the field of cnc workholding and automation. For more than 40 years LANG Technik has developed innovative and patented solutions which help customers optimize their manufacturing processes and exploit available resources ideally. Core strengths of LANG are the automatization of machine tools, set-up time reduction and a second to none clamping technology for 5-face machining.  Customers of all company sizes from industries such as (Medical) Engineering, Aerospace, Automotive/Motorsports, Power Generation trust LANG’s vast experience in metal cutting and cnc manufacturing.

https://lang-technik.de/en/solutions/workholding
https://lang-technik.de/en/solutions/workholding/5-axis-vise
https://lang-technik.de/en/solutions/workholding/round-parts-contours

Name: Kobelco Construction Machinery Australia
Description: Kobelco Construction Machinery Australia is a 100% owned subsidiary of Kobelco and Kobe Steel.  It is the  importer and distributor of Kobelco mini and heavy excavators for the markets in Australia, New Zealand, New Caledonia and Papua New Guinea.

Name: CST Industries, Inc.
Description:
CST Industries, Inc. (CST), is the complete storage system provider for engineering and manufacturing professionals in thousands of different industries and applications throughout the world.

The company is the global leader in the manufacture and construction of factory coated metal storage tanks, aluminum domes and specialty covers. 

CST's existing company portfolio consists of CST Storage, CST Covers and Vulcan Tanks. Five manufacturing facilities and technical design centers and multiple regional sales offices are located throughout North America and the United Kingdom.

International offices are located in Argentina, Australia, India, Japan, Mexico, Panama, Singapore, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates and Vietnam. Currently, more than 375,000 storage tanks and 20,000 covers have been installed in 125 countries throughout the world.

Name: Agromax New Holland
Description: A Agromax, atua desde o ano de 2009, escrevendo uma história de trabalho e sucesso no mercado do agronegócio do estado do Pará. Estamos entre as mais importantes concessionárias de máquinas agrícolas no Norte do País, com três lojas estrategicamente posicionadas nas cidades de Ananindeua, Paragominas e Santarém. Somos uma concessionária autorizada New Holland e temos certificação Premium no Programa Dealer Standard da marca, pois atendemos aos principais critérios de padronização, atendimento ao cliente e qualidade no serviço em todos os setores da concessionária.

Name: Liebherr Gear Technology and Automation Systems
Description:
Welcome to the Liebherr Gear Technology and Automation Systems page! Liebherr is a family-run technology company with a broadly diversified product programme. The company is not only one of the biggest construction equipment manufacturers in the world, but also offers high-quality, user-oriented products and services in many other areas.

The company was founded in 1949: Hans Liebherr’s unerring sense for promising technologies and new markets, his visionary ideas and his genuine passion were vital for the Group’s continuous growth from the beginning and over the course of decades. Today, the Group comprises more than 140 companies on all continents and employs nearly 50,000 staff worldwide. They all are unified by their fascination for technology and exciting products, as well as the determination to achieve great things for their customers and to shape the technological progress in numerous industries.

Liebherr is represented in the areas of gear technology and automation systems. With more than six decades of experience, Liebherr is one of the world's leading manufacturers of gear cutting machines, gear measuring devices, gear cutting tools and automation systems. The activities of the Gear Technology and Automation Systems division are coordinated by Liebherr-Verzahntechnik GmbH in Kempten (Germany).

Imprint: https://www.liebherr.com/en-de/group/disclaimer/imprint-3705178 
Privacy Policy: https://www.liebherr.com/en-de/group/disclaimer/imprint-3705178#tab_privacy_policy_3

Name: SPECTRO Analytical Instruments GmbH
Description:
SPECTRO, a business of AMETEK, Inc., manufactures advanced instruments, develops the best solutions for elemental analysis in a broad range of applications, and provides exemplary customer service.

SPECTRO's products are known for their superior technical capabilities that deliver measurable benefits to the customer. From its foundation in 1979 until today, more than 50,000 analytical instruments have been delivered to customers around the world.

AMETEK, Inc. is a leading global provider of industrial technology solutions serving a diverse set of attractive niche markets.

Name: SYSADVANCE
Description:
SYSADVANCE is a technology company founded in 2002.

Today we develop and manufacture on-site gas generators and gas purifiers, as well as integrated solutions for compressed air and technical gases.

SYSADVANCE product portfolio is comprised of Nitrogen Generators, Oxygen Generators, including Medical Oxygen 93 and VSA Oxygen Generators, solutions for purification of biogas, Helium, Hydrogen and SF6, as well as a wide range of "turn-key" customized engineered solutions.

SYSADVANCE successful projects are the reflection of the quality and dedication of our highly specialized human resources.

Today, SYSADVANCE offers solutions for several industries and sectors such as: chemical and pharmaceutical, electronic components, metal works, aquaculture, water treatment, engineering, automotive, food, wine, aviation, marine, energy, medical, oil and gas, among others.

SYSADVANCE is present today in more than 40 countries, rendering a solid growth as result of a strategy oriented for creating value to our clients, based on superior technology, quality and reliability of our products, as well as continuous innovation.

Name: Fabick Cat
Description:
As the exclusive Cat dealer throughout major portions of Missouri, Illinois, the entire state of Wisconsin and the Upper Peninsula of Michigan, Fabick Cat is one company with a broad range of capabilities designed around serving the diverse requirements of our customers. Understanding your needs and providing value-based equipment, technology and service solutions that will contribute to your long-term success is at the core of all we do. We have the resources to stand behind our promises and keep you up and running 24/7/365. 

Today, there are more than 1,200 employees including members of the Fabick family’s third, fourth and fifth generations, working together under the active leadership of Jeré Fabick, as Chairman, CEO and Dealer Principal, along with John Fabick IV serving as President.

What makes Fabick Cat so unique? It's not only its size, but its outstanding people, support, and facilities bound together by the single concept of total service capability for the equipment owner and always living by our motto, “To Ever Serve Our Customers Better.”

Name: PÖTTINGER Landtechnik GmbH
Description: PÖTTINGER has become one of the most respected agricultural machinery manufacturers in the world since the company was established in 1871. The comprehensive range features hay making machines (mowers, tedders, windrowers), round balers, self-loading harvest and silage wagons plus soil cultivation equipment (ploughs, power harrows, stubble cultivators and seed drills). Ongoing internationalisation is one of the cornerstones of success at Pöttinger. An export quota of nearly 90 percent speaks for itself. Reliable machines that deliver excellent working results with a high level of precision are the focus of the developments. https://www.poettinger.at/en_in/Home/Impressum

Name: Netstal
Description:
Cultivating values, creating value | 

Netstal stands for globally leading high-performance injection molding technology. The Netstal brand goes back to our founding site of the same name in the canton of Glarus, Switzerland. We employ over 500 people at our headquarters with production plant in Näfels and in our subsidiaries.

We offer manufacturing companies in the packaging industry, beverage industry and medical technology high-performance machines which work extremely efficiently, with absolute precision and maximum reliability. We are continuously developing these solutions and deliberately incorporating innovative technologies. Because we feel jointly responsible for ensuring that our customers produce efficiently and sustainably. That is why we are driving the development of digitalization and the circular economy with our expertise and experience. We have focused our portfolio on performance, precision, and quality. Customers can find Elios and Elion series injection molding machines with clamping forces between 800 and 10,000 kN, the PET-Line preform system for up to 192 cavities, and turnkey system solutions from a single source. Our quality management is certified according to ISO 9001 and our accredited calibration laboratory meets the requirements of ISO/IEC 17025:2017.

Netstal became part of the Krones Group in 2024.

Name: Quinn Company
Description:
Quinn Company sells, rents and services a full line of new and used Cat construction, landscape, industrial, and agricultural equipment.

Quinn Power Systems is your single source for continuous power. We provide sales, parts, service and rentals for a wide range of products.

Quinn Rental Services offers a full range of Cat and other name brand equipment and specialized tools to meet all of your job site needs.

Quinn Lift is a full service lift truck dealer for all of your material handling needs. We provide sales, parts, service, and rentals for a variety of top brands.

Quinn’s operations span fifteen counties throughout Central and Southern California, including a portion of Arizona, covering over 70,000 square miles and representing 45% of the State of California.

The Company serves its customers through a dedicated employee population of more than 1,200 based out of 22 locations.

Name: HUBER
Description:
HUBER is a globally operating company with over 1,600 employees, of which around 900 work at the headquarters in Berching (Germany). HUBER specializes in high-quality and innovative stainless steel machinery, plants and equipment for municipal and industrial water, wastewater and sludge treatment. With more than 55,000 plants installed, HUBER is one of the most important international companies and contributes to solving the world's water problems with adapted processes.

Based on decades of experience in designing and equipping wastewater treatment plants, HUBER is your competent partner for the implementation of centralized, semi-centralized and decentralized concepts for wastewater treatment.

In close cooperation with its own subsidiaries, offices and sales partners in around 60 countries, HUBER supports its customers with innovative technologies and comprehensive know-how in solving their tasks in the various fields of water and sludge treatment. In this context, HUBER offers its customers a Global Service that ensures smooth and reliable operation of the plants worldwide with the local HUBER sites.

Sustainability in water use is a special concern for HUBER and is reflected in various HUBER Solutions of wastewater reuse and nutrient and energy recovery from wastewater and sludge. We offer extensive range of stainless steel equipment for drinking water supply and wastewater structures. 


Imprint: https://www.huber.de/imprint/editor.html
Privacy policy: https://www.huber-se.com/privacy-policy/
Privacy Policy for LinkedIn: https://www.huber.de/imprint/privacy-policy-huber-se-at-linkedin.html

Name: Kärcher UK
Description: Established in 1935, Kärcher is a well-respected and trusted, family-owned world leader in the design and manufacture of cleaning equipment and chemicals for domestic, professional and industrial applications.
