Our products utilise innovative technologies to deliver exceptional cleaning performance in every application.

Name: WOLFFKRAN
Description:
WOLFFKRAN. The name stands for experience and competence in the design, construction and use of tower cranes. With its innovative technology and know-how, the company has significantly contributed to the rapid developments in the field of material handling to date.

Around 870 dedicated employees around the world ensure that the innovation process continues and that the WOLFF brand stands for a comprehensive range of trolley jib and luffing jib tower cranes. The red WOLFF cranes are manufactured in the main plant in Heilbronn and Luckau (both in Germany). Branch offices across Germany and subsidiaries in Austria, France, Belgium, Norway, Switzerland, Great Britain, Czechia, the USA, the United Arab Emirates and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia guarantee intensive customer care.

With a rental fleet of approx. 800 tower cranes WOLFFKRAN is among the major providers in this area of business. This underscores the flexibility and dynamics of the tower crane specialist serving customers worldwide as both manufacturer and service provider.

Imprint: https://www.wolffkran.com/imprint
Privacy: https://www.wolffkran.com/privacy

Name: HUBER Technology US
Description:
HUBER Technology, LLC., the U.S. subsidiary of HUBER SE, specializes in high-quality and innovative stainless steel machinery, plants, and equipment for municipal and industrial water, wastewater, and sludge treatment. With over 55,000 installations worldwide, HUBER is a global leader contributing to solving the world’s water challenges through advanced and sustainable processes.
Leveraging decades of experience in designing and equipping wastewater treatment plants, HUBER provides expert solutions for centralized, semi-centralized, and decentralized wastewater treatment systems. For the U.S. market we are headquartered in Denver, NC, where we collaborate closely with our representatives and partners, and offer innovative technologies and comprehensive expertise to address diverse water and sludge treatment needs.
With HUBER SE’s tradition of excellence to Service, HUBER Technology, Inc. has our dedicated team that delivers local support ensuring smooth and reliable operation.
HUBER’s commitment to sustainability is at the core of everything we do. Our solutions focus on wastewater reuse, nutrient recovery, and energy recovery, ensuring responsible water resource management. In addition, we also provide an extensive range of stainless-steel equipment for drinking water supply and wastewater infrastructure that protect critical infrastructure from extreme weather events, especially flooding.

Name: INTERPUMP HYDRAULICS SPA
Description:
Interpump Group is the largest manufacturer of Water Jetting and one of the main suppliers in Hydraulics.
Interpump Hydraulics is one of the main worlwide manufacterer of power take off's, pumps, cylinders, hoses, fittings and components. Interpump Hydraulics is effectively a one-stop platform in the market of automotive, agriculture, ecological, construction building, mining and oil.

Name: Parason Machinery
Description:
Parason Machinery is one of the largest manufacturers and suppliers of pulp and paper machinery globally. Renowned scientist and metallurgist Dr. Desarda serves as the Founder and Chairman of the Company. Parason initiated its first research unit for pulp and paper machinery in the year 1977.

Focused on Research and Development, Parason has conducted numerous studies demonstrating that its latest technology not only enhances paper quality but also significantly reduces power consumption, a crucial factor for profitability in the paper industry. Parason's offerings are widely utilized by Kraft, Tissue, Writing Printing, and Hard Board Paper Mills. Additionally, Parason specializes in Refiner Discs, recognized as some of the best discs available for paper mills worldwide. Parason manufactures various products applicable to numerous operations in stock preparation.
 
With global consultancy services, Parason supports organizations in establishing new paper mills and aids existing ones in reaching higher objectives. Furthermore, Parason has international consultants stationed in Germany, Europe, and the USA.
 
With a worldwide clientele, Parason holds a dominant market share in Germany, the USA, France, Thailand, Italy, Brazil, Spain, Portugal, the Philippines, Indonesia, and Bangladesh, serving more than 60 countries globally. Parason has successfully completed numerous installations for paper mills ranging from 25TPD to 400TPD.

Name: Garaventa AG
Description:
Garaventa AG is a Swiss company with headquarters in Rotkreuz and branches in Goldau, Uetendorf and Sion. The company is the Swiss part of the Doppelmayr Group and has established itself as a centre of competence with an international reputation for aerial tramways, funicular railways, material ropeways and demanding rope hoist work. Garaventa is responsible for all ropeway projects of the Doppelmayr Group in Switzerland. All functions and competences for the special ropeways are made available to the Group worldwide from Switzerland. Garaventa employs around 400 people in Switzerland. 

Garaventa opens doors for performance-orientated, well-trained specialists who are looking for a future-oriented working environment. Discover your career opportunities with us: www.garaventa.com/karriere

Name: Raumak Packaging
Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Air-Conditioning Europe
Description:
Welcome to Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Air Conditioning Europe Ltd (MHIAE), a company created by MHI for all HVAC solutions across Europe. 

MHIAE offers high-efficiency systems for cooling and heating air and water in residential, commercial and industrial applications. As a reputable engineering company with vast expertise and experience, we are fully equipped to meet all your HVAC needs. From homes to hotels, small shops to warehouses, we can help you find the perfect system.   

Our range of high performance, energy-efficient solutions enable specific needs to be met in a number of ways. Whether it’s for a large corporation with a green initiative, or for a small business looking to keep costs down, we pride ourselves on offering solutions suited to any application. 

Our vast network of European distributors is supported by our main warehouse in Rotterdam, which houses our stock of MHI units and spare parts. All of our distributors house experienced service teams and qualified field engineers to provide ongoing technical assistance for MHI systems.    

At MHIAE we understand that reliable, high-quality service is important to our customers, and that’s why our distributors are supported by dedicated MHIAE technical personnel to ensure the best possible service.

Name: Maddox Industrial Transformer
Description:
Maddox serves the commercial, industrial, utility, and renewables segments of the transformer market. We work with small operators, all the way up to the largest projects in the country. Our customers value speed, transparency, and an easy buying experience.

We sell, rent, repair and buy transformers.

With thousands of units in-stock and expedited production slots available, Maddox is dedicated to fast lead times and helping you get your project powered on as fast as possible. Our highly trained sales and customer service teams are dedicated to finding you the right transformer and delivering it to you at the right time.

We believe in not only providing a dependable product with outstanding customer service, but in conducting ourselves with character and integrity in all that we do.  We believe that strong relationships and a good reputation are our most important assets. 

Our experience has taught us that the best way to serve our customers is to deliberately concentrate our skills and expertise on a single line of products. From the very start, MIT was built with an exclusive focus on transformers and transformer-related equipment. We do one thing, and we do it very well.

We serve customers who value quick lead-times, extensive technical expertise, excellent customer service, and ease of doing business. Our customers are primarily industrial and commercial clients, contractors, and equipment dealers/distributors.

1-800-270-2011
sales@maddoxtransformer.com

Name: Surplex
Description:
Surplex has been one of Europe’s leading industrial auction houses for 25 years and trades worldwide in used machines and factory equipment. The 18-language auction platform Surplex.com has over 125,000 registered customers. The company is based in Düsseldorf and has offices in many European countries, including Spain, Italy, and CEE. More than 200 provide a full service in 20 languages.
Surplex became part of TBAuctions in August 2024, Europe’s leading multi-brand (Troostwijk Auctions, Klaravik, Auksjonen, PS Auction, British Medical Auctions, Vavato, and Auktionshuset dab), digital auction platform for B2B used goods. The TBAuctions group reach nearly 200 million annual site visits, sell over 1.6 million assets, receiving bids from 750k bidders in 175 countries, generating hammersales of more than €1.6 billion, and employing nearly 1,200 team members.

Name: A.T.I. BRASIL - Artigos Técnicos Industriais Ltda
Description:
Com uma sólida trajetória com mais de 24 anos no mercado brasileiro, a A.T.I. BRASIL é especializada em fornecer itens em transmissão de potência industrial. 

Nosso compromisso com a excelência e a inovação nos diferencia como líderes na distribuição de componentes mecânicos e representamos as principais marcas do mercado mundial. Alguns de nossos parceiros notáveis incluem BONFIGLIOLI, DONGHUA, ELESA+GANTER, ELTE, FESTO, GRUETZNER, ISB, METABO, OPTIBELT, REGINA, ROLLON, ROSTA, SATI, SBC, SKF e WERA.

Com sede e centro de distribuição principal em Curitiba-PR, a A.T.I. BRASIL ampliou sua estrutura com um novo centro de distribuição em Jundiaí-SP. Além disso, contamos com filiais estrategicamente localizadas nas principais regiões do Brasil: Belo Horizonte-MG, Chapecó-SC, Fortaleza-CE, Joinville-SC, Maringá-PR, Porto Alegre-RS e Serra-ES.

Para melhor atender às necessidades de nossos clientes, contamos não apenas com nossas lojas próprias, mas também com uma equipe dedicada de vendedores e representantes estrategicamente posicionados em todo o território nacional. Estamos comprometidos em fornecer soluções de transmissão de potência de alta qualidade e atendimento excepcional a empresas e profissionais em todo o Brasil.

Junte-se a nós na busca contínua por excelência em soluções de transmissão de potência industrial!

Name: Watson-Marlow Andina
Description:
Watson-Marlow Fluid Technology Solutions (WMFTS) es el líder mundial en bombas peristálticas y tecnologías asociadas de paso de fluido para la industria medioambiental, alimentaria, farmacéutica y química. Está formado por diez marcas consolidadas, cada una de ellas con su propia especialidad, que en conjunto ofrecen a nuestros clientes soluciones inigualables para sus aplicaciones de bombeo y transferencia de fluidos.

Visite nuestra página web para mayor información

We’re Watson-Marlow Fluid Technology Solutions - part of Spirax Group, a FTSE 100 Company.
Location: Cali, Valle del Cauca,, Valle de Cauca

Name: Neemba Mauritanie
Description:
Représentant Caterpillar en Mauritanie depuis 2007, Neemba vous accueille dans son siège à Nouakchott, sur une surface de 2 000 m2. Le site dispose d’un service commercial, un magasin de pièces, un département technique pour les interventions extérieures et tous les services support assurant notre activité sur le territoire.
Une équipe disponible pour vous accompagner et vous proposer les solutions les mieux adaptées à vos besoins, dans les meilleures conditions.
L’expérience de Neemba en Mauritanie a toujours été un gage de confiance pour de nombreuses entreprises évoluant dans divers secteurs :  
Mines, Construction et Infrastructures, Energie, Industries et Services
Notre offre est composée :  
•	De vente de matériels neufs et d’occasion 
•	De fourniture de pièces de rechange
•	De solutions d’innovation
•	Des solutions de location 
•	D’assistance technique et formation

Name: Lochinvar, LLC
Description:
Lochinvar, LLC is a leading manufacturer of high-efficiency water heaters, boilers,  pool heaters and custom pre-piped packaged systems.  The company’s history is rich with family heritage with its founder, William Vallett establishing a foundation built on core values still represented today, almost one hundred years later.  Competencies like a commitment to research and development, lean and flexible manufacturing systems, comprehensive training programs, a network of distribution and most importantly, our people are what have made Lochinvar an industry leader.

Now a wholly owned subsidiary of A.O. Smith Corporation, the foundation built so long ago has a course set for continued leadership in water heating technology in the global market.

Name: MacDon Industries
Description:
The Harvesting Specialists! MacDon Industries is a manufacturer of high quality, high-performance harvesting equipment.

Trademarks of products are the marks of their respective manufacturers and/or distributors.

Name: PT. ALTRAK 1978
Description: Heavy Equipment Distributor

Name: CJD Equipment
Description:
Founded in 1974, CJD Equipment is a privately owned Australian company whose core business involves the National Distribution of construction equipment and trucks. The CJD product portfolio consists of world-class brands such as Volvo, Kenworth, DAF, ISUZU, and Fuso. Our network of dealers and service centres stretches across the nation, from Australian capital cities to regional country towns and mining centres.

CJD Equipment currently employs 600 staff Australia-wide, with our people being highly acclaimed with knowledge and expertise that is unsurpassed in the industry.

Partnering with international manufacturers gives us the ability to offer a diverse range of quality products which support a variety of industries - from heavy duty equipment, to trucks for road freight, haulage, and general delivery - CJD Equipment has it all covered.

Our commitment to customer support is paramount.

CJD Equipment - Big Enough to Trust, Small Enough to Care.

Name: AMUG (Additive Manufacturing Users Group)
Description:
Additive Manufacturing Users Group (AMUG), educates and advances the uses and applications of additive manufacturing technologies.

AMUG is an organization that educates and advances the uses and applications of additive manufacturing technologies. AMUG members include all commercial additive manufacturing/3D printing technologies for companies such as Stratasys, Concept Laser, ExOne, Renishaw, HP Inc., SLM Solutions, EOS, Prodways, Carbon and 3D Systems. AMUG meets annually to provide education and training through technical presentations on processes and new technologies. This information addresses operation of additive manufacturing equipment and the applications that use the parts they make. Online at www.am-ug.com.

Name: Drives & Controls
Description: Drives & Controls is the leading UK platform for automation, mechanical power transmission and motion control. Its Web site covers these topics from a global perspective.

Name: Manlift Group
Description:
Manlift Group is the Middle East and Indian subcontinent's leading supplier of  Access Platforms on both rental and sales basis.

Manlift has one of the largest platform fleets in the Middle East and India comprising of very high quality products from JLG, Genie, Upright, Teupen and MEC covering heights of up to 58 meters.  All machines are ready for immediate dispatch and are supported by a full range of spare parts and extensive service programs.

Name: DEVELON North America
Description: DEVELON North America markets and supports the DEVELON brand of products that includes dozers, crawler excavators, wheel excavators, mini excavators, compact track loaders, wheel loaders, articulated dump trucks, material handlers, log loaders and attachments. With a growing number of equipment dealer locations in North America, DEVELON is known for an unmatched dedication to service and customer uptime, and durable, reliable products. DEVELON is fast becoming a global force in heavy construction equipment. Powered by innovation.

Name: Elematic
Description:
Elematic Oyj is a global leader in precast concrete technology. With over 65 years of experience, the company designs, manufactures, and supplies high-quality machinery, equipment, automation solutions, software, and services for the precast concrete industry. Elematic’s solutions cover the entire precast concrete production process, from design and manufacturing to delivery and installation, helping customers increase productivity, sustainability, and profitability. 

Elematic’s technology has enabled hundreds of thousands of building projects in over 100 countries; we have customers on all continents. In 2024, our net sales were EUR 58 million (57), of which 92% is exports. Today, Elematic employs over 350 professionals worldwide. 

For more information, please visit www.elematic.com, or contact us at marketing@elematic.com.

Name: Yancey Bros. Co.
Description:
Since 1914, the employees of Yancey Bros. Co. have proudly served our customers in the Construction, Roadbuilding, Mining, Aggregates and Agricultural communities by providing them with quality products, parts and service. 

From our earliest days to the present, Yancey Bros. Co. strives to offer the highest level of customer dedicated products and services available. We remain committed to learning more about our customers, offering equipment and support to keep up with their changing needs. 

As we celebrate our first century of service to Georgia and her citizens, the employees of Yancey Bros. Co. work hard to make our state a better place for all of us to call "home". Our employees' involvement with community groups, civic and church organizations, and hundreds of charities is just an example of our commitment to Georgia. 

Likewise, our employees get up early and work hard each and every day to make sure our customers receive first-class quality services. We believe that if our customers are not successful, then Yancey Bros. Co. can't be successful.

We invite you to visit us online and see firsthand the many advantages available to you by doing business with Yancey Bros. Co., "The Nation's Oldest Caterpillar Dealer".

Name: MAPAL Dr. Kress SE & Co. KG
Description: MAPAL Dr. Kress SE & Co. KG is one of the leading international suppliers of precision tools for the machining of practically all materials. The company founded in 1950 supplies leading customers from the automotive and aerospace industries and from machine and plant engineering. With its innovations the family-owned company sets trends and standards in production and machining technology. MAPAL sees itself as a technology partner, supporting its customers with the development of efficient and resource-conserving machining processes using individual tool concepts. The company is represented with production facilities, sales subsidiaries and representatives in 44 countries worldwide. In 2023 the MAPAL Group had 5,000 employees, generating sales of EUR 588 million.

Name: HOBART GmbH
Description:
WORK SMART, NOT HARD!

HOBART is an innovative manufacturer of dishwashing technology commercial dishwasher and warewash systems. We always find solutions that reduce the consumption of your resources continuously, thus protecting the environment.

HOBART develops, manufactures and distributes machines and equipment in the fields of warewashing and cleaning technology, cooking and food preparation as well as environmental technology. Furthermore HOBART offers specific solutions around warewashing: including a in-house developed hygiene line, perfectly adapted to all HOBART dishwashers, as well as water purification and water softening appliances.

Name: EKATO GROUP
Description:
The EKATO GROUP offers custom-made solutions for all sectors of the chemical and process manufacturing industry.

Founded in 1933, EKATO is the world market leader in mixing technology. Three OEMs offer tailor-made solutions for all branches of the process industry:

EKATO RMT, leading in process technology for 90 years, designs and produces agitators and reactors for liquid applications and is the largest company of the EKATO GROUP. Furthermore, EKATO RMT develops innovative mechanical seals and seal supply systems for all types of process engineering equipment.

EKATO FLUID GmbH manufactures modular, standardized industrial agitators for the chemical industry as well as for biodiesel and bioethanol applications.

EKATO SYSTEMS GmbH specializes in turnkey units for the cosmetic and pharmaceutical industry (EKATO UNIMIX), and mixers and dryers for processing solids (EKATO SOLIDMIX).

A worldwide service network with a 24-hour hotline completes the portfolio of the EKATO GROUP.

With a strong focus on customer-oriented innovations, the EKATO GROUP is continuously expanding its leading position in the market.

Imprint:
https://www.ekato.com/imprint/

Name: HINE Group
Description:
Established in 1974, Hine has emerged as a leading provider of hydraulic systems, components, and cooling solutions for industrial and renewable energy sectors. 

With an impressive legacy of over four decades, our expertise in hydraulics design, development, and manufacturing has helped numerous clients thrive in a fiercely competitive landscape. Our unwavering commitment to responsiveness and production capacity has made us a trusted partner for global projects, ensuring timely and cost-effective delivery. 

With strategically located production sites across Spain, the US, Brazil, India, China, Mexico, and soon Poland, we bring manufacturing competitiveness to your doorstep.

Name: BlastOne International
Description:
BlastOne International has been a leading specialist consultant and supplier to the protective coating and corrosion control industry for over 40 years. Our global experience, combined with continual research enable us to provide knowledgeable technical advice with successful outcomes.

Our focus is on heavy industry – for example: pipelines, refineries, chemical plants, power plants, storage tank farms, steel fabricators, water towers, waste water plants, bridges, heavy infrastructure, offshore, shipyards/marine, just to mention few.

We stand behind our brand claim of Superior Performance. It’s something we define as ‘Performance3’ – the result of combining superior equipment with superior abrasives and superior know-how. In short, it’s something that delivers greater cost-efficiencies for our customers.

With locations in the USA, Australia, New Zealand and Malaysia, BlastOne strives to provide excellent advice, the best products and incredible service to it's clients globally, with a local touch.

Name: Messer Cutting Systems
Description:
At five production sites worldwide, over 900 employees manufacture thermal cutting machines that meet the highest standards in the metal plate processing industry.

Machines are deployed in all segments of the thermal cutting industry. They are the first step and most important in a modern manufacturing process.

Messer Precision Cutting Technology rests on four pillars:

• Superior, industry-leading CNC cutting machines and equipment at the forefront of technology. 
• Innovative and advanced software programs to effectively streamline processes. 
• Unrivaled expertise from qualified and accomplished professionals. 
• Five-star service programs from around the globe, ensuring machine productivity and longevity.

With thousands of machines around the world in operation daily, we have earned your trust; thank you, Messer Cutting Systems customers and partners.

Name: NSK Europe
Description:
NSK products and solutions are everywhere where something is moving – even deployed under the hardest of conditions. Our high precision roller bearings and ball bearings are spinning away in wind turbines and machine tools, our linear systems are hard at work in production lines. As a worldwide strategic partner to the top automobile manufacturers and suppliers, NSK provides solutions that offer more performance while taking up less space. Intelligent steering systems, engine, wheel hub and transmission bearings – our OE car parts not only ensure more efficient use of fuel, but also increased safety for automobiles. 

Please also visit our website: 
www.nsk.com/en-eu/

Global website: www.nsk.com

Name: Sieger
Description:
Sieger Spintech,  headquartered in Coimbatore ( India ), is a leading provider of Automation Solutions for Textile Mills, Multi-Level Car Parking Systems, Automatic Storage and Retrieval Systems for Warehouses and Distribution Centers. Since 1994, our products function across the globe to optimize processes at increased efficiencies. 

Our Textile Machinery Division manufactures precision products that have proven to extremely reliable. We are the World's leading manufacturer of Yarn Conditioning Plants.

SIEGER Parking has executed Multi-Level Car Parking Systems over heights of 35 meters. 100% customer satisfaction has paved the way for our exponential growth in the sector. We have built India's largest puzzle parking system one of its kind in the world. As the need and adoption of Automated Parking increases in India, Sieger parking is positioned to provide solutions for any type of project.
 

Our Automatic Storage and Retrieval Systems ( AS/RS ) are technologically advanced with Integrated Intralogistics. Our systems are designed, manufactured, and executed with one primary goal - Space and Process Optimization. 
We have executed projects for different sectors and we are looking forward to exploring the high potential of space optimization across the Globe. 

Our R&D works seamlessly with a world-class manufacturing facility to provide high-quality automated solutions in the field of Textile Machinery, Automatic Car Parking, Automatic Storage, and Material Handling Systems.

Name: Spraying Systems Co.
Description:
Spraying Systems Co is the leader in spray technology. With 12 manufacturing facilities throughout North America, South America, Europe and Asia, we can quickly deliver to our customers anywhere in the world.

Spraying Systems Co. has the right nozzle for your spray application, with nozzles readily available in thousands of sizes, hundreds of configurations and dozens of materials. Our innovative spray nozzles are designed to improve efficiency – from quick-change nozzles that require no tools for installation to anti-bearding nozzles that increase throughput.

Our in-house spray fabrication experts design and fabricate custom lances, manifolds and shower headers. Custom solutions can optimize spray performance, improve product quality, simplify system installation and minimize physical changes to existing operations. Choose from applications in every industry.

Name: Hacker Industrial Ltda
Description: Há 70 anos, sendo referência em Turbinas e serviços para hidrelétricas, promovendo soluções eficientes e inovadoras em projetos de engenharia de alta complexidade, cuidando do meio ambiente e contribuindo para um mundo mais sustentável

Name: SMI (Smigroup)
Description: We are a customer-oriented company engaged in the design and production of high technology bottling and packaging solutions up to 55,000 bottles /hour, featuring the best price / quality ratio on the market. We want to provide our customers worldwide with innovative solutions capable of fully meeting their demands in terms of efficiency, reliability, flexibility and energy saving. The large variety of products that our complete bottling lines can handle includes both flat liquids (water, milk and oil) and carbonated ones (water and soft drinks), in PET/PP/PEN containers whose capacity can reach 10L. In addition to them, our packaging machines can handle also beer, wine, food and detergents. After an in-depth analysis of the customer’s requirements, we can propose customized solutions, providing hi-tech turnkey plants that stand out for low operating costs and great quality/price ratio.

Name: Cascadura Group
Description: The Cascadura Group seeks to advance in technology, quality and relationships. Pillars responsible for its solidity in the market. We seek to offer the best in the market of Coating, Mashining and Maintenance of industrial parts. Here you will find the solution you need in one place.

Name: EAGLE LASERS
Description:
EAGLE LASERS is a leading technology and R&D company specializing in fiber laser systems. The powerful combination of high laser power, unmatched acceleration, and cutting-edge technology enables EAGLE customers worldwide to achieve maximum efficiency.

EAGLE’s philosophy and entire product portfolio are built around the "Ideal Machine Concept"—the result of years of research to provide peak performance with minimal maintenance requirements.

An innate innovator and pioneer in fiber laser systems, EAGLE LASERS offers reliable, high-performance solutions with power levels up to 40kW and acceleration up to 6G, delivering industry-leading speed and motion dynamics.

EAGLE’s portfolio also includes modular automation systems, patented software and cutting technologies, as well as comprehensive service and training solutions.

Headquartered in Poland, the Eagle Group operates subsidiaries in Germany, Scandinavia, Italy, France, and the United States, and maintains a strong global presence through a trusted network of world-class distributors.

Name: Snorkel
Description:
Our comprehensive range of aerial lifts provides safe and efficient working at height, from 4 metres (12 ft) to 40 metres (126 ft).

Our goal is to be a leading global provider of aerial work platforms for safe working at height. We will continue to be closer to our customers than any other access equipment manufacturer, by constantly enhancing and strengthening our worldwide distribution network. We will continue to attract and develop talented, committed people and safeguard our 60-year reputation for innovation, by producing machines that are increasingly more robust, cost effective, simple to use and easy to maintain.

Name: Amada GmbH
Description:
The AMADA Group is one of the world's largest manufacturers of machines and tools for sheet metal processing and is among the internationally leading companies in the industry. We offer an extensive spectrum product of machine tools for cutting, punching, bending and laser technology with automated modular concepts, comprehensive services, software applications and a full range of tools.

AMADA technologies stand for pioneering production solutions that achieve a high degree of profitability and productivity.

The AMADA GmbH is a 100% subsidiary of AMADA Holding Co., Ltd., founded as a sales and service company in 1972 in Düsseldorf, Germany.

Today the AMADA GmbH has its headquarters in the Solution Center in Haan and is responsible for the areas Germany, Austria and Netherlands in direct sales. The south branch is located in the Technical Center in Eching, Landshut.

The company AMADA OOO (Moscow, Russia) and AMADA Sp. z o.o. (Krakow, Poland) are again 100% subsidiaries of AMADA GmbH.

Other Eastern European countries are served on locally-based Partners.

Name: HD Construction Equipment
Description:
HD Construction Equipment is a leader in Korea's comprehensive construction equipment sector. With 90 years of technological expertise and the trust of our customers, we are at the forefront of the global construction machinery industry.

Under the HYUNDAI and DEVELON brands, HD Construction Equipment offers a diverse range of products, delivering added value to customers worldwide through our unique synergy strategies.

We are committed to boosting our competitiveness by establishing a global production system centered around smart factories.

Our focus is on achieving balanced growth across all sectors by developing key areas, including compact construction machinery, engines, and aftermarket services.

Name: Flottweg
Description:
Flottweg is one of the world’s leading providers of solutions in the field of mechanical solid-liquid separation. Our decanter centrifuges, separators and belt presses perform key tasks in a wide variety of industries – efficiently, reliably and individually adaptable.
Our technologies are used in numerous industries: food processing, the beverages industry, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, biofuels, environmental technology, sewage sludge treatment, industrial waste, crude oil and edible and non-edible fats and oils. With nearly 70 years of experience and in-depth process engineering expertise, we develop custom-made solutions for complex requirements.
With more than 1,000 employees and an export ratio of over 80 %, Flottweg has a strong international presence. Our subsidiaries, service offices and branches in the US, China, Italy, Poland, France, Australia, Canada, Peru, Brazil, Thailand and Mexico ensure customer proximity and rapid local services.
What sets us apart? Durable machinery, excellent service, great partnerships, and the enthusiasm to shape the future of separation technology together with our customers.

www.flottweg.com

Imprint: https://www.flottweg.com/imprint/
Privacy Policy: https://www.flottweg.com/privacy-policies-and-imprint-social-media/

Name: Trotec Laser
Description:
Trotec Laser is a leading international provider of advanced, high-speed laser equipment for cutting, engraving, and industrial marking. With the broadest product line on the market, Trotec systems are used to cut, engrave or mark a wide range of materials including wood, paper, metal, acrylic, leather, stone, plastics, and more. 

The company's extensive line of quality laser systems, coupled with its unmatched service and support offerings, have made Trotec one of the industry's leading resources for computer controlled engraving equipment and marking systems. Trotec highly values innovation and R&D; in fact, over a decade ago Trotec developed the world's first laser system that combines CO2 and fiber laser technology in one machine.

www.youtube.com/@TrotecLaserEngraving

Name: BAUKO MAQUINAS S/A
Description:
A BAUKO MÁQUINAS, empresa fundada em 1989, é uma das empresas líderes de mercado na distribuição e locação de máquinas e equipamentos de Construção & Terraplanagem, bem como, na locação e distribuição de empilhadeiras no Brasil. A empresa opera como Distribuidor KOMATSU, DYNAPAC e TOYOTA nos seguintes estados:

KOMATSU – Estados de São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Espírito Santo e Sul da Bahia.
DYNAPAC – Estados de São Paulo e Espírito Santo.
TOYOTA – Estados do Rio de Janeiro, Espírito Santo e Bahia.

A Bauko Rental foi constituída com o propósito especifico de locar equipamentos de construção pesada. Atuamos em todo território nacional, desenvolvendo relações de longo prazo com os clientes. Temos ampla frota de equipamentos das marcas Komatsu e Dynapac. Nosso maior diferencial competitivo é para clientes que trabalham com alta disponibilidade mecânica de equipamentos, pois trabalhamos com prazos apertados e alta produtividade, resultando em custos menores.

A Bauko Movimentação, divisão do segmento industrial (empilhadeiras), foi criada para dar maior prioridade à atividade de Locação de Empilhadeiras, Venda e Terceirização de Frotas. Está presente em quase todos os estados do país, contando com mais de 50 Centros de Apoio Operacional, estabelecidos estrategicamente nas regiões em que atua. Possui uma moderna frota de mais de 2000 empilhadeiras locadas. A empresa agora opera como distribuidora autorizada das empilhadeiras TOYOTA, líder do mercado mundial.

Name: Mtandt Group
Description:
A Five-Decade Legacy That Continues To Scale New Heights

Mtandt Group was formed in 1974 to make working at heights a Safe and reliable experience. To this end, we have been collaborating with leading organizations worldwide to provide Innovation, Technology, and Solutions to enhance their safety and productivity.

Operating through Manufacturing, Sales, Renting, Training, and Services, the Group is managed by experts from diversified segments to cater to the industry's specific requirements through top-class products, experienced fleets, best-in-class services, and a global presence.

Our 5 Main Business Units:
1. Equipment Sales & Rental Division (ESRD)
2. Composite Infra Division (CID)
3. Tactical Safety for Access and Falls (TSAF)
4. Maintenance Repair & Operations (MRO)
5. Under-Deck Access & Dropped Object Protection Solutions
6. Training & Certifications

We deal with below range
1. Aerial Work Platform ( Boom Lift | Spider Lift | Insulated Boom Lift | Truck Mounted Boom Lift)
2. Vertical Lift (Scissor Lift, Personal Lift, Mast Boom Lift)
3. Material Handling Equipment (Truck Mounted Crane | Tele-handler | Order Picker | Duct Lifter | Pallet Trucks)
4. Aluminium Scaffolding (Narrow | Wide | Stairway | Ladder | Cantilever | Powered)
5. Lifeline Fall Protection Systems (Horizontal | Vertical | Overhead)
6. Ground Protection Systems (PortaDeck, PortaMat, PortaPad)
7. Ground Stabilization Solution (Geocell)
8. Under Deck Access Solutions (WebDeck, WebNet, WebCatch)
9. Tools, PPE and Supplies
10. Service, Training & Certification 

We endeavour to serve our customers better through our network of dealerships in India and our global presence with facilities in Sri Lanka and Qatar.

We have a well-established record of accomplishment, and our products and services have always met with great customer satisfaction. We offer great products and services at a very competitive price without compromising on quality.

Name: PROBAT
Description: PROBAT has been a pioneer in developing innovative solutions for the coffee industry for more than 155 years. Through strategic acquisitions in food processing, enhanced technology exchange within the group and continuous expansion of its global service network, PROBAT has established itself as a leading one-stop shop for the food processing sector. As well as designing and manufacturing machinery, PROBAT plans and implements turnkey industrial plants, environmental technologies, and advanced control solutions with integrated smart data management. PROBAT employs around 1,200 people at its subsidiaries in Brazil, Canada, India, Italy, Scotland, the Netherlands, and the United States. With a presence in over 40 countries, PROBAT ensures its expertise and experience are accessible to customers worldwide.

Name: AMS - Ace Designers Machining Center Division
Description:
With over 29 years of rich experience in the machine tools industry, AMS has emerged as one of the largest manufacturers of Machining Centers in India. It has a state of the art production and R&D center which comprises a passionate dynamic team focused on producing innovative and customized machining centers to customers across the globe. 

AMS offers products and services to customers in India and countries like China, Russia, France, Mexico, South Korea, Thailand, Germany, Brazil, UAE, Turkey, Oman.  

AMS caters to the needs of the Automotive, Die & Mould, Medical, Aerospace, Education, Electronics, Power and Energy, Oil and Gas equipment manufacturing, General Engineering, Defence and other government sectors. It is also a single source supplier of machines to many Indian OEM manufacturers and large size component manufacturers.

With a fully-equipped manufacturing facility in Bengaluru and 41+ service centers spread across India, AMS ensures to offer prompt customer support. AMS manufactures the widest range of drill tap, vertical and horizontal machining centers. It covers the entire gamut of milling applications, from the simple to the most complicated operations. AMS also provides a turnkey option and tooled up solutions.

Name: Dieci Official
Description:
DIECI is a leading Italian company in the production and distribution of high-quality telehandlers and construction machinery. 

With extensive industry experience, it offers innovative and reliable solutions for lifting and handling needs in various sectors, including construction, agriculture, industry and emergency.

Our mission is to provide excellent products and support services to meet the needs of our customers around the world.

Name: SENNEBOGEN LLC
Description:
Established in America in the year 2000, SENNEBOGEN LLC quickly became a leader in specialized equipment solutions for recycling and scrap metal yards, demolition, barge and port operations, log-handling, transfer stations and waste facilities.

A growing network of SENNEBOGEN distributors throughout the Americas provides expert support in material handler applications and ongoing maintenance, repairs, parts and service support.

Our 100,000 sq. ft. (9300 m2) facility near Charlotte (Stanley), NC is home to:

• America’s largest inventory of material handler repair parts and major components
• A dedicated training facility for hands-on instruction for parts and service technicians, operators and sales consultants
• Our regional technical sales representatives and application specialists
• Engineering services for customization of SENNEBOGEN equipment

Check out our website here:   http://sennebogen-na.com/ 


Why Choose SENNEBOGEN?

• SAFETY
An investment in SENNEBOGEN equipment is an investment in the health and productivity of your people

• FLEXIBILITY (modular design)
By building simply, with non-proprietary components, SENNEBOGEN custom builds machines at costs competitive with assembly-line methods

• EFFICIENCY
Built to move more material faster, E-Series SENNEBOGEN material handlers are good for the environment and easy on the budget

• SIMPLICITY
With a clear focus on material handling tasks, SENNEBOGEN engineers ensure simple performance, simple operation and simple servicing without relying on complex electronics

• REDUCED OPERATING COSTS
With lower fuel costs, less downtime, and longer life, SENNEBOGEN grows your bottom line every day

• ACCESSIBILITY
Every SENNEBOGEN machine is backed by the bench strength of factory-trained dealer representatives, application specialists and a family tradition of working with customers face-to-face.

Name: Makino Europe GmbH
Description:
Since 1937, Makino has been widely known as an innovator in one of the most challenging markets, the machine tool industry. With continuous technology breakthroughs, we have shaped the manufacturing landscape and our objective is to be at the forefront of innovation.  

With more than 4,800 employees worldwide we strive to assess manufacturers' challenges and deliver the best technical solutions for your unique production needs. To properly understand these needs, in Makino Europe GmbH we are proud to stay close to our customers with offices in France, Spain, Germany, Italy and Slovakia.

Our wide range of premium-quality production solutions includes machining centres for parts production, die and mould manufacturing and in a great variety of applications in aerospace, automotive, off-highway vehicles, industrial components, medical, semiconductor and micro-technology industries. 

We believe that only through a deep understanding of your industry and challenges, we can help you boost your production performance. 

Makino is more than our name, is our word, is a Promise of Performance.

Data protection: https://www.makino.eu/en-us/data-policy-information/gdpr

Name: BW Papersystems
Description:
BW Papersystems, a division of Barry-Wehmiller, combines extremely strong brands, innovative Technologies, and long-standing experience in the sheeting & packaging, stationery, security documents, and corrugating & finishing industries. 

BW Papersystems is a combination of 10 brands that are together to synthesize manufacturing in the paper process industries. We operate under brand names: BW Bielomatik, BWP Zerand, JAG SYNCHRO, Kugler-Womako, MarquipWardUnited, Questec, SHM, VortX, WillPemcoBielomatik and Wrapmatic.

With manufacturing plants in USA, Europe and Asia, parts and service centers in the USA, Germany, Mexico, Brazil, Singapore and Shanghai, and our exceptional people working all over the world, we are at your side with great products and comprehensive services.

Name: Pearson Packaging Systems
Description:
Pearson Packaging Systems has supported CPG, food & beverage, household, industrial, and manufacturers for 70+ years by automating and optimizing secondary packaging and end-of-line operations. Our equipment is engineered to maximize uptime, reduce labor dependency, and deliver predictable throughput across 24/7 production.

What We Deliver

End-of-line automation including:
• Case erecting
• Case packing
• Partition insertion
• Bag insertion & bag uncuffing
• Case sealing
• Robotic palletizing
• Integrated automation systems

Built for high-mix CPG lines and high-volume industrial environments, Pearson machines provide speed, durability, flexibility, and long operational life.

Why Manufacturers Choose Pearson

We solve critical pain points:
• Labor shortages
• Throughput instability & downtime
• Manual case forming/packing issues
• Safety & ergonomic risks
• Inconsistent packaging quality
• High total cost of ownership

Key benefits include maximized uptime, faster changeovers, standardized fleets, higher throughput, improved OEE, and components designed for maintainability.

Post-Sale Support That Sets Us Apart

Automation only matters when it runs, our aftermarket programs keep it running.
• U.S.-based tech support
• 24/7 remote assistance
• Rapid-response field service
• Parts programs & rebuild kits
• Operator/maintenance training
• Full lifecycle support

Our commitment: fast, competent, proactive service that protects your line and performance.

Proven Scale
• 70+ years in business
• 30 years robotic integration
• 23,000+ deployed machines
• 180,000 sq. ft. U.S. manufacturing

Our Focus

Helping manufacturers automate manual tasks, improve uptime and repeatability, standardize equipment across plants, reduce labor bottlenecks, and build long-term operational resilience.

Name: Citizen Machinery UK
Description:
Citizen Machinery UK Ltd, headquartered in Bushey, is a CNC machine tool specialist supplying the latest CNC turning technology to UK industry. Part of the Citizen group, famous also for it's precision watches and electronics, following a merger in January 2011 the company incorporates staff and resources from the UK machine tool operations of both Citizen (Citizen Machinery UK Ltd, formerly NC Engineering Ltd) and Miyano (Miyano Machinery UK Ltd, formerly Macro Machine Tools Ltd).

We have been successfully serving UK manufacturing industry since 1974, our product range focussing specifically on Citizen's range of high performance Cincom Sliding Head CNC lathes, Miyano Fixed Head CNC Turning Centres and Ocean Cincom Autoloaded CNC Lathes.

Take a look at our highly flexible productivity solutions. Whether bar turning, autoloading or hard turning we can provide you a route to the lowest cost-per-part. Our multiple axis machines span the range from 1mm to 64mm diameter. We can also offer a variety of bespoke autoloaded solutions tailored to your requirements using the latest material and parts-handling technology. 

Fast to set, quick to changeover and easy to use our technology represents a sound investment all backed up by the best service in the business and strong residual values. We have a range of funding solutions allowing you to spread the cost whether through leasing, rental or outright purchase.

Name: NEUMAN & ESSER BRASIL
Description: A NEUMAN & ESSER impulsiona a transição energética e a economia circular com confiabilidade e soluções integradas para a infraestrutura de energia do futuro. Nossas soluções em compressores com tecnologia proprietária de vedação são usadas no processamento industrial de gases, tanto na indústria tradicional de petróleo e gás como na economia do hidrogênio verde. O portfólio de produtos também inclui sistemas de produção de hidrogênio sustentável, como eletrolisadores e reformadores a vapor, as principais tecnologias para a demanda futura por energia limpa. Com mais de um século de experiência na compressão de hidrogênio, a NEUMAN & ESSER é hoje a especialista em toda a cadeia de valor de H2. Quando se trata de dar vida a projetos ambiciosos, a NEUMAN & ESSER é o seu parceiro - desde a avaliação de potenciais plantas, viabilidade e financiamento do projeto, passando pela engenharia, construção e comissionamento, até à comercialização dos gases produzidos. Nossas soluções em engenharia de processos mecânicos apresentam diferenciais expressivos para a moagem e classificação de matérias-primas e materiais reciclados. Os nossos sistemas demonstram uma contribuição essencial em aplicações como tinta em pó e enriquecimento proteico, bem como na produção de materiais de alta performance para sistemas de armazenamento de energia em baterias. A confiabilidade e a disponibilidade são a base de parcerias de longo prazo e são garantidas em nossas plantas com um serviço digital 360° durante a operação. A continuidade de uma empresa familiar com quase 200 anos e a nossa rede global de fabricação, vendas e serviços, garantem a proximidade junto aos nossos clientes. Seja em projetos envolvendo máquinas novas, seja na área de serviços, peças OEM ou qualquer atividade de pós-vendas, estamos perto de você. Orientados a soluções ágeis, criativas e inovadoras, desenvolvemos o conhecimento de nossos mais de 1.800 colaboradores para atender as necessidades de nossos clientes.

Name: Grupo Timber
Description:
O Grupo Timber atua há quase duas décadas no desenvolvimento da mecanização e modernização de operações em todo o Brasil. Com presença consolidada nos três estados do Sul, conta com estrutura robusta, equipe técnica especializada, estoque de peças e uma linha completa de soluções personalizadas para os setores florestal, construção civil, agrícola, energia portátil, mobilidade elétrica e rastreamento.

Com sede em Curitiba (PR), o Grupo Timber comercializa, instala e realiza manutenções em equipamentos de alto desempenho, representando as principais marcas globais. É representante exclusivo das máquinas Ponsse e Sany para a região Sul do país, além de atuar com Fuchs também em São Paulo. No portfólio florestal, integram ainda as marcas Denis Cimaf, Falcon Forestry, Plantma, Risutec e Veriga, referências mundiais em tecnologia e eficiência operacional.

Através da divisão Timber Construction, o grupo ampliou sua área de atuação, oferecendo tecnologia de ponta para os setores de construção civil, mineração e movimentação de materiais, com foco em performance, segurança e produtividade.

No setor agrícola, o Grupo Timber é responsável pela comercialização dos drones da XAG, sinônimo de inovação no campo. Em energia portátil, atua com as soluções versáteis e sustentáveis da EcoFlow, ideais para diversos perfis de consumidores. Também representa a Riddara, especialista em rastreamento e segurança, e a Farizon, marca global voltada à mobilidade elétrica com foco em caminhões sustentáveis.

Do atendimento à entrega, o pós-venda do Grupo Timber é um dos grandes diferenciais: técnico, presente, ágil e preparado para garantir que a máquina do cliente nunca fique parada. Com profundo conhecimento técnico e olhar estratégico, o grupo oferece soluções completas que unem tecnologia, inovação e suporte especializado para transformar o presente e preparar o futuro de quem move o Brasil.

Name: Stiles Machinery
Description: As the industry’s leading provider of advanced manufacturing solutions, Stiles has been helping manufacturers nationwide increase their efficiency and productivity for more than 60 years. Stiles is a proud member of the HOMAG Group, a global leader in the production of industrial manufacturing machinery.

Name: SLI Process Technologies

SLI Process Technologies (SLIPT) provide high quality process equipment's for Chemical, Pharmaceuticals & Related Industries.

For Your Enquiries Regarding Product details contact us at 
sliprocesstechnologies@gmail.com or info@sliprocess.co.in or sales@sliprocess.co.in or at 9601975543.

Name: Liebherr Great Britain
Description:
Founded in 1949, the Liebherr Group comprises over 140 companies on all continents and employs 47,925 people. The Liebherr Group is a technology company with a broadly diversified product programme. The company is one of the world's largest manufacturers of construction machines, but also offers high-quality, use-oriented products and services in many other fields.

At Liebherr Great Britain we offer secure employment, an attractive working environment, and a wide variety of jobs: from trainee occupations and apprenticeships to numerous opportunities for experienced professionals. As a family-owned company, Liebherr believes in a long-term orientation with steady growth and progress. This applies both to individual employee development and to advances in research and innovation or to trend themes like Industry 4.0. Join us in working for the future!

Name: Zünd Systemtechnik AG
Description:
Zünd Systemtechnik AG, a family-owned business with operations worldwide, specializes in developing and manufacturing digital cutting systems. The Zünd name represents Swiss Quality and is synonymous with precision, performance, and reliability. Since 1984 Zünd has been developing, manufacturing, and marketing modular cutting systems and is globally recognized as the market leader.

The Zünd customer base consists of manufacturers and suppliers in many different industries, including graphics, packaging, garment, and leather, as well as technical textiles and composites. Zünd maintains headquarters in Altstätten, Switzerland, where the company's R&D, marketing, and production facilities are located. Besides Zünd's own sales and service organizations in Austria, China, Germany, India, Italy, the Netherlands, Thailand, the United Kingdom, France, Spain, Brasil, Australia, and the United States, Zünd relies on a global network of long-standing, independent distribution & service partners.

Name: ENGGVALLEY
Description:
ENGGVALLEY is associated with FOOD PROCESSING MACHINERY (In Every Range For Every Sector) and together make all kinds of FOOD PRODUCTION LINES,  TURN-KEY SOLUTIONS for Food and Beverages (From processing to packaging,) and PACKAGING SOLUTIONS, with a range of guaranteed quality. 

ENGGVALLEY also works for Various World Class brand, which specializes in making SPECIAL Food Processing Machinery & Production Lines, Turn-Key Solution For Food & Beverages (RAS, LONKIA, JOYSHINE) which is unique in the design and manufacture of any Machine & Production Lines with ANY POWER, SPEED, AND MEASUREMENTS that the CLIENT ORDERS!

Name: S&T Machinery Pvt LTD

Our commitment to innovation and quality has made us a cornerstone in providing state-of-the-art machinery. We continuously spearhead advancements in the machine tool sector, offering unparalleled products and services across PAN India.

At S&T Machinery, we present a stellar range of CNC machines, meticulously crafted in Taiwan and manufactured with precision in India. Our diverse lineup includes:
VL-Series: High-Performance Vertical Machining Centers (VL510 to VL2090)
VD-Series: Direct Drive - High-Speed Vertical Machining Centers (VD510 to VD2090)

Name: KRÜSS - Advancing your Surface Science
Description: As specialists in interfacial chemistry and the world's leading supplier of measuring instruments for surface and interfacial tension, we not only provide high quality product solutions - our offer is a combination of technology and scientific consulting. These include seminars, technical service, and our Applications & Science Center for professional measurement services. Many well-known companies have already been inspired by our know-how, precision and passion consulted by our offices in Hamburg, the USA, China, Great Britain, France and with the help of our exclusive distributor network. Acting quickly and flexibly, we are always at our customer’s doorstep in the research and development laboratories as well as quality control centers of countless industries all over the world.

Name: GEBHARDT Fördertechnik GmbH
Description: Die GEBHARDT Fördertechnik GmbH ist einer der führenden Anbieter von Materialfluss- und innerbetrieblichen Logistiksystemen. Und das seit über sechzig Jahren. Name: Siempelkamp
Description: The Siempelkamp Group is a global-active technology supplier for machine and plant construction, casting technology and nuclear technology. Siempelkamp is a system supplier of press lines and complete plants for the wood-based panel industry, metal forming as well as the composite and rubber industries. Siempelkamp manufactures large castings with a total weight of 320 t  (353 US tons) each with one of the largest hand-molding foundries in Krefeld. The company also supplies transport and storage containers for radioactive waste and specializes in the dismantling of nuclear facilities.

Description:

Name: Alimak
Description: Alimak is the global market leader and pioneer in designing, developing, manufacturing and servicing industrial rack and pinion vertical access solutions. The company provides high quality rack and pinion and traction elevators, construction hoists and work platforms primarily for the industrial and construction sectors. Alimak has a well-established global sales, service and distribution platform across more than 90 countries with strong market presence. The company has a large global installed base of over 23,000 units which provides unique know-how of all industrial application areas. Alimak was founded in 1948 and is part of Alimak Group which is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

Name: Hailstone Innovations Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Hailstone Innovations Pvt. Ltd. is a leading machine manufacturer and EPC- Service provider which cater process solutions to mining and aggregate industries. We supply crushing, screening, washing and conveying equipment across the globe.

We started our two decade old professional journey as Multitech Engineering at Trissur in Kerala, India. A new factory was added to service and got branded as Hailstone innovations within the years of operation. Hailstone celebrated Silver Jubilee with commissioning of the new state of art manufacturing facility at Palakkad, Kerala, India to serve Indian and Global market.

The company has challengingly developed in the engineering sector with its own Design & development center, three manufacturing & assembling plants, service & support, sales& marketing and a total strength of 300 people striving together for betterment Hailstone has successfully completed around 250 projects and installations all over India.

The growth under such a short span of time itself is the proof of our capabilities, which indeed has pushed us among the top competitors in this sector. We are now one of the largest manufacturers of Jaw crusher and cone crushers. Our economically engineered machines have already marked its quality and performance with satisfied customers all over. We focus on continuous development in every aspect which makes us stand different among all others.

Our team's unique expertise coupled with continuous improvement and latest R&D won customers by reduced production cost per ton, increased process safety and minimum down time. We add value to market by improving product quality, reducing wastage and meeting environmental and engineering standards.

Name: Nationwide Platforms
Description:
We’re Nationwide Platforms, the UK’s market leader in powered access platform hire, equipment sales and IPAF training. 

From our depots across the UK we’re proud to offer you the widest selection of powered access equipment including a complete range of scissor lifts, boom lifts, low level access platforms and both van mounted and truck mounted platforms. 

We also have access to the largest fleet of specialist equipment, such as tracked access and narrow spider machines, to fulfill all your platform rental requirements.  

To complement our access platform equipment we offer a wide range of working at height courses to include accredited IPAF Training, PASMA and health and safety courses. Visit our training site for more course information and book your next training course online.

We believe our powered access solutions should be comprehensive, robust and safe for every single site, application and user. That’s why we’ve created a unique collaborative approach which combines the strengths of our business with closest needs to deliver a truly exclusive outcome.

In the past decade, the Group has further expanded its technological leadership into the field of Thermal Energy Storage (TES), developing advanced systems that contribute to the global energy transition and enable a greater integration of renewable energy, and support the flexibilization of power generation networks.

Name: Robbins
Description:
With 70 years of innovation and experience, Robbins is the world’s foremost developer and manufacturer of advanced, underground construction machinery.

Robbins has been involved in hundreds of tunnel boring projects around the world. Today Robbins offers an extensive range of underground excavation equipment. Whether you need to build a 4-lane highway through the heart of the Himalayas, construct a 10 km subway tunnel through Hong Kong, or bore a 0.7 m tunnel for a gravity sewer in your town, Robbins makes the best machines to do the job safely and efficiently. Name: Miele Professional
Description:
Miele has been an independent family-owned company since its establishment in 1899 and is equally committed to its owners, employees, customers, suppliers, the environment and society.

Miele Professional concentrates on the manufacturing of commercial products for industries using commercial dishwashers, commercial laundry technology and laboratory and dental technology. Wherever innovative high-end products with an outstanding cleaning performance and high hygiene requirements are needed, Miele Professional wants to be the first choice.

Our appliances are developed by Miele engineers and the carefully selected components are largely produced in our own competence centers in Germany and Europe. For us, German engineering primarily means that we go into the details extremely carefully. And that we make every effort even for the smallest of improvements. Miele Professional is quality you can rely on.

Name: AMADA AMERICA, INC.
Description:
Since its inception, AMADA AMERICA, INC. has provided American industry with a steady stream of innovative, productivity enhancing sheet metal machines. We have accomplished this by carefully listening to you, our customers, and then engineering and building machine tools that solve your fabrication needs. Markets served include: Aerospace, Air Conditioning, Appliance, Computers, Electronics, Farm Equipment, Gaming Industry, Medical Equipment, Metal Office Equipment, Restaurant Equipment, Telecommunications, and Transportation.

AMADA AMERICA, INC. was established in Seattle, Washington in 1971 and has been located in California since 1973. Its company headquarters are located in Buena Park, California. AMADA AMERICA, AMADA CANADA, and AMADA DE MÉXICO combine to deliver industry-leading sales, service and support for manufacturers in North, Central, and South America.

Name: SKAN
Description:
SKAN is a Swiss company and a global market and technological leader for isolators, cleanroom devices, and decontamination processes for the aseptic production of biopharmaceutical substances. SKAN's core competency is the design and development of process isolators for the aseptic filling of biopharmaceutical products. Furthermore, the company offers its customers process support, services, and consumables.

SKAN's technology and innovation leadership is based on a unique combination of specialist knowledge in the areas of ventilation technology, air conditioning, sterilisation, software programming that must be validated in a pharmaceutically compliant manner, microbiology and chemistry. It is also experienced when it comes to regulatory requirements and production competency.

With its state-of-the-art products and services, SKAN focusses on markets with the highest regulatory requirements in the health sector. These are mainly situated in Europe, North America, Japan, South Korea, and Singapore. 
SKAN's expertise and innovative energy is the result of long years of trusting relationships with blue-chip (bio)pharmaceutical companies and leading research laboratories worldwide. SKAN's products and services are decisive for the success of its customers. For this reason, the company profits from high market entry barriers. Thanks to the experts at our in-house laboratories who research innovative solutions for isolator technology, SKAN can fulfill even the most complex customer requirements.

Name: NG Metalúrgica
Description:
A NG foi fundada em 1996 pelo empresário Narciso Gobbin (Nino) e família, com o objetivo de oferecer ao mercado toda sua experiência acumulada em décadas vividas no setor de bens de capital sob encomenda.

Investimentos constantes em área fabril e máquinas e uma estratégia de crescimento e diversificação de produtos e mercados levaram a NG ao que é hoje: pessoal qualificado, tecnologias de ponta e solidez.

NG was founded in 1996 by entrepreneur Narciso Gobbin (Nino) and his family with the goal of offering the market all his accumulated experience in decades lived in the capital goods sector.

Ongoing investments in manufacturing plants and machinery and a strategy of growth and diversification of products and markets led NG to what it is today: qualified personnel, State-of-the-art technology and strength.

Name: Marel Poultry
Description: JBT Marel Poultry is the leading global provider of advanced poultry processing systems and services. In close cooperation with our customers, we create innovative solutions for the poultry processing industry, driving excellence in performance, food safety, and sustainability.

Name: PT. Gaya Makmur Tractors
Description:
PT. Gaya Makmur Tractors (GM Tractors) which is established on 29 August 2005 in Jakarta is a wholesale supplier of brand new heavy equipments for road construction, plantation, forestry, mining and much more. It is a sole distributor of  Wirtgen Group (Wirtgen, Vogele, HAMM) of Germany.

Furthermore GM Tractors is also a sole distributor of some heavy equipment manufacturers from China. They are Shantui Construction Machinery (Shantui) with their wide range product on bulldozers, wheel loaders and forklifts.  Xuzhou Construction Machinery Group (XCMG) which produces a variety type of cranes, motor graders and wheel loaders.

Beside selling those heavy equipment products, GM Tractors also provides after sales service, attachment and component making, heavy equipment recondition, rentals and used heavy equipment sales.

Name: KYOCERA SGS Precision Tools
Description:
At KYOCERA SGS, we’re not just crafting tools, we’re shaping the future of precision. From indexable, solid round carbide, and PCB tooling to hard coatings, and surface treatments, our innovations redefine excellence, creating a sharper, more precise tomorrow.

We provide world class machining solutions and services through several product lines and divisions to a variety of industries, including aerospace, automotive, medical, power generation, mold & die, casting & foundries, general engineering, and more.

Name: Yanmar
Description:
Founded in Osaka, Japan in 1912, Yanmar was the first ever to succeed in making a compact diesel engine of a practical size in 1933. A pioneer in diesel engine technology, Yanmar is a global innovator in a wide range of industrial equipment, from small and large engines, agricultural machinery and facilities, construction equipment, energy systems, marine, to machine tools, and components — Yanmar’s global business operations span seven domains.
On land, at sea, and in the city, Yanmar provides advanced solutions to the challenges customers face, towards realizing A Sustainable Future.

Name: Weber Food Technology
Description:
At Weber, we have been setting new standards with innovative strength, quality and customer proximity since 1981. It all started back then with the manufacture of derinding machines and skinners, which are still an integral part of our product portfolio today. In the meantime, Weber has established itself as one of the leading system suppliers for slicing applications. We are proud to be a strong partner of the food processing industry.

From weight-accurate slicing to the precise infeeding and packaging of deli, meat, cheese and vegan products: we develop and produce complete slicing and packaging lines for processing food products. Our portfolio is diverse, and offers the perfect solution for all requirements and areas of application. This also means supporting our customers on-site.

Weber has been family-owned since its foundation and is now managed in the second generation by Tobias Weber (CEO), the eldest son of the company founder Günther Weber.

The entire product range of high-tech machines is "Made in Germany" and has been manufactured exclusively at six German production sites since the company was founded. And: "Real quality can only be guaranteed if you manufacture as much as possible yourself and on your own responsibility". True to this motto of company founder Günther Weber, all elements made of stainless steel, right down to the hygiene screw, are produced in-house. This means an in-house production quota of 80% and is our key to the greatest possible flexibility in the interest of our customers.

Our goal is to continue to promote the national and international presence of the company in future in order to be close to our customers worldwide and to provide the usual Weber service. Weber currently employs about 1,500 people at 23 locations in 18 nations, who contribute to the success of the Weber Group every day with commitment and passion.

Name: Crosby
Description:
Crosby is a product brand of Kito Crosby, the global leader of the lifting and securement industry it pioneered, and for which it continues to set the quality standard. With global engineering, manufacturing, distribution, and operations, the company provides a broad range of products and solutions for the most demanding applications. Our iconic brands include Kito, Crosby, Harrington, Gunnebo Industries, and Peerless. Kito Crosby’s people, products, solutions, and service have innovated the lifting and securement industry for more than 250 years. Together we lift and secure the world today, for a safer, stronger, and more productive tomorrow. 

With global engineering, manufacturing, distribution and operations, we provide a broad range of products and solutions for the most demanding applications with uncompromising quality that exceeds industry standards.

Name: Simplex CNC
Description: Simplex offers industrial solutions to a wide variety of regional manufacturers spanning a number of industries. Since it’s establishment in 2013, the firm has mainly manufactured CNC router machines for the Egyptian market by combining quality components with a highly personalized pre- and post-sales experience. The CNC machine allows users to cut and engrave wooden , acrylic and aluminum surfaces with a high degree of accuracy, speed, and reproducibility, which results in a stronger production process than one relying on skilled manual labor. In the first year Simplex sold its CNC router machines in 11 governorates all over Egypt

Name: NEUMAN & ESSER (NEA GROUP)
Description:
NEUMAN & ESSER is a reliable partner to the industry, driving both the energy transition and the circular economy with integrated solutions for the energy infrastructure of tomorrow.

Our compressor solutions with in-house sealing technology are used in the industrial processing of gases. Both in the traditional oil and gas industry as well as in the hydrogen economy and the green gas industry.

The product portfolio also includes hydrogen production systems such as electrolyzers and steam reformers, the key technologies for the future demand for clean energy. Combined with a century of experience in the compression of hydrogen, NEUMAN & ESSER is today the expert for the entire H2 value chain.

When it comes to bringing ambitious projects to life, NEUMAN & ESSER is your partner - from the evaluation of potential sites and the feasibility and financing of the project, through engineering, construction and commissioning, to the marketing of the gases produced.

Our solutions in mechanical process engineering are particularly relevant in the shredding and classification of raw materials and recycled materials.
NEUMAN & ESSER systems make an essential contribution in applications such as powder coating, recovered carbon black and protein enrichment, as well as in the production of high-performance materials for battery energy storage systems.

Reliability and availability are the basis of long-term partnerships and are ensured in our plants with a digitally supported 360° service during operation.

Thanks to the continuity of an almost 200-year-old family business and a global network of production sites, sales and service locations, we are close to you both in the primary and in the aftermarket, so that we can react quickly to individual requirements.

Solution-oriented, agile, creative and innovative, we use the knowledge and the commitment of our more than 1,900 employees to understand and fulfill the needs and requirements of our customers.

Name: EMUGE-FRANKEN USA
Description: EMUGE-FRANKEN USA was established in 1984 to better service the North American market with localized inventory and technical support. With over 10,000 different stocked standard taps, thread mills, drills, end mills, tool holders, and workpiece clamping devices, EMUGEoffers standard products that are custom made items for others. In 2006, EMUGE had out grown its original location and moved into a new state-of-the-art facility in West Boylston, Massachusetts. The new facility houses EMUGE’s Technology Center where EMUGE skilled engineers host training seminars and help solve customer machining issues. In 2015, EMUGE started manufacturing products in the USA with the opening of a reconditioning center for Emuge cutting tools and we are proud to be a part of a revitalized manufacturing sector in New England.

Name: Methods Machine Tools, Inc.
Description:
Methods Machine Tools, Inc. is North America’s foremost supplier of high-quality, high-precision machine tools and automation. We import FANUC RoboDrill and ROBOCUT, Nakamura-Tome, YASDA, OKK, KIWA Japan, and Weiler machining centers.

Headquartered in Sudbury, Mass., and in operation since 1958, Methods provides an end-to-end portfolio of best-in-class products, engineering services, support, parts, training, and integration. With 11 technical centers, and a precision center, Methods has installed more than 40,000 machine tools throughout North America. Our many long term partnerships include Nakamura-Tome, FANUC, Yasda, OKK, Kiwa-Japan, and WEILER.

We offer the most advanced technology in:
•	Vertical
•	Horizontal
•	5-Axis Machining
•	High Performance
•	Multitasking CNC Lathes
•	High Speed Drilling
•	Tapping Machines

Our factory-trained service technicians will support you with any electrical, mechanical, preventative maintenance, spindle repair or installation needs. Our training experts offer a full range of training classes at each of our regional facilities on topics including machine servicing, hands-on operation, and software programming.  Our extensive parts selection has 95% of orders in stock and ready to ship the same day. Methods financing group recognizes the wide variety of cash flow and credit needs of our customers' capital acquisitions.  

Our headquarters resides just outside of Boston, Massachusetts, with regional offices across the United States and distributors throughout North America.  Methods brings you a support system like no other manufacturing solutions provider.  

Since 1958 - More than the world's best machines.

Name: LMW Textile Machinery Division

With over 50 million spindleage capacity installed globally, LMW has become a preferred global partner, providing end-to-end solutions for the spinning industry. Our commitment to consistent and sustainable growth has deepened our roots in India and global markets.

Explore our extensive range of machinery designed to cater to various applications and process a diverse range of raw materials. As a testament to our global reach, we have established wholly-owned subsidiaries in China (LMW Textile Machinery, Suzhou) and Dubai (LMW Global FZE) to address the unique needs of dynamic markets.

At LMW, we are at the forefront of technological advancements in textile machinery. As a totally integrated spinning system manufacturer, we produce smart machinery from Blowroom to Ring Spinning, Auto Winders, and Airjet Spinning. With greater efficiency and better return on investment for the customer, LMW has more than 50 million spindlage capacity installed worldwide. With an extensive sales force and service hubs, LMW has emerged as a preferred global partner who provides end-to-end services in the textile machinery world.

Name: Toyota Empilhadeiras

A Toyota, é líder mundial no mercado de empilhadeiras, produzindo e comercializando empilhadeiras desde 1959. Em 2000, adquiriu a BT, uma empresa especializada em soluções em logística e junto veio a Raymond e assim a Toyota passou a oferecer a mais completa linha de empilhadeiras do mercado.  
Com a parceria, a Toyota BT Raymond oferece: tecnologia com alta durabilidade.Uma eficiente assistência e reposição de peças, a mais ampla linha de máquinas, para toda e qualquer necessidade.

Name: SANY Saudi Arabia
Description:
SANY Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989. Since its founding, the output of SANY Heavy Industry Co., Ltd grows at a rate of over 50% annually. In 2012, SANY’s operating revenue and net profit were 46.831 billion yuan and 5.686 billion yuan respectively. In the first half 2013, its operating revenue and net profit were 22.085 billion yuan and 2.651 billion yuan respectively. In July, 2011, the British newspaper Financial Times released the 2011 list of the world’s 500 most valuable companies (FT Global 500) ranked by market capitalization. SANY was put on the list of FT Global 500. It became the unique company listed among the world’s top 500 companies in China’s construction machinery industry.


SANY has built 25 manufacturing bases, six sales regions, and over 100 offices with more than 400 agents and 8,000 suppliers worldwide. In China, SANY has established six industry parks in Beijing, Changsha, Shanghai, Shenyang, Kunshan and Urumchi. With global R&D centers and manufacturing bases in the US, Germany, India and Brazil, SANY’s products are exported to 150 countries and regions.

Description: Founded in 1992, ZOOMLION Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. is mainly engaged in developing and manufacturing major high-tech equipment in the areas of engineering industry and agricultural industry. With more than 20 years of innovation and development, the company is now a global enterprise possessing 9 major categories and 49 product lines, as well as nearly 800 leading products. Name: LoxamHune
Description:
