We provide energy efficient, reliable and IoT connected air solutions to a broad range of applications and processes used in many industries. 

For more than a century and a half, Gardner Denver has been a trusted partner for the world's most demanding and ever-changing compressed air, low pressure and vacuum needs. Equipped with the industry's widest product breadth and leading warranty programs, Gardner Denver is an expert in diverse applications. The new iConn service provides compressed air users with in-depth and real-time knowledge about their system.

Name: Barloworld Limited
Description: Barloworld is positioned as an industrial processing, distribution and services company with two primary areas of focus: Industrial Equipment and Services and Consumer Industries (food and ingredient solutions). Our provision of Industrial Equipment and related services, offers earthmoving equipment, industrial services and power systems, which enable the operation and maintenance of a large array of mining, construction and power solutions for our customers, with whom we have built enduring relationships based on mutual trust. Through our Consumer Industries business, we provide large enterprises with the ingredients essential to the manufacturing of a range of products including food and beverages, paper, pharmaceuticals, building materials and adhesives, amongst others.

Name: CASE Construction Equipment
Description:
In the business of earthmoving for 180 years, CASE sells and supports a full line of construction equipment around the world, including the first ever factory integrated backhoe loader right through to today’s excavators, motor graders, wheel loaders, vibratory compaction rollers, crawler dozers, skid steers, compact track loaders and rough-terrain forklifts.  
 
Through CASE dealers, customers have access to a truly professional partner with world-class equipment and aftermarket support, industry-leading warranties and flexible financing. 
More information is available at http://www.CaseCE.com.

Name: DINGLI
Description:
Founded in 2005, Dingli Machinery Co., Ltd. is the world's leading enterprise of intelligent aerial work platforms and one of the global top three manufacturers of aerial work platforms.

Dingli has established overseas R&D centers in MAGNI (Italy), MEC (USA) and TEUPEN (Germany), etc. Relying on China's intelligent manufacturing base, Dingli has built a development pattern of overseas R&D design combines China's intelligent manufacturing, and fully realized digital design as well as intelligent production.

Dingli is the industry leader in new energy, the world's only manufacturer of modular boom series (16-44 meters), including electric, diesel and hybrid series, etc. All booms are suitable for container transport. The scissor series (6~32 meters) includes electric and diesel models, etc. All products have completed the electrification process with completely independent intellectual property rights.

Name: Cummins Arabia
Description:
Cummins Inc., a global power leader, is a corporation of complementary business segments that design, manufacture, distribute and service a broad portfolio of power solutions. Cummins Arabia, part of Cummins Inc., combines distribution business in United Arab Emirates, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Kuwait. Equipped with a full portfolio of state of the art technologies, Cummins Arabia can provide a solution to every unique customer need from engines to generator sets to parts and services..

شركة "كمينز" المدمجة، مزوِّد عالمي لحلول الطاقة مكوّنة من قطاعات تجارية متكاملة تتخصّص في تصميم وصناعة وتوزيع وتوفير مجموعة واسعة من حلول الطاقة.

"كمينز أريبيا" هي جزء من شركة "كمينز" المدمجة، تعمل في توزيع خدمات الطاقة في دولة الإمارات العربيةالمتحدة، والمملكة العربية السعودية، والكويت. تتميّز "كمينز أريبيا" باستخدامها لأحدث التقنيات وأكثرها تقدماً لتوفر حلولاً مناسبة تُلبّي حاجات جميع عملائها.

Name: AL SHIRAWI ENTERPRISES (L.L.C.)
Description:
Al Shirawi Enterprises LLC is a leading provider of commercial vehicles, equipment, and industrial solutions across the UAE. Since 1979, we’ve built trusted partnerships with world-class brands including SCANIA commercial vehicles, CASE construction equipment and agriculture equipment, STILL forklift trucks, Manitou telehandlers, DIMOS multidirectional forklifts, Electra Electric Commercial Vehicles, TANA waste management, and Weland vertical storage lifts. 

Our expert team delivers exceptional sales and after-sales support including service and genuine spare parts across industries such as construction, transportation, logistics, agriculture, oil and gas, and waste management. 

With a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Al Shirawi Enterprises continues to drive progress across the region.

Name: Komatsu Australia
Description:
Komatsu is an industry-leading manufacturer and supplier of equipment, technologies and services for the construction, forklift, mining, industrial and forestry markets. For over a century, Komatsu equipment and services have been used by companies worldwide to develop modern infrastructure, extract fundamental minerals, maintain forests and create technology and consumer products. The company’s global service and distributor networks support customer operations, tapping into the power of data and technology to enhance safety and productivity while optimising performance. 

If you want to learn more about our parts portal, visit https://my.komatsu.com.au

Name: The Manitowoc Company
Description: Manitowoc is a standalone cranes business, creating market leading lifting solutions and manufacturing a range of innovative products and unparalleled product support services. Manitowoc’s strong brand signals our industry leadership, provides a competitive edge, and builds on our reputation for excellence. Since 1902, the vision of Manitowoc’s founding fathers have made Manitowoc a strong, respected global organization throughout the world. Today, The Manitowoc Way culture promotes innovation and velocity to better compete in an ever changing world and we are poised for success in the crane industry for many years to come. Whether lifting solutions require crawler, boom, telescoping, or tower cranes, Manitowoc’s ingenuity will be there to Build Something Real for its customers, investors, employees, and partners.

Name: JCB North America
Description:
JCB is a family company founded on October 23rd, 1945, and is now one of the world’s largest privately owned manufacturers of construction, agricultural and defense equipment, with 22 factories around the world. 

JCB North America currently employs more than 1,000 people and operates out of its headquarters in Savannah, Georgia. JCB recently began work on a new $500 million factory in San Antonio, Texas, the biggest investment in its history. JCB’s North American division also has regional offices in Dallas, Texas; Santa Monica, California; and Miami, Florida. JCB manufactures a range of more than 300 products for customers in 150 countries. 

JCB products include Loadall telescopic handlers, backhoe loaders, tracked and wheeled excavators, wheel loaders, compact excavators, skid steer loaders, compact track loaders, aerial work platforms, rough terrain forklifts and Fastrac tractors. 

For more information, visit www.jcb.com.

Name: Herrenknecht AG
Description:
Herrenknecht is a technology and market leader in the area of mechanized tunnelling systems. As the only company worldwide, Herrenknecht delivers cutting-edge tunnel boring machines for all ground conditions and in all diameters – ranging from 0.10 to 19 meters. The Herrenknecht product range includes tailor-made machines for transport tunnels (Traffic Tunnelling) and supply and disposal tunnels (Utility Tunnelling) as well as innovative solutions for the efficient installation of pipelines underground.

Under the umbrella of the Herrenknecht Group, a team of innovative specialists has formed to provide integrated solutions around tunnel construction with project-specific equipment and service packages upon request: these include separation plants, conveyor belt systems, navigation systems, rolling stock systems and segment moulds right up to turnkey lining segment production plants. The range of products also includes services in the area of technical consultancy, planning and supervision for tunnelling projects as well as personnel solutions to complement construction site crews on a temporary basis.

Herrenknecht develops innovative technical solutions to sink vertical shafts down to great depths as well as to successfully excavate sloping shafts for tunnel construction and mining. The company also produces state-of-the-art deep drilling rigs that drill down to depths of 8,000 meters as well as rigs for the exploration of shallow geothermal energy.

Name: Milacron
Description:
Milacron is a global leader in the manufacture, distribution, and service of highly engineered and customized systems within the plastic technology and processing industry. 

Our power to engineer solutions is the result of combining local expertise with a global team of the best that the industry has to offer. Our employees run the full gamut of plastics processing technology and experience. Their expertise covers: injection, co-injection, extrusion, low-pressure injection molding, process control, and life-cycle management. We have built a team that can deliver the entire spectrum of services that the plastics industry can offer.

Visit Milacron at www.milacron.com.

Name: HİDROMEK
Description:
HİDROMEK, a globally known manufacturer of construction machinery, was founded in Ankara in 1978. The founder of HİDROMEK, Hasan Basri Bozkurt, started with producing attachments for agricultural tractors.  This initiative was moved further in the following years and the first construction machine ever designed by Turkish engineers was produced. The product range was expanded in time, which led to the growth of HİDROMEK, which has around 2400 employees today. Backhoe loaders, hydraulic excavators, wheel loaders, motor graders, and soil compactors are manufactured in seven production facilities including 5 factories in Ankara, 1 factory in İzmir and 1 factory in Thailand. The new production facility located in an area of 1.4 million m2 in Ankara has been continuing. HİDROMEK, whose machines work in more than 120 countries in 6 continents, performs the management of international authorized dealers and provides sales and after-sales services through international sales and after-sales service centers such as HİDROMEK WEST in Barcelona, Spain, HİDROMEK RUSSIAN in Krasnodar, Russia and HİDROMEK JAPAN in Sagamihara, Japan.
Creating a difference in the design of construction machinery, HİDROMEK has crowned its accomplishment with many awards. As of today, HİDROMEK is the winner of a total 38 design awards, which are internationally prestigious.
HİDROMEK is the first and only Turkish machinery manufacturer which is on the "Yellow Table 2025" list of media institution KHL Group, which provides information to the whole world in respect of construction machinery and sets a reference for the whole industry, and the list contains the largest construction equipment manufacturers in the world. As per figures declared by İMDER, HİDROMEK constantly had been the market leader in Turkey for 11 years for backhoe loader sales, for 8 years for excavator sales and for 2 years for motor grader sales in the years between 2009 and 2019.

Name: Makino Asia Group
Description: Makino Asia is a fully integrated manufacturing company, incorporating research and development, engineering production and business administration under one roof.  Our operations span across China, India, Thailand, Indonesia, Vietnam, Malaysia and the Philippines. We also export to the US and Europe regions. Learn more at www.makino.com.sg

Name: New Holland Agriculture
Description:
New Holland is a world-leading agricultural equipment brand with over 125 years of experience in supporting five generations of farmers across the globe. The brand is the partner that farmers and growers can rely on to provide innovative, efficient, and sustainable farming solutions. 

New Holland offers every customer the broadest choice of easy-to-operate tractors, harvesters, foraging equipment, balers, material handlers, sprayers, tillage, seeding and planting equipment complemented by advanced Precision Land Management solutions. 

It is open and responsive, ready to understand global customers’ changing needs and on hand to help farmers get the job done.

Name: HOERBIGER
Description:
HOERBIGER is active throughout the world in the energy sector, the process industry, the automotive industry, the mechanical engineering sector, in safety engineering, and in the electrical industry. In 2023, its 6,174 employees achieved sales of 1.416 billion euros in 133 locations across 43 countries. Our products and services are used in reciprocating compressors, gas flow control units, vehicle drives, rotating unions, explosion protection, gas-powered engines, and in automobile hydraulics.

Since 1895, it has been our ambition to deliver excellence for our customers. As a result, we create an environment which allows our employees to develop their full potential and demonstrate initiative: people and success go hand in hand at HOERBIGER.

Name: Electrolux Professional Group
Description:
With 20 different brands, Electrolux Professional Group is one of the world’s leading providers of professional food, beverage, and laundry solutions. 

With equipment manufactured in 13 plants and showcased across the world in 20 centers of excellence, we reach 110 countries and meet the needs of a wide range of customers, from small cafés and launderettes to restaurant chains and public institutions, with a group sales of SEK 12.5 billion.	

We cover the entire value chain with global integrated services from planning through installation, including Connectivity, Customer Care and the Digital Platform, an intuitive, self-service portal for our distributors and partners.

We are setting the pace of our industry with concrete innovation and energy goals, like reducing CO2 emissions by 70% and becoming climate neutral in our industrial operations by 2030.

At Electrolux Professional Group, people are our priority. Our 4,300 employees are driven by a culture built on four guiding principles: be customer obsessed, build trust, be bold, and act sustainably.

Electrolux Professional Group - making your work-life easier, more profitable – and truly sustainable every day.

Name: Nordson Corporation
Description: At Nordson, we believe that anything is possible. We empower our global team of employees to engineer, manufacture, and market innovative products and systems that are essential to everyday life. These differentiated products and systems are used for precision dispensing and processing and serve a variety of end markets, including packaging, transportation, medical, and electronics. Founded in 1954, we are guided by our values of integrity, respect for people, customer passion, energy, and excellence. We care for our employees and provide them with opportunities to advance their careers and make an impact, inside and outside of work. Nordson is headquartered in Westlake, Ohio, and has direct operations in more than 35 countries to support our products and systems with application expertise and a direct global sales and service organization.

Name: HORSCH
Description:
HORSCH ist einer der weltweit führenden Hersteller von moderner und innovativer Landtechnik. Das Familienunternehmen wurde 1984 gegründet. Der Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Entwicklung von Produkten für Bodenbearbeitung, Aussaat, Pflanzenschutz und Hybrid-Landwirtschaft.
Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens liegt im bayerischen Schwandorf. Neben den drei Standorten in Deutschland gibt es weltweit mehrere Niederlassungen, wie zum Beispiel in Brasilien oder den USA. International sind rund 3.200 Mitarbeitende bei HORSCH beschäftigt. 

HORSCH is one of the worldwide leading global manufacturers of state-of-the-art and innovative agricultural technology. The family-owned company was founded in 1984. The focus is on developing products for tillage, seeding, crop care and hybrid farming. 
The company’s headquarters is located in Schwandorf, Bavaria. In addition to the three locations in Germany, HORSCH has several subsidiaries worldwide, for example in Brazil or the USA. Internationally, HORSCH employs approximately 3.200 people.

Name: Bell Equipment Mining & Construction
Description:
Established as an agricultural repair workshop on a small farm outside Empangeni 60 years ago, Bell values the roots and principles instilled by founder Irvine Bell. This is what continues to encourage us to achieve in a highly competitive industry.
Today, Bell is one of the global leaders in the Articulated Dump Truck (ADT) market. The company's engineering expertise and product quality are comparable with some of the biggest global industry players, and Bell is immensely proud of the ground-breaking technological advancements it has developed on South African soil with its team of local engineers.
In Southern Africa, Bell Equipment holds strategic dealerships for equipment manufactured by key global manufacturing leaders, thereby strengthening its position as an equipment supplier of choice.
Our core product, the Bell ADT, is complemented by a diverse range of equipment, including Wheel Loaders, Rigid and Articulated Haulers, Excavators, Motor Graders, Dozers, Tractor Loader Backhoes, Tri-Wheeler rough terrain material handling equipment, a comprehensive range of compaction machinery,  and even a fully-kitted material processing product line.
Supported by an all-inclusive network of Bell Customer Service Centres and independent dealers, Bell Equipment is strategically positioned in Africa as a one-stop shop with over 100 products providing 'strong reliable machines, strong reliable support to the agriculture, forestry, waste handling, construction, and mining industries. 
Bell Equipment is a global supplier, with 50 000 machines operating in over 80 countries around the world. The Group has nine marketing and support operations outside of South Africa and more than 150 offshore distribution outlets and dealerships. Locally, we boast more than 25 distribution outlets across the nation, and have over 3 500 people in our employ. With local pride and international standards, Bell helps you build it better.

Name: PESA S/A
Description:
A PESA é uma empresa líder de mercado. Trabalha com vendas, locação e prestação de serviços no segmento de máquinas e equipamentos. Como distribuidor Caterpillar, atua em todos os estados da região Sul do país, e com locação de equipamentos em todo o território nacional, apresentando expressivo crescimento no mercado nacional.

Se você gosta de desafios e procura se desenvolver em uma grande empresa, some-se ao nosso time de sucesso, venha para a PESA!

Name: Genie
Description: Genie is here to deliver the quality your business needs: Durable equipment, expert support, and dependable parts. We specialize in material lifts, portable aerial work platforms, scissor lifts, and self-propelled telescopic and articulated booms to help elevate your work.

Name: Lely
Description:
The official global account of Lely 

As an international family business in the agricultural sector, we spend every day making farmers’ lives easier with innovative solutions and tailored services. We offer solutions for almost all activities in the dairy farm: from milking to feeding and cleaning. We provide advice on how to organise a dairy farm smartly with the use of management systems.

For more information, visit www.lely.com/global/

Name: SLTL Group - Sahajanand Laser Technology Ltd
Description:
Sahajanand Laser Technology Limited (SLTL) - A pioneer in the field of lasers in India, caters to the need of various industries. The company offers pinnacle solutions with a wide range of laser system for diversified industrial applications such as: Cutting, Marking, Welding, Micro Machining, Solar Cell Scribing/ Cutting, Diamond processing and scanning, etc. SLTL is one of the few manufacturers in the world providing customized Computer Numeric Controlled (CNC) laser solutions.
For more detail please visit : www.sltl.com         

Our Happy Customers @ https://www.sltl.com/testimonials/

Name: KraussMaffei
Description:
KraussMaffei is one of the world's leading manufacturers of machines and systems for producing and processing plastics and rubber. Our range of products and services covers all technologies in injection molding, extrusion, reaction process machinery and additive manufacturing. This gives us a unique selling proposition in the industry.
With strong innovation capacity, we ensure sustainable added value for customers across their entire value chain, with standardised and individual product, process, digital and service solutions. 
We deliver these services to customers in the automotive, packaging, medical and construction industries, and to electrical and electronic product and household appliance manufacturers, among others.

Name: UNOX S.p.A.
Description:
Every day, we dedicate our efforts to helping professionals in the gastronomy sector experience the taste of success. This is why we design, produce, and bring to market technologically advanced solutions for cooking and hot food preservation. Since 1990, we have continuously expanded our reach, making Unox the leading global brand in the commercial oven industry, both in terms of units sold and ENERGY STAR-certified ovens. 

With a team of over 1,300 talented individuals, we operate in 42 countries and distribute our ovens in more than 110 nations, including Italy, where our headquarters and production facilities are located. Our passion for innovation is unstoppable. We continually research and develop new cooking solutions to minimize consumption and emissions, while improving cooking performance and results. We offer cutting-edge technologies that exceed the expectations of the most demanding chefs, applying the most intriguing trends in technology and design to our smart ovens. At Unox, we are deeply committed to creating an environment where our employees can grow both professionally and personally. Thanks to this ongoing commitment, we have been recognized by the Great Place to Work Institute as one of the best workplaces in Italy for innovation, gender equality, and attractiveness to millennials since 2018. As of 2023, we have also earned the EQUAL-SALARY certification, a recognition that makes us exceptionally proud and testifies to the pay equity between men and women within our company.

Are you prepared to immerse yourself in a forward-thinking, innovation-driven organization? Come aboard our worldwide team and explore new horizons with us!

Name: Kelvion
Description:
Welcome to Kelvion! 
Kelvion is the leading global developer and manufacturer of heat exchange solutions. Renowned for its commitment to innovation and sustainability, the company delivers cutting-edge thermal management solutions that empower customers to ensure reliable and efficient operations. Kelvion’s extensive portfolio serves a wide range of applications such as data centres, crypto-mining, hydrogen production, heat pumps, marine, HVAC, refrigeration and the food and beverage industry. The company's global sales, service and production network ensures that Kelvion is always available to support customers wherever they are. Whether supporting site installation, providing on-site technical service or replacement parts – Kelvion’s comprehensive range of service offerings is designed to optimise performance and extend the product lifecycle to ensure sustainability and reliability. 

Together, We Shape the Future.


Imprint: https://www.kelvion.com/imprint/

Name: Ingersoll Rand EMEIA Compression Systems
Description:
We are a globally diversified industrial firm providing products, services and solutions to enhance the quality and comfort in homes and buildings, transport and protect food and perishables, and enhance industrial productivity and efficiency. Ingersoll-Rand (India) Limited has around 1400 employees based out of 15 locations in the country.  
Our success at Ingersoll Rand is enabled by the commitment and dedication of our 16000 employees globally. With our focus on a progressive, diverse and inclusive culture, growth through innovation, emerging markets and services and operational excellence, we are a company that achieves real progress for our customers around the world.
To achieve this progress, we rely on our Vision, Purpose, Values, Competencies and Brand Promise – the principles that unify us in our cause, inspire us in our work and guide us as a cohesive global team. 
Our product portfolio consists of Industrial products such as compressors, tools, material handling and pumps.

Name: GE Additive
Description: Colibrium Additive – a GE Aerospace company, is a world leader in metal additive design and manufacturing, a pioneering process that has the power and potential to transform businesses. Through our integrated offering of additive experts, advanced machines, and quality powders, we empower our customers to build innovative new products.
Location: West Chester Trade Center, Building 2, West Chester

Name: HD Hyundai Construction Equipment India Pvt Ltd
Description: HD Hyundai Construction Equipment India Pvt. Ltd. is a major player in manufacturing advanced Hydraulic Excavators and Material Handling Equipment.

Name: Colibrium Additive - a GE Aerospace company
Description: Colibrium Additive – a GE Aerospace company, is a trusted leader in providing 3D printers, powders, and services for industrial scale metal additive manufacturing. We empower our customers to design and build innovative new products that solve manufacturing challenges and improve business outcomes.

Name: Zoomlion Brasil
Description: Somos a Zoomlion Brasil, parte da Zoomlion Group, desenvolvemos e fabricamos equipamentos de alta tecnologia desde 1992. Nossas soluções incluem guindastes, máquinas de bombeamento e transporte de concreto, plataformas elevatórias, gruas e empilhadeiras.

Name: Matsuura Machinery Ltd
Description:
Providing UK Manufacturers, OEM's, SME's and Sub-contractors the best fully automated CNC machining solutions and 3D Printer Technology, innovative engineers and optimised manufacturing processes. Backed by world class customer support and outstanding multi-skilled engineers.

Our product portfolio spans the whole spectrum of CNC machine tools from the world's premium machine tool brands, supporting a diverse range of UK customers spanning all industrial sectors.

Matsuura Machinery Ltd is an authorised reseller of HP Multi-Jet Fusion 3D printers, Desktop Metal 3D printers & DyeMansion 3D post-processing systems.

For more information, please call 01530 511400 or visit www.matsuura.co.uk

Name: KARL MAYER
Description:
KARL MAYER is an innovative market leader as well as driving force in the textile machinery building. The manufacturer offers perfect solutions for the fields of warp knitting, technical textiles and warp preparation for weaving.

To ensure the success of its international customers, KARL MAYER has always been eager to provide its clients with the best economical and technical products and services and to offer innovations which bring fresh impetus to the textile world.

With employees worldwide, the international organization produces in its main markets, so that KARL MAYER is always close to its customers and their needs. Today, the company has e.g. subsidiaries in China, USA, India, Italy, Hong Kong, Japan, Bangladesh and Switzerland as well as agencies all over the world.

Please find our imprint here: 
https://www.karlmayer.com/en/legal-notice/

Please find our privacy policy here:
https://www.karlmayer.com/en/privacy-policy/

Name: Waagner-Biro Stage Systems
Description:
The Waagner-Biro Stage Systems Group as one of the worlds leading companies in its area offers a full range of stage engineering equipment for large and medium stages and mobile building equipment for arenas, stadiums and multipurpose facilities.

The world-wide distribution network ensures close contact to customers and warrants the efficiency of the deliveries offered and assures the performance of the delivered equipment.

As a complete solutions provider, Waagner-Biro Stage Systems plans and realizes high-performance stage systems for opera houses, theatres, concert and music halls, event centers, multipurpose halls, congress and exhibition facilities, stadiums and arenas.

Special stage engineering equipment for cruise ships, computer controlled stage management systems, mobile building equipment like automatic telescopic seating stand systems for maximum flexibility and economic utilization of entertainment arenas, telescopic acoustic walls, mobile air cushion seating systems, acoustic ceiling panel systems, special platforms and wagon systems complete the wide product range of Waagner-Biro Stage Systems.

Over a century of experience and comprehensive system solutions specially tailored, both in technical and economic terms, make Waagner-Biro Stage Systems an internationally sought-after partner for the specific stage engineering requirements of opera houses, theatres, multipurpose centers, concert halls, special-event centers, stadium and arenas and special mobile building equipment such as automatic telescopic stands. Complicated sequences within a production constantly pose new challenges to the stage equipment. A highly advanced stage control system guarantees a great measure of flexibility and safety to meet the tough requirements associated with complex, safe and fast scene changes.

Name: EBARA Bombas América do Sul – EBAS
Description:
A EBAS foi a primeira unidade industrial criada fora do Japão e possui hoje a maior linha de produtos no ramo. Construídos a partir da tecnologia japonesa, as bombas e motores submersos EBARA são reconhecidos como equipamentos da mais alta qualidade e confiabilidade, constantemente modernizados para adequação às exigências do mercado nacional e internacional, fatores esses que também contribuíram para nos tornarmos a primeira fábrica do Grupo EBARA, fora do Japão, e a primeira do segmento de bombas submersas no Brasil, a receber a certificação ISO 9002:1994 em 30 de agosto de 1996 e a ter o Sistema da Qualidade certificado com a ISO 9001:2000 desde março de 2003.
Nossas atividades contemplam não somente o processo produtivo, mas as atividades administrativas, comerciais, marketing, órgãos públicos, engenharia e projetos, assistência técnica e operações de Comércio Exterior. Ademais, em busca de uma maior proximidade entre o fabricante e o cliente final, a EBAS também têm estabelecido centros de distribuição nas regiões norte, nordeste, centro-oeste e sudeste do país, além de uma rede de vendas que cobre todo o território brasileiro, de forma capilar, vasta e abrangente, com mais de 5.000 revendedores, mais de 500 bases de atendimento para assistência técnica e mais de 70 representantes comerciais.
Temos hoje a maior linha de produtos no ramo, abrangendo as categorias de Bombas Injetora, Monoestágio, Multiestágio, Normalizadas, Piscinas e Lazer, Quadro de Comando, Sistema de Pressurização, Sistema Solar ÉCAROS, Submersas, Submersíveis, Tratorizadas e Utilização em Balsas, atendendo assim as diversas áreas de atividade, como Agricultura e Irrigação, Edifícios e Habitação, Sistemas de Esgoto e Drenagem, Bombagem de Águas Residuais, Tratamento e Abastecimento de Água, Sistemas de Combate a Incêndios e Indústrias em Geral.

Name: Komatsu Forest
Description:
As one of the world's leading manufacturers of forestry, construction, mining and utility equipment, Komatsu has stood by your side for an entire century, offering unique quality, peace of mind, knowledge and support.

Our way of working, from innovation to manufacturing, is distinguished by our partnership with customers. Together, we create the solutions required to achieve a sustainable future for people, businesses and our planet.

Name: FRITSCH Bakery Technologies
Description:
Welcome to the world of baking technology - 
Welcome to FRITSCH. 

FRITSCH is known as a baking machine manufacturer with a truly #PassionForDough. 

FRITSCH is specialised within the sector of dough sheeting, forming, and processing. 

The German company has been sharing this “Passion for Dough” with its customers since its foundation in 1926. 500 employees are committed to developing solutions that inspire customers - from artisan bakeries to industrial-sized bakeries - and help them to achieve their pastry products of choice.  

FRITSCH is part of the #MULTIVAC Group: www.multivac-group.com 

Legal notice: https://www.fritsch-group.com/en/privacy/
Imprint: https://www.fritsch-group.com/en/imprint/

Name: Pedrollo S.p.A.
Description:
Engineering and manufacturing electric water pumps since 1974, Pedrollo is now a reference mark in the water supply sector worldwide.

Its Head Quarter and plant in San Bonifacio, Verona occupy an area of over 151,000 square metres. High industrial automation and technology position the company at the highest level in its field, both for consistent investment in innovative R&D and for its ability to control quality throughout the entire production process.
Pedrollo produces about 2,5 million electric water pumps yearly, shipping to customers in over 160 countries. It's a truly global company while manufacturing 100% Made in Italy. 

The range of products includes surface pumps, submersible pumps and motors and submersible drainage pumps, covering most applications for domestic, civil, light industrial and agricultural use.

Environmental sustainability and CSR are key values to Pedrollo, ehical business being its guiding principle since its foundation.

Pedrollo is technology, innovation, passion, solidarity, Made in Italy.

Name: Gleason Corporation
Description: Gleason is a global leader in gear technology. Gleason’s "Total Gear Solutions" range from gear and transmission design software to the development and production of gear manufacturing machines and related accessories, gear metrology equipment and automation systems. Gleason products are used by customers in the automotive, commercial vehicle, aerospace, agricultural, mining, energy, construction, power tool, marine and many other industrial equipment markets. Gleason has manufacturing facilities in the U.S., Brazil, Germany, Switzerland, India, China and Japan, and operates sales and service offices in North and South America, Europe and Asia Pacific. For more information about Gleason Corporation, please visit www.gleason.com.

Name: Fosber S.p.A.
Description:
Fosber is a leading global supplier for the design, construction and installation of complete lines as well as individual machine units for the production of corrugated board packaging.

Originally founded in Lucca in 1978, through its Italian headquarters and strategically located subsidiaries in the USA and China, the Fosber Group today supplies complete corrugators as well as major machine upgrades across the globe with a total dedication to quality and customer service.

Our renowned focus on continuous evolution and innovation, coupled with our constant investment in R&D are the keys of the company's success. In what are continuously changing and evermore demanding markets, the Fosber Group delivers the most up-to-date technology to guarantee its customers high performance, total production flexibility, dramatically reduced running costs, less complexity, and enhanced reliability.

Name: TRUMPF Deutschland
Description: Werkzeugmaschinen, Laser und Lasersysteme – das ist das Metier der TRUMPF Werkzeugmaschinen Deutschland Vertrieb + Service GmbH + Co. KG und der TRUMPF Laser- und Systemtechnik SE mit Sitz in Ditzingen. Für die flexible Blech- und Rohrbearbeitung sowie die Lasermaterialbearbeitung bieten wir Ihnen Fertigungslösungen zum Biegen, Stanzen, 2D- und 3D-Laserschneiden und Laserschweißen, Markieren und Mikrobearbeitung sowie für kombinierte Stanz-Laser-Prozesse und additive Fertigung. Wir beraten und unterstützen Sie bei der Vernetzung Ihrer Maschinen und Laser mit Software und Services. So können Sie Schritt für Schritt Ihre Smart Factory aufbauen und sich für die digitale Zukunft Ihrer Fertigung rüsten.

Name: Carpigiani Group
Description:
Since 1946, Italian firm Carpigiani makes renowned machines for the Italian-style fresh ice cream (gelato). Carpigiani is part of the Italy-based Ali Group, one of the world's largest manufacturers and suppliers of equipment for the foodservice industry.
Today Carpigiani Group – three plants in Italy, one in Spain and one in China, commercial branches in France, Germany, United Kingdom, USA, Japan and China, - is the global leader in the production of equipment for artisanal gelato and one of the most important player for frozen desserts equipment. Moreover, the company is the leading multibrand manufacturer of equipment for soft serve, frozen yogurt, shakes, slush, whipped cream and hot chocolate.
The traditional art of Italian gelato makers and pastry chefs is handed down to new generations thanks to the activities of Carpigiani Gelato University, the world’s first School dedicated to the “art and business” of ice cream. Through its Gelato University, Carpigiani Group offers beginner and advanced courses at its headquarters in Anzola Emilia near Bologna and in most of its branches around the world.
Open to visitors since September 2012, the Carpigiani Gelato Museum is a center of cultural excellence dedicated to the understanding and study of the history, culture, and technology of gelato and the expertise of the innovators who drove its evolution over the centuries.

Name: AmbaFlex Spiral Conveyor Solutions
Description:
AmbaFlex is the partner for customised material handling systems based on spiral conveying technology! Our unique SpiralVeyor is used in a wide range of markets and applications for vertical transportation, temporary storage and the accumulation of single goods and packed products.

We are an independent global company that has developed, produces and also maintains the SpiralVeyor system to ensure that our customers receive the most cost effective solutions available today.

Users all over the world already appreciate the level of quality we deliver and our proven experience in their markets. To maintain this leading and trendsetting position, we continuously invest in product innovation and the development of functional solutions in close cooperation with our customers.

We ensure increased up-time by offering global support and through our professional approach to co-operation. We prefer to work with our customers based on mutual respect and through a continuing dialogue.

AmbaFlex employees are highly knowledgeable and experienced and therefore always able to build the ideal solution together with you!

Name: Gallus Group
Description:
Gallus, a subsidiary of Heidelberger Druckmaschinen AG (HEIDELBERG), with production facilities in Switzerland and Germany, is a leading company in the development, production and sale of conventional and digital narrow-web, reel-fed presses designed for the label and packaging business. The machine portfolio is augmented by a broad range of screen printing plates (Gallus Screeny), globally decentralised service operations, and a broad offering of printing accessories and replacement parts. Products and services of the Gallus brand are distributed through the global Heidelberg Sales and Service network. The comprehensive portfolio also includes consulting services provided by label experts in all relevant printing and process engineering tasks. 

Gallus employs around 270 people, of whom 163 are based in Switzerland where the company has its headquarters in St. Gallen. Gallus machine systems are assembled at Langgöns-Oberkleen factory in Germany. This plant employs 130 people, many of whom are engineers and technicians.

Name: Saudi Parts Center Company
Description:
Saudi Part Center was established in 1988 with a clear and open vision to provide customers with spare parts that are alternative to genuine parts with comparable quality and less costs, especially for agriculture and Construction equipment, in addition to trucks. 
Saudi Parts Center is still committed to that vision through 11 branches and three service centers specialized in Turbochargers, by which covering all regions in Saudi Arabia and is the most expanded company among others in the same field. 
The activity of the Saudi Parts Center, moreover, maintains dedicated departments that look after businesses and governmental sectors as well as an international sales division. 
A wholesale division extends competitive products for parts dealers all over Saudi Arabia's regions as well as the governmental sales division which effectively cooperates with government authorities in order to offer them highest support where the international sales division serves many countries in Northern Africa and the Middle East. 
The Saudi Parts Center mission which was formulated by senior management, reads: To work in the field of spare parts for Constructions Equipment and Trucks and to contribute saving our customers’ resources through offering guaranteed quality alternative products and services in competitive prices at the right time. 
Each word of this mission was precisely and carefully chosen and everybody in the company is committed to providing its essence. As we at Saudi Parts Center not only save our customers’ resources by offering low price products but also by providing them with products that contributes in extending the life of their assets. Moreover we are committed to offer all of which at the right time by having high levels of inventories available in our warehouses.

Name: Kubota Holdings Europe
Description:
Kubota had the first establishment in Europe more than 40 years ago and has shown a significant growth since. In the European region Kubota currently has more than 4,400 employees and achieves sales over € 2.2 billion. 
The European business organization is organized in five Business Units (Tractor, Construction Machinery, Engine, Implements and Parts) and counts 12 manufacturing facilities and 25  distribution, service and sales offices covering the whole European region offering products including tractors, construction machinery, engines, agricultural machinery, turf equipment and utility vehicles. 
To embody Kubota’s European ambitions, Kubota Holdings Europe B.V. was established in 2017 as the Regional Headquarters of Kubota in Europe. The main goal is to support the European activities in driving lean and efficient processes aimed at creating customer value. 
Subsidiaries in Europe are:
-	Kubota Baumaschinen GmbH
-	Kubota Deutschland GmbH
-	Kubota España, S.A
-	Kubota Europe S.A.S
-	Kubota Farm Machinery Europe S.A.S
-	Kubota Turkey Makine Ticaret Limited Şirketi
-	Kubota UK Limited
-	Kverneland Group (10 manufacturing facilities and 17 sales companies)
For more information on Kubota in Europe please visit www.kubota-eu.com

Kubota Corporation
The mother company Kubota Corporation has been a leading manufacturer of agricultural, turf, hay and construction equipment since 1890. With world Headquarters in Osaka Japan, approximately 40,000 employees and offices in more than 110 countries throughout North America, Europe and Asia, Kubota achieved revenues last year over $16 billion. Although, agricultural equipment is Kubota’s primary line of products, Kubota also produces a diverse line of other products including city wide water filtration systems, irrigation, piping, roofing, housing and large underground valves. For more information on Kubota worldwide, please visit www.kubota-global.net

Name: Kärcher North America Inc.
Description:
Kärcher is the leading manufacturer of commercial, industrial and consumer cleaning equipment and technologies in North America. Kärcher North America is one of the largest subsidiaries of the Kärcher Group with over 1,150 employees working at eight facilities (including four manufacturing locations) throughout the US, Canada and Mexico. 

 Main locations in North America:
• Blackwood, New Jersey 
• Vancouver, Washington 
• Aurora, Colorado 
• Monterrey, Mexico 
• Fayetteville, Arkansas 
• Mississauga, Ontario (Canada)

In North America, Kärcher is producing and distributing products under the brands Kärcher, Landa, Hotsy, Watermaze and Spraymart.

This worldwide leader in cleaning technology will continue to distinguish itself in the future with its inventive spirit, top-class performance and innovative cleaning solutions.                            .

Name: Máquinas Furlan Ltda
Description:
A Máquinas Furlan é uma fabricante de soluções para a indústria extrativa. Com um portifólio de 150 equipamentos, a empresa oferece uma ampla gama de acessórios e peças de reposição fundidas em aço para atender o setor mineral.
Fundada em 1962, na cidade de Limeira, no interior do Estado de São Paulo, a Furlan se consolidou como referência no Brasil, nas Américas do Sul, Central e do Norte. No parque industrial de 210 mil m², a fabricante agrega recursos tecnológicos e profissionais qualificados para o desenvolvimento e fabricação de produtos empregados nas operações de cominuição (britagem, trituração e moagem) e no processamento de minérios (classificação, transporte, piroprocessamento etc.).

Name: Tractel
Description:
Tractel is a world leading safety specialist providing reliable, innovative and cost-effective working-at-height solutions and services. These solutions are used in many end-user applications, in particular in industrial, construction, energy, telecoms and infrastructure projects.

Tractel’s solutions portfolio comprises of:
•	Height Safety - Leading provider of working-at-height personal protective equipment – fall arrest devices (stopfor, blocfor, derope), anchors, harnesses - as well as collective protective equipment, such as guardrails, (Bluewater), safety gates (Fabenco) and safety nets (Knot).
•	Load Measurement & Control – European leader in industrial load measurement and control – dynafor, handifor, dynasafe, dynaline, dynarope, and dynaplug.
•	Lifting & Handling – World leader in pass-through manual wire rope hoists (tirfor) and pass- through electrical wire rope hoists (tirak, minifor), clamps,pulleys and hooks, as well as ground handling equipment.
•	Temporary & Permanent Access – World leader in hoists (tirak) and aluminium platforms (ALTA, skysafe), mast climbing work and transport platforms and construction elevators (Scanclimber), Building Maintenance Units and permanent access solutions for industry, infrastructure and buildings.
•	Services- in-situ inspection and maintenance services for permanent access equipment,  workshop maintenance and general overhauls of mechanical equipment, as well as training and rental services.

Established more than 70 years ago, Tractel today has significant manufacturing facilities in Europe (France, Germany, Poland, Spain), the USA (Minneapolis, Houston), Canada (Toronto, Montreal), China (Shanghai), Singapore and Turkey. These facilities are supported by dedicated centres of excellence in R&D, engineering and safety standards. Tractel has customers in 120 countries, subsidiaries in 19 countries, 10,000 distributors around the world, and employs around 1,100 people.

Name: Neles
Description: Neles is now part of Valmet. From April 1, 2022, it operates as Valmet’s Flow Control business line. Be sure to follow us @valmetglobal for new updates and opportunities. #Valmet #ReinventingReliability #valmetflowcontrol #forwardtogether

Name: Noblelift Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Noblelift Group is a Chinese leading manufacturer and service provider for material handling equipment and logistics solutions. The company is the largest manufacturer of hand pallet trucks globally for more than 13 years, and the leading manufacturer for Class 1/2/3 forklifts in China. Noblelift is dedicated to be the leading manufacturer and solution provider for material handling business worldwide.

Statistics and facts
Noblelift headquarter is located in Changxing, Zhejiang , 1.5 Hour from Shanghai, with manufacturing space covering more than 390,000㎡.
Noblelift has 2000 employees in China, Malaysia, Europe and USA, working together and achieved an average 15% growth annually in sales for recent 10 years. With a global sales of 1.02 million industrial trucks and over 500 installed systems, Noblelift employees expect generating more than 350M US$ revenue for the calendar year 2017.
On January 28th, 2015 Noblelift was Public-listed in Shanghai Stock  Exchange, Noblelift is committed to be the leading manufacturer and logistics solution provider in the MHE industry worldwide.

Name: INRODA Máquinas Agrícolas
Description:
A Inroda tem mais de 60 anos de história e é especialista em implementos agrícolas focados no preparo do solo. Ao longo dos anos, nos tornamos referência do setor no mercado nacional e internacional.

Contamos com uma família completa de produtos: roçadeiras de arrasto, colheitadeiras, escarificadores, distribuidores, que levam qualidade, tecnologia e inovação para o campo.

Siga o nosso perfil e confira todas as novidades.

Juntos, somos força em campo!

Name: TRUMPF India
Description:
TRUMPF (India) Pvt Ltd is established in July 2006, with its head office at Pune and this is a wholly owned subsidiary of TRUMPF Werkzeugmaschinen GmbH, Germany.

Sales, Service and application support for Laser, punching, bending machines.
Divisions: Machine tools and Laser.

Products: 2D Laser cutting machines, CNC punching and bending machines, 3D cutting, welding machines, Marking systems, OEM lasers: CO2 Laser, Solid State Disk laser, Diode laser, Pulse laser, Fiber laser.

Name: Sumitomo Drive Technologies USA
Description:
Sumitomo Drive Technologies brings the products and service expertise of three companies together as one to provide engineered solutions to our industrial power transmission customers.

With installations worldwide, our products are the preferred choice by many of the largest and most recognized global companies. We understand your drive requirements, and through the synergies of our three organizations, we are confident we can provide you with the best solutions available today.

Name: SCM Frigo S.p.A.
Description:
ONE GOAL AND A TEAM OF EXPERTS
SCM FRIGO’s goal is continuous innovation pursued through research, design and production of CO2 refrigeration systems which are highly sustainable for the environment.
All this is made possible by a close-knit team of highly skilled professionals all working toward one end goal. We are natural born optimists, always striving to become better and better at doing what we believe in.

A “NATURALLY” SHARED COMMITMENT
We believe that, through our work, we can help create a more sustainable future: since 2004, we have worked to develop technologies that use natural gases as refrigerants, thus becoming leaders in the production of CO2 refrigeration systems.

ONE BRAND, MANY SOLUTIONS
Natural gas refrigeration systems are our mission and the main assets of our human resources are enthusiasm, team spirit, initiative, willingness to work hard and result orientation
Thanks to this corporate culture, our wide range of condensing units and refrigeration units make SCM FRIGO spa a unique manufacturer in the European scenario.

OUR VALUES
Our core values are all-around customer service, technical expertise, production flexibility and synergism with suppliers.
Location: Sant'Angelo di Piove di Sacco, Veneto

Name: BHS Corrugated North America
Description:
BHS Corrugated is the world’s largest provider of solutions for the Corrugated Industry. 

BHS Robotics is our world-class system integrated, offering leading technology, comprehensive capability, and extensive experience.

Our main characteristics include competence, innovation and a passionate commitment to excellence, thus making us a strong and reliable partner in the industry. We support our customers every step of the way in 26 countries, with approximately 2,500 employees worldwide.

Name: Marel Meat
Description:
Marel Meat is a leading global supplier of integrated systems and advanced stand-alone processing equipment to the red meat industry – from live animal receipt to finished packs.

Our cutting edge equipment and software help meat processors of all sizes, in all markets, to operate at peak productivity and enhance the overall quality and value of meat products.

At Marel, we can offer you a world of opportunities, allowing you to inspire, innovate and set global standards wherever you are. Learn more and apply now at https://jobs.marel.com/global/en

Name: Bedeschi S.p.a.
Description:
Bedeschi is a family owned company established in 1908 close to Venice, in the North Eastern part of Italy. In the last decade the company has experienced a big growth becoming one of the leading providers of integrated solutions for bulk material handling in many different industries.
Bedeschi in the fifties was able to differentiate its field of operation from bricks industry (where the Company was born and still one of its BUs) entering the cement business leveraging on the ability to handle wet and sticky raw materials typical of the brick manufacturing process. This know how satisfied a need of the cement manufacturer when moving from wet to dry process and allowed Bedeschi to qualify as a reliable supplier to cement players, being end users or engineering company.
After this first step, the Company kept increasing both its offers of products and services with three main guidelines: to innovate for better products, to provide tailor made solutions and to keep in house manufacturing of the most critical components.
Bedeschi is today the only provider with its own manufacturing facilities in Europe: the company operates two workshops in North Italy for a total of more of 40.000 square meter. This choice provides the highest reliability in the manufacturing quality, spare parts logistics and fastest product optimization being design and manufacturing located in the same place.
As of today Bedeschi is the only worldwide provider with recent and successfully references with coal, fertilizers, grain, limestone, bauxite, iron ore ecc. both for off-shore and on shore applications as well as industrial plants.

Name: McCloskey International
Description: Celebrating our 40th year in 2025, McCloskey International leads the screening and crushing industry with a complete line of equipment including crushers, screeners, stackers, shredders and washing systems. Built with power and durability as standards, every product is field-tested before being deployed in a wide range of industries which include compost screening, aggregates processing, waste management and recycling, construction & demolition, infrastructure and roadbuilding, landscaping and organics.

Name: Finanzauto
Description:
Finanzauto es una empresa multi-industria con servicio en toda España. Somos el distribuidor oficial de Caterpillar en España, y también de otras marcas entre las que destacan Sandvik, Konrad, Prinoth, Noe y MaK. Nuestra compañía engloba varias divisiones: ► Finanzauto Cat | Maquinaria de Obra Pública y Construcción (Marcas Cat y Sandvik) ► Finanzauto Forestal (Marcas Cat, Konrad, Prinoth y Noe) ► Finanzauto Energía: Motores industriales y Grupos Electrógenos (Marca Cat) ► Finanzauto Marine: Motores y soluciones energéticas para el sector marino (Marca Cat y MaK) Además, no sólo nos dedicamos a la venta de máquinas y motores, nuevos y usados, sino que también ofrecemos un amplio servicio de postventa y alquiler en todo el territorio peninsular. En Finanzauto llevamos 90 años colaborando en el desarrollo de la economía española y formamos parte de un grupo internacional italiano, el grupo TESYA, compartiendo su filosofía y valores: "Powering Your Growth".
Finanzauto engloba varias divisiones de negocio: máquinas de obras públicas, máquinas de minería y construcción y sistemas energéticos (motores industriales, marinos y grupos electrógenos). Y es hoy una empresa sólida y potente, en permanente evolución y con una gran diversidad de soluciones para sus clientes.
Location: Arganda del Rey, Community of Madrid

Name: AMBORETTO BOMBAS LTDA
Description: O GRUPO AMBORETTO tem como política da qualidade a satisfação dos seus clientes por meio do desenvolvimento de soluções para bombeamentos e sistemas de manuseio de fluidos oferecendo produtos inovadores projetados e desenvolvidos por uma equipe capacitada e comprometida em atender aos requisitos estatutários e regulamentares aplicáveis. Tudo isso com foco na melhoria contínua do sistema de gestão da qualidade.

Name: Cascade Corporation
Description:
Cascade Corporation is a global leader in the design, manufacture and marketing of materials handling equipment and related technologies.

As Cascade lays the groundwork for continued growth and success, our primary objectives are:

    * Ensure customer satisfaction by continually improving the quality and value of Cascade products and services.
    * Provide all employees with challenging and rewarding opportunities to utilize their talents and experience in contributing to our shared success.
    * Earn a return on our capital that ensures the long term financial health and viability of our company.

Success in the pursuit of these goals requires that all employees strive for excellence in everything they do in every aspect of our business.

Continuous improvement is essential -- in our products, our services, our interpersonal relationships, our competitiveness and our profitability.

Name: KOSME
Description:
KOSME designs and manufacturers a full range Packaging and Beverage lines, providing custom solutions based on the philosophy: high performance, highly reliable, simple to use.
Kosme guarantees world coverage with direct sales and sales through agents.
The worldwide, young, flexible, highly motivated organization will provide you with innovative solutions.
The company employs technical specialists that consult with customers and develop specific solutions for any application.
Kosme's Service and Spare Parts departments are rapid and efficient thanks to the highly skilled staff.
Each year the number of employees and tools available to assist customers grows in proportion to the number of Kosme machines installed across the world.
Kosme's network of associated companies and agents now covers the five continents and guarantees our high quality standard and rapid emergency service.
Today, Kosme is a company that can provide you with competitive, reliable alternative solutions in the vast Packaging & Beverage industry.

Name: FJDynamics
Description: FJDynamics is a robotics company focused on digitalization, automation, and  new energy. We are committed to creating practical and affordable robots for the most labor-intensive industries and using our technology to drive AI adoption across sectors for improved productivity and working environment. Today, our solutions are widely applied in agriculture, landscaping, construction, surveying, and facility services. As our business expands globally, we are excited to collaborate with partners and clients to create a better future for the world.

Name: Ilapak Packaging Machinery
Description:
As one of the world’s leading manufacturers, IMA ILAPAK, with its vast range of machinery, can satisfy virtually all form, fill and seal packaging requirements: modified atmosphere, horizontal and vertical packaging, product handling, automation and cartoning.

ILAPAK’s purpose is to provide our customers with packaging solutions tailored precisely to their needs, to minimising their cost per pack by means of very reliable equipment and top quality service.

Customer service begins with a tailor-made system and continues through installation, commissioning, training, technical assistance and the supply of spare parts.
Represented in more than 50 countries in the world by its own network of sales & service subsidiaries and a number of qualified agents, ILAPAK is the point of reference in the packaging market.

- Founded in 1970.
- Headquarters in Lugano, Switzerland.
- Part of the IMA Group.
- 14 subsidiaries worldwide.
- 5 manufacturing plants on 3 continents.
- Over 450 employees.
- One of the largest Customers Service teams in the industry.
- More than 600 machines delivered per year.
- ISO 9001:2000 and ISO 14001:2004 certified.


At ILAPAK we give you our commitment, our 360° Commitment. You want us to cover it all for you: from the first project meeting with one of our industry specialists, to maintaining your machine with one of our factory trained locally-based engineers, you expect us to think around the issues and deliver the solutions, and that is exactly what we do, from every angle, 360°.

Visit our website at https://ilapak.com/
Check out our Privacy Policy at https://www.ilapak.com/privacy

Name: NETZSCH Group
Description:
We are a mid-sized, family-owned German company engaging in the manufacture of machinery and instrumentation with worldwide production, sales, and service branches. Without losing view of our regional roots, we strive for global market penetration. Regionality and globality are not mutually exclusive terms in our world.

Our business units stand for individual solutions at the highest level. More than 4,000 employees in 36 countries and a worldwide sales and service network ensure customer proximity and competent service.

At the same time, our performance standards are high. We promise our customers Proven Excellence - outstanding performance in all areas. We have been proving that we can do this time and again since 1873.

The NETZSCH Group consists of three Business Units under the umbrella of the Erich NETZSCH GmbH & Co. Holding KG:

1 Pumps & Systems
Always the right positive displacement pump for your application.

2 Grinding & Dispersing
Comprehensive machine program for wet and dry grinding as well as mixing, dispersing, homogenizing and classifying.

3 Analyzing & Testing
Thermal analysis instruments, instruments for the determination of thermophysical properties and fire testers.

 Imprint: https://www.netzsch.com/en/meta-nav/imprint
 Privacy Policy Social Media: https://www.netzsch.com/en/meta-nav/data-protection-policy

Name: Lincoln Electric Automation
Description:
Lincoln Electric is the world leader in the engineering, design, and manufacturing of advanced arc welding solutions, automated joining, assembly and cutting systems, plasma and oxy-fuel cutting equipment, and has a leading global position in brazing and soldering alloys. Lincoln is recognized as the Welding Expert for its leading materials science, software development, automation engineering, and application expertise, which advance customers’ fabrication capabilities to help them build a better world. 

Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, Lincoln operates 71 manufacturing and automation system integration locations across 20 countries and maintains a worldwide network of distributors and sales offices serving customers in over 160 countries. For more information about Lincoln Electric and its products and services, visit the Company’s website at https://www.lincolnelectric.com

Name: Moba Group
Description:
Welcome to Moba

Moba provides the most innovative and economical solutions for inspecting, grading and breaking of eggs to our customers world wide. Our projects reflect the perfect synergy of high tech innovative machines and outstanding employees. This formula is the secret of our success.

Our people are talented, experienced and work passionately. "Profit starts with care". Therefore we encourage people to use their creativity,professional skills and to be entrepreneurs. Moba offers challenging jobs with possibilities for personal and professional growth.

Are you looking for a new challenge or exciting internship? Check our website. For opportunities in the Netherlands, please check www.werkenbijmoba.nl.

Name: Picanol Weaving Machines
Description: For more than eighty years, Picanol (www.picanol.be) has played a pioneering role in the global textile industry and it is currently the world’s leading weaving machine manufacturer. Picanol develops, manufactures, and sells high-tech weaving machines based on airjet and rapier technology. Picanol offers upgrade kits, spare parts, training, troubleshooting services and also digital services for its weaving machines through PicConnect. Picanol has its headquarters in Ieper (Belgium) and it employs more than 1,200 people worldwide. Picanol is part of Picanol Group, a business unit of Tessenderlo Group (Euronext: TESB).

Name: Leavitt Machinery
Description:
Leavitt Machinery is a leading materials-handling dealership with an extensive network of over 30 branches across Canada and the United States. 

As the premier provider in our region, we have established a solid reputation for delivering tailored mobile equipment solutions to our valued clientele. Our success is built on the foundation of our expert team, who bring a diverse selection of top-tier product lines to the table.

Our comprehensive portfolio of high-quality product lines, combined with the expertise of our skilled professionals, empowers us to consistently provide optimal solutions for our customers. Whether you are an owner of a forklift, boom lift, scissor lift, telehandler, container handler, reach stacker, sweeper, or scrubber, Leavitt Machinery is your go-to partner for enhancing operational efficiency and minimizing costs.

Name: Yanmar Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 1912, no Japão, com o nome de Yamaoka Hatsudoki Kosakusho, nove anos mais tarde, quando teve seu primeiro motor a diesel fabricado, passou a chamar-se YANMAR. No Brasil sua história começou em 1957, com a fundação da subsidiária Yanmar Diesel do Brasil Ltda, na capital 
paulista, que comercializava os motores com a série NT65-K. Três anos depois, sua primeira fábrica de motores diesel de pequena potência foi montada na cidade de Indaiatuba (SP), em 1960.

Presente em cinco continentes e em mais de 20 países, oferecendo soluções para os mercados de construção, agricultura, indústria, marítimo e energia, a Yanmar celebrou, em 2012, seus 100 anos de existência e no Brasil está presente há 62 anos. Hoje denominada Yanmar South America – investindo, cada vez mais, em tecnologia, melhoria contínua e em pessoas, pois, seus princípios se baseiam no espírito de seus fundadores, que, ao longo destas décadas, foram passados para toda a companhia, o que foi o ponto de partida para a Yanmar chegar ao patamar que se encontra atualmente.

Em 2012, celebrou seu primeiro centenário mundial e 55 anos no mercado brasileiro. Com isso, a Yanmar South America vem contribuindo para o desenvolvimento e viabilizando o avanço tecnológico do segmento no país, já que oferece ao mercado uma gama diversificada de produtos, além de atuar nos mercados de construção civil, marítimo, industrial e agronegócio, sem deixar de lado a preocupação ambiental.

Name: Tractafric Equipment Gabon
Description:
Tractafric Equipment Gabon est, depuis 1932, le distributeur exclusif des engins Caterpillar ainsi que de la marque SEM, des solutions de manutentions Manitou, des camions Mercedes-Benz et des compresseurs Sullair.
Nos trois agences de Libreville, Port-Gentil et Moanda nous permettent d'avoir une présence au plus près de nos clients.
Nos principaux clients des secteurs miniers, pétroliers, forestiers, BTP et énergie du Gabon nous font confiance pour leurs achats de machines neuves et d'occasion ainsi que pour leurs pièces de rechanges. Nos trois ateliers et nos équipes techniques itinérantes proposent un service de proximité qui garantie une durabilité optimale du matériel.

Name: Paper Converting Machine Company
Description:
BW Converting manufactures high-performance converting machinery for the tissue, nonwovens, hygiene, printing and packaging industries under the banner of our industry-leading Paper Converting Machine Company (PCMC) brand. 

For more information, visit bwconverting.com.

Name: Ring Power Cat
Description: Ring Power Corporation, North and Central Florida’s Cat dealer, is headquartered in St. Augustine, Florida. Ring Power is comprised of eight divisions and has 60+ years of experience servicing and supporting Cat products and allied equipment.

Name: Rite-Hite
Description:
Rite-Hite, headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin USA is a world-wide leader in the development, manufacture, and sale of loading dock safety systems, industrial door solutions and in-plant products. All of our products are designed for maximum safety, productivity, efficiency and reduced energy costs at your facility.

Rite-Hite's complete product line includes hydraulic, mechanical and air-powered dock levelers, vehicle restraints, light communication systems, truck levelers, dock seals and shelters, high speed doors, cooler/freezer doors, traffic/impact doors, machine safety doors, safety barrier systems, industrial HVLS ceiling fans and a complete line of aftermarket parts, accessories, and service.

Rite-Hite is focused on providing solutions for you. From developing the Dok-Lok in 1980 to prevent premature trailer separation to the innovative Rite-Vu Light Communications system introduced in 2009 to protect pedestrians and forklift drivers, we're innovative to make you safer, more efficient and productive.

Careers
If you would like to explore career opportunities with Rite-Hite, please apply online at www.ritehite.com.

Name: Manz Asia
Description: Manz Asia delivers semiconductor equipment and solutions built on core technologies in wet chemistry, plating, inkjet printing, automation, and software integration. Our expertise covers advanced packaging (High-Density PLP / FOPLP) and IC substrate processing (glass and organic core), supporting customers from R&D to high-volume manufacturing. Through system solutions, contract manufacturing, and sales representation, we help customers accelerate time-to-market, boost yield, and stay competitive in the fast-evolving semiconductor industry.

Name: Electro Pneumatics And Hydraulics (India) Pvt Ltd
Description:
Electro Pneumatics And Hydraulics (India) Pvt Ltd (EPHL) located in Chakan, Pune is a renowned name in the metal forming industry in India and abroad for more than 52 years. We are a Company known for indigenously developing various products and technologies in-house through our R&D efforts.  We have the following business verticals:
Machine Manufacturing Division (MMD): The MMD offers machines for different requirements of forming. Our product range includes hydraulic presses, servo presses, tube bending machines, angle punching machines, SPMs. We have indigenous strengths in all the core technologies of mechanical, hydraulic, electrical and even electronics/PLC/CNC that go to build a machine of superior standards.  
Component Manufacturing Division (CMD): The CMD leverages our years of experience in forming technology to produce formed parts and assemblies using innovative and cost-effective alternatives such as tube and sheet hydroforming, specialized tube bending and end forming, servo pressing, etc. to conventional forming, thereby providing our customers the advantage of superior product performance-to-cost. CMD provides batch and mass production of formed components/ assemblies.
Drives and Controls Division (DCD):  EP has its own indigenously developed range of AC servo drives and a family of brushless servo motors for a variety of applications. Designed with the latest DSP and IGBT technologies, these state-of-the-art drives provide exceptional system performance at an unmatched price. 
Strategic Project Division (SPD):  SPD undertakes turnkey projects and systems based on specific requirements.  Our scope of work- from concept design to execution is undertaken for various naval, defence and allied applications.
Fluid Power Division (FPD): Our FPD manufactures pneumatic valves, cylinders, accessories, hydraulic cylinders, power packs, intensifiers, etc. These proven designs are built to stringent quality control standards and tested for multi-million cycles.

Name: TRITORC
Description:
Tritorc specializes in delivering precision bolting, torque, and tensioning
solutions to oil & gas, Steel, Mining, and other industries. With a proven
track record in streamlining procurement processes and ensuring project
delivery excellence, we help Contract, Procurement, and Site Managers tackle
the industry's toughest challenges. Our innovative tools and services reduce
downtime, enhance safety, and ensure seamless subcontractor coordination
across complex projects.

Name: EPIQ Machinery
Description: Un concepteur d'équipements investi avec la mission de fabriquer des solutions innovantes et efficaces pour le marché des équipements lourds, des véhicules et des systèmes de manutention. Notre équipe défie les frontières entre une entreprise technologique et un fabricant de machinerie lourde.

Name: Heli Forklift
Description: Anhui Heli Industrial Vehicle Imp & Exp Co., Ltd. is the subsidiary of HELI Group, and is responsible for the import and export business of HELI GROUP, the sales channels and marketing network management. Heli Group is a leading forklift truck manufacturer in China. Specialize in engineering and manufacturing high quality forklifts and warehouse equipment.

Name: Manz AG
Description:
Manz AG is a globally active high-tech engineering company.
With a focus on the automotive industry and electromobility, battery production, electronics, and energy, Manz develops and builds innovative and efficient production solutions: From customized single machines for laboratory production or pilot and small series production, to standardized modules and systems, to turnkey lines for mass production.
Technologically, Manz's production equipment is based on many years of experience in automation, laser processing, inspection systems, and wet chemistry.
With currently around 1,200 employees, the Manz Group develops and produces in Germany, Slovakia, Italy, Mainland China and Taiwan. Sales and service subsidiaries also exist in the USA and India.

Follow us on Facebook, Twitter or YouTube:
https://www.facebook.com/manzag.engineering
https://twitter.com/Manz_AG
https://www.youtube.com/user/ManzGroup

Imprint:
http://www.manz.com/legal-information/

Name: Lincoln Electric Brasil
Description: A Lincoln Electric é líder mundial em design, desenvolvimento e fabricação de produtos de solda a arco, sistemas de junção, montagem e corte automatizados, equipamentos de corte a plasma e oxi-combustível e tem uma posição líder global em brasas e ligas de solda. Sediada em Cleveland, Ohio, a Lincoln possui 59 locais de fabricação em 18 países e uma rede mundial de distribuidores e escritórios de vendas, cobrindo mais de 160 países. Para obter mais informações sobre a Lincoln Electric e seus produtos e serviços, visite o site da empresa em https://www.lincolnelectric.com.br

Name: KERN Precision, Inc.
Description:
KERN Precision, Inc. is KERN Microtechnik GmbH's North American Headquarters located in Glendale Heights, IL.

KERN Precision also represents Becker Eroding Technology for high quality pallets and workholding, and 6C Tools for laser-sharpened, solid PCD cutting tools for the most demanding applications in sintered ceramics and tungsten carbide.

KERN Microtechnik GmbH was founded in 1962. After having been in the contract manufacturing business for 20 years, KERN decided to design and build its own milling machines. With years of experience from the parts manufacturing, KERN knows all about the needs of customers and about the crucial factors in precision milling machines. Right from the beginning, the focus was on milling machines with the highest possible accuracy. The privately-owned company is nestled amongst the Bavarian Alps, in Eschenlohe, Germany. With 250 employees KERN continuously succeeds worldwide in bringing automation and accuracy to new levels. Different industries where precision is vital, such as mold shops, medical instrumentation, watch making, and aerospace rely on KERN as well as research centers around the world. For more information, please visit www.kernprecision.com.

Name: Ebara Corporation
Description:
Established as a pump manufacturer in 1912, EBARA Group has developed business in the fields of fans and blowers, chillers, environmental plants, and eventually the precision machinery industry, continuing to broaden our business domains throughout our history of over 100 years.

Ebara core competencies in water management, energy productions, and environmental solutions are technologies that support the not just our clients but also our shared global community. We strive to improve our technologies and services as we work towards the sustainable development of society.
ーーー
For inquiries about our products or recruitment, please visit Inquiry site.
https://www.ebara.co.jp/en/contact/index.html

Name: Lufkin Gears
Description:
Our Lufkin Gears brand bring a deep history of industry-leading technology to demanding high-speed mechanical-drive, turbo machinery, and marine-propulsion applications. They continually set the standard for design and manufacturing to meet or exceed the most stringent customer and industry specifications. Our designs include single helical and double helical gearing, and proprietary fluid-film bearing technology to ensure the highest performance and reliability. We use the highest quality materials with advanced processes including through-hardening or carburizing, and precision form-grinding of gear teeth to increase durability, power capability, and efficiency for the most demanding turbomachinery applications.

Benefits
Low overall cost of ownership with exceptional reliability and long life
Extended maintenance intervals
Drawing on 90 years of engineering expertise, innovation, and support

Features
Purpose-built to exacting customer specifications and ISO/AGMA/API standards
Robust designs with rigid case construction
Low noise, low vibration, and industry-leading material specifications

Capabilities
Speeds up to 70,000 RPM and power up to 100 MW
Cast and fabricated casings
Integrated lubrication, vibration, and temperature monitoring 

https://www.lufkingears.com

Name: ABICOR BINZEL
Description:
ABICOR BINZEL provides Total Torch Technology and innovative welding accessories that enhance welding workmanship and effectiveness. We have a complete product of air and water cooled MIG, TIG, and Robotic welding torches suitable for any welding application. All of our torches are ISO-9000 certified to ensure the absolute highest standards of quality and reliability. 

In addition to our best in market welding torches, we also provide numerous welding accessories and innovations including seam tracking, fume extraction, laser guiding, and chemical compounds that protect and improve your welding needs.

Our products are manufactured and assembled across the world in our various manufacturing locations, which include the United States, Brazil, India, China, and our global headquarters in Giessen, Germany. 

With sales, product, and customer service staff positioned in each of our core markets and a global marketing and brand identity, BINZEL is both worldwide and at your side.
