We also provide customized welding solutions to meet your unique welding and fabrication needs. Contact us and see why we are more than welding.

Name: Allied Machine & Engineering
Description:
Allied Machine & Engineering manufacturers holemaking & finishing tool systems, such as industrial drills, boring tools, thread mills, reamers, & more in Dover, Ohio. 
Their product offering includes brands such as Wohlhaupter, ThreadMills USA, Superion, & Criterion.

They devote their advanced engineering and manufacturing capabilities to create the widest selection of value-added tooling available to metal-cutting industries worldwide. Their tooling solutions deliver the lowest cost per hole in many varieties of drilling, reaming, burnishing, boring and threading applications.

Established in 1941 by Harold Stokey, Allied Machine & Engineering Corp. entered the 1950s as a job shop, manufacturing tapered bearing lock nuts and accessories. Allied introduced a more effective universal-style spade drill in the 1960s, breaking new ground for the industry with patented developments in blade locking and particle metallurgy. In the 1980s, Allied pioneered innovative spade drill geometry and coatings that took hole-making to a level never before seen by the metal cutting industry. In 1992, Allied formed a partnership with Allied Maxcut Engineering Company of West Midlands, England, enabling customers within the European markets to access the high-quality Allied tooling and application support offered in the USA.

Today, Allied’s commitment to offering products of unparalleled quality continues to create value for our customers, our associates, and our community.

Name: EMW filtertechnik GmbH
Description: Excellence in filtration - This is the goal we have embraced in more than 60 years in the business. It is our unwavering commitment in development and supply of made-in-Germany technologies for air filtration and (waste)water treatment. Every filter system we supply is tailored to the exact requirements at hand. Our filtration systems perform reliably day-in and day-out, preventing problems before they even arise.

Name: SANY Europe GmbH
Description:
SANY Europe is a company of SANY Heavy Industry, from Changsha. This is one of the three largest manufacturers of construction machinery worldwide, with a turnover of around 15.3 billion USD in 2020. The company, founded in 1989, offers a wide range of products, with more than 26 product families and over 300 machine models. These are developed, produced and sold by just under 36,000 employees around the world.  

SANY's European site has been in Bedburg, near Cologne, since 2011. The site employs around 80 staff in Sales, Service and in adapting products for the European market. In 2020, SANY Europe sold more than 1400 excavators and around 40 port machines on the continent. With the help of more than 100 dealers, the turnover across the whole of Europe was more than €65 million in the same year. 

Product range handled by SANY Europe GmbH:
- Excavators 1.75 t to 50.0 t
- Mobile Port Machinery: Reach Stackers, Empty Container Handlers, Heavy Duty Forklift Trucks, Material Handler
- Port Cranes: STS, RTG, RMG, MHC and Jib Cranes
- Rotary Drilling Rigs
- Crawler Cranes 60t to 650t

SANY Europe was formerly known as SANY Germany GmbH. The R&D team guarantees that all products distributed within Europe meet local requirements in emission,  safety, reliability and efficiency.  

The German based SANY team is dedicated to the delivery of highest quality both in terms of sales, manufacturing and customer services. The local manufacturing can adapt machines to customer requirements like options, accessories and color schemes.

Spare parts are delivered from stock within 24 hours all over the region.

Name: HD Hyundai Construction Equipment North America
Description: HD Hyundai Construction Equipment North America, Inc., is a subsidiary of HD Hyundai XiteSolution; a global construction equipment manufacturer under the HD Hyundai umbrella group of companies. HD Hyundai Construction Equipment North America, Inc. (HD HCE-NA) operates from a North American headquarters based in Atlanta (Norcross), Georgia. HD HCE-NA partners with over 195 dealer locations across the United States and Canada. HD HCE-NA  offers a full line of construction equipment from excavators, wheel and compact loaders, dozers, compact construction equipment, and specialty equipment. For more information about HD HCE-NA, Hyundai products or dealership opportunities, visit www.hceamericas.com or call 877-509-2254.

Name: Fluid-o-Tech Group
Description:
Fluid-o-Tech Group has 75-year experience in moving, dosing and controlling fluids with high accuracy and precision by designing and producing volumetric pumps, valves, sensors and systems for automotive, foodservice, industrial and healthcare industries.
With about +400 collaborators, Fluid-o-Tech Group exports +80% of the production thanks to a direct presence in Italy, UK, USA, China, Japan and more than 120 distributors in over 60 countries. 
Its factory is considered as a model example for the 4th Generation Industrial processes. Quality and Innovation are the company strategic pillars: certified for the automotive quality standards, it invests an average of 6% of revenue in R&D involving 18% of its staff.  The innovation practice has been awarded 3 times in a row with the Italian National Award for Innovation.
With an open approach to innovation, Fluid-o-Tech Group develops cutting-edge solutions through strategic partnerships with customers, suppliers, research institutes, engineering companies and universities. 
Since 2013 thanks to F-Lab, the innovation center, highly qualified engineers and designers work on new technologies and materials together with universities, companies and experts.

Name: Tecnokor
Description:
A Tecnokor é referência no fornecimento de equipamentos de manuseio, movimentação e processamento de commodities minerais e agrícolas.

Com 35 anos de mercado, somos movidos pela paixão por projetar e fabricar as melhores soluções para os principais setores econômicos do país, como mineração, agronegócio, siderurgia, portos, óleo e gás e geração de energia. 

Nossa empresa se diferencia graças à confiabilidade e excelência dos produtos e serviços oferecidos. Estamos empenhados em ser a primeira escolha dos clientes, compreendendo as necessidades e desafios envolvidos em cada entrega. 

Contamos com um time próprio de especialistas em todas as etapas, desde a engenharia até a entrega final ao cliente. Nossa fabricação é desenvolvida em instalações próprias, o que garante acompanhamento rigoroso da produção e total controle de qualidade.

A Tecnokor, que reúne a Tecnometal Engenharia e a Koch do Brasil, alia a tradição de marcas reconhecidas pelo mercado à inovação que nos projeta para o futuro.

Tecnokor, 

Seu fornecedor de confiança.

Name: Derrick Corporation
Description:
Derrick is a family-owned and operated company with a global presence focused on pioneering fine-separation technology. 

Since 1951, Derrick has expanded its product portfolio to serve a variety of challenging markets within the Mining & Industrial, Oil & Gas Drilling, and Civil Construction industries. Derrick remains committed to providing the latest technological enhancements that evolve alongside industry best practices and market developments.

Derrick's corporate headquarters, in-house manufacturing facility, and Mining & Industrial are based out of Derrick Corporation in Buffalo, New York, while Oil & Gas Drilling and Underground Construction & Aggregates are run out of its Houston, Texas office.

Name: Áster
Description:
A Áster Máquinas e Soluções Integradas foi fundada no dia 23 de janeiro de 1997, em Campo Novo do Parecis (MT).

A Empresa cresceu, conquistou novos territórios, expandindo-se nos estados do Mato Grosso e do Mato Grosso do Sul, região esta conhecida como Celeiro do Mundo. A Áster Máquinas possui atualmente 11 filiais, sendo representante exclusiva da John Deere em sua área de concessão, a Áster Máquinas é 
 
Muito mais que máquinas e tecnologia, a Empresa oferece soluções integradas para superar a cada dia as expectativas dos clientes. O foco da equipe é oferecer a melhor experiência ao cliente, com o melhor produto e serviço, disponibilidade, agilidade, respeito e cordialidade, ajudando-o a produzir mais e melhor, de forma sustentável, além de contribuir com a sua nobre missão de alimentar o mundo.

Name: PIA Automation
Description:
Creating efficiency - achieving significantly more performance with smart and creative solutions. This is the guiding principle of the PIA Automation companies connected in the PIA Group. 

With decades of continuously growing expertise and more than 8,700 completed projects, PIA Group is now one of the world's leading automation specialists. 

Over 1,850 employees in 12 networked locations in Europe, North America and Asia make PIA a partner that flexibly, reliably and sustainably innovates automation for the automotive, medical, consumer goods and electronics industry as well as for testing. 

With its own Industry 4.0 solutions, PIA offers its customers decisive advantages in the digitalization and networking of production.

Name: William Adams Pty Ltd
Description:
William Adams supplies Cat products and services to the Construction, Mining, Quarrying, Agricultural, On-Highway Trucks and Marine industries in Victoria and Tasmania.

With extensive Field Service coverage, unrivalled Product Support and technology driven Equipment Management; William Adams is Built For It.

Name: Grupo Toniolo
Description:
O Grupo Toniolo busca por contínuas inovações em equipamentos mecanizados e é líder no seguimento de sua atuação: Soluções em operações de rejeitos de mineração. O grupo está sempre desenvolvendo equipamentos personalizados, trazendo soluções para o atendimento às operações de rejeito e operações especiais, às quais foram testadas por diversas operações realizadas e outras em andamento. Dentre as principais soluções podemos citar a remoção mecanizada com equipamentos especiais como escavadeiras anfíbias, escavadeiras com lanças de longo alcance, manejo de rejeitos para otimização da máxima capacidade do reservatório, desaguamento de rejeitos com equipamentos em reservatórios/baias, operação de dragagem por sucção e recalque, dragagem com apoio de escavadeiras anfíbias e dragas de precisão, empilhamento de rejeito à seco controlado, limpeza mecanizada de transportadores de correia, remoção de macrófitas e controle de qualidade de água de reservatórios.  
O Grupo Toniolo desenvolve soluções para os projetos, sendo referência nas criações e aprimoramento dos equipamentos especiais, buscamos sempre melhorias para os nossos equipamentos, como a escavadeira anfíbia, onde somos especialistas nas operações, visando sempre a segurança e a confiabilidade dos nossos equipamentos, possuímos a Patente em nível Nacional das escavadeiras Anfíbias. Além das escavadeiras anfíbias, desenvolvemos e melhoramos diversos implementos/equipamentos, como lanças de longo alcance de 15 até 25 metros com a maior capacidade de carga do mercado, veículos de apoio e resgate anfíbio para áreas de difícil acesso e alagadas, implemento Sabre para limpeza de correia transportadora sem a necessidade de parar a operação, entre outras soluções.

Name: ESAB South America
Description: A ESAB é líder mundial na produção de equipamentos e consumíveis para soldagem e corte. Nossas soluções e equipamentos inovadores reconhecidos mundialmente são desenvolvidos com a participação de nossos clientes, e construídos com a expertise e a experiência de um líder global. Aqui será um espaço de compartilharmos nossas experiências e nossa paixão por soldagem.

Name: Titan Machinery
Description:
Titan Machinery owns and operates a network of full-service agriculture and construction equipment stores in the United States, Europe and Australia. At our stores, we sell and rent new and used construction and agriculture equipment and provide superior parts and service support. 

We're proud to represent our manufacturing partner, the CNHi family of brands - including Case IH, Case Construction, New Holland Agriculture, and New Holland Construction.

Titan Machinery is committed to maintaining a customer focused culture and to responding quickly to our customers' needs and demands.

If you are looking for an exciting and challenging career with growth potential, competitive pay and industry leading benefits, apply today at titanmachinery.com/careers.

Name: Matsuura Machinery USA, Inc.
Description:
Matsuura Machinery USA is a subsidiary of Matsuura Machinery Corporation of Japan. Matsuura USA’s St. Paul, MN facility includes a large showroom and demonstration area, conference and training rooms, accessories and spare parts storage, along with administrative, service and engineering application support. 

Since 1935, Matsuura has been a leader in developing and manufacturing innovative machining equipment to ensure that manufacturing professionals always have the tools they need to create high quality parts. As the U.S. subsidiary of Matsuura Machinery Corporation in Japan, Matsuura USA provides the premium service, applications, and technical field support that have always been the Matsuura standard for business.

Matsuura Machinery Corporation has been at the forefront of innovative design and development of high quality CNC controlled machining centers from its world headquarters in Fukui, Japan.  Lines include horizontals and verticals in all sizes, configured with 3 to 5 axes, single table, twin and multi pallet systems, twin spindles and tool changers, cell systems, and ultra-high speed linear motor machines.  Matsuura Machinery USA, Inc. also offers the Matsuura LUMEX Avance Series, a powder bed metal AM platform with subtractive capability.  The Matsuura LUMEX Series combines selective laser sintering (SLS) along with high speed milling (HSM) commonly called Hybrid AM.

Name: Carter Machinery
Description:
Founded in 1952, Carter Machinery is the authorized Caterpillar dealer serving Virginia, West Virginia, Maryland, Delaware and Washington D.C. through a network of more than 30 locations and 3,000 employees. We support customers in many diverse industries including construction, mining, forestry, power generation, paving, industrial engines, and gas compression and marine.  

Mission:  We continuously enhance our customers' experience by delivering the highest levels of value through engaged employees.

Follow Us:

X (formerly Twitter): https://twitter.com/CarterMachinery 

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/CarterMachinery

Instagram: https://instagram.com/cartermachinery

Name: Arneg
Description:
International leader in the design, manufacture and installation of complete equipment for the retail sector.

SOLID ROOTS
Arneg was established half a century ago based on those solid principles and moral values typical of Veneto culture. It has grown progressively strongly believing in the effectiveness of production growth sensitive to important topics like safeguarding the environment, energy savings and respecting people.

SUSTAINABLE FOR NATURE
Our project is a high sustainability, entrepreneurial project that has grown over the years thanks to intelligent technologies evolving. It pursues its economic purpose interacting with the environment, society and its customers who then benefit from its activities. Continually improving quality of life is a fundamental part of this project.

THE POWER OF A GLOBAL ENTERPRISE
The global dimension is the one that best describes the achievement by the Arneg Group in the international market. Its leadership position in the commercial refrigeration sector finds its origins in the exploitation of synergies created between the various Group companies and in a wealth of knowledge and ideas circulating in a continuous flow of informations throughout the production and distribution network of each continent. A way of working that, starting from the head office and going through the foreign branches and the Italian companies belonging to the Group, have guaranteed to Arneg in half a century leading results in terms of product quality, innovation and environmental protection.

Name: Wilo Middle East & Africa (MEA)
Description:
The Wilo Group is one of the world’s leading premium suppliers of pumps and pump systems for building services, water management and the industrial sector. In the last decade, we transformed from hidden to visible and to connected champion. Wilo employs around 9000 people around the globe today. With innovative solutions, smart products and individual services, we provide the clever, efficient and climate-friendly service of keeping water flowing. We already are the digital pioneer within the industry with our products and solutions, processes and business models.

Wilo MENA headquarters is in Dubai, UAE to serve 20 countries with five subsidiaries and seven representative offices. 
In 2019, Wilo inaugurated its state-of-the-art facility in Dubai, UAE—a LEED Gold-certified building complex spanning over 8,000 square meters. In 2025, Wilo marked a major milestone by doubling the size of the factory, integrating cutting-edge automation, and increasing production capacity by 60%. This expansion enhances our ability to deliver German Water Solutions made in the UAE, meeting both regional and global demands.

To support this growth, the key objectives of the project include:
• Tripling warehouse capacity to accommodate surging demand
• Establishing in-house machining and fabrication capabilities
• Introducing new water solutions, including Deep Well pumps, Firefighting pump sets (UL Listed & FM Approved), and Norm Pumps
• Enhancing the Factory Test Bed with capacities of up to 500 kW power and maximum flows of 5,000 m³/h for dry running pumps and 9,000 m³/h for submersible pumps—making it the largest accredited test bench in the Middle East and Africa.

Follow us on social media:
https://www.youtube.com/user/WiloMiddleEast
https://www.facebook.com/WiloPumpsMENA
https://www.instagram.com/wilomiddleeast/
https://twitter.com/wilomiddleeast/

Name: Nilpeter
Description:
Nilpeter is a leading global manufacturer of labels and flexible packaging machinery, based on flexo, offset and InkJet technologies. With manufacturing facilities in Denmark, USA, and India, Nilpeter offers press sales and customer care across the globe.

Nilpeter provides label and packaging printers with innovative technology and creative solutions that meet the printers’ challenges. Nilpeter’s aim is to offer unique printing solutions in an increasingly integrated value chain.

With nearly 100 years of engineering expertise, and in-depth, global industry knowledge, we deliver outstanding flexibility, quality, and cost-effectiveness, covering all printing processes, widths, substrates, and markets. Our flexible, high-performance printing solutions are designed to meet your evolving business needs – so you can offer innovative label and packaging solutions to your customers.

Lars Eriksen, 4th generation President & CEO:
“The label industry is constantly evolving - yet Nilpeter has remained an important industry supplier of narrow-web presses for almost 100 years. Our success rests on our ability to produce value-added technologies and innovative solutions by understanding our customers' business – and their needs.

In our state-of-the-art production facilities, we manufacture presses that are intelligent. In the development and design phase, we strive to ensure that our products are intuitive and flexible. At the same time, they have to meet our customers’ needs that are driven by different dynamics in a global setting.

At the end of the day, Nilpeter delivers the highest quality and our presses are the best value.

Name: Dura Equipment Sales (Pty) Ltd.
Description:
Dura Equipment Sales is a leading supplier of construction and earthmoving equipment to the Southern African market. We are known for our exceptional service in providing affordable, reliable and trusted equipment to our diverse client base throughout Africa. 

Our proud association as the sole agents in Sub-Saharan Africa for the LOVOL brand, enables us to provide an affordable alternative to the African wheel loader and excavator market in the form of the robust LOVOL Wheel Loader and LOVOL Excavator ranges.

Name: Quincy Compressor
Description:
Quincy Compressor makes and sells the highest quality rotary screw and reciprocating air compressors and vacuum pumps. Our products are used around the world in manufacturing plants, hospitals, climate control systems and any application that requires reliable air assistance.

Quincy Compressor provides uncompromising reliability and performance  on its products that are customized for the most demanding applications.

Name: ANDRITZ Feed & Biofuel
Description:
ANDRITZ is vital to ensuring a reliable global supply of aqua feed, animal feed, pet food, and biofuel. With full process lines accounting for half the world’s production of aqua feed and biomass alone, we continuously support leading producers in achieving the highest levels in safety, quality, and control from initial feedstock to final product. 

How can we help grow your business?

Name: KRONE Agriculture
Description:
Maschinenfabrik Bernard KRONE GmbH & Co. KG, based in Spelle, Germany, is part of the KRONE Group and a proven specialist in forage harvesting technology. Our product range includes disc mowers, rotary tedders, rotary rakes, forage wagons and trailers, round balers and large square balers, the Premos pelleting press and the two self-propelled machines BiG M (high-performance mower conditioner) and BiG X (forage harvester). Our flagship is the BiG X 1180, which has a whopping 1156 hp. This means that we are currently building the most powerful agricultural machine in the world in Spelle. 

KRONE agricultural machinery is sold in more than 60 countries worldwide. In the meantime, the name KRONE stands for much more than just mechanical engineering. With around 2,000 employees, we develop answers to the challenges of the future - such as Agriculture 4.0, Industry 4.0, digitalization, e-commerce and climate change.

KRONE agriculture - Quality made in Spelle since 1906.

Name: TAMGO - The Machinery Group LLC.
Description:
شركة تامكو، إحدى شركات مجموعة شركات الزاهد، تأسست في عام 1991 كجزء من التزام المجموعة الراسخ بدعم تطوير البنية التحتية في المملكة العربية السعودية. تقدم تامكو لعملائها المحليين والإقليميين مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات والخدمات الصناعية عالية الجودة ضمن سبعة حلول رئيسية: حلول الطاقة، حلول معدات البناء، حلول ضواغط الهواء، حلول الطاقة المحمولة، حلول الحرائق والمياه، حلول معدات المناولة، وحلول التعدين كما تلتزم شركة تامكو بتقديم خدمة متميزة و دعم ما بعد البيع لمساعدة عملك على النجاح
 
TAMGO; The Machinery Group LLC, is a Zahid Group company that was establishedin1991as part of the Group’s long-standing commitment to supporting the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia’s infrastructural development. TAMGO provides local and regional customers with a diverse range of best-in-class industrial machinery products and services that fall within seven solutions: Power Solutions, Construction Machinery Solutions, Compressed Air Solutions, Portable Power Solutions, Fire & Water Solutions, Material Handling Solutions, and Mining Solutions and Tamgo is fully committed to providing superior service and after-sales Support to help your business succeed.

Name: ROTHENBERGER Werkzeuge GmbH
Description:
ROTHENBERGER has focused on developing, producing and marketing pipe tools and machines for plumbers, pipe fitters, heating engineers, refrigeration and air conditioning technicians and maintenance mechanics since 1949. Our tools and machines are used every day throughout the world on construction sites and in buildings assisting in the assembly of ventilation and air-conditioning components and systems, in pipeline and sanitary construction, in environmental technology applications as well as in service and maintenance of various piping systems.

High-quality tools are the basic prerequisite for high-quality work results. Craftspeople and technicians appreciate our tools and machines for their durability, effectiveness and reliable precision – proof of the innovative power and sophisticated technology we use in the development and manufacture of our products. You will find our products in specialist dealers’, to whom we offer a comprehensive portfolio as a full-range supplier.

Get to know our products at https://www.rothenberger.com/ 

Join a strong team in which family ties, trust, responsibility, efficiency, quality, courage and entrepreneurial spirit count! Help shape the success story that has developed the Frankfurt specialist trader, founded in 1949, into a group of companies with a worldwide presence. 

ROTHENBERGER is part of the ROTHENBERGER Group which unites leading developers and manufacturers of pipe tools and machines for plumbing, heating, air conditioning, refrigeration, gas and environmental technology.

Career Website: https://rothenberger.com/gb-en/career
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/rothenberger
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rothenberger_official
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@rothenberger
Imprint: https://rothenberger.com/gb-en/imprint
Data protection: https://rothenberger.com/gb-en/privacy-policy

Name: PT Arianto Darmawan
Description:
DARMAWAN is a symbol of hard work, determination, and integrity. DARMAWAN’s products define state-of-the-art craftsmanship, resulting in years of customer satisfaction.

Established in Bandung in 1966, DARMAWAN rose to meet the machinery needs of the developing textile industry. Being the only one of its kind in Indonesia and South East Asia, DARMAWAN integrates custom-made machinery with distribution of spare parts, lubricants, and support chemicals.

Today DARMAWAN is proud to be supported by a solid management and more than 250 highly capable staff members who are committed in providing the finest business experience. Every business strategy is carefully crafted in order to achieve DARMAWAN’s goal in becoming the leading manufacturing company in Indonesia.

Name: CHIRON Group SE
Description: The CHIRON Group, headquartered in Tuttlingen, Germany is a global company specializing in CNC vertical milling and mill-turn machining centers, as well as turnkey and automation solutions. Comprehensive services and digital solutions complete the portfolio. The Group has a global presence, with production and development sites, sales and service subsidiaries, and sales agencies worldwide. Around two thirds of machines and solutions that are sold are exported. Key customer sectors are the automotive, mechanical engineering, medicine and precision engineering, aerospace industries, as well as tool manufacturing.

Name: Bucher Emhart Glass
Description:
Bucher Emhart Glass is the world's leading international supplier of equipment, controls and parts to the glass container industry. With broad-based expertise in glass container forming, glass conditioning, gob forming, ware handling, cold end inspection, refractory parts and quality assurance, the company's machines and systems are established as standard products worldwide. Bucher Emhart Glass also provides installation, training, production assistance, and maintenance related services.

One vision

Our vision is a world with glass as a dominant and preferred ecological material, enabled by Bucher Emhart Glass as the leading technology provider.

One mission

We support our customers in their quest for sustainable profitability, quality and increased market share in the packaging industry through our automation solutions.


Would you like to work for us? please check our website - Careers!

Name: Matec Industries
Description:
MATEC specializes in the design and development of wastewater treatment, filtration and aggregate washing plants. We work for many different industries, the most important are: mining, aggregates, gravel, sand, stone, ceramics and glass. Our mission is the customer’s satisfaction. That is why we offer timely after-sale service, as well as before-sale advice to understand the real requirements of our potential customers.

We have installed over 4000 purification plants all across the world in the last two years: this is the real guarantee of our production and service quality. We develop ourselves all-inclusive purification and filtration plants. It does not matter the size of your business, our range of machines covers every kind of needs.

MATEC new plants are based in Massa, in the very heart of a wide industrial zone, also known as Apuana. A well-equipped reality that can cope with all the needs of the worldwide purification market, thanks to a simple but effective organization. All the machines are built in our plants. Thus we can offer top-quality products ‘Made in Italy’, which will fulfill the most demanding applications and markets.

MATEC progetta e realizza impianti di depurazione e filtrazione acque reflue, lavaggio degli inerti in moltissimi settori. Tra i più importanti troviamo senza dubbio: minerario, inerti, ghiaie, sabbie, minerario, lapideo, cemento, ceramico, vetro e plastica.

Solo negli ultimi due anni, MATEC ha installato oltre 4000 impianti di depurazione in tutto il mondo; e questa, più di ogni altra cosa è la vera garanzia della qualità dei nostri prodotti e servizi. Potete trovare un impianto di filtrazione MATEC in quasi ogni angolo di mondo, dall’Italia alla Australia, dall’Europa all’America.

Gli impianti di filtrazione e depurazione che sviluppiamo sono impianti completi e adatti a qualsiasi lavoro, qualunque sia la grandezza della vostra impresa, le nostre linee di macchine possono coprire ogni tipo di necessità.

Name: A.Celli Group
Description:
A.Celli is leading edge technology. A.Celli is human values. 

These are the assets that have, for over 80 years, made A.Celli synonymous of excellence in the global nonwovens market, with high-range products and technological solutions. 

Technology in its purest form, together with that impalpable factor that makes the difference between created in Italy and the rest of the world. And sensitivity, the human value of creativity, a focus on performance. But also intuition, vision, emotion.

These are and have always been the pillars on which A.Celli founds its value.

A.Celli: more than nonwovens.

Headquarters:

 A.Celli Nonwovens S.p.A.- via Romana Ovest, 252 - 55012 Rughi, Porcari (LU) - ITALY

 A.Celli Turkey - Atatürk Mah.Vedat Gunyol Cad. Sedef 4 Ap.NO:46/H D:8 34750 Atasehir, Istanbul - Turkey

Name: RAJ PROCESS EQUIPMENTS AND SYSTEMS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
RAJ PROCESS EQUIPMENTS AND SYSTEMS PRIVATE LIMITED is one of the leading process equipment manufacturers from India, supplying advanced solutions to customers across India and in 33 countries worldwide.
We specialise in thermal process equipment, turnkey plants and sustainable industrial solutions for:

Sugar & biofuel, CBG and 1G/2G ethanol

Chemical, pharmaceutical & food processing

Fertilizer, dyes & paints, wastewater and ZLD

Palm oil (POME ZLD), power, hydrogen & carbon capture (CCUS)

PLA, bioplastics and other emerging green technologies

Our portfolio includes spray dryers, rotary and paddle dryers, ATFDs, evaporators, boilers, heat exchangers, reactors, pressure vessels and integrated balance-of-plant systems.

Backed by an in-house R&D and pilot facility, multi-location manufacturing units and a multidisciplinary team of engineers, RAJ PROCESS supports clients from concept and basic engineering to commissioning and lifecycle O&M.

Our focus is clear:
to convert complex industrial challenges into efficient, low-carbon and commercially viable solutions for our partners in India and around the globe.

 To explore collaboration, pilot trials or turnkey projects, connect with us on LinkedIn or visit our website.

Name: Intamin
Description:
Intamin Amusement Rides Int. Corp. Est. is a world’s leading manufacturer of amusement rides and theme park equipment. Tailored to the customers needs – over 50 years.

The comprehensive product range includes roller coasters, water rides, giant wheels, drop towers, immersive rides and round rides. These rides are designed and developed in our offices in Schaan, meeting the needs of our customers worldwide.

Name: KOBELCO Construction Equipment India
Description:
Kobelco Construction Equipment India Pvt. Ltd. (KCEI), established in 2006, is a subsidiary of Kobelco Construction Machinery, Japan. The company manufactures Excavators and Cranes in Sri City, Andhra Pradesh, and is fully equipped to meet customer expectations in terms of service and parts with over 140+ outlets in India, Nepal, and Bangladesh. 

We take pride in our robust supply chain of more than 35 dealers, and a driven team for contributing to the manufacture of more than 12,000 machines.

Kobelco offers outstanding construction equipment ranging from Excavators to Cranes for construction sites. Loaded with revolutionary technology, sustainable solutions, and unmatched efficiency, Kobelco machines are customized for every terrain and condition. With a remarkable workforce and a century-long legacy of excellence, Kobelco has garnered immense customer trust and appreciation for the incorporation of Japanese technology and adherence to high-quality processes.

Our company is focused on building a long-term, sustainable business with our partners and customers with the motto of making Atmanirbhar Bharat a reality. Our Made in India machines are revered for delivering superior performance, low maintenance, and high ROI even after a decade.

Kobelco continues to move ahead on the path of sustainable growth in the construction sector with high-end and fuel-efficient equipment and a value-for-money approach.

Name: Makita do Brasil
Description:
Somos fabricantes de ferramentas a bateria, elétrica e a combustão. Nossa fábrica está localizada em Ponta Grossa-PR, possuímos um escritório comercial e centro de distribuição em São Bernardo do Campo - SP, mais 8 filiais para atendimento personalizado aos nossos clientes e uma ampla rede autorizada com mais de 5.000 revendas e cerca de 950 assistências técnicas distribuídas em todo território nacional.

Hoje desenvolvemos ferramentas elétricas, a bateria e a combustão que atendem a diversas áreas como: construção civil, indústria automotiva, marcenarias, marmorarias, jardinagem, agricultura, engenharia, dentre outras diversas áreas da indústria. Além de uma linha exclusiva para uso profissional.

Nossa fábrica possui as certificações do Sistema de Gestão da Qualidade com base na norma ISO 9001 e Sistema de Gestão da Ambiental com base na norma ISO 14001 e definiu sua Política da Qualidade e Meio Ambiente como:

Nossa missão é ser uma organização que contribui para a sociedade e para a satisfação dos clientes, através do fornecimento de ferramentas utilizadas para gerar bem estar e qualidade de vida.

Nós pensamos na qualidade sob o ponto de vista dos nossos clientes e buscamos a excelência em nossas atividades para realizá-lo.

Nós nos comprometemos em atender os requisitos legais e aplicáveis e contribuímos positivamente para a região.

Nós somos comprometidos com a proteção do meio ambiente e trabalhamos na prevenção e redução de itens que têm grande influência ao meio ambiente para não gerarmos impacto ambiental.

Nós estabelecemos objetivos que sustentam a qualidade, zelo ambiental e estratégia da empresa, transmitindo valores e fomentando um bom ambiente de trabalho.

Nós nos comprometemos a executar melhoria contínua.

Nós agimos com iniciativa e mantemos abertura para novas propostas.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Casagrande
Description:
Casagrande S.p.A. supplies piling rigs and crawler drills for bored piles, micropiling, anchoring, and jet-grouting, as well as equipment for diaphragm walls and special machinery for tunnel consolidation—offering more than 300 customizable solutions.
All this is the outcome of intensive research and development and the embodiment of a winning combination of ingenuity and strategic vision that gives rise to purpose-driven concepts—tailored to the goals, applications, and performance range of our equipment.

Our manufacturing process stems from a creative approach: we start by analyzing our customers’ needs and challenges, then explore new ways to deliver the most effective solutions. Calling this flexibility would be an understatement. We prefer to describe it as a proactive and collaborative mindset—a hallmark that enables us to design and build bespoke equipment for specific applications, alongside our standard product range.

With over 60 years of experience in the field, Casagrande continues to set industry standards worldwide, combining tradition, innovation, and engineering excellence.

Name: Carolina Cat
Description:
Since 1926, Carolina Cat has been committed to the needs of its customers by providing superior parts, service, and sales of construction equipment, power generation, and on-highway trucks. We are proud to be a part of the elite Caterpillar dealer network. Carolina Cat operates 10 locations throughout western North Carolina serving the following industries: Agriculture, Construction, Data Centers, Financial Services, Forestry, Governmental, Healthcare, Landfills, Landscaping, Manufacturing, On-highway Trucking, Paving, Quarries & Aggregates, and Waste.

At Carolina Cat, we are proud of our nearly 100-year service to our customer partners in western North Carolina. While our organization has grown and the equipment has advanced, we have never lost sight of our family-owned values. We believe in doing what we say, getting the details right, doing the right thing, improving always, and bringing a positive attitude every day. Above all, we strive to be a trusted partner in our customer’s success. 

Carolina Cat is proud to be part of the Weisiger Group family of companies.

Mission: We are a trailblazing organization that is built to last. Our company is rooted in history that shows we are willing to listen to customers and adapt to changing market trends. 

WHY WE ARE HERE 
-	We strive to be a trusted partner in your success. 
-	Trust is our bottom line. You can count on us, every time. 
-	We are your partner. We bring our best. We are in it for the long haul. 
-	Success means whatever you need to win. We always find a way.

Name: CMS SpA
Description: CMS SpA manufactures machinery and systems for the machining of composite materials, carbon fibre, aluminium, light alloys, plastic, glass, stone and metals. It was established in 1969 by Mr Pietro Aceti with the aim of offering customized and state-of-the-art solutions, based on the in-depth understanding of the customer’s production needs. Significant technological innovations, originating from substantial investments in research and development and take-overs of premium companies, have enabled constant growth in the various sectors of reference.

Name: NETZSCH Grinding & Dispersing Brasil
Description: Paint and dyes make our lives more colorful, chocolate melts in your mouth and the perfect make-up gives you a radiant complexion – the Business Unit Grinding & Dispersing, one of three business units of the global NETZSCH Group, offers a comprehensive program for the many challenges in mechanical process engineering. Here the Business Unit is primarily involved in the areas of wet and dry grinding, mixing, dispersing, de-aeration and classifying. The laboratory- and production-scale machines, as well as complete production lines, are used in almost all areas of industry, such as the forward-looking nanotechnology, the production of ink, minerals or foods. The bundling of processing know-how, our extensive machine program, solutions for customer-specific problems and our global presence are unique and hence the strength of the business unit

Name: Tesmec Group
Description:
Tesmec Group is leader in designing, manufacturing and selling of systems, technologies and integrated solutions for the construction, maintenance and efficiency of infrastructures related to the transport and distribution of energy, data and material.

In details, Tesmec Group is active in the following businesses:

1) STRINGING SOLUTIONS: technologies, machines and accessories for stringing operations for the construction and maintenance of transmission and distribution power lines

2) ENERGY AUTOMATION: a complete portfolio of solutions for different voltage classes (high, medium and low) to face the new technological challenges related to renewable energy sources and distributed generation in the sector of the power grids technologies

3) TRENCHERS & SURFACE MINERS: specialized equipment and services for telecommunication networks, oil, gas and water pipelines, renewable plants, bulk excavation, surface mining and underground infrastructures; 

4) RAILWAY TECHNOLOGIES: rail vehicles and integrated systems for the construction, maintenance and diagnostics of the railway infrastructure

The Group, established in 1951 and led by Chairman & CEO Ambrogio Caccia Dominioni, relies on more than 900 employees and has the production plants in Italy - in Grassobbio (Bergamo), Sirone (Lecco), Monopoli (Bari), in the USA, in Alvarado (Texas) and in France, in Durtal, as well as three research and development units respectively in Fidenza (Parma), Padua and Patrica (FS). The Group also has a global commercial presence through foreign subsidiaries and sales offices in USA, South & West Africa, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Qatar, China and France.

Tesmec believes in innovation and sustainable technology: it is always focused on the improvement of performance with respect for the environment and on the development of technological solutions to fast forward growth and modernization worldwide.

Name: Hangcha Forklift
Description: Specialized in engineering and manufacturing high-quality forklifts and warehouse equipment since 1956.

Name: Haver & Boecker Latinoamericana
Description:
A company dedicated to developing storage, mixing, packing, filling, palletizing and loading solutions for over 125 years, Haver & Boecker works with customers on six continents, with over 50 subsidiaries and 150 representatives worldwide. Haver offers a vast equipment and service portfolio, serving different markets including cement, building materials, food and animal feed, chemical and petro-chemical.
Haver employs specialists in all areas to offer complete and personalized solutions. Serving the most specific technical needs and always trying to understand and learn every customer’s production processes in order to offer the best solutions is our approach to every challenge.

About our parent company HAVER & BOECKER
HAVER & BOECKER is a family-managed, midsize company with headquarters in Oelde, Westphalia, Germany. HAVER & BOECKER
OHG comprises the Wire Weaving and Machinery Divisions. Together with more than 50 subsidiaries and 150 representatives on all five
continents, HAVER & BOECKER operates worldwide with about 2,950 employees.
The Wire Weaving Division manufactures woven wire cloth and processes it into engineered woven wire products. They are used for
screening and filtration in the chemical, plastics and automobile industries, in aviation and aerospace, electronics, industrial and analysis
screening, in the food industry as well as for architectural applications.
The Machinery Division and its technology brands HAVER & BOECKER, HAVER & BOECKER NIAGARA, IBAU HAMBURG,
SOMMER, FEIGE FILLING, BEHN + BATES, AVENTUS, NEWTEC BAG PALLETIZING, HAVER Automation and HAVER Engineering is
specialized in processing, transport, storage, mixing, filling, packing, palletizing and loading of bulk materials. The product range includes
the development, production and distribution of machines for agglomeration, pelletizing and washing for building materials and mineral
goods plant engineering and services.
www.haverboecker.com

Name: Penske Australia & New Zealand
Description:
Penske Australia & New Zealand is a leading supplier of the world’s finest heavy-duty trucks, diesel engines, gas engines, and power systems. 

Distributing the Western Star Trucks, MAN Truck & Bus, Dennis Eagle, mtu, Bergen Engines, Detroit, Allison Transmission (AU only), and Sauer Compressors (AU only) brands, we operate across the most dynamic markets, including on-highway and various off-highway industries such as mining, energy solutions, construction and industrial, rail, marine, oil and gas, agriculture, and defence. 

Penske also represents aftermarket products from leading oil, coolant, and filter brands. 

With over 1,300 employees, we are committed to providing the most comprehensive 24/7 aftersales support through a network of strategically located branches and field locations and more than 100 dealers. 

Penske Australia and Penske New Zealand are 100% subsidiaries of Penske Automotive Group, a Fortune 500 company that operates automotive and commercial vehicle dealerships across the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, Italy, and Japan, and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

Penske Truck Leasing forms part of Penske Transportation Solutions. 

Both Penske Automotive Group and Penske Transportation Solutions form part of Penske Corporation. 

http://penskeanz.com

Name: NETZSCH Pumps & Systems
Description:
As a global specialist in complex fluid handling, our customers' satisfaction is our top priority. NETZSCH has been developing, producing and distributing positive displacement pumps worldwide for more than 70 years.

We develop the right pump solution for your customers' specifications. Thereby, we promise you Proven Excellence - outstanding performance in all areas. Even complex media pose no problems to our broad product range.

From the smallest metering pump for the industry to large pumps for the oil and gas sector or mining - we have the solution optimised for you for every application area. NETZSCH Pumps & Systems serves markets worldwide with NEMO progressing cavity pumps, TORNADO rotary lobe pumps, NOTOS multi screw pumps, PERIPRO persitaltic pumps, grinding systems, barrel emptying systems, dosing systems and accessories. 

Whether environment & energy, chemical, pulp & paper, food & pharmaceutical, mining, oil & gas upstream, mid- / downstream or battery: At NETZSCH, we develop the right pump solution for your individual requirements.

Contact:
We look forward to cater our clients in the most economical and enduring way by providing “Technologies that care”

Name: Rollepaal Pipe Extrusion Technology B.V.
Description:
For over 60 years, Rollepaal has been the trusted partner for pipe manufacturers worldwide. We design and build advanced extrusion technology that helps customers achieve higher efficiency, lower costs, and perfect product quality. With deep process expertise, innovative digital tools, and a global support network, we make pipe production smarter, more sustainable, and more profitable.

Process Knowledge
Decades of pipe production experience are built into every solution we deliver. This ensures your team makes fewer mistakes, improves consistency, and achieves perfect output—every time.

Premium Performance
Our machines are engineered to run faster, longer, and cleaner. The result is consistent production with minimal downtime, giving you maximum efficiency and a reliable competitive edge.

Material Saving
We help you reduce overweight, cut scrap, and optimize every formulation. This protects your margins and increases profitability, while reducing environmental impact.

Beyond equipment, we provide PVC-O technology, enabling stronger, lighter, and more durable pipes with reduced material use and lower total cost of ownership. With Rollepaal Connect and our mobile app, we empower customers with real-time data, predictive insights, and secure remote support.

From strategic hubs in Europe, the USA, and India, our service includes global on-site repairs, training, tailor-made service contracts, and 24/5 technical support. Wherever you operate, we ensure your production lines run at their very best.

At Rollepaal, our mission is clear: to be the experts in perfect pipe production,delivering sustainable technology that supports access to clean water and sanitation worldwide.

Name: SP Ultraflex Systems Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Since its inception in 1985, SP Ultraflex Systems (P) LTD. has played a vital role in the evolution of Converting Slitter Rewinders in South-East Asia. Traditionally considered as mere ancillaries, slitter rewinders are now sourced with the due diligence that accompanies the purchase of higher value equipment such as Printing Presses and Lamination equipment. Deservedly so, since slitting rewinding is the final converting operation and the finish of slit reels is the proverbial “first impression” given to the customer.

Keeping pace with developments in related equipment such as Printing, Lamination and Packing machines, there has been a constant metamorphosis in the design of converting slitters, particularly in respect of the speeds, drives, changeover mechanisms and material handling options. SP Ultraflex is proud to have spearheaded these innovations at every stage, as propagandists, as underwriters and as pioneers.

The production facility is located in Mira Road, Thane, a forty-minute drive from Mumbai airport.

Our Vision: To be the most preferred supplier, customer, employer and partner in the industry.

Our Mission: To present to the converting industry an optimum blend of reliability and affordability and by so doing, empower them to realize a better value proposition than higher and lower priced options.

Name: RDO Equipment Australia
Description:
The year is 1968. 26-year-old potato farmer, Ron Offutt, is farming alongside his father in Minnesota, US, operating John Deere equipment rented from his local dealership. Later that same year, Ron purchases that local dealership and grows it into a company with more than 75 stores across nine states. 

Fifty years later, RDO Equipment is one of the world’s largest John Deere and Vermeer dealers. 

Continuing a 60-year Australian legacy of innovation, RDO Equipment is the official dealer partner for John Deere Construction and Forestry equipment in Australia (excluding WA), a John Deere agricultural and turf equipment dealer in 22 QLD, NSW & NT locations, and also operates the Vermeer Australia equipment dealership business.

RDO operates out of 28 dealership locations across Australia and proudly employs more than 800 staff providing expert sales, parts and service support to customers across the agricultural, roads, environmental, landscaping, mining, road, and forestry sectors.

BVS also exports its products outside Turkey to Turkish Republic, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Egypt, Algeria, Sudan, Afghanistan, the United Arab Emirates, Palestine, Iraq, Iran, Syria, Jordan, Russia, Romania, Germany, Belgium, France, Italy, Albania, Portugal, Romania, Peru, Djibouti, Sudan, Morocco, and United States of America. As a result of this quality policy, BVS is certified with EN ISO 9001:2000, TÜV and CE certificates by TÜV, and our management system has also been certified by TÜV management service according to EN ISO 9001:2000 . Furthermore BVS has “DIN EN ISO 3834-2” Welding Quality Conformity Certificate, “OHSAS 18001” Occupational Health& Safety Management System Certificate, "ISO 14001:2004" Environmental Management System Certificate, "GOST-R" Russia Certificate of Conformity and" ROSTEKHNADZOR (RTN) Russia Permit to use Certificate.

 كما تتشرف اوتراك بشراكتها مع كبري شركات المقاولات بالقطاع العام و الخاص و الاعمال و منها علي سبيل المثال لا الحصر(اوراسكوم, المراسم, المقاولون العرب,  بتروجيت, حسن علام....الخ)

Description: RotoMetrics is the world leader in precision rotary tooling.  The company, headquartered near St. Louis, Missouri supplies global printing and converting customers from operations in 11 countries.  RotoMetrics has the broadest product offering in the industry, supplying rotary and flexible cutting dies, magnetic and print cylinders, modular processing stations and accessories flexographic printing equipment.

Name: Fine Handling & Automation Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Fine Handling & Automation develops high quality handling equipment for all types of industries  which help improve productivity by making handling effortless for your operators. For over last few years, the entire team of Fine Handling & Automation is involved with designing and development of technically superior handling solutions and grippers. We are proud of the large number of handling solutions we have implemented. The spectrum ranges from simple tackles all the way to highly complex gripping solutions with integrated functional modules and gauging devices.

The innovative handling equipment manufactured by Fine Handling & Automation aids workers in handling either heavy or awkward loads. Not only do they protect operators from unnecessary strain and possible injuries, they also prevent damage to materials and equipment being moved.

Our well equipped designing facility & world class manufacturing, assembly and testing facility ensure competent advice and efficient processing of our customers tasks.

Our business principles, the expertise of our team members and our consistent quality management combined with our many years of experience make first class quality possible which we guarantee for each of our customers.

Products:

•	Zero Gravity Manipulators
•	Link Type Handling Systems
•	Air Balancers & Grippers

•	Gantry Systems for Automatic Loading and Unloading
•	Pick and Place Mechanisms
•	Floor Based Conveying Systems
•	Customized Solutions

Clients: Ashok Leyland, Tata, Mahindra, TI India, Comau, Hirotec, Caterpillar, AMW, VW, Ford, Skoda, Atlas Copco, Toyota, Makino, Bosch, Maruti Suzuki, John Deere.

Name: Christian Pfeiffer Maschinenfabrik GmbH
Description:
Christian Pfeiffer Beckum optimises grinding processes through outstanding technological innovations, most of which are unique and patented. Thanks to these innovations, we have been a leader in the size reduction technology industry for more than 90 years! 

Worldwide customers appreciate our expertise in grinding processes and separator/classifier technology.

Solutions for Cement industry:
-  We optimise grinding plants
-  We assist you with minimizing energy consumption and CO₂- reduction

Solutions for Coal grinding
- We offer ball mills and vertical roller mills for different solid fuels

Name: Rhinestahl Advanced Manufacturing Group
Description:
Rhinestahl Corporation is a privately held high-tech company with headquarters and facilities located in Mason, Ohio. Started in 1967, Rhinestahl prides itself on its entrepreneurial and can-do culture and seeks team members that are inclusive of diversity of thought and style to bring the best ideas forward to "delight" the customer.

Advanced Manufacturing Group (AMG)

AMG is engaged in complex machining and fabrication of build-to-print and Rhinestahl-proprietary designs. AMG takes a partner approach with its customers helping to refine customer-defined designs for improved manufacturability, lower cost and improved utility as well as works upstream with customers to ensure a complete and integrated solution.

Name: Fritz Studer AG
Description: Fritz Studer AG, founded in 1912, is one of the market and technology leaders in the field of high-precision cylindrical grinding technology. The company supplies both standard machines and customer-specific system solutions of the highest quality and precision for all industrial sectors. STUDER is part of the UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS group, which, with total sales of over USD 1.5 billion, is one of the largest machine tool manufacturers worldwide. With around 5,000 employees at over 50 global production, service, and sales locations, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is customer-oriented and highly efficient.

Name: Ingersoll Cutting Tools
Description:
Ingersoll Cutting Tool Company has long been one of the world's leading suppliers of metal removal tooling. Since our first cutting tool patent in 1889, we have strived to provide the most innovative and productive metal removal solutions on the market.

We pioneered the development of indexable carbide end mills. We were the first to introduce the On-Edge insert configuration. We received the first patent for an indexable ball nose end mill and quickly followed with the first two-effective ball nose.

Today, Ingersoll Cutting Tools offers the widest range of milling products in the world and, with our close ties to the many various resources of the IMC Group of companies, we stand poised to bring forth even more exciting innovations to the metal removal process.

Name: Guris Construction Machineries Industry Co. Inc.
Description:
GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc. joined the structure of GURIS Holding when it was founded in 1984 with name Guris Export Import and Marketing Co. Inc.
The company, which underwent a change of name in 2010 and became GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc. focused on concrete mixing plants by correctly analyzing the facts of the country and the world since its foundation.
GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc., having achieved many worldwide successes in its field made significant contributions to the growth of the company along with other Holding Companies.
GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc., having gained expertise on Concrete Mixing Plants became one of the enterprises that not only caught up with contemporary technology but also developed and produced this technology worldwide under its brand name.
GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc., one of the favorite enterprises of GURIS Holding, after having made an agreement with the Japanese Furukawa Company, soon became one of the most important worldwide solutions partners in the field of Hydraulic Crawler Drills and Rock Breakers .
The quality of the service given worldwide in the field of spare parts and service is one of the most significant successes of GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc.
GURIS Construction Machineries Industry Company Inc. will, in the future as in the past, strengthen its infrastructure, invest more in R&D in order to introduce its activities and products to the whole world, besides the fact that it is one of the leading companies of GÜRİŞ Holding and our country, and it has the objective of producing more productive products.

Name: FPZ | Blowers, Pumps and Fans
Description:
FPZ is an international company with 3 brands and business units: FPZ side channel blowers, Doseuro metering pumps, Arivent industrial fans.
Thanks to more than 50 years of experience in the design and production of fluid handling technologies, today FPZ is a point of reference in different sectors, with thousands of machines operative in facilities over the 5 continents.

Our lean production systems is designed to guarantee: product quality, delivery time and reliable machines (also in extreme conditions).

FPZ with its 8 branches (UK, Spain, France, Germany/Austria, Turkey, USA, Mexico) can guarantee pre-sales and post-sales assistance all over the world. The core applications markets are:

- water treatment
- industrial suction
- industrial automation
- biogas extraction
- packaging 
- plastic injection
- textile

Fpz strength is the possibility to customize its products for the applications markets in terms of perfomances, accessories and installations.

Name: LK Metrology
Description:
At LK Metrology we are shaping the future of measurement technology with unmatched precision and innovation. 

Our expertise lies in delivering class-leading solutions that combine ultra-precise ceramic Coordinate Measuring Machines (CMMs), advanced optical sensors, and fully integrated software - all developed and manufactured under one roof. 
And with a 10-year guarantee on original accuracy, our customers can rely on long-term performance and reliability.

We don’t just deliver machines - we provide complete metrology ecosystems tailored to every measuring task, big or small. 
Since over 60 years our precision technology underpins the process chain from design, development, production and assembly through to quality assurance in global industries.

Headquartered in the UK, LK's CMM development and production are at the company’s facility in Castle Donington, UK. 
Sales and support offices are located in the UK, North America, Belgium, France, Germany, Italy, China, Japan, India, Mexico, Poland and Dubai - supplemented by a worldwide distributor network. 

Industries worldwide - including automotive, aerospace, defense, energy, medical, and motorsport - trust LK Metrology to deliver the precision they need to stay ahead.

We are metrology.

Name: MIZZTECH
Description:
MIZZTECH is a globally recognized leader in providing innovative and reliable mineral processing solutions. With years of expertise in the mining and minerals industry, we specialize in delivering high-performance mineral processing equipment, EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) solutions, slurry handling systems, and material handling technologies. Our multidisciplinary approach enables us to offer end-to-end services, from conceptual design and engineering to full-scale plant construction and operational optimization.  

Core Competencies & Services  

Mineral Processing Equipment  
- Crushing & Grinding Systems (Jaw crushers, cone crushers, ball mills, SAG mills)  
- Separation & Classification Equipment (Magnetic separators, flotation cells, hydrocyclones, gravity concentrators)  
- Filtration & Dewatering Solutions (Filter presses, thickeners, centrifuges)  
- Tailings & Waste Management Systems  

EPC Solutions for Mineral Processing Plants  
Slurry & Material Handling Solutions  
Process Optimization & Troubleshooting  

Why Choose MIZZTECH?  

1. Expertise & Innovation  
2. Global Reach, Local Support  
3. Commitment to Sustainability  
4. Customer-Centric Approach  

MIZZTECH is more than a supplier—we are a strategic partner for mining companies seeking high-performance, sustainable mineral processing solutions. Our full-spectrum capabilities, from equipment supply to EPC and process optimization, ensure that clients receive integrated, cost-effective, and future-ready solutions.  

Whether you are developing a new mine, upgrading an existing plant, or tackling processing challenges, MIZZTECH has the expertise, technology, and commitment to deliver exceptional results.  

Contact us today to discuss how we can optimize your mineral processing operations!

Name: Camfil Air Pollution Control
Description:
Industrial dust collectors, mist collectors and fume collection equipment to clean up manufacturing processes such as blasting, chemical processing, fiberglass and FRP production, laser cutting, plasma cutting, mining, paper scrap, pharmaceutical, rubber grinding, seed processing, thermal spray, welding, woodworking, machining and more.

Camfil APC is a division of Camfil, headquartered in Trosa, Sweden and is a worldwide air filtration company. Camfil has filtration divisions that specialize in HVAC filters, HEPA filters, cleanrooms, gas turbine intake filtration, hospital filtration, railroad locomotive filters and carbon odor filters.

Name: Gasparini Industries
Description:
We are an Italian manufacturer, specialized in the production of top level Press brakes, guillotine shears and automated lines..

We exist to make bending and cutting sheet metal a quick, precise and reliable process.

We try to make our Clients more productive and competitive.

We want to be regarded as the most authoritative actor in the sheet metal working sector. We aim to become more and more the point of reference on theory and practice of bending and cutting. For this reason, we invest a lot of energy in the development of new technologies and in the creation of innovative products.

Our goal is to provide the best customized solution for the most demanding customers.

We offer our knowledge to guide the customer in the purchase process, with the aim of guaranteeing the product that best suits to their needs.

Contact us at info@gasparini.it

Name: Estampo Tec
Description:
A Estampo Tec é uma empresa brasileira com atuação no mercado desde 1990, especializada no desenvolvimento e construção de ferramentas e fornecimento de componentes estampados para o mercado nacional e internacional de autopeças, eletrodomésticos e outros setores. Alicerçada por um corpo técnico altamente qualificado, desenvolve projetos e soluções para estampos progressivos de precisão e estampagem de componentes metálicos.

Valendo-se desta experiência, a Estampo Tec com uma administração moderna e atuante, ocupa lugar de destaque nos segmentos de estamparia, ferramentaria e usinagem de precisão. Contando com uma grande estrutura equipada com máquinas de última geração, confere aos ferramentais confeccionados, alta qualidade e precisão que aliadas à rapidez de execução, fazem da Estampo Tec uma empresa de padrão diferenciado no mercado nacional e internacional.

Suas amplas e modernas instalações de 6.500 m2 foram planejadas e construídas visando garantir condições adequadas e otimizadas para a oferta de extensa gama de serviços, dentro de um Sistema de Gestão da Qualidade Certificado em conformidade com a norma IATF 16949:2016 e ISO 9001:2015. É uma empresa que cresce em ritmo acelerado, de forma sustentável, oferecendo sempre serviços de qualidade superior, de forma a possibilitar um atendimento rápido e principalmente eficaz aos seus clientes.

Name: ADIRA Metal Forming Solutions
Description:
ADIRA is a leading manufacturer and global supplier of advanced sheet metal working machinery. We specialize in designing and producing hydraulic, electric, and hybrid press brakes, guillotine shears, laser technology, robotic bending cells, and automatic sheet metal transformation systems. Operating in approximately 60 markets worldwide, we are recognized for our expertise, high-quality made-in-Portugal solutions, and ability to deliver highly complex, fully customized solutions tailored to each client’s specific needs.

We are dedicated to continuous innovation and improvement, collaborating closely with our customers and carefully monitoring each project to ensure outstanding results. Our goal is to consistently exceed expectations with every solution we provide.

Name: Lainox Ali
Description:
In 1981 the Lainox company was founded in Italy, in Vittorio Veneto, Treviso. It immediately specialized in designing and creating equipment for professional restaurateurs, especially multi-use ovens. 
It's strong entrepreneurial spirit and the quality of it's innovations made it quickly stand out. Both qualities led to the rapid achievement of results and attainment of significant market share in Italy and abroad.

For more than 30 years Lainox is an excellence partner for all chefs

Name: HİSARLAR
Description:
HİSARLAR 1974 yılında bir aile şirketi olarak kurulmuştur. Toplamda 97.000m2’lik bir alanda yaklaşık 600+ kişi ile faaliyet gösteren, kurumsal yapısıyla, uluslararası bilinirliğe sahip standart şartlarına göre sertifikalandırılmış “ürün-yönetim-üretim” şekilleriyle, Türkiye’ye değer katan büyük bir organizasyondur.

Türkiye’nin ilk Traktör kabini üreticisi olan HİSARLAR, yıllarca artan tecrübelerini, kabiliyetlerini daha sonra ağır metal işleme konusuna da yoğunlaştırmıştır. Global pazarda adını duyurmuş önemli iş makinaları markalarına şasi ve diğer kaynaklı birleştirme parçalar gibi hassas üretimler gerçekleştiren önemli bir yan sanayi üreticisi olmuştur. 

HİSARLAR aynı zamanda 1985 yılından bu yana Tarım Makinaları sektöründe kendi tasarım ve üretim kabiliyetleriyle geliştirdiği, marka olmuş toprak işleme makinaları üretimini gerçekleştirmeye ve ürün gamını geliştirmeye devam etmektedir. 

Ar-Ge’ye büyük önem veren HİSARLAR, Türkiye’nin Tarım Makinaları sektöründe halen ilk Ar-Ge merkezi olma özelliğini korumaktadır. HİSARLAR, 2012 yılından beri ilgili Bakanlıkça tescilli Ar-Ge merkezidir. Ar-Ge’yi geleceğinin ve büyümesinin teminatı olarak değerlendirmektedir. Türkiye’deki ve Dünya’daki gelişmeleri yerinde ve hızla takip edebilmek adına yeni ürün geliştirmeye önem vermektedir. 

HİSARLAR kaliteli ve yüksek üretim kapasitesi, özellikle Avrupa’daki seçkin ana sanayilere ihracatı, yüksek verimliliğe sahip AR-GE yatırımları ve teknolojik üstünlükleriyle, tarımsal mekanizasyonda geliştirdiği ürünlerle Dünya’da saygın bir marka olmaya kararlıdır. 

HİSARLAR; bizce ‘üretmek sanattır’.

Name: Link-Belt Cranes

Link-Belt’s ever-evolving product line currently includes 36 cranes grouped as telescopic crawler, rough terrain, lattice crawler, hydraulic truck, lattice truck and all-terrain cranes. Our strong network of domestic and international crane distributors provide full sales and service support.

Name: Carimali
Description: We are Carimali, a manufacturer of professional coffee machines born in Bergamo, Italy. For over 100 years, our passion for coffee has led us to produce innovative, reliable, and top-performance coffee machines, both fully automatic and traditional. Excellence and integrity are core foundations to our business,  as we stand out to revolutionize the craft of making coffee.

Name: Kern Microtechnik GmbH
Description: We are your partner for challenging tasks in high-precision machining - for almost all conceivable geometries and materials. When it comes to process stability, repeatability, surface quality and temperature management, there is no better choice than a KERN machine. In order to meet your individual requirements in the highest possible way, we rely on innovative product technologies for the permanent development and optimisation of our machining centres. The customer and his process is our priority. Quality and service are our highest goals.

Name: Grind Master Machines Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Grind Master Machines is a leader in special purpose machines for Metal Finishing, Deburring, NanoFinish, and solutions including Robotic automation and Abrasives.

 With over 5500 machines across 6 continents, serving a wide range of industries, Grind Master Machines brings a world of experience of over 35 years in machine technology & process knowledge. Name: Matsuura Machinery Corporation
Description:
Since our foundation in 1935, Matsuura has been at the forefront of innovative design, development and manufacture of high quality machining centers. Our products satisfy the global requirement for high reliability, sustained accuracy and guaranteed performance.

In tune with the spirit of innovation of our founder, Matsuura today produces a wide range of outstanding high speed machining centers covering all industry sectors. These include horizontals and verticals in all sizes, configured with 3 to 5 axis, single table, twin and multi pallet systems, twin spindles and tool changers, cell systems and our superb range of ultra high speed linear motor machines.

Recognized as a technology leader in the world of high performance machining,our prestigious customer base spans aerospace, automotive and motorsports, electronics, telecommunications, medical research and mold & die industries.

Our global customers base demand and receive high speed, high accuracy and reliability from our products with technical, applications and service support that is second to none.

Our dedication and commitment to the research and development of unique products incorporating the latest emerging technologies is the reason why we maintain our status as a technology leader.

Name: TECBELT INDUSTRIAL LTDA.

Name: Italtractor ITM SpA
Description:
IITM Group designs, manufactures and distributes a comprehensive range of undercarriage parts and complete customized solutions for several industry segments. The extensive product range includes track chains and shoes, rollers, sprockets and segments, idlers and tension groups. 
The headquarters of the Group, Italtractor ITM, founded in 1957 is based in Valsamoggia, Bologna, Italy. ITM with over 1.700 professionals and engineers worldwide, operates through a global service network, dealers and distributors. 
The production capacity in its facilities are located in Italy, Germany, Spain, USA, Brazil, China, Australia and in India. A Global Top Quality Partner with cutting-edge solutions for several industrial sectors: mining, construction, paving, agriculture, forestry, marine and others specific applications. Italtractor ITM S.p.A. is a Titan international Inc. Company.

Name: MC Machinery Systems Inc.
Description:
A subsidiary of the Mitsubishi Corp. and headquartered in Elk Grove Village, Ill., MC Machinery Systems is a premier North American supplier and servicer of fabrication, additive and milling equipment from Mitsubishi Electric, OPS Ingersoll and Roku-Roku, including fiber and CO2 lasers, wire and sinker EDMs, precision milling machines, press brakes, robotic bending cells, and automation systems. MC Machinery Systems, Inc.

Elk Grove Village, IL 60007
(630) 860-4210

With all the experience since established, along with continuously contributing to the national economy, Dener has successfully achieved a position as one of the best sheet metal working machines manufacturers in the world.

Name: Aasted
Description: Aasted ApS – Worldwide, market-leading manufacturer of production solutions within the chocolate, bakery, and confectionery industries. Now in its third generation, Aasted remains committed to developing quality products and innovative design solutions at the leading edge of production and technology.A Danish, family-owned, consolidated company, Aasted has always been driven by a passion for innovation. With CEO Piet Tæstensen currently at the helm, Aasted services the global market through a comprehensive product portfolio, and has seen steady growth, especially in developing markets such as India and Bangladesh. And 2019 saw the opening of the Aasted North America, Inc. office in Atlanta, Georgia, USA. In January 2010, Aasted merged with A. E. Nielsen to provide a more complete range of products to our valued customers. It is thanks to fruitful partnerships like this one that Aasted remains an innovative and successful entity – as a worldwide supplier of complete processing lines, machinery and equipment for the chocolate, bakery and confectionery industries.At Aasted, the mission toward success does not stop at the physical product. We pride ourselves of our after-sales services and of providing flexible solutions that are adaptable to the specific needs of customers. Integral to the company, the Aasted Service Department operates worldwide with its own staff of dedicated engineers, technicians and logistics experts. At Aasted, we work hard to provide a fast and efficient service to all our customers – wherever they are and whenever suits them.

Name: Euro Auctions
Description:
Euro Auctions has been specializing in conducting unreserved auctions of Industrial Equipment and Construction Machinery since 1998 and continues to go from strength to strength. 

Euro Auctions is a truly international company with buyers and sellers from nearly every country in the world. We pride ourselves on providing an exceptional service for both buyers and sellers alike, with highly competitive rates. 

Our goal is to provide a straightforward service, making the buying and selling of equipment easy and accessible to all. We continually strive to conduct successful auctions, tailored to the needs of our buyers and sellers. We aim to achieve fair and market-value prices for our customers by bringing buyers and sellers together at auction. Each auction is completely unreserved and buyers can purchase onsite or online via our free online bidding service. 

Each position at Euro Auctions plays a part in the continuing success of our business and we are committed to unearthing talented new members to join our team and positively impact on our global business growth.

Name: BAŞAK Traktör
Description:
DA-TA Demir Araba - Tahta Araba fabrikası olarak Adapazarı’nda 1914 yılında kurulan Başak Traktör, 1944 yılında Türkiye Zirai Donatım Kurumu’na bağlı SAZ (Sakarya Alat-ı Ziraiye) unvanıyla Türk çiftçisinin tüm tarım alet ve makinaları ile diğer ihtiyaçlarını karşılamaya devam etmiştir.

1962 yılından itibaren Ford marka traktörlerin ithalatını yapmaya başlayan Başak Traktör, 1968 yılından itibaren Ford ile yapılan işbirliği çerçevesinde Adapazarı'nda yüzde 65 yerli üretim oranı ile imalat başarısını göstermiştir. 

1976 yılında STEYR firmasıyla yapılan anlaşma kapsamında STEYR markası ile traktör üretimine başlanmış, 1996 yılından itibaren BAŞAK markası ile traktör üretimine devam edilmiştir. Başak Traktör 2012 yılında Sanko Grubu’na katılmıştır.

Sakarya’da bulunan fabrikada, 275.000 m² alan üzerinde 40.000 m² kapalı alanda üretim yapılmaktadır. Yıllık üretim kapasitesi 10.000 adet olup, traktörün ana parçaları olan motor, şanzıman ve hidrolik donanım ana parçaları, Başak Traktör fabrikasında işlenmekte ve üretilmektedir. Başak Traktör, farklı segmentlerdeki 2x4 ve 4x4 çekişli 20 civarında modeli; az yakıt tüketimi sayesinde en ekonomik kullanımı sağlayan, az bakım gerektiren yerli traktörleri ile çiftçilerin hizmetindedir.

SANKO çatısı altında yeniden yapılanan Başak Traktör, Türkiye çapında yaygın satış ve servis ağı ve her an ulaşılabilir, ekonomik yedek parça stoku ile çiftçilerin yanında olmaya devam etmektedir.

Description:
Lincoln Electric is the world leader in the design, development and manufacture of arc welding solutions, robotic welding and cutting systems, plasma and oxyfuel cutting, and is a leading provider of brazing and soldering alloys. Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, USA, Lincoln Electric has 71 manufacturing locations, including operations and joint ventures in 21 countries, and a worldwide network of distributors and sales offices reaching over 160 countries. 

Recognized as the welding experts, the Company provides leading technology products and solutions. From its early beginnings, Lincoln pioneered technological advancements and improvements in arc welding consumables and equipment. Lincoln sustains the industry's most dynamic and comprehensive research and product development program. This effort is supported by the David C. Lincoln Technology Center, the most advanced facility of its kind.

Arc welding is indispensable to many industries. For example, the metal working field involves production arc welding in transportation, construction, fabrication, petrochemical and other industries. In the manufacture of metal products, arc welding applications range from producing consumer appliances to fabricating heavy machinery and structural steel. Arc welding is the dominant joining method for building and other industrial construction, including oil and gas pipeline fabrication, and oil refinery construction.

For more information about Lincoln Electric and its products and services, visit the Company’s website at www.lincolnelectric.com.sg
