Name: Mazak Europe
Description:
The World's Leading CNC Machine Tool Manufacturer

Mazak Europe is the European manufacturing, sales and support arm of the leading international machine tool builder, Yamazaki Mazak Corporation.

Yamazaki Mazak Corporation, found 1919, is the world's largest producer of computer-controlled metal cutting machine tools with annual sales of over 1.5 billion Euro. The company's headquarters are near Nagoya, Japan, and it has manufacturing operations in Japan, USA, Singapore, and China as well as in the UK. It is privately owned by the Yamazaki family, from whose name the brand "Mazak " is derived. 

Customers include manufacturers of sub-sea equipment for the oil industry, makers of moulds for contact lenses, customers supplying to the aerospace, automotive and construction industries, and manufacturers of machinery of all kinds. Indeed it is said that Mazak supplies machines to make everything from jewellery to jet engines.

Name: Sime Darby Industrial Sdn Bhd
Description: Sime Darby Industrial Sdn Bhd is a Machinery company located in Jalan Puchong, Puchong, Selangor, Malaysia.

Name: Busch Vacuum Solutions
Description:
The Busch Group is one of the world’s largest manufacturers of vacuum pumps, vacuum systems, blowers, compressors and gas abatement systems. Under its umbrella, the group houses three well-known brands: Busch Vacuum Solutions, Pfeiffer Vacuum and centrotherm clean solutions.

The extensive product portfolio makes the Busch Group your preferred solution provider for vacuum, overpressure and abatement applications in all industries, such as semiconductors, food, analytics, chemicals and plastics. This also includes the design and construction of tailor-made vacuum systems and the industry’s most extensive worldwide service network.

The Busch Group is a family business that is managed by the Busch family. More than 8,000 employees in 44 countries worldwide work for the group. Since its beginnings more than 60 years ago, Busch is headquartered in Maulburg, Germany, in the tri-country region of Germany, France and Switzerland.

Today, the Busch Group manufactures in its 23 own production plants in China, the Czech Republic, France, Germany, India, Romania, South Korea, Switzerland, the United Kingdom, the USA and Vietnam, always near to its customers for fast delivery around the globe.

What characterizes the family-owned Busch Group is stability, reliability and flexibility. This combination makes us your best one-stop supplier in the vacuum market for innovative, individual solutions.

Name: Lenze
Description:
Lenze is a leading drive specialist for machine and plant engineering. For more than 75 years, the company has been a pacemaker and strong partner at its customers' side. With the help of the triad of electromechanics, electronics and software, Lenze accompanies its customers and helps them to optimize production and logistics processes, cut costs and reduce their energy consumption. 

 

The Lenze Group, based in Aerzen, employs more than 3,600 people worldwide and is represented in 45 countries. Group-wide, the company generated a turnover of 828 million euros in the 2023/2024 financial year. 

 

More information is available on the website at www.lenze.com

Name: Hastings Deering
Description:
Established in 1932, the Hastings Deering Group is one of the top 5 Cat dealers worldwide. The company is the exclusive distributor for the sale of Cat equipment, technology solutions, parts and service support in our territories. Headquartered in Brisbane, Queensland, Australia, Hastings Deering has over 3000 employees, across 23 business service centres throughout Queensland, Northern Territory, Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands and New Caledonia.

We sell, rent, and offer outstanding support  and parts distribution services for customers across a range of industries, including mining, general construction, civil transport and commercial construction, power systems, government, primary industries and marine.

In 1992, the Hastings Deering Group was purchased by Sime Darby Berhad, one of the oldest and largest Cat dealers in the world and a multinational organisation with more than 200 companies operating in 26 countries.

Today, the combination of our rich history, the expertise of our people and our genuine commitment to understand our customers’ needs continues to sustain Hastings Deering as a market leader providing solutions that deliver superior outcomes for our customers.

Name: Voith Turbo
Description:
The Group Division Voith Turbo is part of the Voith Group and a specialist for intelligent drive technology, systems as well as tailor-made services. With its innovative and smart products, Voith offers highest efficiency and reliability. Customers from highly diverse industries such as oil and gas, energy, mining and mechanical engineering, ship technology and rail rely on the advanced technologies and digital applications of Voith.

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/VoithTurboOfficial

Imprint: https://voith.com/corp-de/footer/imprint.html

Name: Sullair Argentina
Description:
Ofrecemos soluciones a través de maquinaria para la industria, la construcción y los servicios en general. También proveemos generación de energía en distintos mercados de Sudamérica. 

Compresores de aire, grupos electrógenos, plataformas para trabajo en altura, manipuladores compactos y telescópicos, torres de iluminación y equipos para movimiento de tierra.

Name: Hitachi Construction Machinery (Europe) NV (HCME)
Description:
HCME is a subsidiary of Hitachi Construction Machinery Co., Ltd. and was established in 1972 in Oosterhout, The Netherlands. It is responsible for the manufacture, sales and marketing of Hitachi construction equipment throughout Europe. 

Hitachi produces the widest range of hydraulic excavators in the world, ranging from one-tonne minis to 800-tonne ultra-large mining excavators. Every single model delivers a smooth and productive performance, and is comfortable, safe and reliable. In addition to excavators, HCME also supplies wheel loaders, rigid dump trucks, crawler cranes and other equipment for special applications.

HCME has three manufacturing plants in The Netherlands: a medium excavator and wheel loader factory in Amsterdam; and a mini excavator factory and special application factory, both located in Oosterhout. The Hitachi European Parts Centre is also located in Oosterhout.

Successful operations at its European factories are allowing HCME to fulfil its business strategy and increase market share in each of its key markets. Hitachi’s mission to ‘think global, act local’ is reflected in its focus on customer needs and the Hitachi brand values associated with innovation and technology.

Name: La Marzocco
Description:
La Marzocco manufactures high quality coffee machines and equipment, finely handcrafted in Florence by artisan professionals since 1927, when it was founded by the Bambi brothers Giuseppe and Bruno, whose distinct heritage still lingers today. 

La Marzocco is a trendsetter, the innovations of style and technique within the espresso equipment industry throughout more than 80 years of experience and passion has made the company earn recognition in the coffee industry as well as in the specialty coffee environment. 
Rich in tradition, aware of its artisan values without losing site of a fast-forward edge, it delivers prime espresso coffee machines in over 80 countries worldwide.

The ongoing search for superior reliability and performance of each and every model are the living expression of La Marzocco’s values, a company remarked by its unique mindset and engagement in improving the coffee world and its community of people.

In fact, La Marzocco's mission is to persevere in the manufacturing of the finest in class specialty coffee equipment, while encompassing people, heritage, technology, design, and a spirit of sustainability in business.

Headquartered near Florence, La Marzocco has a strong network of distributors and partners present on the 5 continents and has branch offices located in Auckland, Barcelona, Markgröningen, Melbourne, Milan, London, Seattle, and Seoul.

Name: LiuGong Machinery
Description:
LiuGong is a leading construction equipment manufacturer offering a full line of extreme duty, intuitive machines for construction equipment owners constantly challenged to do more with less.
LiuGong, headquartered in Liuzhou, China, has one of the most expansive arrays of product line of any Chinese manufacturer, including wheel loader, excavator, bulldozer, pipe layer, motor grader, roller, paver, cold planer, skid steer loader, backhoe loader, forklift, aerial working platform, truck crane, lorry mounted crane, off-highway truck, rotary drilling rig, hydraulic diaphragm wall grab, hydraulic diaphragm wall drilling rig, trench cutter & hydraulic cutting and mixing rig.
The company is among the world’s fastest growing CE firms and has a strong performance in the overseas markets. In 2002, LiuGong put forward the globalization strategy. Since then, LiuGong has had nearly 30 overseas subsidiaries & offices, 4 overseas manufacturing plants and 5 R&D bases spreading across the world. More than 300 dealers provide LiuGong products and services to the customers in over 170 countries & regions.

Name: Valtra Inc.
Description:
Valtra is a leading manufacturer and service provider in the Nordic countries and it enjoys a growing reputation in South America. Valtra machines are sold in over 75 countries.

Valtra tractors are recognized for their reliability, versatility, durability and Nordic roots. Each tractor is specifically designed to individual customer needs and manufactured to withstand the harshest climates and deliver the highest levels of performance in the toughest working conditions.

Name: Toromont Cat
Description:
Toromont Cat est le concessionnaire Caterpillar autorisé au Manitoba, en Ontario, au Québec, au Nouveau-Brunswick, en Nouvelle-Écosse, à l’Île-du-Prince-Édouard, à Terre-Neuve et Labrador et au Nunavut. Nous nous spécialisons dans l’approvisionnement et l’entretien d’équipement neuf et usagé appuyés par un service après-vente exceptionnel. 

Créée en 1993, Toromont Cat est une division de Toromont Industries (TSX : TIH), une société à croissance diversifiée cotée en bourse qui a été incorporée en 1963. Notre priorité est d’offrir à nos clients des solutions qui contribuent au succès de leur entreprise. Avec plus de 300 modèles de machines et d’accessoires spécialisés dans la gamme de produits Cat, une multitude d’équipements connexes et de partenaires technologiques, un service varié et des options de location, nous pouvons répondre à vos besoins, quelque soit la tâche à accomplir.

Toromont Cat is your Cat Dealer in Manitoba, Ontario, Quebec, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, P.E.I., Newfoundland and Labrador, and Nunavut. We are dedicated to supplying and servicing new and used equipment, delivering a superior customer experience and exceptional product support to the markets we serve.

Established in 1993, Toromont Cat is a division of Toromont Industries (TSX: TIH), a publically traded, diversified growth company incorporated in 1963. We are focused on offering our customers solutions aimed at making their business more successful. With over 300 machine models and specialized attachments in our Cat equipment product line, a host of allied equipment and technology partners, and varied service and rental options, regardless of your needs or the job at hand, we strive to be your first choice.

For more information please visit www.toromontcat.com

Name: ASTEC
Description: Since 1972, Astec has been connecting communities by providing innovative rock to road solutions for our customers. United by our purpose - Built to Connect - Astec is a leading global manufacturer of specialized equipment for asphalt road building, aggregate processing and concrete production. Operations are divided into two primary business segments. Infrastructure Solutions includes road building, asphalt and concrete plants, thermal and storage solutions. Materials Solutions includes aggregate and other material processing solutions.

Name: Coperion
Description:
Hi, we are Coperion!  We are pioneers, inventors, thinkers, doers, creators, organizational talents, data nerds, both machine and people experts and much more. By combining our strengths, we made a name for ourselves as a worldwide technology leader for a broad range of high-end process solutions and complete systems used in various industries. Within the Coperion Group experts from leading brands, such as Bakon, Coperion, including the former Schenck Process FPM group of companies, Coperion K-Tron, Diosna, Gabler Engineering, Herbold Meckesheim, Peerless, Shaffer, Shick Esteve, Unifiller, as well as VMI, work closely together to provide comprehensive machines and (complete) systems for all kinds of applications. Our technologies range from extrusion, plastics recycling, feeding and bulk material handling to ingredient automation, pre-dough systems, mixing, and depositing systems. 
As an integrated technology provider, we use our comprehensive expertise and network to implement individual solutions for companies around the world. This covers the full added value chain of the production process from consultation and planning, through engineering, process optimization, manufacturing, delivery, installation and commissioning through our worldwide service network.
As part of our parent company Hillenbrand and in line with our motto "Shape what matters for tomorrow", we are constantly working on new solutions for current and future challenges. Let’s stay in touch - We invite you to follow our journey on LinkedIn! 
For legal notice information please see: https://www.coperion.com/en/support/imprint/
Also please refer to our data privacy policy here: https://www.coperion.com/en/support/data-protection

Name: Burckhardt Compression
Description: Burckhardt Compression creates leading compression solutions for a sustainable energy future and the long-term success of its customers. Together with its brands Burckhardt Compression, PROGNOST, SAMR Métal Rouge and Shenyang Yuanda Compressor, the Group is the only global manufacturer that covers a full range of reciprocating compressor technologies and services. Its customized and modularized compressor systems are used in the Chemical/Petrochemical, Gas Transport & Storage, Hydrogen Mobility & Energy and Industrial Gas sectors as well as for applications in Refinery and Gas Gathering & Processing. Since 1844, its passionate, customer-oriented and solution-driven workforce has set the benchmark in the gas compression industry.

Name: Baumer
Description: Presente em mais 4 mil hospitais, distribuídos em 36 países, a Baumer, empresa líder nas áreas de Prevenção e Controle de Infecção, Implantes e Materiais Ortopédicos e com forte atuação em Sistemas para Cirurgia, conta com mais de cinco mil soluções para a saúde. O Grupo Baumer é composto por sete divisões -ortopedia, spine, trauma, Infection control, surgical center, dental e service – que estão concentradas em seu parque fabril, localizado no Distrito Industrial de Mogi Mirim, com 12 mil metros de área construída. #compromissocomasaude

Name: Güntner
Description:
SOLVE TOMORROW'S CHALLENGES TODAY
At Güntner, we combine maximum precision in everyday life with a vision for the future in order to provide our partners with the best possible support.

OVER 90 YEARS OF LEADING ENGINEERING SOLUTIONS
Our home in Munich has seen our team become the global experts in heating and cooling solutions, making us critical to a wide variety of industries. We power everything from keeping food fresh to providing comfortable indoor temperatures in office buildings and enabling renewable energy production.
Our business has been serving the world for nearly a century and we see our heritage as a springboard for new ideas, innovation and bold ambitions.

AT OUR HEART: SUSTAINABILITY 
We are united in the desire to find ways to progress as a society – unified in our search for well-being, prosperity for future generations, and the protection and preservation of our shared home.
From the very beginnings of new product development to the operation of our units on site, we always keep this commitment in mind.

Our manufacturing plants are designed with respect for nature: we use green energy and sustainable water treatments, and our unique ‘planted plant’ concept is a breakthrough in healthy work environments. Not only this, but all our units operate with the lowest water and energy consumption possible, protecting the world’s valuable resources.

ENGINEERING SOLUTIONS
OUR GLOBAL IMPACT
We’re playing an essential role in industries all around the world with our know-how and the specialist heat exchange systems we manufacture. Always providing our customers a truly customised experience, wherever they need us. 
 
With our expert teams across more than 50 office locations and 6 manufacturing plants, we thrive on diversity of ideas as well as on our determination and ability to meet and exceed our partners’ needs. Together we're designing the future of cooling solutions and heat transfer systems.

Name: Mantrac Egypt
Description:
Mantrac Egypt is the authorised dealer representative in Egypt for the full range of Caterpillar, SEM and Perkins products. We are proud to supply the best equipment to the most demanding industries and to keep your equipment running at peak productivity.

Mantrac Egypt is not only a supplier, but a solution provider. We offer integrated business solutions backed by technical expertise and local knowledge.

E-mail: contactus@mantracegypt.com

Name: Sanmartin Brazil
Description:
We are the biggest manufacturer of equipment for beverage packaging lines in Latin America. Sanmartin manufactures bottle washer and plastic crate washer machines, tunnel pasteurizers, crater and decrater, palletizers and depalletizers, pallet stretch wrappers and the entire line of conveyors (bottles, cans, plastic crates, packs and pallets). We also develop projects for the food and non-food segments. Our solutions are developed to meet the highest level of efficiency with less consumption of production sources and utilities (water and energy). We do complete management of line integration projects. 
 
The Sanmartin Group started its activities in Argentina more than 70 years ago and also has plants in Brazil and Mexico. Our priority is the constant development of solutions with innovations that create value to our customers and permanent care for our employees, promoting social integration and initiatives for growth and development in a respectful environment.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Normet Group
Description:
Normet is a world-leading, innovative technology company. We define the future of underground operations in mining, tunnelling, and civil engineering projects, helping our partners increase safety, sustainability, and productivity throughout the lifecycle of their projects.

Normet is a caring, committed, and courageous company. We establish long-term relationships with our customers and partners to find optimum solutions to challenges that will have positive impacts on people and the environment. We constantly engage to deliver maximum value to our clients, providing high performance products and services that generate a sustainable future.

Our offerings include a complete portfolio of mining and tunnelling solutions for the entire process chain, as well as future technologies such as digitalisation, extended reality, and automation.

Headquartered in Finland, we employ over 1,800 dedicated professionals in more than 50 locations in 30 countries around the world, committing to long-term, mutually beneficial partnerships that create value in our industry and society as a whole.

Normet Group net sales were EUR 482 million in 2024.

Name: Komatsu Europe
Description:
Komatsu Europe International n.v. (KEISA) are the European Headquarters of the Komatsu Group, which is based in Tokyo, Japan. KEISA represent Komatsu in Belgium since 1967. Subsequent to previous locations in Antwerp and Haren (Brussels), KEISA set up in Vilvoorde in 1973. 

We import and distribute Komatsu construction, mining and utility equipment to European and African countries and supervise European legal and financial operations. We are also the Parts Distribution Centre for Europe, the Middle East and Africa.

Komatsu products are world renowned for their high technology, productivity, reliability, economical operation, ease of use and safety. In 2008, Komatsu launched the very first Hybrid Excavator, and environmental protection is designed into all Komatsu machines.
 
Many people work at the Vilvoorde headquarters: technicians, sales profiles, marketing and legal experts, administrative staff etc.... People with wide-ranging backgrounds and qualifications, and who share common characteristics such as perseverance, efficiency and trustworthiness: the very image of Komatsu machines.

Privacy Policy: https://www.komatsu.eu/privacy-policy

Name: Groz-Beckert
Description:
Welcome to the textile world of Groz-Beckert.

Textiles are encountered by man in every conceivable area of life: in fashion, sports and recreation, as home and domestic textiles, floor coverings, or in architecture. Today, textiles are also indispensable for mobility – from the automobile to space travel – as well as for the health sector. Behind all this are complex knitting, warp knitting, and weaving technologies, sewing, nonwovens, structuring and spinning processes – and almost always products from Groz-Beckert.

Groz-Beckert is the world's leading supplier of industrial machine needles, precision parts and fine tools, as well as systems and services for the production and joining of textile fabrics. Its products and services support the fields of knitting, weaving, nonwovens, tufting, sewing and spinning.

Groz-Beckert is part of the Groz-Beckert Group, which is a market leader in the development, manufacture and distribution of process-critical textile precision tools, industrial cutting solutions, textile reinforcements for the construction industry and composites.
The group consists of the companies Groz-Beckert, TKM and solidian and generated sales of 839 million euros in 2024 with around 9,400 employees worldwide. The company is active in more than 150 countries with agencies, production and sales subsidiaries.


Legal notice: https://www.groz-beckert.com/en/imprint.html
Privacy policy: https://www.groz-beckert.com/en/privacy-policy.html

Name: MULTIVAC Group
Description:
Packaged expertise, innovative cutting-edge technology and strong brands under one roof: The MULTIVAC Group offers complete solutions for the packaging and processing of food, medical and pharmaceutical products, as well as industrial items – and as the technology leader, it continues to set new benchmarks in the market. 

For more than 60 years the name has stood for stability, strong values, innovation and future security, as well as quality and excellent service. Founded in 1961 in the Allgäu region of Germany, the MULTIVAC Group is today a global solutions supplier, which supports small and medium-sized companies, as well as large corporate businesses, in designing their production processes to be efficient and resource-saving. The product portfolio compromises a wide range of packaging technology, automation solutions, labelling and marking equipment, inspection systems and packaging materials. The product range is complemented by practical and customised solutions for food processing – from slicers and portioning machines right up to bakery technology. All the packaging and processing solutions are individually matched to customer requirements in the company's own application and development facilities. 

Around 7,000 staff in more than 80 subsidiaries worldwide ensure that the company remains close to its customers, as well as providing the maximum customer satisfaction – from the first project concept right through to after-sales service.

Get to know your career possibilities at MULTIVAC Group
https://multivac.link/job-vacancies

Privacy Policy
https://multivac.link/privacypolicy/linkedin

Imprint
https://multivac.link/imprint

Name: Brandt Group of Companies
Description:
The Brandt Group of Companies — headquartered in Regina, Saskatchewan, Canada – is a privately owned manufacturing and distribution company that serves a growing international audience in industries such as agriculture, construction, forestry, rail, mining, steel, transportation, material handling, and energy. The company has 6000+ employees and more than 180 locations in Canada, USA, Australia, and New Zealand. Brandt is one of Canada’s largest privately owned companies and is among an elite group of Platinum Club members of Canada’s Best Managed Companies.
--
Le Groupe d'entreprises Brandt, dont le siège social est situé à Regina, Saskatchewan, Canada, est une entreprise privée de fabrication et de distribution qui dessert un public international croissant dans des secteurs tels que l'agriculture, la construction, la foresterie, le rail, les mines, l'acier, le transport, la manutention et l'énergie. L’entreprise compte plus de 6000 employés et plus de 180 sites au Canada, aux États-Unis, en Australie et en Nouvelle-Zélande. Brandt est l'une des plus grandes entreprises privées du Canada et fait partie du groupe d'élite des membres du Club Platine des sociétés les mieux gérées du Canada.

Name: Bull Machines Pvt Ltd
Description: BULL Machines Pvt Ltd was started in the year 1962 in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. Bull is the Indian leader in Loaders and Backhoes in its class and segment. Largest selling Tractor Attachment Manufacturer in India.More than 30,000 Bull products are running across the globe. World Wide sales and service network of 600 plus dealers and 7 branch offices across India. Bull has two world-class manufacturing plants with state of the art manufacturing facilities.

Name: Altec
Description:
Altec is a leading provider of products and services to the electric utility, tree care, telecommunications and lights and signs markets. We help customers dig deeper and reach higher in over 100 countries worldwide.

In addition to new equipment, Altec offers a wide range of used equipment through Altec NUECO and rental options through Global Rental Company, as well as disposition services through NUECO and JJ Kane Auctions. Altec Capital is available to assist in custom tailoring financing options. With Altec’s nationwide network of shop and mobile service, we’re here to help keep equipment online and at work. Altec also offers a wide range of tools and accessories through Altec Supply, as well as replacement parts. We provide industry-leading safety training through Altec Sentry.

For more than 90 years, Altec has been a company committed to excellence. Our products are the industry leaders, consistently raising the bar through innovative product design, integrated safety features, and continued dedication to total customer satisfaction. While we are known for our equipment that helps people reach tough-to-reach places, what makes us unique is how we help our associates reach higher. We know that our people are our greatest strength and the foundation of our success.

Name: Windmoeller & Hoelscher Group
Description:
For 150 years, Windmöller & Hölscher (W&H) has been constantly demonstrating its innovative power and is one of the leading suppliers of machinery and systems for the manufacturing and converting of flexible packaging. Our product portfolio includes high-performance machines for film extrusion, printing and converting. Specialized undertakings such as complete reconditioning of used machines as well as the construction and technical distribution of paper and film sack machines are taken care of by our subsidiary Garant. Our daughter company W&H Machinery is the leading producer of machinery for industrial woven packaging. 

Our passion for innovation has been instrumental in our successful effort to stay young, dynamic and flexible. As a company with global activities, we see ourselves as a partner and system provider offering its customers everything from a single source: from expert advice and engineering to the delivery of high-quality machines and complete packaging production lines. 

Concentrating all our resources on flexible packaging is one of the keys to the success of W&H. Comprehensive knowledge of the production processes associated with these applications allows us to constantly develop trailblazing innovative solutions. 

It is our customers, however, who have the greatest share in our success and market position. Knowing that they will get from us the perfect solution for their specific production requirements, they put their trust in us and rely on our advanced machinery and equipment.

Windmöller & Hölscher machines and systems are currently in operation in more than 140 countries and at more than 5,000 customer plants, which impressively proves that we live up to our company maxim ‘Passion for Innovation’.

Name: Baldan Implementos Agrícolas
Description:
Nossa vocação: criar soluções inovadoras para a agricultura - esta agricultura que garante a manutenção da vida!

Já são quase 100 anos escrevendo histórias e cultivando parcerias no agro. Tudo isso, porque a Baldan acredita no poder da ajuda mútua e no fortalecimento de pessoas que sonham com um mesmo futuro e aspiram os mesmos resultados.
É a partir desse companheirismo que se criam laços fortes, enraizados no solo de quem vive o campo diariamente e firmados por uma paixão em comum: a arte de cultivar a terra.

Desenvolver máquinas pensadas em cada detalhe para os agricultores vai muito além da fabricação em si. É também sobre descomplicar processos e criar novas possibilidades. É sobre ser responsável e preservar os recursos naturais, com a ajuda de soluções ambientalmente corretas e socialmente mais justas. É sobre alcançar novos patamares de sucesso!

Estamos sempre presente nesta terra.
Pelo agro e pela vida.
Essa é a nossa vocação, hoje e amanhã.

Name: Kubota in Europe
Description:
Kubota had the first establishment in Europe more than 50 years ago and has shown a significant growth since. In the European region Kubota currently has about 5,000 employees and achieves sales over € 2.2 billion. 
The European business organization is organized in five Business Units (Tractor, Construction Machinery, Engine, Implements and Parts) and counts 12 manufacturing facilities and 25  distribution, service and sales offices covering the whole European region offering products including tractors, construction machinery, engines, agricultural machinery, turf equipment and utility vehicles. 

For more information on Kubota in Europe please visit www.kubota-eu.com

Name: IHI Corporation
Description:
The IHI Group is one of the world's leading industrial companies, leveraging its manufacturing technology. For over 170 years, we have been creating advanced engineering solutions and addressing various challenges. Building on the technology cultivated through shipbuilding, we have expanded our business and now operate in four sectors: "Resources, Energy & Environment," "Social Infrastructure," "Industrial Systems & General-Purpose Machinery," and "Aero-Engine, Space & Defense."
The IHI Group encompasses more than 190 companies worldwide, with a workforce of 28,000 employees. Guided by our management philosophy of "Contribute to the development of society through technology" and "Human resources are our single most valuable asset," we continually strive to walk alongside our customers, stakeholders, and colleagues, contributing to create a world where nature and technology work in unity.

Ampla experiência na prestação de serviços terceirizados de movimentação de cargas em unidades industriais e comerciais, somos referência em venda e locação de equipamentos, peças de reposição e assistência técnica.

Name: Shanghai Electric Power Generation Engineering Company
Description:
Shanghai Electric has established itself as one of the largest, strongest and most comprehensive equipment manufacturers in China, and annually yields a sales volume in excess of RMB40 Billion.

As one of SEC’s core businesses, SEPG specializes in the manufacture of power generation equipment and the construction and engineering of power plants. With more than 15,000 employees, as well as first class human and equipment resources, SEPG has been able to quickly integrate with the global economy through state-of-the-art management practices and internationalized operations. Since 2004 SEPG's volume of production, volume of sales and quantity of orders of thermal power generation equipment have remained ranking first in the World, the engineering industry has numbered among the best global companies, the service industry has started to make a figure, and the new energy industry has risen rapidly.

Shanghai Electric Power Generation Company is one of the main strategic development fields of Shanghai Electric, which has provided numerous model projects, based on EPC, the supply of power generation equipment in complete sets, and the power island (BTG) package for the customers at home and abroad for years. Our subsidiaries and projects are located not only in many domestic provinces, but also in more than 20 countries and regions.

The Company has revitalized the national equipment industry and maintains the core concept of "creating out future together", with stable future development standing upon the core value of professional, international, high quality and responsibility. We also sever clients with integrity, efficiency and excellence and promote the industrialized process in order to achieve the objective of invigorating the equipment manufacturing industry of China and ranking amongst world class equipment manufacturers.
LinkedIn URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/上海电气集团股份有限公司电站分公司

Name: LMW Limited
Description:
LMW is a long-standing capital goods manufacturer with expertise in diversified verticals like textile machinery, CNC machines, foundry & castings and aerospace components & composites. 

Textile machinery division is the first in the LMW business line with six decades of market presence. Machine Tools Division produces and exports CNC machining centers globally on par in performance. Foundry Division of LMW can handle a wide range of tonnage that serves niche customers. Advanced Technological Center manufactures Aerospace components and systems.

LMW has an inclusive environment that operates from various parts of the globe. The brand has established itself with an identity for unsurpassed quality of products. Since its inception LMW has been the first choice for premiere brands in industries like Automobile, Indian Railways, Compressors & Pumps, Industrial Machinery, etc.

Name: Locar Guindastes e Transportes Intermodais
Description: A Locar Guindastes e Transportes Intermodais é uma das maiores empresas da América Latina, no segmento de transportes especiais e a maior em içamentos de cargas por meio de guindastes. Desde 1988, executa importantes trabalhos em todo território nacional.

Name: LGMG
Description:
LGMG is a privately-owned subsidiary of the Lingong Machinery Group. Lingong Machinery Group was founded in 1972 and is one of the leading construction machinery groups, officially designated as one of the top 100 enterprises in the industry in China. 
LGMG has become one of the TOP 5 China MEWPs Manufacturers，TOP 10 World’s Largest Access Equipment Manufacturers and TOP100 Global Construction Machinery Manufacturers. The top 10 world’s largest access equipment manufactures in 2020.
In 2018, LGMG opened its first European office, based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. From 2019 to 2020, LGMG established American companies and Japanese companies. We offer a full range of scissor lifts and rough terrain scissor lifts along with articulated and telescopic boom lifts. Our products have been exported to more than 50 countries.

Name: Velo3D
Description:
Velo3D provides a fully integrated metal 3D printing solution for mission-critical parts used for space exploration, to enhance critical defense systems, to boost transportation efficiency, and to produce cleaner energy. Our advanced solution helps innovators build and scale the complex parts they need without compromising design or quality. 
@FastCompany World's Most Innovative Manufacturing Companies

Name: Koenig & Bauer
Description: Established in 1817 in Würzburg, Germany, we are the world's oldest printing press manufacturer. We supply machines and software solutions covering the entire printing, finishing and converting process, with a particular focus on packaging. Our machines are capable of printing on practically all substrates with a portfolio ranging from banknotes to cardboard, corrugated, film, metal and glass packaging, and including book, display, coding, decor, magazine, advertising and newspaper printing. We operate globally with eleven production sites in Europe and a worldwide sales and service network.

Name: GROB-WERKE GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
GROB-WERKE GmbH & Co. KG - Von Bayern in die Welt!

Seit fast 100 Jahren ist unser Unternehmen als global operierendes Familienunternehmen in der Entwicklung und Herstellung von Anlagen und Werkzeugmaschinen tätig. Zu unseren Kunden gehören die namhaftesten Automobilhersteller, deren Zulieferer und Unternehmen verschiedenster Branchen. Mit Produktionswerken in Mindelheim (Deutschland), Bluffton, Ohio (USA), São Paulo (Brasilien), Dalian (China), Pianezza (Italien) und Bangalore (Indien) sowie weltweiten Service- und Vertriebsniederlassungen sind wir international aufgestellt. Weltweit erwirtschaftet die GROB-Gruppe mit 9.600 Mitarbeitern eine Leistung von 2,0 Mrd. Euro (GJ 24/25). 

Unser Portfolio reicht von Universal-Bearbeitungszentren über hoch komplexe Fertigungssysteme mit eigener Automatisierung bis hin zu manuellen Montagestationen und voll automatisierten Montagelinien. Des Weiteren sind Produktionsanlagen für Elektromotoren und Montageanlagen für die Batterie- und Brennstoffzellentechnologie Teil unserer Produktpalette. Für die Zerspanung von Turbinengehäusen und die Bearbeitung von Struktur- und Fahrwerksbauteilen werden eigene Lösungen realisiert. Mit der eigen entwickelten Software zur Digitalisierung und Vernetzung von Produktionsprozessen GROB-NET4Industry können Produktionsprozesse digital und transparent dargestellt werden.

Impressum: https://www.grobgroup.com/impressum/

Name: JCB do Brasil
Description:
Do DNA visionário e empreendedor de Joseph Cyril Bamford, nasceu a gigante JCB, sigla em referência ao nome do fundador. Empresa de origem britânica, com 80 anos de atuação, reconhecida pelo protagonismo em inovação, é pioneira mundial no conceito de manipulador telescópico, mais conhecido como Loadall. Equipamento versátil, desenvolvido pelo próprio Sr. Bamford nos anos 50, hoje em operação no mundo inteiro, agregando os mais altos níveis de desempenho e produtividade no campo. 

Com portfólio de mais de 300 modelos de máquinas, a JCB é líder mundial em retroescavadeiras e a terceira maior fabricante global de equipamentos, presente em todos os continentes, com 24 fábricas distribuídas na Europa, Brasil, Estados Unidos e Ásia.  

Na América Latina, o headquarters e a moderna unidade industrial estão sediadas em Sorocaba, no interior de São Paulo, produzindo cerca de 30 modelos de máquinas para o setor agrícola e construção, principalmente. A comercialização é realizada através da maior rede de distribuidores da linha amarela do Brasil, com 64 filiais no país e 130 pontos de atendimento nos principais mercados da América Latina. 
Confiança e respeito estão entre os valores reconhecidos pelos mais de 600 funcionários, que há cinco anos colocam a JCB na seleta lista do Great Place to Work (GPTW). Eleita também como lugar desejado para trabalhar no estado de São Paulo e no setor do agronegócio.  

Com um plano ousado de crescimento na América Latina, a JCB prepara-se para dobrar o tamanho das operações até 2030, com investimento em produtos, produção, rede de distribuição, pessoas e serviços em linha com o pensamento do seu fundador “Always looking for a better way”.

Name: NSK
Description:
Established over 100 years ago, NSK (Nippon Seiko Kabushiki Kaisha) is a Japanese-listed company that has evolved from a regional ball bearing supplier to a roller bearing specialist and automotive supplier with a global market presence. 

Today, NSK employs more than 31.500 employees in 29 countries. This result has been driven by ever-increasing investment in research & development, enabling the company to continuously improve the quality of its products and services.  

This investment supports NSK’s objective of “No. 1 in Total Quality”. In addition to a complete rolling bearing portfolio, NSK develops and manufactures precision components and mechatronic products, as well as systems and components for the automotive industry, including wheel bearing units and electric power-steering systems.

www.nsk.com/am-en

Name: Lohia Corp Limited
Description: Lohia Corp Limited has been providing advanced solutions to the woven plastics flexible packaging industry around the world for more than 4 decades in over 90 countries. The fabric produced is used in many applications such as bags for cement, fertilizer, food grains, FIBC/Jumbo Bags, Leno/Ventilated bags & many more. The global footprint of the company is serviced by subsidiaries/associates in USA, Brazil, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines and UAE  supported by sales agents in all major woven sacks producing countries.

Name: TRUMPF North America
Description:
TRUMPF Inc. is the North American subsidiary of TRUMPF SE + Co. KG. based near Stuttgart, Germany. The TRUMPF Group is a world leader in sheet metal fabrication machinery and industrial lasers. TRUMPF's North American headquarters is located in Farmington, CT.  

"Trusting in brave ideas" – this is our promise to everyone who works for us. As a family business, we decide long-term and provide our people with the trust and stability needed to bring their ideas to fruition, even the unconventional ones. Being a market and technology leader in machine tools and lasers, we courageously shape the networked manufacturing of tomorrow, meeting every challenge with bold, fresh thinking.

Name: Columbus McKinnon
Description: This year marks the 150th Anniversary of Columbus McKinnon. From our humble beginnings as saddlery, chain, and hoist craftsmen, we have grown to become a global leader in intelligent motion solutions for material handling. Today, our high-quality brands, such as CM, STAHL CraneSystems, Yale, Magnetek, Coffing, Dorner, and Duff-Norton, work together to move the world forward and improve lives. Whether it’s increasing safety or improving productivity, our intelligent motion technology is hard at work worldwide.

Name: Okuma America Corporation
Description:
At Okuma, We open possibilities in manufacturing with world-class machine tools, service, and support.

Our machine tools, including vertical and horizontal machining centers, lathes, double column machining centers, and grinders, are built with the exact balance of power, speed, and size to meet any application. They hold tight tolerances, perform sophisticated cuts, and create precision-crafted parts time and time again.

Each machine tool is backed by our extensive distribution network that delivers superior service and support. With over 2,000 support personnel across the Americas, our customers' needs are met with trusted, local resources.

With 125+ years of experience, we have what it takes to turn manufacturing challenges into successes. To learn more about our solutions, our history, and our mission, please visit okuma.com.

Follow us on our official social channels:
YouTube: @OkumaAmericaCorp
Instagram: @okumaamerica
Facebook: @Okuma America Corporation (Machine Tools)
X: @OkumaAmerica

Interested in working for Okuma America? As a nationally recognized 2023 Top Workplace, our efforts are always aimed at putting our customers and employees first. View our open positions at okuma.com/careers.

Name: JBT FoodTech
Description:
JBT supplies customized industrial and turnkey solutions used in the food processing industry. Through innovation, we design, manufacture and service food processing equipment for the preparation of meat, seafood and poultry products, ready-to-eat meals, shelf stable packaged foods, bakery products, high-value powdered products, juice and dairy products, and fresh fruit and vegetable products. 

Our equipment sterilizes more than 50% of the world’s shelf-stable canned foods, freezes more than 50% of the world’s frozen foods and squeezes more than 75% of the world’s citrus juices. 

In addition to sales and services offices based in more than 25 countries, we also support our customers through research and technology centers located in North America (4), South America (2), Europe (5), Africa (1) and Asia (2). 

The JBT FoodTech portfolio includes these well-known brands:

•     A&B Process Systems
•     Alco
•     AutoCoding Systems
•     Avure Technologies
•     BevCorp
•     C.A.T.
•     Double D
•     DSI
•     Formcook
•     FranRica
•     Fresh’n Squeeze Point-of-Sale Juicers    
•     Frigoscandia
•     FTNON
•     MEPSCO
•     PLF International
•     Prime
•     Proseal
•     Schröder
•     SF&DS
•     Stein

•     Urtasun
•     Wolf-tec/Polar

In addition to our wide range of food processing solutions, we also offer fully integrated automated guided vehicle (AGV) systems for repetitive material handling tasks in industries including automotive, food and beverage, hospital, manufacturing, and warehousing.

At JBT, we’re with you right down the line.

Name: Salvagnini
Description:
Salvagnini provides innovative solutions in the field of machine tools and automation for flexible sheet metal processing. 
The Group’s state-of-the-art technologies are implemented in smart systems such as punching/shearing machines, panel benders, press-brakes, fiber laser systems, integrated FMS/FMC and automatic storage systems. Handling automation devices and proprietary software complement the highly flexible, Industry 4.0 compliant Salvagnini solutions.

Name: SMS group USA
Description:
SMS group Inc. is responsible for new equipment sales, upgrades and modernizations for North American metals producers, and is a world leader in outsourced maintenance services for the steel and non-ferrous metals industry.  SMS group Inc., a member of the SMS group family, is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

At SMS group Inc., we are an original equipment supplier offering comprehensive maintenance and spare part services for metals production, continuous casting and rolling (flat and long products), tubes, welded pipes, forging, non-ferrous technology, and heat treatment plants - all from a single source.  Apart from traditional refurbishment services for all major OEM equipment, you can also take advantage of our comprehensive field services and modernization projects.  Steel production is our largest market, where we supply world class new equipment and actively support operations and maintenance devising solutions throughout the process from melting and casting to rolling and finishing.  In addition to new equipment supply, our Forging division has experienced maintenance specialists who focus on closed and open-die forging, powder metal presses, extrusion presses, and ring rolling.  New equipment supply, maintenance services, and spare parts inside the aluminum industry crosses a wide variety of products including flat rolling mill equipment, plate stretchers and extrusion presses.  For tubes and pipes, our unique broad know-how covers the complete line of processes from ERW to spiral welded pipe as well as seamless producing operations utilizing equipment from cold drawing and pilger mills to piercing mills.  It is our commitment to be the Leading Partner for our customers guiding and assisting our customers to make equipment and process decisions that allow them to remain competitive in an ever evolving global market, and serve as a single source for new equipment, maintenance and spare parts that our customers can trust and value.

Name: Multotec Group of Companies
Description:
Innovative thinking, exceptional engineering capability, application of specific technical knowledge and provision of customised solutions has placed the Multotec Group at the forefront of beneficiation technology. 

This South African based group has served the local and international mining industry for over 45 years and is committed to reducing total cost of ownership with a concomitant improvement in throughput efficiencies and reduced wear. It is one of few groups to offer diverse process related product solutions to the mining industry and quality remains an integral part of the group’s strategy.

For all current positions in Africa for Multotec please refer to www.Careers24.com
Link:  https://www.careers24.com/now-hiring/9744-multotec-pty-ltd/
Please note that no direct applications will be accepted  - Please apply online via Careers24.com.

Name: DMG MORI USA
Description:
DMG MORI is a worldwide leading manufacturer of high-precision machine tools and sustainable technologies that are at the beginning of global value chains. Integrated automation and end-to-end digitization solutions extend our core business with turning and milling machines, Advanced Technologies and Additive Manufacturing.

Our technology excellence is bundled within the main sectors of Aerospace, Automotive, Die & Mold as well as Medical and Semiconductor.

In the “Global One Company”, more than 12,000 employees are in direct contact with our 150,000 customer factories. DMG MORI is present in 43 countries worldwide – with 16 production plants, 113 sales and service locations – and is actively advancing the future fields of automation, digitization and sustainability.

Name: STIHL USA
Description:
Virginia Beach-based STIHL Inc., one of several manufacturing facilities in the STIHL Group, is the headquarters for U.S. operations and embodies the American built mentality. We have steadily increased our investments in America since our founding in 1974. Starting with 50 employees that assembled only one model of chain saw, today, we now have 1.4 Million square feet under roof, on over 150 acres, employ approximately 2,700 people nationwide, with 2,300 in Virginia Beach, Va., and manufacture more than 100 models of handheld outdoor power equipment for sale in the U.S. and around the world. The majority of STIHL products sold in America are also built in America* and STIHL Inc. not only exports products to more than 80 countries but produces the majority of STIHL units for the world market. 

STIHL products are only available the more than 10,000 authorized local STIHL Dealers – not mass merchants. STIHL products sold through U.S. STIHL Dealers are for distribution in the United States only. For more information or for the name of a local STIHL retailer, call toll free 1-800-GO STIHL (1-800-467-8445), visit stihlusa.com or text your zip code to 78445.

*A majority of STIHL products sold in America are made in America of U.S. and global materials. "Number one selling brand" is based on syndicated Irwin Broh Research as well as independent consumer research of 2009-2014 U.S. sales and market share data for the gasoline-powered handheld outdoor power equipment category combined sales to consumers and commercial landscapers.

Name: Bobcat EMEA
Description:
Originating in North Dakota, USA in 1947, Bobcat has been a global leader in compact equipment for construction, landscaping, agriculture, and grounds maintenance. Today, with manufacturing facilities in Czech Republic, France, and China, Bobcat continues to empower customers worldwide.

Situated in the heart of Europe, Bobcat’s EMEA headquarters in the Czech Republic stands out as a modern hub unlike any other in the industry. Here, the innovative Bobcat Campus integrates a state-of-the-art manufacturing plant, Innovation Centre, and Training Centre, all under one roof. This central location serves as the focal point for the development, production, and training delivery for new machines and technologies catering to dealers across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA).

With over 350 Bobcat Dealerships across the EMEA region, customers have access to an extensive network of local sales, service, parts, and rental specialists, guaranteeing exceptional support and access to Bobcat equipment.

*As of 2007, Bobcat Company became a business unit of Doosan Bobcat Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Doosan Infracore Co., Ltd.

Name: Dalgakıran Kompresör
Description:
Dalgakıran Kompresör is Türkiye’s global industrial compressor brand, exporting to over 130 countries worldwide.
Founded in Istanbul in 1965 by Ömer Dalgakıran in a modest 25 m² workshop, the company has grown rapidly through strategic investments and today operates the largest compressor manufacturing facility under one roof in both Europe and Türkiye, covering a closed production area of 50,000 m².
With a diverse product range and production quality aligned with international standards, Dalgakıran is among Türkiye’s top 500 exporters, contributing to the country’s economy while reliably delivering advanced compressor solutions to more than 130+ countries.
With over 60 years of experience and an expert team, Dalgakıran continues to expand in global markets with a strong focus on customer satisfaction. Its wide-reaching international presence includes 130+ dealerships, overseas branches, and an extensive service network, ensuring rapid and reliable support around the world.

Name: MAKEEN
Description: Saudi Engines Manufacturing Company (MAKEEN) is a joint venture formed by Saudi Aramco, HD Hyundai Heavy Industries, and Saudi Arabian Industrial Investment Company (Dussur) to manufacture, build, sell, and service marine and land-based 2- and 4-stroke engines and high-speed mtu engines.

Name: ARBURG GmbH + Co KG
Description:
ARBURG is one of the world's leading manufacturers of injection moulding machines. The product portfolio encompasses ALLROUNDERs with clamping forces of between 125 and 6,500 kN, robotic systems, customer and industry-specific turnkey solutions, and further peripheral equipment.

ARBURG is a pioneer in the plastics industry when it comes to energy and production efficiency, digitalisation and sustainability. Its arburgXworld programme covers all of its digital products and services, and is also the name of the customer portal. Its “arburgGREENworld” initiative, meanwhile, covers resource efficiency and circular economy strategies, plus every company activity and approach that relates to this.

The central objective of ARBURG is to enable its customers to manufacture their plastic products, one-off parts to large-volume batches, to optimum quality, in a resource-efficient manner and at minimal unit costs. The company’s target groups include the automotive and packaging industries, communication and entertainment electronics, medical technology and the white goods sector.

ARBURG has its own organisations at 37 locations in 27 different countries and, together with its trading partners, is present in more than 100 countries. This creates an international sales and service network that allows the company to provide first-class customer support on the ground. Production takes place at the headquarters in Lossburg, Germany. Of a total of about 3,450 employees, about 2,850 work in Germany. About 600 further employees work in ARBURG’s organisations around the world.

The family-owned company is now in the hands of the third generation and achieved a consolidated turnover of around 600 million euros in 2024.

ARBURG is certified to ISO 9001 (quality), ISO 14001 (environment), ISO 27001 (information security), ISO 29993 (training) and ISO 50001 (energy).

Our data protection policies: https://www.arburg.com/en/data-protection/

Name: Al Marwan Heavy Machinery
Description:
Al Marwan is your one-stop shop for heavy equipment, We have been fulfilling the world's growing demand for heavy machinery & spare parts since 1978 in the GCC region.

With one of the most extensive heavy machinery rental fleets in the Middle East, complemented by certified operators. As the authorized distributor of Kobelco excavators and cranes in the UAE  Saudi Arabia, and Oman, we bring top-tier equipment to your projects.

Al Marwan is also a trusted distributor of Powerscreen, Dynapac, ABI equipment, Sinoboom Aerial Lift Platforms, CIFA machinery, and SOCMA forklifts. We offer a range of pre-owned construction machinery from global brands like  Caterpillar, Volvo, JCB, and Komatsu.— including young, low-hour excavators, bulldozers, wheel loaders, dump trucks, cranes, manlifts, forklifts, and more.

Name: Neemba Burkina Faso
Description:
Présent depuis plus de 45 années au Burkina Faso.  
NEEMBA Burkina Faso est la filiale Burkinabé du Concessionnaire Caterpillar sur l’Afrique de L’ouest Francophone.  

Nos secteurs d’intervention sont centrés sur les domaines des Mines et Carrières, de la Construction & Infrastructures et de l’Energie et l’industrie.  

Notre ambition est de vous accompagner dans la réalisation de tous vos projets et vous fournissant le support dont vous avez besoin. 

Notre offre est composée : 

- De vente de matériels neufs et d’occasion 
- De fourniture de pièces de rechange 
- D’assistance technique et formation 
- Des solutions de location 

Nos installations au Burkina Faso s’étendent sur une superficie globale de 9ha d’infrastructures.

Name: KSB Brasil Ltda
Description:
A KSB do Brasil oferece uma grande variedade de produtos e serviços, pois onde há o movimento de líquidos, podemos fornecer bombas que são exatamente necessárias nesse local. Pode ser um produto padrão ou agregado desenvolvido segundo a especificação do cliente: Como um experiente fabricante de bombas, sabemos definir qual bomba é mais adequada para cada aplicação. Com aproximadamente 900 funcionários em suas 3 plantas fabris, 7 filiais e centros de serviços, a KSB tem o compromisso de oferecer consultoria especializada, excelente qualidade e máxima segurança.  Ao mesmo tempo que é garantia de uma assistência confiável e mundialmente disponível.

A fim de melhorar ainda mais nossos serviços a nível nacional, a KSB mantém relações comerciais com uma rede nacional exclusiva de distribuidores.

A sede da KSB Brasil esta localizada na cidade de Várzea Paulista e suas plantas subsidiárias, Fundição e Bombas Standard, estão respectivamente nas cidades de Americana e Jundiaí, todas no estado de São Paulo. Veja endereços e telefones das filiais no URL: https://www.ksb.com/ksb-br-pt/companhia/localizacao/

Name: KALYANI TECHNOFORGE LIMITED
Description:
Emerging as the fastest growing leader in world-class forgings and machined components, sub-assemblies and assemblies. Kalyani Technoforge is a manufacturing partner for renowned brands in the auto and non-auto sector. With innovation at our core, we have been at the forefront of technology ever since our inception in 1979.

KTFL is part of USD 3 billion conglomerate Kalyani Group under Bharat Forge as the flagship company. We have always encouraged people participation, investments in latest technologies, energy efficient processes (green technology) and co-engineering which helped us to tranform from just a reliable component supplier to a development partner.

We take great pride in speedy development, supply at the right time and flexible manufacturing facility. To provide the highest level of customer service in the forging industry, we have dedicated machining lines for specific customers.

All our efforts are customer-centric because we share our customers' goals; of ensuring a delightful experience for their customers. With our comprehensive services we manufacture products that are safe, sustainable, reliable and enhance performance.

Name: EP EQUIPMENT
Description: EP Equipment, founded in 2007, is a Hangzhou-based leading manufacturer specialising in lithium-powered warehouse equipment. From product design and production to after-sales services EP supports material handling equipment suppliers worldwide.

Name: Liebherr Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 1949, o Grupo Liebherr é atualmente não só uma das maiores fabricantes de máquinas para construção no mundo, mas também oferece produtos e serviços com a mais alta qualidade e orientados para os clientes em diversas áreas. A empresa de tecnologia familiar emprega mais de 53 mil pessoas em mais de 150 empresas em todo o mundo. A gama de produtos Liebherr inclui os segmentos de movimentação de terra, máquinas para fundação profunda, guindastes móveis sobre esteiras e pneus, guindastes de torre, tecnologia do concreto, manipulação de materiais, mineração, guindastes marítimos, aerospace e sistemas de transporte, tecnologia de corte de engrenagens e automação, refrigeradores, freezers e adegas, componentes, além de hotéis na Irlanda, Áustria e Alemanha. A matriz do Grupo é a Liebherr-International AG localizada em Bulle, Suíça, que é de propriedade integral de membros da família Liebherr. 

Desde 1974 no Brasil, a Liebherr possui uma área de aproximadamente 900.000 m² e, ao longo dos anos, diversificou seu portfólio de produtos no Brasil, sempre acompanhando as principais demandas do mercado brasileiro. Atualmente, a Liebherr Brasil Ltda (LBR) participa em 11 das 13 áreas de negócio do Grupo, excetuando-se somente a gestão de hotéis e refrigeradores. A Liebherr Brasil produz equipamentos de grande porte para construção, como máquinas para movimentação de terra, máquinas para manipulação de materiais, equipamentos para tecnologia do concreto, além de fabricar também componentes, como rolamentos de grande diâmetro utilizados em torres de energia eólica. A empresa também é responsável pelas vendas e pelo pós-vendas desses negócios e para guindastes móveis sobre esteiras e pneus, guindastes de torre, fundação profunda, guindastes marítimos, mineração e tecnologia de corte de engrenagens e automação. Além disso, há uma fábrica dedicada para as atividades de Aerospace e sistemas de transporte. 

Liebherr, presença há 51 anos no Brasil.

Name: Wajax
Description:
Founded in 1858, Wajax (TSX: WJX) is one of Canada’s longest-standing and
most diversified industrial products and services providers. The Corporation
operates an integrated distribution system providing sales, parts and services to a broad range of customers in diverse sectors of the Canadian economy,
including: construction, forestry, mining, industrial and commercial, oil sands,
transportation, metal processing, government and utilities, and oil and gas.

\\ Together We Get More Done.

--

Fondée en 1858, Wajax (WJX à la Bourse de Toronto) est l’un des fournisseurs
de produits et de services industriels les plus anciens et les plus diversifiés au
Canada. La Corporation tire parti d’un système de distribution intégré pour
vendre et fournir des pièces et des services à de nombreux clients de différents secteurs de l’économie canadienne : construction, foresterie, exploitation minière, industrie, commerce, sables bitumineux, transport, traitement des métaux, gouvernements et services publics ainsi que pétrole et gaz.

\\ Ensemble, nous en faisons plus.

Name: Schuler Group
Description:
THE ANDRITZ SCHULER COMPETENCE
Offering customized cutting-edge technology in all areas of forming – from the networked press to press shop planning. In addition to presses, our products include automation, dies, process know-how and service for the entire metalworking industry. Within the ANDRITZ Metris platform, we combine digital solutions for networking forming technology and develops them continuously to further improve line productivity and availability. For battery production in gigafactories, we provide equipment and service in
many process steps specially for cell assembly and formation. Our customers include automotive manufacturers and suppliers, as well as companies in forging, household appliance and electrical industries.

schulergroup.com/index.html

Name: DEUTZ
Description:
Since its foundation in the year 1864, DEUTZ has stood for pioneering spirit, passion and innovative power. From the time we first invented the internal combustion engine we‘ve been improving it day by day.

We are the forerunner in the development of environmentally-friendly and efficient drive technologies. Our customer-specific solutions provide lasting quality and reliable power with economical overall costs.

Together with our partners, we are already developing today the technologies for the requirements of tomorrow.

Contact us via LinkedIn@deutz.com

Imprint: https://www.deutz.com/en/imprint
Privacy policy: https://www.deutz.com/en/privacy-policy

Name: Tequaly
Description:
Com mais de 25 anos de experiência, a Tequaly é referência em soluções integradas para o setor industrial na América Latina. Especialista em engenharia, fabricação, implantação e manutenção de plantas industriais, a empresa atua com um portfólio completo para atender as demandas dos setores de papel e celulose, saneamento, siderurgia, mineração, fertilizantes, petroquímica, óleo e gás.
 
Com sede em Curitiba e filiais em MG e PA, a Tequaly oferece atendimento ágil e personalizado em todo o Brasil, dispondo de infraestrutura robusta e certificações ISO 9001 e ASME. Unindo tecnologia avançada, segurança e sustentabilidade, a Tequaly se destaca como o parceiro estratégico ideal para transformar desafios em conquistas.

Name: Glatt Group
Description:
Glatt – Integrated process solutions

When it comes to fluidized bed technology, Glatt has assumed a pioneering role and is the worldwide leader in integrated process solutions. Glatt offers a unique expertise and product spectrum and a comprehensive support service for pharmaceutical and related powder processing industries. The support service starts with the product development for solid dosage forms and goes far beyond the required process technologies, optionally even covers the planning and installation of the plant required for said technologies. 

Glatt covers four areas of expertise: 

Process Technology Pharma is the original and top-selling area of expertise of the Glatt brand. It includes the core business of fluidized beds for which Glatt has assumed a pioneering role and is considered a worldwide leading supplier. 

Pharmaceutical Services develops and produces solid pharmaceutical dosage forms such as pellets, micropellets and granulates. 

Process Technology Food, Feed & Fine Chemicals develops, plans and distributes fluidized and spouted bed systems for the food, feed and chemical industries. 

Process & Plant Engineering plans, installs and realizes projects in plant construction worldwide.  Its spectrum of expertise ranges from the expansion or reorganization of existing production plants to the construction of new ones – in part or as a whole. 

Werner Glatt founded the company in 1954. Today the company has 14 branches and subsidiaries worldwide.

Name: Robopac
Description:
Robopac's production ranges from semi-automatic wrapping machines with smart technology to innovative automatic packaging solutions, industrial packers and case packers, palletizers and machines dedicated to raw material recycling. Founded in Rimini in the 1980s, today not only is Robopac one of the largest companies in the world in the production of end-of-line packaging machines, with highly specialized business units, but it is a partner with a widespread presence in international markets and offers in every corner of the world high-performance solutions but made tailor-made on the specific needs of the market and the customer, with an extreme attention to the issues of circular economy. Robopac is part of Aetna Group, an end-of-line packaging giant, which has 6 production facilities located in Italy (in Packaging Valley); abroad they’re located in the United States, Brazil, China and Germany. The Group is also active with 12 subsidiaries in major business areas, employs more than 2000 people, including more than 280 technicians engaged in after-sales service, and has a 24/7 service network. It has a turnover of more than 400million euros and invests more than 7% annually in R&D.
CAREERS →  contact us at https://www.robopac.com/en/careers
Location: Castel San Pietro Terme, Emilia Romagna

Name: Parle Global Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Parle Global Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of advanced processing and packaging machinery for the pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, cosmetic, food, and beverage industries.

Driven by our vision to be a “One Roof Solution for Healthcare,” we deliver high-quality solutions to our customers.

With a dedicated workforce of over 1,200 professionals, we operate seven state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Mumbai and Ahmedabad, supported by 10 regional connects across India and a presence in over 90 countries worldwide.

Our global alliances with Freund Corporation (Japan), CUBEGEL (South Korea) and Leepack Co Ltd. (South Korea) enable us to integrate Japanese, and Korean technologies into our manufacturing processes in India.

Our comprehensive product portfolio includes Tablet Compression, Granulation, Capsule Filling, Printing, Inspection Systems, Counting & Filling Lines, Tube Filling & Sealing, Pouch and Container Filling, Capping, and Cartoning Machines, among many others.

For more information, visit www.parleglobal.com

 Enquiries: +91 8484911031
 Enquiries: info@parleglobal.com

Name: GMMCO Ltd
Description:
Established in 1967, Gmmco - a CKA Birla Group company - has been engaged in the sale and support of construction and mining equipment as well as engine power systems for over four decades now.

With close to 5 decades of experience in the field, and over 28 years of association with Caterpillar, the world leader in machines and engines, Gmmco is well placed to take full advantage of the construction and infrastructural boom that India is experiencing today, and become the market leader.

Gmmco is a part of the CK Birla group of companies, a multi-faceted business house and a household name in business and in social service in India.

One-stop solutions

Gmmco offers 'one-stop solutions' to customers looking for mining, construction  machines, and engines of various capacities and for various applications. Starting with advice and consultancy in choosing the right product, to round-the-clock on-site support, our business solutions include both new and used products, as well as rental options.

Name: Skyjack Inc.
Description:
Skyjack proudly provides quality engineered, simple and reliable access and material handling equipment globally, so that companies can maximize utilization and their return on investment. All Skyjack’s products are designed to be easy to service and maintain. By keeping design simple and using proven technology, the reliability and ease of service is common to all the company’s products. Because of this, Skyjack machines offer the rental industry’s best life cycle value through low cost of ownership, ease of service and maintenance, while retaining high residual values.

Today we like to think that this proud heritage, together with an easy to do business with attitude, represents a product range and company that is simply reliable.

Name: Allied Engineering & Services (Pvt.) Ltd.
Description:
Allied Engineering & Services (Pvt.) Ltd, founded in 1976, deals in Earthmoving Machinery and Power Generation Equipment in Pakistan, since 1976 supporting over 3200 MW in Pakistan.

Allied Engineering & Services (Pvt.) Ltd is also providing complete CAT Microgrid solution along with state of the art installation and services, typically for consumers in Pakistan

We also have dealership of World's best brands like Broad Chillers, Sullair Air Compressors & IMW CNG Compressors.

Customized solutions for Equipment and Power Systems requirements, equipment sales and rental, New and Used equipment and power systems, Maintenance and Repair Contracts, Earth-moving equipment, Building and heavy construction, Mining solutions , Road making, Demolition, Waste and scrap handling, Electric power generation, Marine propulsion, Construction, Marine, Oil & Gas (onshore & offshore), Road Construction and Infrastructure, Power Generation, Defense & Military, Health Care and Hospitality, Government and Public Sector Services, Industrial, Quarry and Aggregates, Telecommunication, and Logistics

Name: Rexnord
Description:
Our name has changed. Please follow us on our new account at Regal Rexnord! 

Rexnord, a Regal Rexnord Corporation Brand, keeps industry moving with a broad portfolio of highly engineered mechanical components and smart solutions including bearings, conveyor belts, couplings, gear drives, industrial chain and more. We are committed to keeping customers running reliably and efficiently across the automotive, food & beverage, energy, cement, mining and forest industries.
  
Together with our corporate entity, Regal Rexnord, we employ approximately 29,400 employees worldwide and are headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. If you have questions or need more information, please visit www.rexnord.com. For more information on our corporate entity, visit RegalRexnord.com.

Name: Propel Industries Private Limited
Description:
Propel Industries is one of the India’s Fastest Growing Crushing Equipment Manufacture company, provides innovative, technologically-sound and cost-effective solutions to the crushing and screening industry. We are the strategic business division of the 57-year-old Coimbatore-based AV Group. 
 
We provide a comprehensive range of products with high reliability and performance. The new-age work culture that we have adapted drives our team to exhibit results par excellence. 
 
We provide cost-effective spare parts because we make every part indigenously. Enhanced performance and versatile applications at optimal costs has made us the market leaders. 
 
Our product line includes a comprehensive range of Jaw crushers, Cone crushers, Vertical shaft impactors (VSI), Feeders, Vibrating Screens, Sand Washers and Air Classifiers.  The nationwide presence of the company’s sales and service network and round-the-clock customer support make us the ultimate choice of customers. 
 
PROPEL INDUSTRIES is the first Indian company in this segment to get a CE (Conformitè Europëenne) certification.

Name: Creality
Description:
Shenzhen Creality 3D Technology Co., Ltd., known as Creality, has been a pioneer in consumer 3D printers since 2014. Our mission as a "3D Printing Evangelist" is to innovate, apply, and popularize 3D printing worldwide.

Our strategy, "One Core with Two Wings," focuses on 3D printer products as our core business, supported by ecosystem products like 3D scanners, laser engravers, filaments, and accessories. Creality Cloud, our second wing, offers an all-in-one 3D printing platform.

Managing global brands such as Creality, Ender, HALOT, and Sermoon, our products are shipped to over 100 countries, dominating global sales charts. Embraced by individuals, families, educational institutions, and enterprises, our products have garnered global acclaim.

Our R&D, production, and sales system, along with collaborations with universities, underpins our success. With over 500 patents, we've received awards like the Red Dot Design Award and the Display Industry Award (DIA), featured by outlets like CNET and TechRadar.

In late December 2023, we refreshed our brand values—Usable, Smart, Affordable, Versatile, and Enjoyable. Our new slogan, "Imagine It, Make It," reflects our commitment to accessibility, support, affordability, versatility, and the joy of 3D printing.

Aligned with social responsibility, we support initiatives like the Space Robotics Project in Brazil and 3D-printed prosthetics in Tanzania. Creality remains dedicated to democratizing 3D printing benefits and contributing to a better world.

Name: Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd.
Description:
Driven by a vision to build the company into “A Temple of Technology” Jyoti was established in 1989 and today it is one of the largest multinational. Since inception company has grown manifold from manufacturing gear boxes for machines to developing precision all-geared head lathe machines. Later on Jyoti has rightly identified shift from conventional machines to highly sophisticated CNC machines.

Jyoti was the first company to manufacture CNC machines in Gujarat. It was not an end, there are many firsts attached with Jyoti since then. The company has a wide product basket consisting of series of CNC Turning Centers, CNC Turn Mill Centers, CNC Vertical Machining Centers, CNC Horizontal Machining Centers, CNC Vertical Line Machines and High-tech CNC 3 axis and 5 axis machining centers.

Name: SANY America
Description:
With $10+ billion in global revenue and over 60,000 employees, in 2025 SANY hit #6 on the KHL Yellow Table for heavy equipment manufacturers. It’s not that we have over three decades of experience, an ever-expanding global manufacturing footprint (Indonesia, India, America, Germany, Brazil, China, and Turkey) that sets us apart––it’s our people.

At SANY America, a subsidiary of SANY Global, we are self-starters and forward-thinkers building our dream of heavy equipment and delivering the highest quality and value to our customers across the globe. Since 2006, we have been investing in and growing across the U.S. From our $60 million, 272-acre facility in Peachtree City, Georgia, where we employ over 200 American employees, to our thriving dealer network stretching from Maine to Washington, SANY America is dedicated to building business across America.

SANY America’s equipment is specifically made for the U.S. market and designed to exceed our customers’ expectations. That’s why all SANY machines are backed by the industry’s strongest standard warranties, loaded with standard features, built with component brands you trust and serviced locally by trained technicians.

SANY America’s equipment offering covers four sectors of the market:  construction equipment, port machinery, piling equipment and cranes.

Name: Kverneland Group
Description:
Kverneland Group is a global leader in agricultural technology – developing, producing, and distributing innovative implements, electronic solutions, and digital farming services.

For over 145 years, we have combined expertise with innovation to help farmers achieve greater productivity, efficiency, and sustainability.
Our factories produce Kverneland, Vicon, and Kubota implements – delivering solutions within soil and seeding, fertilizer spreading, spraying, forage and bale handling, and precision farming. We are proud to support farmers through our sales companies and importer partners worldwide. Kverneland Group has been part of the Kubota Group since 2012. 

Grow with us – discover career opportunities on our LinkedIn page or website.
Together, we drive sustainable agriculture forward.

My Job – Our Future.

Name: Bharat Fritz Werner Ltd. (BFW)
Description:
Bharat Fritz Werner (BFW) is a global advanced manufacturing company headquartered in India.
