For over six decades, we have been involved in producing the highest quality CNC machines across categories — Vertical Machining Centre (VMC), Horizontal Machining Centre (HMC), Vertical Turning Lathe (VTL), CNC Turning Centre, Special purpose machines and Five Axis Multi-Process machines. 
Our machining solutions serve many sectors including aerospace, automotive, electronics, and medical engineering, turning critical industry challenges into innovation opportunities. Additionally, our customer-centric approach prioritises tailored solutions, nurturing long-term relationships.
With a robust ecosystem, including manufacturing facilities, global networks, and research capabilities, our expert teams drive efficiency and innovation. Committed to Industry 4.0, our smart plants integrate IT and OT. Our smart manufacturing plants engage additive manufacturing, automation, process engineering, cobots, and robots showcasing advanced connectivity, IIoT, data analytics. Our new smart plant in Hosur, India, is poised to triple our production capacity, from 3000 to over 10000.
Operating in 15 countries, we recently expanded into Europe to enhance our service to our global customers. Sustainability is at the core of our practices, focusing on energy efficiency, waste reduction, and lean manufacturing. We are driven by diversity and inclusion, value employee well-being and development, and attract top talent globally for a future of manufacturing excellence.

Name: Merlo Global
Description:
MERLO Group is one of the world's leading manufacturers of telehandlers for the following sectors: Agriculture, Construction, Industry and Recycling. The group is also involved in the production of tool-carrying tractors for municipal and forestry use, with its TREEMME brand. For us, nothing is insignificant and nothing is left to chance. The quality of our machinery is the result of carefully selected materials, with a constant focus upon research and technological innovation, and, above all, the passion that distinguishes our work and that of all our collaborators.
Boasting over 1,700 employees and a turnover over 700 million Euros, MERLO’s high-tech products are used anywhere in the world. 
MERLO maintains an international outlook and a dedication to family values, and is proud to offer an environment based on mutual respect and the possibility of individual growth.

Name: ASMPT SMT Solutions
Description:
New technologies like mobile connectivity, the Internet of Things, expert systems and real-time simulations characterize the Industry 4.0 concept that makes products more intelligent, flexible and resource-efficient. 
ASMPT SMT Solutions is the world’s leading provider of first-class equipment and the technology process partner for the electronics industry. Based on our vision of “Enabling the digital world”, we help to make the world safer, more functional and more sustainable with complete, connected and highly integrated hardware and software solutions and as a component partner for building integrated smart factories.
We demonstrate our technological leadership with best-in-class hardware and software such as SIPLACE placement machines, DEK printers, inspection and material storage solutions, as well as WORKS, our Software Suite. 
Would you like to make your electronics production more intelligent, flexible and future-proof? 
Talk with us! We have many innovative solutions and work with leading electronics manufacturers on implementing the Intelligent Factory.

Visit smt.asmpt.com for more information about ASMPT SMT Solutions. Disclaimer: The views and opinions expressed by ASM Assembly Systems employees on LinkedIn are their own and do not necessarily represent the official position of ASMPT GmbH und Co. KG.

Name: [Brazil] HD Construction Equipment
Description: A HD Construction Equipment produz, comercializa e exporta máquinas de linha amarela e empilhadeiras há mais de 8 anos no mercado brasileiro. Com o objetivo de construir um amanhã mais confortável, a empresa foca no cliente e na adaptação ao mercado brasileiro para proporcionar excelência em serviços e tecnologia dos produtos.

Name: [Brazil] HD Hyundai Construction Equipment
Description:
HD Hyundai Construction Equipment Brazil has been producing, selling and exporting construction equipment machines and forklifts for over 8 years in the Brazilian market. Building a more comfortable tomorrow, the company focuses on the customer and on adapting to the Brazilian market to provide excellence in services and product technology. 

Discover the HDHyundaiCE world: https://linktr.ee/hyundaicebr

Name: Combilift
Description:
Combilift is the largest global manufacturer of multi-directional forklifts and Straddle Carriers.  We are an acknowledged leader in long load handling solutions and offer a free warehouse and site optimisation design service. More than 95,000 Combilift units have been sold in over 85 countries since Combilift was established in 1998. 

The driving force behind Combilift’s operations is a desire to deliver innovation in the material handling arena. Responsiveness to the ever-changing needs of the customer permeates every area of the business.

Combilift continually invests 7% of all revenue in research and development as part of its relentless quest to find safer, more productive and more cost-effective ways to lift challenging loads in challenging environments.  The company’s commitment to new product development has seen it continue to blaze a trail through the lifting and handling industry worldwide, cementing the company’s reputation as a global leader.

Combilift employs more than 800 people and occupies a brand new, purpose-built facility spanning 46,500 m² in Monaghan, Ireland.

Name: Ponsse
Description:
Ponsse Group

Ponsse Plc is a company that specialises in the production, sale, maintenance and technology of cut-to-length forest machines, as well as in innovative harvesting solutions in line with sustainable development. Over the years, the company’s daily activities have been driven by a genuine interest in customers and their business. Ponsse has 13 subsidiaries and 30 dealers across the world.

Throughout its history, the value-driven family company, established by forest machine entrepreneur Einari Vidgrén in 1970, has only focused on cut-to-length forest machines. Today, more than 20,000 PONSSE forest machines have been completed at the Vieremä factor for global logging sites, all customised to meet each customer’s needs.

Hailing from Vieremä, Finland, Ponsse is one of the world’s leading forest machine manufacturers. The company’s shares are quoted on the NASDAQ OMX Nordic List.

The Ponsse Group consists of the parent company Ponsse Plc and the subsidiaries Ponsse AB, Sweden; Ponsse AS, Norway; Ponssé S.A.S. France; Ponsse UK Ltd., Ponsse Czech s.r.o., Czech Republic, Ponsse North America, Inc., the United States of America; Ponsse Latin America Ltda, Brazil; Ponsse Asia Pacific Ltd, Hongkong; Ponsse China Ltd, China; Ponsse Uruguay S.A., Uruguay, Ponsse Chile SpA, Chile and Epec Oy, Seinäjoki, Finland.

Name: Directed Machines
Description: We designed a new class of machine for utility-scale solar, Ag, airports, field mowing, golf and turf, nurseries, roadsides and more: the Land Care Robot ("LCR"). A compact, bi-directional, zero-emissions, low-noise, electric, enterprise-grade machine that can autonomously Mow, Tow and Know. Stainless chassis, 86HP peak power, 1,700 ft.lb of torque.  LCRs have been hardened over tens of thousands of kilometers in both structured and un-structured environments. On sale since 2020, the LCR fleet now spans across North America.

Name: Gedik Holding
Description:
Gedik Holding’in temeli 1963 yılında kaynak sarf malzemesi üreticisi olarak kurulan Gedik Kaynak ile atılmıştır. Gedik Kaynak ticari hayatını yıllar içinde başarıyla devam ettirmiş ve sektöründe lider konuma gelmiştir. Gedik Holding daha sonra faaliyet alanları arasına döküm, vana, sermaye piyasaları, eğitim gibi pek çok sektörü katmış ve bu alanlarda da öncü kuruluşlarıyla Türkiye’nin en köklü ve en saygın kurumları arasında yerini almıştır.

Gedik Holding bünyesinde 1500’ün üzerinde kişi çalışmaktadır. Holding, yeniliklere ve yatırıma verdiği önemle her geçen gün büyüyen, kendisini global ve lokal ekonomik şartlara ve değişimlere uydurabilen, stratejik alanlardaki gelişmeleri yakinen takip edip hızlı reaksiyon gösterebilen geniş bir topluluk haline gelmektedir.

Gedik Kaynak ve Döküm Grubu’nun Türkiye genelinde İstanbul merkez ofis olmak üzere Ankara, Bursa, Antalya, İzmir, Adana, Trakya, Erzurum, Kayseri, Konya, Samsun, Eskişehir’de bulunan bölge müdürlükleri ile yaygın bir satış ve hizmet ağı bulunmaktadır. Grup, Avrupa’daki müşterilerine daha hızlı hizmet verebilmek amacıyla 2009 yılında Hollanda’da Gedik Europe adıyla bir satış ofisi açmıştır. Bunun yanı sıra Grubun Amerika, Rusya, Ortadoğu, Kuzey Afrika, Güney Asya bölgelerinde partnerleri bulunmaktadır.

Gedik Holding, tüm dünyada talep gören Gedik Kaynak ve Gedik Döküm ürünlerini çeşitlendirmek ve kapasitesini artırmak amacıyla Sakarya Hendek 2. Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 261.700 m²’lik bir alan üzerinde yepyeni ve modern bir tesis kurmuştur.

Gedik Holding, ülkemizde kaynak başta olmak üzere ilgili sektörlerdeki nitelikli eleman gereksinimini gidermeye katkıda bulunmak ve sosyal sorumluluk bilinci ile 1994 yılında Gedik Eğitim ve Sosyal Yardım Vakfı’nı (GEV) kurmuştur.

Name: Kanoo Machinery-UAE
Description:
Kanoo Machinery is one of the leading distributors of materials handling, construction, agriculture, cleaning and industrial equipment in the Gulf. It offers its clients premier world-leading brands that include Grove, AUSA, Beach Tech, Massey Ferguson, Snorkel, Tennant, Bobcat, Aisle-Master, Combi-lift, Hyster, Utilev, Perkins, Sullair, Lincoln Electric, Norton Abrasives, and Panasonic. 

Products from these Principals are marketed through a dedicated product specialist from sales and aftermarket who are available in all its 5 branches (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Al Ain, Sharjah and RAK) in the UAE.

We support our customers through an expert team of over 214 sales and factory trained service engineers, technicians and support staff.

The company's extensive inventory of fast moving machines and consumables offers fast response time to customer break downs and is maintained in stock at all branches of Kanoo Machinery. This is complemented by a more comprehensive inventory in the Kanoo Distribution Centre in Al Quoz and in Jebel Ali Free Zone. The Distribution Centre is fully equipped with low-bed trailers, recovery vehicles and pick-up trucks to ensure timely deliveries to customer’s premises and to our branches.

Kanoo Machinery carries an inventory of parts in excess of USD$ 5million. Fast moving parts are stocked in all branches whilst on-line link to regional warehouses in Saudi Arabia and Bahrain. The UAE ensure a first pick availability up to 90% for common agencies. Non-stocking parts available in Principal’s warehouses are generally made available within 2/3 working days. Trained and qualified personnel also ensure that the customer gets prompt service to keep equipment downtime to the minimum.

Kanoo Machinery is a member of The Kanoo Group, one of the largest family owned business groups in the region established in 1890.

Customer Contact Centre: KM100.UAE@Kanoo.com
Whatsapp: +971 56 5479222

Name: Galadari Energy Solutions
Description:
Galadari Energy Solutions is a flagship subsidiary of Galadari Brothers, and the leading provider of air compressors, marine engines, lighting towers, and custom-built diesel generators. We are the authorized distributors of a number of leading international brands: Komatsu, Atlas Copco, and Baudouin. 
Focusing our efforts on being a solutions provider, GES has built a reputation for outstanding service & aftersales support.

Name: Brudden Equipamentos Ltda.
Description: Desde 1980, a empresa Brudden é conhecida no mercado como fabricante de equipamentos agrícolas e jardinagem com alto padrão de qualidade, tornando-se referência de comprometimento, inovação e confiança. O propósito da empresa é oferecer aos seus clientes produtos, serviços e soluções inovadoras, que atendam as necessidades de lazer, bem-estar e conforto, despertando as pessoas para uma vida mais prazerosa e saudável. Os equipamentos Brudden visam atender a integração do homem com o campo, apresentando inovações tanto no design quanto na funcionalidade para os mais diversos trabalhos. Atualmente, oferece uma linha completa de produtos e serviços, que atendem as necessidades dos mais diversos segmentos (doméstico, agrícola, jardinagem, hortícola, parques e bosques, florestal, comercial, saúde pública e limpeza urbana) e usuários, sejam eles ocasionais ou profissionais.

Name: De Lama
Description:
De Lama world leader Company for more than 75 years, in design and manufacturing of high quality sterilizers, washing equipment and high-end pharma machinery and all related validation services. 

The wide attention addressed to Customers and the well proven know-how allow De Lama to meet the widest range of requirements with tailor made solutions and leading edge technologies.

DE LAMA S.p.A., established in 1949, is one of the most well-known and qualified manufacturers of sterilization equipment with plants supplied all over the world.

DE LAMA’s Sterilizer and Autoclave production is mainly addressed to these sectors:

- pharmaceutical
- medical devices
- laboratories & research
- microbiological 
- chemical 
- nutraceuticals
- food industry
- cosmetical industry

 Up-to-date and functional productive plants allow accurate and first class works. A skilled technical team assures the best level of competence required to manufacture highly technological plants. An experienced and motivated staff, care in details in addition to the skillfulness in optimizing the suggested solutions, distinguish DeLama S.p.A. as one of the most reliable and appreciated companies operating in this sector.

DE LAMA’s great experience is a warranty for executions highly appreciated from a technological and qualitative standpoint that are always conforming to specific Customers’ requirements. The production is marked by versatility in design and production, high construction quality, absolute safety in operation, easy maintenance and maximum lifetime. DeLama’s sales philosophy is addressed to the single Customer’s full satisfaction and develops itself in any kind of activity thanks to an interactive and rigorous working method: from design to manufacturing, from sale to after-sales service. 

Company’s target is not simply limited to the satisfaction of Customer’s requirements, according to the standards current in this field, but aims to overcome them in terms of quality and safety.

Name: MADISA CAT
Description: Empresa líder en México en soluciones integrales de maquinaria y servicios para la minería, construcción, petróleo y gas, sector marítimo, industrial, comercial, telecomunicaciones, servicios y agrícola.  Distribuidor Caterpillar (desde 1946) más grande de México.  Distribuidor de montacargas Caterpillar y Mitsubishi,  compresores Doosan, equipo agrícola CNH, equipo de trituración Astec Telsmith, grúas Terex.

Name: Roeders - Machines and Automation
Description:
More than 200 years of company tradition, innovation and fairness are the solid foundation of the Röders family business managed by the 6th generation. The Röders GmbH has several fields of business activities, a pewter foundry for high-quality art wares, a blow mould production for PET bottle moulds and a machine production for highly precise milling, grinding and measuring machines as well as automation.

Here you will find infromation about the machines. For blow moulds please go to https://www.linkedin.com/company/roeders-blowmoulds

Name: Stolle Machinery Company LLC
Description:
Stolle is the world’s leading supplier of two piece can and end-making machinery for the global canmaking industry.  Our high speed machines can be found in can plants around the world performing the value-added functions of the canmaking process.  In addition to supplying individual machines, we design, install and support complete can and end lines for beverage and food cans. 

Stolle machines are designed and built to be the most productive and reliable machines available, which is why canmakers rely on them as the backbone of their operation.  They know they can count on Stolle to support their machines for life with the highest quality OEM spare parts, responsive field service and continuing technical innovations to keep their machinery at the forefront of canmaking technology.  Our engineering and development teams consistently produce new improvements and innovations that increase production speeds, save materials and increase consumer appeal… all the while maximizing our customers’ productivity and profitability.

With roots going back over 147 years, the history of Stolle reads like a Who’s Who of the can machinery industry.

Name: ROBOPAC Brasil
Description:
Há mais de 25 anos, a Robopac Brasil oferece soluções tecnológicas que otimizam processos produtivos e logísticos em diferentes setores. Com foco em eficiência, qualidade e segurança, atuamos em segmentos como: alimentício, higiene e limpeza, cosméticos, agro, bebidas e muito mais.

Nossas soluções incluem envasadoras, encaixotadoras, empacotadoras, paletizadores e envolvedores de paletes com filme stretch. Comprometidos com inovação e excelência no atendimento, trabalhamos continuamente para fortalecer a competitividade e o sucesso dos nossos clientes. Investimos em Pesquisa & Desenvolvimento e em um time qualificado, dedicado a desenvolver tecnologias que aumentam a produtividade e promovem a sustentabilidade.
Location: Bento Gonçalves, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Petersime
Description:
Petersime provides world-leading incubators, hatchery equipment and turnkey hatcheries aligned with the expertise and support to maximize return on investment. 
For over 100 years, Petersime’s mission has been to use nature as a reference to continue perfecting the incubation process and help customers reach maximum performance. Additionally, Petersime leads the way in the optimization of the poultry value chain through the use of big data. 
Headquartered in Belgium and with Regional Centres on strategic locations, Petersime’s incubators, hatchery solutions and services are available worldwide.

Name: Clearpack Group
Description:
Clearpack is a leading provider of Automatic packaging solutions for Food, Beverage, Home and Personal care, Pharma and Chemical products. We are a 600+ people strong, stable, and well organised group with proven expertise in filling, end-of-line, and complete line engineering solutions. We are leading the industry with Best in Class Packaging Automation using Robotics, AGV’s, Digitalisation including factories of future with advanced technology systems.

With our network of offices, R&D and production facilities and a dedicated team of packaging professionals across South East Asia, India, China, Middle East, and Europe we deliver excellent value to our customers by:
•	Manufacturing & sales of Net Weight Filling and End of Line machines in our facilities in India and other locations
•	Distributing some packaging equipment from our global partners 
•	Providing total services from finalising the project specifications to Installation commissioning and after sales service & spare parts

We owe our success to our esteemed customers and our reliable partners, both inspiring us to deliver "Customer Delight" and not mere satisfaction. It is an endeavour we take very seriously.

We are providing mentioned below automatic packaging machines-
Automatic shrink wrapping machine
Automatic sticker labelling machine
Shrink bundling machines
Case packer/carton packaging
Robotic Palletizers
Complete turnkey line
Automation packaging solutions

Name: Rademaker BV
Description:
Rademaker, your partner in food processing and bakery equipment. We deliver production solutions for any dough or pastry based products. Over the past four decades, Rademaker is shaped by worldwide market needs and trends. Our portfolio consists out of highly efficient production lines for breads, croissants, pastries, pizza, flatbreads, pie and quiches. 

Our expertise manifests itself in providing efficient production solutions, high quality automation, hygienic design at the lowest cost-of-ownership possible. Rademaker has a wide knowledge about bakery products and their production technology. Dedicated professionals and state of the art engineering techniques provide you with solutions that live up to your (best) expectations. Driven by worldwide market forces, Rademaker evolved to become a company with an international outlook with our headquarters located in Culemborg, the Netherlands. To better serve the wishes and requirements of local customers, sales offices opened doors in France, Germany, the United Kingdom, the United States of America, Russia and China. Production lines and turn-key solutions for all continents represent a great part of our business today.

Name: Dieffenbacher
Description:
Dieffenbacher is an internationally active group of companies specializing in the mechanical engineering and plant construction sector. With over 1850 associates and 18 production, service and sales locations worldwide, we are a leading manufacturer of press systems and complete production plants for the wood-based panels, forming and recycling industries. In addition, we offer a wide range of advanced solutions for sustainable energy generation.

As an independent family business in its fifth generation, we’ve stood for reliable partnership and continuous progress for 150 years. 

Our Wood business unit plans and implements complete solutions for the manufacture of wood-based panels, such as particleboard, MDF, OSB and LVL boards.

The Forming business unit develops processes, presses and fully automated production lines for the manufacture of fiber-reinforced plastic components and system solutions for metal forming.

Our Recycling business unit supplies plants for waste wood processing and waste-to-product solutions.

Our Energy business unit offers power plant and modernization solutions, industrial heat recovery systems and process equipment.

Data privacy statement: https://dieffenbacher.com/en/data-privacy-statement

DIEFFENBACHER GMBH Maschinen- und Anlagenbau
Heilbronner Straße 20
75031 Eppingen
Germany

Mail: dse@dieffenbacher.de

Name: CenterLine (Windsor) Limited
Description:
Since 2013, CenterLine (Windsor) Limited has qualified as the winner of Canada’s Best Managed Companies (Best Managed) award. The company currently holds Platinum status as they have maintained their Best Managed status for seven years or more. CenterLine congratulates its dedicated and talented staff for its outstanding work and commitment to excellence and its many valued suppliers that contribute to our overall success. 

CenterLine is a privately held North-American-based corporation specializing in advanced automation processes and technologies for metal joining, forming and coating needs. Centerline supplies a complete range of joining, metalworking and finishing products and services for the automotive, mass transit, aerospace and defence industries. 

From consumable electrode products to complete automated production systems, CenterLine has the capabilities to satisfy virtually any need.  

Among its products, CenterLine supplies: FlexGun Family of welding guns, FlexFast  Family of stationary welders,  SoftMount Gun, PinPoint Solution, KapTec and High Speed Fastener Solution. Other CenterLine products include OHMA Weld Cylinders, OHMA Piercing Cylinders and OHMA Presses and SST Cold Spray coating systems and supplies. 

Strong R&D, Engineering, Service and Process Development groups enable CenterLine to provide complete turnkey solutions. With operations In Canada, USA, Mexico, Brazil, Germany, India and Romania, CenterLine continues to assist its customers in maintaining their competitive advantage.

Name: CSM - Máquinas e Equipamentos para Construção Civil e Movimentação de Materiais
Description:
Founded in 1979, CSM stands out in the manufacturing of machinery and equipment for civil construction, material handling and power generation plants in general. The company continuously invests in processes, development  of new products and qualification of its staff so as to keep among the world-class quality companies.

Specialized in Concrete Manufacturing Machinery, Precast Concrete Molds, Construction Systems and Structures for Power Plants, Concrete Plants, Machinery to Manufacture Tubes, Blocks and Pavers, Soil Compaction, Electric Hoists, Overhead and Gantry Cranes, the company has three business units in the north of Santa Catarina State, two in the city of Jaraguá do Sul and one in Schroeder.

Supplying equipment, systems and machines for major works, such as the construction of soccer stadiums, the Yellow Line of São Paulo Subway, Line 4 South of Rio de Janeiro Subway, the bridge over the Negro river, revitalization works of Porto Maravilha in Rio de Janeiro, concrete molding machines for the bases and towers of wind power generation farms from north to south of the country, among others, CSM has been actively contributing to the economic and social growth of the country, generating jobs and wealth, developing and qualifying professionals, and thus contributing positively to the general well-being of the population.

Focused on the solid and sustainable growth of its business, CSM is sensitive to environmental issues and works with full dedication in order to build an increasingly prosperous future. CSM undertakes commercial and social commitments, believes in Brazil, in its people and in the full development of its economic and human potentialities.

Name: VEMAG Maschinenbau GmbH
Description: VEMAG Maschinenbau GmbH has been developing and manufacturing machines and equipment for the food industry and artisan producers for over 75 years. The company emloys some 800 staff and operates around the world, achieving an export ratio of approx. 80%.

Name: MECATHERM
Description:
The French company MECATHERM is a world leader in industrial bakery equipment and the number one in automatic production lines for industrial bakeries. Since 1964, it designs and manufactures ovens, machinery and automatic production lines exclusively for players in the bakery & pastry industry. 
With more than 890 automatic lines installed by the Group currently processing in over 70 countries on five continents, Mecatherm makes 90% of its turnover internationally. It devotes a substantial part of its activities to research and development, and provides a direct technical and commercial relationship with its customers. 
-----------------------------------------------------------

Pionnier de la boulangerie industrielle en France, MECATHERM est un des leaders mondiaux des équipements de boulangerie industrielle et le numéro un des lignes de production de la baguette industrielle. 
Depuis 1964, MECATHERM conçoit et réalise des fours en continu, des machines et des lignes automatiques, exclusivement pour les acteurs industriels du secteur de la boulangerie / viennoiserie / pâtisserie. 
Le groupe a installé plus de 890 lignes automatiques en fonctionnement actuel dans plus de 70 pays sur les cinq continents, et réalise 90% de son chiffre d'affaires à l'international. Il consacre une part importante de ses activités à la  recherche et au développement, et assure une relation technique et commerciale directe avec ses clients.

Name: Marine and Construction
Description:
Marine and Construction focuses on customer needs across the entire life cycle of assets within the offshore and marine industry. Our engineering consultancy combined with NOV’s premium equipment create highly specialized and integrated solutions that are safe and reliable, reducing risks and environmental impact. From oil & gas and civil construction to shipping and the offshore and marine environment, we work with you through all concept stages and provide lifetime aftermarket support to help you explore options that achieve your goals. 

Learn more:
www.nov.com/mc

Name: GRUPO AIZ
Description:
O Grupo AIZ tem o maior showroom multimarcas à pronta-entrega do Brasil. Caminhões Implementados, Implementos Rodoviários e Agrícolas, Linha amarela e muito mais. Tudo com preço e garantia de fábrica. 

Nossa missão é entregar o que há de melhor no mercado quando se trata de caminhões implementados, implementos rodoviários e máquinas linha amarela.

Name: Viking Pump, Inc.
Description:
Viking Pump, Inc. has been a pump industry leader and innovator since its founding in 1911. We continue to build on our ever-growing experience to deliver innovative pumping solutions (including custom designs) to thousands of customers who use millions of Viking pumps in some of the world's toughest applications.

Our vertical integration expertise (casting, machining, assembling and testing in-house) allows us to ensure best quality and maximum pump availability.

We're renowned worldwide producing highly customized pumps for the most demanding fluids. Choose a Viking Pump and you'll see why.

Name: Additive Industries
Description:
Additive Industries is a pioneer in industrial 3D metal printers offering cutting-edge technology that enable customers to industrialize and accelerate their manufacturing processes. As a company, we help to solve the challenges of the most forward-looking industry leaders in high demanding sectors, including aerospace, automotive, high tech and energy.

Additive Industries' passion for innovation and drive for excellence define our commitment to inspiring customers and shaping the future of production through metal additive manufacturing.

Name: Leister
Description:
Founded in 1949, Leister has grown into a globally recognized and highly successful brand. Leister stands for premium, high-quality products with reliable performance in the areas of plastic welding and process heat, including infrared solutions. We are proud of our team of dedicated employees and the strong partnerships we've established with customers, sales partners, and suppliers across the globe.

HQ and production of Leister are located in Switzerland. We're having a local presence in over 100 countries, working with 130 sales and service partners and eight national subsidiaries that contribute to our global presence and proximity to our customers:

Leister Germany, originating from Solingen in 1949, has grown in Germany significantly since 1949.

Leister Benelux began operations in Belgium in 1953 and in the Netherlands in 1963. Today, Leister's innovative and high-quality products are demonstrated, sold, and serviced across the Benelux region.

Recognizing Italy's market importance early on, Leister Italy has been providing its innovative and high-quality products locally since 1958.

Leister US first entered the U.S. market in 1961 and since then, has continued to grow its distribution network, bringing it closer to its customers.

Japan's engagement with Leister Japan started in 1967 through a sales partnership. Today, Leister continues to broaden its presence in this major world economy.

Leister China's presence in China began in 1980 with a sales partner from Hong Kong. The company expanded its footprint significantly with the establishment of its own subsidiary in 2004.

India has been a significant market for Leister India since 1987. Over the years, Leister has successfully increased its market coverage throughout India, providing a wide range of products and services.

As the latest addition, Leister Singapore was established to enhance market reach and customer support in the Southeast Asian region.

Name: Milton CAT
Description:
Milton CAT is the Caterpillar Dealer for the Northeast region of the United States. Our territory includes Massachusetts, Rhode Island, Maine, New Hampshire, Vermont and upstate New York.

We are a private company, founded in 1960, owned by the family who started the business fifty years ago. Since those early days, Milton CAT has grown to 12 locations, and close to 1000 employees. We're consistently named one of the world's top CAT dealers in terms of sales volume and we're well-known for our progressive practices. In addition to the complete range of Caterpillar equipment, we also sell and service several other top brands that complement the Caterpillar brand.

The company has two main divisions; Earthmoving and Power Systems.

The Earthmoving Division sells, rents and supports machinery and work tools for segments that include the construction, landscaping, forestry, mining, quarry, crushing and screening and municipal sectors.

The Power Systems Division sells, rents and supports power generators and air compressors, and has a specialized engineering group that works with customers to develop customized power systems. Those Milton CAT locations close to water have a marine focus; an industrial group markets engines to manufacturers to power their own machines; and the on-highway truck engine business is an important component for all of our locations.

Name: Paul Horn GmbH
Description:
Paul Horn GmbH has been developing and producing grooving, side turning and slot milling tools since 1969; these tools occupy a leading position in the market.

Our products are used by  automotive,  general engineering, aerospace,  hydraulics /pneumatics,  jewellery and medical equipment manufacturers.

Our tools excellent reputation is based on their technology, performance and reliability, They are developed and produced by 1,400 employees world wide. In Germany we have been established as the branch market and technology leader for many years.

We provide our customers with high quality service and support based on our comprehensive range of high performance tool systems. Through collaboration with our overseas sister companies and distributors we are able to be a valuable and added value partner for each of our customers world wide.

Ongoing development and optimisation of processes and products, and dissemination of knowledge our highest priority. The constant growth of HORN and the great satisfaction of our customers affirm our business strategy.

We are committed to ongoing development and innovation. We can control all important factors in-house from carbide manufacture to interfaces and toolholders to coating technologies and geometry developments. Possessing and building on this capability is one of our key strengths that benefits each customer through machining performance and manufacturing economies.

Data Protection: https://www.phorn.de/en/service-pages/data-protection/

Imprint: https://www.phorn.de/en/service-pages/imprint/

Name: Global Hydro Energy
Description:
GLOBAL Hydro is the primary contact worldwide for hydropower technologies and secures a liveable environment for the next generations due to innovative solutions. We are specialists in Kaplan, Pelton and Francis turbines with capacities of 100 kW to 30 MW. With our products HEROS 4.0, our fully automated turbine and plant control system, as well as smarT, GLOBAL Hydro’s fully assembled PLUG-IN power plant solution, we are offering our customers sustainable package solutions.
It began more than 80 years ago with a small turbine manufacture besides the Danube river. Today GLOBAL HYDRO ENERGY is worldwide successful operating as provider of small hydropower plants with its innovative products. Consistent demands on quality and continuous advancement ensure technology which is state-of-the-art.

Name: NORD Drivesystems Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
NORD develops, produces and distributes drive systems and is one of the leading international full-service provider in the industry. In addition to standard drives, NORD supplies application-specific concepts and solutions for special requirements, for example with energy-saving drives or explosion-protected systems. 
The company founded in 1965 has today worldwide through 35 own subsidiaries. The dense sales and service network ensures optimum availability for short delivery times and a customer-oriented services. NORD's wide variety of gear types covers torques from 10 Nm to 200,000 Nm, electric motors in the power range from 0.12 kW to 200 kW and with frequency inverters and servo controllers, the necessary power electronics. Inverter solutions are available both for installation in control cabinets as well as for decentralized and fully integrated drive units.

Name: Niftylift Ltd
Description:
Niftylift designs develops and sells mobile elevating work platforms (MEWPs), also know as Cherry Pickers, throughout Europe, the USA, the Middle East, Far East, Australia and South Africa.

We use advanced 3D modeling software together with rigorous testing to optimize every aspect of our product design and to ensure that every Niftylift work platform delivers outstanding performance without compromising on functionality or reliability.

With years of experience designing machines for the rental industry, we understand the importance of reliability, ease of operation, minimal maintenance, and excellent after sales support to our customers.

Through investment in staff, manufacturing equipment and technology, we maintain an ongoing commitment to our customers to consistently produce high quality innovative products that meet or exceed their expectations.

Name: ISTOBAL Group
Description:
ISTOBAL es una multinacional de referencia en el diseño, fabricación y comercialización de soluciones de lavado y cuidado para todo tipo de vehículos, con una trayectoria de más de 75 años que avala su liderazgo en el sector. Con un equipo de más de 1,000 profesionales comprometidos con la calidad y la innovación, ISTOBAL desarrolla soluciones tecnológicamente avanzadas que ofrecen una alta rentabilidad para el negocio del lavado y un notable valor añadido para sus usuarios, quienes se benefician de un servicio eficiente, seguro y sostenible.
Fundada en 1950 en L’Alcúdia (Valencia, España), ISTOBAL ha crecido manteniendo su esencia de empresa familiar. Hoy en día, la tercera generación de la familia dirige el grupo, que ha consolidado su presencia internacional. ISTOBAL cuenta con 16 filiales y cuatro plantas de fabricación y ensamblaje ubicadas estratégicamente en Europa, América y Asia, permitiéndole atender una demanda global con productos que se adaptan a las necesidades específicas de cada mercado.
La compañía exporta a más de 80 países, contando con una extensa red de distribuidores que garantizan la cobertura en todo el mundo. Esta expansión ha llevado a ISTOBAL a ocupar el segundo lugar entre los fabricantes de soluciones de lavado en Europa y el tercero a nivel mundial. Con un enfoque en la calidad , el 72% de su producción corresponde a ventas internacionales, lo que representa su capacidad de satisfacer los estándares y exigencias de mercados diversos y complejos.
ISTOBAL demuestra un firme compromiso con el desarrollo de tecnologías sostenibles y eficientes, aportando valor a sus clientes, y promoviendo el respeto y cuidado del entorno en cada región donde opera. A través de la inversión en I+D, la empresa busca constantemente innovar en sus productos y procesos, abordando los desafíos actuales del sector de una forma responsable y competitiva.

Name: Ammann India
Description:
Ammann India is a leading manufacturer of road construction equipment and machinery, headquartered in Mehsana, Gujarat. Our extensive range of products includes asphalt plants, concrete mixing plants, asphalt pavers, soil compactors, tandem rollers, and other related road construction equipment. We operate across the country with a vast network of sales, spares, and service touchpoints, providing high-quality and innovative solutions to our clients.

Our commitment to innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction is reflected in our focus on designing and developing reliable and efficient products that meet the highest industry standards. We understand the importance of providing seamless and hassle-free service, and that is why we ensure that our sales and service touchpoints are readily available to our clients.

In addition to our extensive product range, we also have popular brands such as Apollo and Elba under our portfolio. This further enhances our capabilities in providing top-notch solutions to our clients. With our combination of innovative product range and strong brand portfolio, we are able to cater to the diverse needs of our clients, making us a one-stop-shop for all their road construction equipment requirements.

At Ammann India, we are committed to delivering the best possible service and solutions to our clients. Our team of experts works tirelessly to ensure that our clients receive only the best, and that is what sets us apart from our competitors. We take pride in being a premier provider of top-quality road construction equipment and machinery, and our goal is to continue delivering innovative solutions that meet the evolving needs of the industry.

Name: Energy Power Systems Australia
Description:
Energy Power Systems Australia (EPSA) is the Cat dealer for engines, generators and power solutions in Australia, Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands.

We provide:

• Technically superior Cat products for all power generation requirements. From off-the-shelf low-cost engines and generators to full turnkey solutions including project management and commissioning, we supply engines and generators for the broadest range of industries.

• Short or long-term Cat rental solutions for power generation, temperature control and compressed air equipment. Cat Rental Power has been recognised as a global leader and innovator with the most recent innovation being Remote Monitoring. Remote Monitoring provides live equipment telemetry and remote control functionality, now allowing you to accurately view performance data of Cat equipment in real time.

• Full turnkey provider offering Rental, New, Used and Engineered solutions - working to partner with your business operation to find the through-life cost benefit solution to suit your application.

• Projects range from large Multi MW power stations through to individual units. We have the capability to be there from set up through to commissioning and post-sale support. We will find the optimal power, air or temperature control solution to drive your business, managing the project from start to finish – designing, constructing, connecting, commissioning, owning, operating and maintaining.

Caterpillar has expanded into Renewable Energy, developing an integrated photovoltaic (PV) solar solution for microgrid applications. EPSA is the exclusive provider of the new Cat Microgrid System and the only fully integrated service provider of hybrid systems, offering purpose-built products and project services.

Caterpillar is renowned for reliability, safety and dependability with Cat power systems boasting a proven lowest total cost of ownership and highest return on investment.

Name: XCMG India Manufacturing
Description:
Xuzhou Construction Machinery Group Co., Ltd. (XCMG) was founded in 1943. Since then, XCMG has stood at the forefront of the Chinese construction machinery industry and developed into one of the domestic industry's largest, most influential, and most competitive enterprise groups with the most complete product varieties and series.
XCMG is the 3th largest construction machinery company in the world. It is ranked 65th in the list of China's Top 500 Companies, 44th in the list of China's Top 100 Manufacturing Enterprises, and 2nd in the list of China's Top 100 Machinery Manufacturers. 
XUZHOU CONSTRUCTION MACHINERY MANUFACTURING (INDIA) PVT LTD is the branch company of XCMG in India.

Name: Deltec Equipamentos Industriais
Description:
Seja bem-vindo(a) à nossa página :) 

Somos uma empresa de 39 anos que, desde a sua fundação, atua no setor industrial fornecendo soluções em equipamentos para tratamento de superfícies e pintura, e tem sua estrutura administrativa e fabril localizada em Valinhos/SP, em uma área de quase 15.000m². 

Atualmente, contamos com 300 colaboradores fazendo história nessa trajetória de sucesso da Deltec e, com eles, levantamos a bandeira que diz "somos amor pelo que fazemos" - uma forma de evidenciar a nossa cultura de entregar soluções customizadas aos nossos clientes, tratar os nossos parceiros e amigos com o mesmo comprometimento e valorizar aqueles que, todos os dias, saem de suas casas para fazer da Deltec uma empresa melhor -. 

Somos especialistas em soluções completas de pintura a pó e líquida (transportadores, pré-tratamento, estufas, cabines de pintura e etc.), entregando tudo o que a sua empresa precisa para crescer em tecnologia, inovação e, claro, produtividade!

Não deixe de entrar em contato conosco através dos nossos canais de comunicação.

Name: Bouwman Livestock & Agriculture
Description: Profissional do setor de maquinas Agrícolas

Name: Tonello
Description:
Tonello is the global leader of garment finishing technologies that, since 1981, has been contributing to the success that made in Italy has enjoyed all over the world. 

Thanks to its cutting-edge machines and its one-of-a-kind service, it acts side by side with its customers creating a link between the stylists and the companies working, dyeing and finishing the garments. 

With more than 9500 machines sold worldwide, Tonello is considered the reference point for the garment finishing industry.

Name: Wilo MENA
Description:
The Wilo Group is one of the world’s leading premium suppliers of pumps and pump systems for building services, water management and the industrial sector. In the last decade, we transformed from hidden to visible and to connected champion. Wilo employs around 9000 people around the globe today. With innovative solutions, smart products and individual services, we provide the clever, efficient and climate-friendly service of keeping water flowing. We already are the digital pioneer within the industry with our products and solutions, processes and business models.

Wilo MENA headquarters is in Dubai, UAE to serve 20 countries with five subsidiaries and seven representative offices. 
In 2019, Wilo inaugurated its state-of-the-art facility in Dubai, UAE—a LEED Gold-certified building complex spanning over 8,000 square meters. In 2025, Wilo marked a major milestone by doubling the size of the factory, integrating cutting-edge automation, and increasing production capacity by 60%. This expansion enhances our ability to deliver German Water Solutions made in the UAE, meeting both regional and global demands.

To support this growth, the key objectives of the project include:
• Tripling warehouse capacity to accommodate surging demand
• Establishing in-house machining and fabrication capabilities
• Introducing new water solutions, including Deep Well pumps, Firefighting pump sets (UL Listed & FM Approved), and Norm Pumps
• Enhancing the Factory Test Bed with capacities of up to 500 kW power and maximum flows of 5,000 m³/h for dry running pumps and 9,000 m³/h for submersible pumps—making it the largest accredited test bench in the Middle East and Africa.

Follow us on social media:
https://www.youtube.com/user/WiloMiddleEast
https://www.facebook.com/WiloPumpsMENA
https://www.instagram.com/wilomiddleeast/
https://twitter.com/wilomiddleeast/

Name: MEIKO Group
Description:
MEIKO is a global technology and service company that develops professional warewashing, cleaning and disinfection technology as well as sustainable food waste treatment systems. 

With more than 2,500 employees in over 30 countries MEIKO assists and enables professionals to deliver an outstanding performance. Offering a full range of sustainable and hygienic solutions, efficient processes and great service. 

Since 1927 proudly serving our customers with expertise. Claiming an essential share in the development of future markets. 

Maybe that’s why MEIKO is the world’s choice for clean and intelligent solutions.

Name: Yanmar Compact Equipment
Description:
With a proud Japanese history that dates back to 1912, Yanmar Compact Equipment (Yanmar CE) is today a truly global leader dedicated to helping our customers and society build success. We design, manufacture and support compact construction equipment. Part of the Yanmar Group, our Yanmar CE range includes mini-excavators – which we invented in 1968 – compact wheel loaders, compact tracked loaders and small tracked carriers.

With production facilities in Japan, France, Germany and the U.S., a wide range of Yanmar CE products and services are available through an international network of highly skilled and motivated dealers.

Name: GRUPO PESCO
Description:
Somos un holding líder en la comercialización de equipos y maquinaria industrial para las industrias mineras, forestal, medio ambiente, municipal, eléctrica y de emergencia.

Con más de 20 años de historia y gracias a 35 representaciones internacionales, se ha logrado posicionar en el mercado nacional con sucursales en Santiago, Calama, Los Ángeles y Puerto Montt; mientras que en el extranjero, tenemos presencia en Perú y Uruguay.

Junto a sus empresas, PESCO, PESCO Seguridad y Servicios, PESCO Rental, y PESCO Capacitaciones, entregan soluciones eficientes e innovadoras, caracterizándose siempre por su calidad y respaldo.

Name: JBT Marel Fish
Description:
Marel is the leading global supplier of advanced standalone equipment and integrated systems to the fish industry.

With roots in the fish industry all the way back to the company’s origins developing onboard scales, Marel combines its extensive knowledge of fish processing with heavy investment in product development to create innovative equipment, systems, and software for processing whitefish and salmon, both farmed and wild, onboard and ashore.

At Marel, we can offer you a world of opportunities, allowing you to inspire, innovate and set global standards wherever you are. Learn more and apply now at https://jobs.marel.com/global/en

Name: Nakamura-Tome Precision Industry Co.,Ltd.
Description: We are the machine tool builder specialized Multi-tasking machines and CNC lathes.

Name: McLanahan Corporation
Description:
McLanahan Corporation is an industry-leading, global provider of processing solutions for the aggregates, mineral and C&D recycling industries. From primary crushing to sand and mineral processing to tailings and water management, McLanahan designs and manufactures processing solutions for both wet and dry applications that are tailored to each unique operation for a variety of industries.

We’ve also applied our engineering expertise in the aggregates and mining industries to the dairy industry, providing innovative solutions for sand-manure separation, bedding management, manure management and freestall management on dairies of all sizes.

As one of the oldest manufacturing companies in the United States, we’ve built a legacy of trust, durability, and performance backed by over 190 years of experience. With dedicated engineers, in-house lab testing, project managers, field service technicians and more throughout several key regions of the world, McLanahan provides global support from the selection process through the life of your equipment. 

Founded in 1835, McLanahan Corporation is in its fifth and sixth generation of family ownership and management. We believe we are the oldest, family-owned, operating foundry in the United States, and we were recently listed by Family Business magazine as the 49th oldest family business in the USA. McLanahan's corporate headquarters remain at the original site in Hollidaysburg, Pa., USA.

Name: WAMGROUP
Description: WAMGROUP is the global market leader in Screw Conveyors and amongst the most prominent players in the field of Bulk Solids Handling & Processing Equipment. The Company founded in Modena, Italy, in 1968, employs some 2,500 people at more than 60 locations in 40 countries. The Company’s comprehensive product range includes equipment for Bulk Solids Handling & Processing, Dust Filtration, Wastewater Treatment and Renewable Energy Generation. Strongly focused on the requirements of the market, WAMGROUP aims to produce market-oriented solutions turning them into a particularly user-friendly standard, tailored for a variety of industries. Industrial quality and an excellent price-performance ratio make WAMGROUP equipment the ideal choice for project engineers and provide customers all over the world with the best deal available on the market. Uncompromising dedication to R&D is the foundation of the Company’s vast product range and leads time and again to the development of highly innovative equipment from standardised modular components. Highly rationalised and cost-effective production methods and logistics are constantly being improved and time and again determine state of the art in the industry. Global quality management gives WAMGROUP customers the assurance that their equipment has been checked and tested in each phase of the manufacturing process. Currently, WAMGROUP manufactures its product range in four continents and distributes it through its worldwide subsidiary network offering customers professional advice, smooth order management and ‘round the clock’ spares service.

Name: Comacchio SpA
Description: Comacchio design and manufactures drilling rigs that operates in the fields of geotechnics, foundations, ground improvement, tunneling, water well drilling, geothermal and exploration.

Name: Peerless Pump Company
Description:
𝐀𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐏𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐏𝐮𝐦𝐩
Peerless Pump is a leading manufacturer of horizontal and vertical pumps with installations in Commercial Buildings, Municipal Facilities, Industrial warehouses, and Manufacturing, including all aspects of the Power & Energy market. We are an ISO 9001 facility providing high-quality products in various materials and configurations to meet the pumping needs of the 21st Century.

Founded in 1923, Peerless Pump has 𝟭𝟬𝟬 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗿𝘀 of experience in the pumping industry. Headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana, USA, with facilities in Lubbock, TX, Houston, TX, and Fresno, CA, we are a leading pump manufacturer with sales and service locations around the globe.

𝗣𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗣𝘂𝗺𝗽 𝗧𝗲𝗮𝗺
Our Peerless Colleagues have diverse backgrounds working not only with some of the best customers in the world but also with some of the best organizations—names like Hydraulic Institute, Underwriter’s Laboratory, the National Fire Protection Association, and many others.

𝗣𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗣𝘂𝗺𝗽 𝗧𝗼𝗱𝗮𝘆
We offer many innovative solutions to meet the modern pumping needs in the 21st Century; Pumps with NSF certifications for clean & safe water, customized package systems to meet special needs, and a complete offering of fire pumps for keeping life and property safe.

Peerless Pump is also entering the rapidly growing digital market! Peerless FireConnect is the first cloud-based solution capable of modernizing any fire pump system and giving you real-time, remote monitoring of the fire pump system whenever, wherever you need it. With the Peerless FireConnect app, you have all the information you need right at your fingertips, allowing you to monitor your system and make decisions remotely effectively. Peerless FireConnect is fire safety at its best.

Name: Cetro Máquinas
Description:
A Cetro é uma empresa brasileira que entrou no mercado para oferecer máquinas de alta qualidade, de fácil uso e para diversos tipos de segmentos: doméstico, comercial e industrial.

Nosso propósito é oferecer soluções completas e inovadoras para o mercado, proporcionando o crescimento de pequenas, médias e grandes empresas, afim de alavancar a indústria nacional.

Hoje a empresa conta com uma equipe altamente especializada para atendimento, venda, assistência técnica e pós-venda. Nossa matriz fica em Bauru, interior de São Paulo e contamos com 3 filiais, sendo elas em São Paulo-SP, Rio de Janeiro-RJ e Belo Horizonte-MG.

Para conhecer mais acesse nosso site!

Name: MULTIVAC USA
Description:
We take great pride in setting the industry standard in technology, efficiency, and reliability through our expertly engineered products. With the most experienced team in the industry, we help you develop the perfect package suited to your product, your brand, and your objectives for profitability.

Global Capabilities – Local Support: Industry leading global operations supported by US Headquarters and Innovation Center, plus three US regional support offices.

Unmatched Experience: MULTIVAC US was established in 1987 and is the #1 daughter company of MULTIVAC Global. There are currently more than 8,000 active US based packaging machines, with growth of more than 250 new machines sold annually.

Reliability: Nearly 60 years of German engineering and more than 115,000 machines installed worldwide, MULTIVAC has become the global leader in packaging equipment due to high outputs, minimal downtime, and long lifespans.

Productivity: MULTIVAC equipment is designed to perform consistently through rigorous production requirements and when problems arise trained, experienced technical staff quickly resolve any issue, sustaining output.

Our commitment begins with the first consultation and continues through comprehensive worldwide technical service and support for as long as you own your MULTIVAC equipment. To provide customers with a single source supply network, MULTIVAC offers thermoforming, traysealing, and chamber packaging machines along with portioning, labeling, printing, inspection, and automation equipment solutions. In addition, MULTIVAC Certified Films are designed and tested for optimal performance on MULTIVAC packaging equipment.

Name: Kaban Makina
Description:
1986 yılında 20 metrekarelik bir alanda kurulan Kaban Makine bugün 30.000 metrekare kapalı alanda yüksek teknoloji içeren otomasyon hatlar ile üretim yapan ve sektörde uluslararası liderlik noktasına ulaşmış bir firma haline gelmiştir.

Yola çıkarken, “işini doğru ve eksiksiz yapmak” anlayışına inanıp ve buna bağlı olarak büyüyüp gelişen firma, yılların birikiminden süzülmüş olarak yarınlara aktarılan, dürüstlük, vefa ve istikrarın sağlam temellerinden yükselen bir “Kaban geleneği” haline gelmiştir.

Hidrolik silindir, torna, freze işleri ile başlayan ürün yelpazesinde artık 100’ün üzerinde ülkeye ihraç edilen, 45 farklı makine çeşidi mevcut olup, yıllık 5.000 makine üretim kapasitesine sahiptir.

Kaban Makina, öncü Ar-Ge çalışmaları ile şekillenmiş, yüksek kaliteli, kolay ulaşılabilir ürünler, çözümler ve hizmetler ile başarı grafiğini her geçen gün arttırmaktadır. Bu başarıların hem kaynağı hem hedefi değerli müşteri ve çalışanlarının memnuniyeti olacaktır.

Name: Hitachi High-Tech Analytical Science
Description: We’re a global Hitachi company offering a wide range of connected materials analysis products and services, either for use in the lab or in-field. We work alongside our customers to utilise our advanced, cutting-edge technologies to help industry and institutions stay ahead of the curve. We want to help design the industry of tomorrow which is why we believe waste reduction, circular economy, and preservation of raw materials is key to a more sustainable, global industry.

Name: Mühlbauer Group
Description:
Founded in 1981 in the heart of Bavaria, the Mühlbauer Group has ever since grown to a leading global player in the fields of Parts & Systems, Semiconductor Related Products, Document Solutions & Equipment for Security Systems, and innovative Technologies for Electromobility and Flexible Solar Solutions. With around 4,000 employees, technology centers in Germany, Malaysia, Slovakia, the U.S. and Serbia, and 35 sales and service locations worldwide, Mühlbauer created a strong competence network around the globe.

Our global corporation continuously invests in the most modern innovations and creative ideas in order to enhance our competences and to provide you with optimized solutions. We aim to protect the environment with our advanced technologies and make life easier for countless people. 


BUSINESS LINES:

The Mühlbauer business unit PARTS & SYSTEMS produces high-precision single components for safety-related sensitive branches like aerospace or medical technology. 

Our business unit AUTOMATION does not only develop and assemble individually customized production systems, but also offers intelligent software solutions for production automation (Industry 4.0). Vision inspection technologies as well as semiconductor and RFID applications complete our comprehensive portfolio.

Our youngest and currently most dynamic division ATECH – Advanced Energy Technologies – brings unique machinery requirements to series production. For the e-mobility industry, we have been offering highly efficient production lines for the manufacture of pouch cells and prismatic cells for lithium-ion batteries, as well as MEA's & stacks for fuel cells of renowned automotive manufacturers since 2022.

As system partner, the business unit TECURITY offers comprehensive complete solutions for the Smart ID area - from the first concept to the final issuance and verification of the ID documents.

IMPRINT:
https://www.muehlbauer.de/imprint/

Name: BSM Engenharia
Description:
Fundada em 1973, diante da perspectiva de uma grande expansão do mercado de construções e montagens industriais, o Banco Bozano Simonsen e a Montreal Engenharia uniram forças para criar a BSM Máquinas e Equipamentos.

Concebida para atuar na prestação de serviços de locação de equipamentos pesados, movimentação de cargas, operações portuárias e logística integrada, conta com uma frota de mais de 600 equipamentos incluindo guindastes sobre pneus e esteiras, empilhadeiras, gruas, caminhões, balsas, entre outros.

Ao longo desses anos, obtivemos o reconhecimento e confiabilidade pelo profissionalismo e prontidão em resolver desafios de grande complexidade para clientes em todo o Brasil. Nossos conhecimentos já foram testados em diversos projetos complexos nos quais nos orgulhamos de ter participado e oferecido a melhor solução. Atualmente, com razão social de BSM Engenharia S.A., continuamos a expandir nossos índices de qualidade e grau de satisfação de nossos parceiros.

Portfólio
• Grandes projetos de movimentação de cargas superdimensionadas envolvendo grande quantidade de equipamentos, como guindastes e dispositivos especiais.
• Projetos especiais de içamento e transporte
• Montagem de turbinas eólicas
• Locação de guindastes telescópicos e sobre esteiras com capacidade até 1.250 toneladas
• Operações de içamento offshore
• Load-in e load-out de cargas superdimensionadas
• Operações portuárias e logística integrada
• Desmontagem, transporte e montagem de sondas onshore (DTM)
• Gerenciamento de projetos, estudos e consultoria de engenharia
• Locação de gruas e cremalheiras
• Gestão de condomínio e serviços logísticos

Locação de equipamentos
Guindastes sobre pneus | Guindastes sobre esteiras | Empilhadeiras | Reach Stackers | Caminhões | Carretas | Veículos de apoio | Muncks | Pás Carregadeira | Balsas Oceânicas | Gruas | Elevadores de Cremalheira
Location: Rio de Janeiro , Rio de Janeiro

Name: Fairbanks Morse Defense
Description:
Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD) is the leading provider of the highest value equipment for naval defense customers. For more than 100 years, FMD has been a principal supplier of reliable power systems, parts, and aftermarket services to the U.S. Navy, U.S. Coast Guard, Military Sealift Command, and the Canadian Coast Guard. Through its six strategically located service centers and a robust aftermarket team, FMD is able to provide round-the-clock field service and parts support. Additionally, its suite of full lifecycle solutions extends asset life and enables it to run more efficiently. With a growing portfolio of companies under the FMD brand, the company continues to integrate these mission-critical products and innovative service solutions to power marine defense. FMD, a portfolio company of Arcline Investment Management, is based in Beloit, Wisconsin.  
Learn more about FMD by visiting www.FMDefense.com.

Name: Ace Designers Ltd
Description:
AMS offers products and services to customers in India and countries like China, Russia, France, Mexico, South Korea, Thailand, Germany, Brazil, UAE, Turkey, Oman.  

AMS caters to the needs of the Automotive, Die & Mould, Medical, Aerospace, Education, Electronics, Power and Energy, Oil and Gas equipment manufacturing, General Engineering, Defence and other government sectors. It is also a single source supplier of machines to many Indian OEM manufacturers and large size component manufacturers.

With a fully-equipped manufacturing facility in Bengaluru and 41+ service centers spread across India, AMS ensures to offer prompt customer support. AMS manufactures the widest range of drill tap, vertical and horizontal machining centers. It covers the entire gamut of milling applications, from the simple to the most complicated operations. AMS also provides a turnkey option and tooled up solutions.

Name: Gram Equipment
Description:
Founded in 1901, Gram Equipment is one of the most experienced and trusted suppliers in industrial ice cream production.

With a strong international footprint, more than 600 employees, and a network of subsidiaries, agents, and service teams, we are close to our customers and ready to support them wherever they operate.

Our goal is simple: to help ice cream producers meet changing market demands with reliable, high-performing, and future-ready solutions. We continuously invest in innovation to keep our customers ahead, whether that means higher output, smarter automation, or more sustainable production.

We take responsibility in how we operate, committed to people, the environment, and the communities we serve.

Driven by engineering excellence and deep industry know-how, we aim to be the trusted partner for ice cream producers worldwide.

Name: Ciarama Máquinas John Deere
Description:
No mês de maio de 2001, com o propósito de expandir nossas operações na região de Ponta Porã, no estado de Mato Grosso do Sul, inauguramos a Ciarama Máquinas Ltda, uma concessionária da renomada marca John Deere, mundialmente reconhecida pela alta tecnologia em sistemas mecanizados para a agricultura. 

Nossa empresa é especializada na comercialização de tratores, colheitadeiras, plantadeiras, pulverizadores, implementos agrícolas e serviços para agricultura de precisão. Oferecemos também peças originais e serviços técnicos especializados, mantendo os elevados padrões de qualidade exigidos pela fábrica global. 

Atualmente, operamos em nove unidades no estado de Mato Grosso do Sul, com presença em Ponta Porã, Amambai, Bela Vista, Dourados, Eldorado, Naviraí, Nova Andradina, Laguna Carapã e Rio Brilhante. Nosso crescimento contínuo gerando mais de 518 empregos diretos, desempenhando um papel significativo nas comunidades em que estamos presentes e contribuindo substancialmente para o desenvolvimento econômico e social dessas regiões. 

Trabalhamos incansavelmente para que a vida possa avançar!
Location: Ponta Porã , Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Macpower CNC Machines Limited
Description:
Macpower CNC Machines Ltd. (Macpower) welcomes you to the world of machining excellence. Two decades of experience and the vision towards creating a niche have what transformed Macpower intoIndia’s fastest growing CNC Manufacturing Company. This meteoric growth is a result of Macpower’s vision par excellence to manufacture state of the art products, adopting the best in technology.

The company drives inspiration from Mr. Rupesh Mehta, President who has added value, with his experience and knowledge in this sector.

Macpower Group comprises of Modern Machine Tools, Macpower Industries and Macpower CNC Machines Ltd. The journey of Macpower Group began with its inception of Macpower Industries in 1985 and from then, it went on to become a reputed company with its brand TURNER LATHE, well known in Indian and worldwide Machine Tool markets.

In 2003, Macpower Group started Macpower CNC Machines Ltd., CNC Machines manufacturing unit in an area of around 4 acres situated at Metoda G.I.D.C., Rajkot (India). to successfully target the technology driven customers. Currently, company provides the wide gamut of products with its advanced CNC Machine Series. Name: EWM GmbH
Description:
Welding technology made in the Westerwald
In Germany’s Westerwald region lies a hidden champion – a worldwide leader in technology and quality: EWM GmbH is Germany’s largest and one of the most important manufacturers of arc welding technology worldwide. The family-run company from Mündersbach has been living its motto “We are welding” for over 60 years with forward-looking, well thought-out and sustainable complete solutions, designed with a large helping of passion for industrial clients, as well as skilled craft businesses. 

EWM develops high-end welding technology. The Westerwald-based company offers complete systems that cover everything from high-quality welding machines and all associated components, through welding torches, to welding consumables and accessories for manual and automated applications. EWM has made a name for itself worldwide thanks to its large sites in Germany, China and the Czech Republic. Users praise the products’ ease-of-operation and excellent results. Companies value the solid consultancy, service and enormous savings that come with EWM systems. The partially patented welding processes reduce the consumption of materials, energy and time, and produce up to 75 percent fewer welding emissions. 

The innovative welding manufacturer employs around 700 employees at 14 German and 7 international locations, and just under 400 of these are based at their original headquarters in Mündersbach. Here, highly qualified specialists are continually working on new, high-quality technologies. 

Legal Notice: https://www.ewm-group.com/en/legal-notice.html
Privacy Policy: www.ewm-group.com/en/privacy_policy/linkedin

Name: BAUER COMPRESSORS INC.
Description:
BAUER has been manufacturing high-pressure compressors for over 70 years. From our humble beginnings in the BAUER family home in Munich, Germany in 1946 to our current status as an industry leader, BAUER has earned its reputation as the world's foremost innovative designer and manufacturer of high-pressure compressors and purification systems.
 
Since its inception, BAUER has expanded internationally with offices in Italy, Japan, Hong Kong, Singapore, Austria, England, France, United Arab Emirates, Egypt, India and the United States. The U.S. facility, BAUER Compressors, Inc. of Norfolk, Virginia was founded in 1976. BAUER Norfolk has experienced continued growth in sales and has expanded to our present 115,000 square foot facility. BAUER Norfolk is headquarters for branch offices in Los Angeles, San Francisco and Detroit.

Name: MATACHANA
Description:
EXPERIENCE THAT IMPROVES LIVES

Over 50 years ago, Antonio Matachana started a business project with a clear objective: to offer a quality product and service. Over time, with the acquisition of knowledge and experience, constant investment in research and development as well as an on-going internationalization process, MATACHANA GROUP has established itself as a benchmark provider of technological solutions for the Healthcare and Life Science sectors.

This strong growth is and has been possible thanks to the participation of a team of experts; meticulous, eager, ambitious, creative and, above all, committed. From the first of the operators from our production site, to the heads of the international subsidiaries, through engineers, commercial agents, designers, administrators and technicians; all of us being a part of MATACHANA GROUP are aware that our project goes beyond the merely economic and business scopes. It has indeed a direct influence on the daily lives of many people around the world.

For all these reasons and more, we continue to better ourselves at every step, helping to improve lives for everyone.

The group's activity is developed in several areas: sterilization, washing and surgical units. Design, manufacture, marketing and representation of international brands and own technical service as a base support for its customers, enable to provide integral solutions. The presence of MATACHANA GROUP is extensive in Spain, with technical and sales offices covering the entire territory.

MATACHANA GROUP IS PRESENT IN MORE THAN 110 COUNTRIES ON THE FIVE CONTINENTS, ONE OF THE LEADING COMPANIES WORLDWIDE IN THE STERILIZATION AND INFECTION CONTROL FIELD.
We focus heavily on the application of new concepts and technologies to execute quality projects. A professional team of people is engaged in research, development, manufacturing, commercialization and after-sales service.

 MATACHANA: ensuring a sound experience.

Name: SMT GB
Description:
SMT is a leading full-service distribution company and after-sales partner, specialised in construction,  quarrying, material handling, demolition, and recycling equipment. At SMT, we put our customers at the center of everything we do and build long-lasting relationships to support their growth. We offer them integrated full-service solutions through selling and renting equipment, carrying out maintenance and repairs, and selling parts.

Active across 3 continents - in large parts of Africa, Great Britain, Belgium, Luxembourg, in the Netherlands, and in the United States (Texas and New Mexico), we partner with premium brands such as AGGPRO, Volvo Construction Equipment, and Dynapac road equipment. 

Established in Great Britain in 1967, the SMT GB dealership has an established reputation for market leading quality equipment and unrivalled customer support. Operating from eight Customer Support Centres throughout Great Britain, supplemented by strategically located home-based engineers, we are able to offer the level of support that you would expect from a global construction equipment distributor.

Name: Marel Fish
Description:
Marel is the leading global supplier of advanced standalone equipment and integrated systems to the fish industry.

With roots in the fish industry all the way back to the company’s origins developing onboard scales, Marel combines its extensive knowledge of fish processing with heavy investment in product development to create innovative equipment, systems, and software for processing whitefish and salmon, both farmed and wild, onboard and ashore.

At Marel, we can offer you a world of opportunities, allowing you to inspire, innovate and set global standards wherever you are. Learn more and apply now at https://jobs.marel.com/global/en

Name: Riwal
Description:
Riwal is now part of Boels Rental – one of Europe’s leading equipment rental companies. Together, we combine strength, expertise and ambition to serve our customers even better.

Riwal remains a leading specialist in safe and efficient work at height. With local offices in 16 countries across Europe, the Middle East and India, and a fleet of 20,000 aerial work platforms, forklifts and telehandlers, we’re one of the major global players in powered access.

Now as part of Boels Rental, we’re able to offer even broader support – with an expanded product range, stronger logistics and more service locations across Europe. We share the same drive: helping customers move forward through smart, reliable rental solutions.

Working at Riwal means being part of a dynamic, international organisation with over 2,000 employees – and now an even bigger network within Boels. Our culture is built on entrepreneurial spirit, pride, persistence and practical thinking. We value dedication, reward initiative, and offer great opportunities for personal growth.

What unites us is our focus on safety, integrity, teamwork and delivering the best customer experience – from site to boardroom. And above all, we do it together. Boels keeps you going

Name: Gruppo B&T
Description:
Gruppo B&T is a manufacturer of turnkey plants for the ceramic and agglomerated quartz industry worldwide with a widespread presence in all markets, providing excellent technological solutions and innovative services with particular focus to energy efficiency and respect for the environment. The Group guarantees to its customers a complete and customized service that includes technical assistance for the installation, maintenance and refurbishment of the manufacturing lines.
Gruppo B&T is involved in all phases of the ceramic manufacturing process through the work of its subsidiaries and affiliates, each specialized in a specifically targeted phase of the production process: 
o	SITI (premium thermal machines and presses)
o	ANCORA (complete lines for the surface finishing of ceramic products) 
o	PROJECTA (digital printing solutions)
o	DIGITAL DESIGN (design and graphic projects)
o	DIATEX and MEC ABRASIVES (cutting discs, tools and squaring) 
The Group's internal divisions represent a further level of product and service specialization through which the Holding aims to achieve targeted levels of excellence in specific segments:
o	B&T Quartz (complete lines for agglomerated quartz surfaces)
o	B&T White (complete systems for sanitaryware)
o	B&T Service (inter-company and inter-divisional customer service and technical assistance worldwide)
The Group has 23 companies, 17 of which have subsidiaries abroad in 12 different countries and on 4 continents. Every year Gruppo B&T invests 5% of its turnover in Research and Development, most of which is carried out in the modern bt-LAB in Formigine, home to the laboratories and the four pilot lines of the various technologies.
In addition, it provides customers with a complete and personalized technical service, from the design of the layout up to the realization of the turnkey plant, including maintenance and upgrading of existing production lines.

Name: Tranter
Description:
Tranter is a global engineering and manufacturing group specializing in thermal management in the process industries, district heating and within the building envelope. Tranter is strongly committed to expansion and leadership in all aspects of the plate heat exchanger business. Tranter strives to attain market leadership by applying a three-part philosophy: investing in R&D to maintain a competitive edge, providing customized products with a solution-driven approach and supporting its customers’ life-cycle investments through quality parts & service. Backed by almost 90 years of exclusive focus on heat transfer, Tranter has earned its reputation as “The Heat Transfer People.”

Significant manufacturing, research, design engineering and product development activities are based in the USA, Brazil, Sweden, China, India and Korea. These activities comprise a rich resource for applications engineering solutions by our geographical divisions. In addition, their mutual collaborations on product development ensure that geographical needs are addressed and resulting solutions are shared globally as appropriate.

Tranter is represented globally by a network of our own sales companies, licensees and agents. Our Service Centers specialize exclusively in plate heat exchangers, including refurbishment and supply of parts for all known brands in the market.

For more detailed information, please visit www.tranter.com
