We build things, we test things and we iterate systematically and methodically to reach solutions. Solutions which will impact the world. Solutions which will shape our country.

Name: Provisur Technologies Inc
Description:
Provisur’s legacy of industry-leading brands has manufactured innovative industrial food processing equipment for more than 50 years. Customers use our innovative solutions around the world. Our more than 350 global patents form part of an extensive portfolio of the industry’s most trusted, highest-performing brands. 

Provisur joined the Fortifi family of companies in December 2025. As part of Fortifi Food Processing Solutions, Provisur continues to transform the food processing industry with sustainable operational efficiency.

Headquartered in Mokena, Illinois, Provisur provides local support through a global network of sales and service locations. Like all Fortifi companies, we base many of our foremost innovations on what our customers need to enhance product taste and quality, increase throughput, and compete in new and evolving markets. We take the time to support our customers fully and invest in creating progressive solutions that meet their challenges.

Our goal is simple: push the boundaries of technology, application innovation and service to give our customers the most value possible.

We help our customers achieve high performance by offering a portfolio of leading equipment brands across applications, including AM2C,  Beehive, Cashin, Formax, Hoegger Lutetia, and Weiler. Our portfolio also includes our own proprietary technologies and a range of automation and customizing solutions. 

Our key solution areas:

•	Grinding, mixing, forming, coating, cooking, and freezing
•	Form pressing, slicing and sliced product handling 
•	Protein recovery separation technologies
•	Defrosting, marinating and cooking tumblers and chambers

To support our global customer base, Provisur has established factories, offices and service support centers in the USA, France, The Netherlands, Switzerland, Brazil, China, and Thailand.

Name: Wacker Neuson
Description: In close cooperation with our customers, we offer products and services that surpass their high standards and fulfill their diverse requirements, while enhancing their capabilities. The trust that our customers place in us is our motivation to deliver our best with a passion for true innovation and the highest quality. We strive to be a reliable partner, committed to helping our customers achieve success.

Name: Ali Group
Description:
Founded in 1963, the Ali Group is a global corporation headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, with its European corporate office located in Milan, Italy. Through its subsidiaries, the company designs, manufactures, markets and services a broad line of commercial and institutional foodservice equipment used by major restaurant and hotel chains, independent restaurants, hospitals, schools, airports, correctional institutions and canteens.

The Ali Group and its more than 110 global brands employ approximately 14,500 people in 29 countries and, in terms of sales, is the world’s largest group in this industry. It has 74 manufacturing facilities in 17 countries and sales and service subsidiaries throughout Europe, the Middle East, Africa, North America, South America, and Asia Pacific.

Name: SMS Equipment Inc.
Description:
SMS Equipment Inc. is the premier equipment solutions provider for the mining, construction, road construction, and forestry industries. Our world-class specialists work across more than 40 locations in Canada and Alaska, providing tailored equipment, support, parts and technology solutions that help our customers grow. We’re Partners in Your Possibilities, innovating and delivering cutting-edge programs with leading manufacturers that drive success for our customers. We’re a team committed to collaborative growth, making a meaningful impact through everything we do.
 
SMS Equipment partners with employees to transform jobs into careers. Do work that is productive and meaningful. Learn new skills. Explore diverse opportunities within our network. Sound right for you? Come join us!

------------------------------

Équipement SMS inc. est le principal fournisseur de solutions d'équipement pour les industries de l'exploitation minière, de la construction, de la construction routière et de la foresterie. Nos spécialistes de classe mondiale travaillent dans plus de 40 emplacements au Canada et en Alaska, fournissant de l'équipement sur mesure, du soutien, des pièces et des solutions technologiques qui aident nos clients à croître. Nous sommes des Partenaires de vos possibilités, innovant et offrant des programmes de pointe avec des fabricants de premier plan qui favorisent la réussite de nos clients. Nous sommes une équipe engagée dans une croissance collaborative, ayant un impact significatif à travers tout ce que nous faisons.
 
Équipement SMS s'associe à ses employés pour transformer les emplois en carrières. Effectuer un travail productif et utile. Acquérir de nouvelles compétences. Explorer diverses opportunités au sein de notre réseau. Si cela vous convient, rejoignez-nous!

Name: Alliance Laundry Systems LLC
Description:
At Alliance Laundry Systems, our family of brands offers solutions to a worldwide customer base through the delivery of premium quality laundry products and services. Our corporate focus of putting the customer first drives our commercial quality product development strategy, marketing programs, and technical support.

Our mission is to make the world cleaner and more sustainable as the premier provider of laundry solutions. We deliver leading performance through our exceptional team, unmatched quality and commitment to innovation.

Whether the buyer is a large-scale hotel looking for an on-premises laundry, a laundromat owner, or a family in need of a washer and dryer for their residence, we're dedicated to providing the most efficient, high quality solution.

Alliance Laundry Systems manufactures products under the well known brand names of Speed Queen, UniMac, Primus, Huebsch, and IPSO.  Our brands are supported by an extensive network of distributors and route operators throughout the world.

Name: Hitachi Industrial Equipment Systems Co., Ltd.
Description: Hitachi Industrial Equipment Systems enhances productivity across various industries — including data centers, batteries, electronics and semiconductors and pharmaceuticals — through high-efficiency products such as compressed air systems, grid edge solutions, drives and coding and marking equipment. Our innovative solutions and services integrate digital technology to drive customer success and contribute to a more sustainable society. We support customers throughout the entire product lifecycle, from maintenance to recycling.

Name: The Middleby Corporation
Description:
The Middleby Corporation is a world leader in commercial and residential kitchen equipment and industrial food processing and bakery systems. With manufacturing facilities and sales offices worldwide, Middleby can deliver solutions and innovations to all customers regardless of location.

The Commercial Cooking Equipment segment of Middleby is a partner with top global chains and well-known chefs. Products in commercial foodservice in the commercial kitchen include fryers, bakery ovens, ranges, steam equipt., speed cooking, induction, blast chilling, combi ovens, grills, mixers, warmers, slicers, micro green cabinets, clam shell grills, panini makers among many other products. Products in Middleby beverage offerings include single serve and nitro brew coffee along with chewblet ice, blended drinks, soft serve solutions for liquor and soda dispense.

In Middleby Residential the company offers leading premium brands including Viking, Lynx, Aga, La Corune, U-Line and Marvel among others. Products include ranges, speed cook ovens, refrigerators, cooktops, and outdoor equipment. The company has two residential showcase showrooms in New York City and Chicago.

The Food Processing and Industrial Bakery Equipment group makes systems for large processing and bakery operations.

Middleby is proud of its continued innovation, heritage and employees, with many of our well-known brands being more than 100 years in business.

www.middleby.com

Name: Bizerba
Description:
Bizerba is one of the world's leading suppliers of precision products and integrated solutions for slicing, processing, weighing, testing, order picking, labeling and payment. As an innovative company, the Bizerba Group is continuously driving forward the digitalization, automation and networking of its products and services.  

In this way, Bizerba offers its customers from trade, commerce, industry and logistics greater added value with complete state-of-the-art solutions. From hardware to software, apps, and cloud solutions, all complemented by the appropriate labels or consumables, Bizerba adheres to the motto 'unique solutions for unique people'.  

Bizerba was founded in 1866 in Balingen / Baden-Württemberg and is today one of the top players in 120 countries with its solutions portfolio. The family-run company, now in its fifth generation, employs around 4,500 people worldwide and has production facilities in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, France, Italy, Spain, Serbia, UK, China, Canada and the USA. In addition, the group of companies maintains a worldwide network of sales and service locations.

Name: Escorts Kubota Ltd. - Construction Equipment
Description:
Escorts Kubota Limited - Construction Equipment Business, is a pioneering name in the construction industry. Formerly, Escorts Construction Equipment Limited, we have more than five decades of experience and have established ourselves as a trusted partner for all the construction equipment needs. Our commitment to innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction sets us apart.
Our operations started in 1971 & post that we have done multiple global collaborations to bring the best of technology in India. We have a state-of-the-art manufacturing and assembly facility covering 25 acres. Its capabilities and processes include fabrication shop, shot blast & paint facilities, and stores, along with dedicated assembly lines which altogether have a capacity of 14,000 units per annum.

We specialize in providing top-of-the-line machinery and solutions for a wide range of construction projects. From Backhoe loaders to Cranes & Compactors, our diverse fleet of equipment is designed to meet the demands of modern construction.

Name: Kobelco Construction Machinery USA, Inc.
Description:
KOBELCO has long been known for its quality line of excavators and dedication to the research and development, manufacturing, and marketing of a full range of crawler excavators.

KOBELCO offers industry-leading crawler excavators in the 3,000 lb. to 185,000 lb. classes including zero tail swing, compact, standard, long reach, high and wide undercarriages, mass excavation, auto recycling, and demolition models.
  
KOBELCO excavators are well known for their advanced technologies, including an innovative noise and dust reduction system, advanced hydraulic circuitry for reduction of pressure loss, and for superior fuel efficiency.

Globally we are known as the excavator perfectionist!

Name: Lincoln Electric EMEA
Description:
Lincoln Electric is the world leader in the engineering, design, and manufacturing of advanced arc welding solutions, automated joining, assembly and cutting systems, plasma and oxy-fuel cutting equipment, and has a leading global position in brazing and soldering alloys. Lincoln is recognized as the Welding Expert for its leading materials science, software development, automation engineering, and application expertise, which advance customers’ fabrication capabilities to help them build a better world. 

Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, Lincoln operates 71 manufacturing and automation system integration locations across 20 countries and maintains a worldwide network of distributors and sales offices serving customers in over 160 countries. 

For more information about Lincoln Electric and its products and services, visit the Company’s website at https://www.lincolnelectric.com/en-GB.

Name: Galadari Trucks & Heavy Equipment
Description:
Galadari Trucks & Heavy equipment is a flagship subsidiary of Galadari Brothers, and the market leader in providing heavy earthmoving, construction, power systems and materials handling equipment for over 40 years in the United Arab emirates. Focusing our efforts on being solutions provider, GTHE has built a reputation for outstanding service & aftersales support. Continually innovating and thinking forward, GTHE has established an exclusive range of world leading support technologies, each being the most highly regarded within its respective industry.

These supporting solutions include products and services related to the Health & Safety, Environmental, productivity and efficiency of our industry. Each is backed by a professional and highly trained team who are knowledgeable in their respective field and closely supported by the OEM.

Name: WEIMA Maschinenbau GmbH
Description:
The WEIMA Group has been building shredding machines for a wide range of applications with customers in the plastic, wood and recycling industry from all over the world for over 40 years. The WEIMA Group has about 300 employees around the world with sales locations in Europe, North and South America and Asia. The production range includes single-shaft shredders, four-shaft shredders, cutting mills, briquette presses, draining presses and systems including accessories.

Disclaimer: https://weima.com/en/disclaimer

Name: SACMI Packaging & Chocolate S.p.A.
Description:
Sacmi Packaging & Chocolate is a company able to provide complete turnkey solutions for the chocolate world, from the chocolate processing until the end-of-line packaging and to serve several applications as confectionary, bakery, other foods, cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries with wrapping and packaging solutions.
SACMI Packaging & Chocolate, part of SACMI IMOLA group, promotes and markets the historical brands which have made history in the Italian chocolate and packaging industry: Carle&Montanari and OPM.

Specifically, Carle & Montanari is to operate the Process & Moulding and the Wrapping business units.

OPM is to operate the Primary & Secondary Packaging business units.

Name: Soilmec
Description:
Soilmec was established in 1969 and today it is one of the major companies in the field of design, production and sale/marketing of equipment and rigs for drilling and foundation works. It counts on a wide range of products, among the most complete in the world, so that it can cover any requirements of works and sites. Bridges, viaducts, electric power plants, dams, ports, motorways, metro and railways, geothermie and small diameter drilling…. Soilmec can satisfy any request and need, also the most complex and articulated ones. This is the result of a widespread and rooted company culture which has always focused on the customer and relevant requirements as the real centre of all its activities, according to a true idea of partnership. 
Soilmec belongs to the Trevi Group, which is among the main leaders worldwide in the field of special foundations. And it is also thanks to the synergy and the interaction among engineering and experience on the field that the rigs produced by Soilmec are available on the market after an accurate and concrete site testing phase, hence capable of supplying successful and reliable performances, also in case of innovative technologies. Innovation as growth’s engine. 
In few words, this is the cultural approach which has always characterized the whole Soilmec activity since its very beginning. Innovation of process, market, communication... but especially of product, in order to supply the client with more and more technologies which are always updated and advanced as for performances, quality, reliability and safety. 
The real pulsing core of Soilmec is just the Research & Development Centre, mechanical engineers and designers who are wholly dedicated to the neverceasing development of new technologies and solutions that are client-targeted. 
Soilmec is active in over 70 countries, with a network of subsidiaries, agents and dealers who guarantee the clients a continuous technical and financial support as well as an after-sale service.

Name: IDEX India
Description:
About Us :
IDEX Corporation was founded in 1988 and has since been a global leader in applied solutions. Specializing in fluid and metering technologies, health and science technologies, fire and safety, and other diversified products in high growth markets, the company stands for Innovation, Diversity and Excellence! IDEX trades under the abbreviation “IEX” on the New York Stock Exchange and Chicago Stock Exchange. Headquartered in Northbrook, IL, USA, our operating facilities are spread across five continents with more than 6,800 dedicated employees worldwide.

We are best known for our expertise in highly engineered fluidics systems and components, as well for our expertise in fire and safety products, including the Jaws of Life family of rescue and recovery tools.

Our products touch lives every day. Whether it’s a life-saving rescue operation, dispensing fresh juice to a first grader or fuelling aircraft, IDEX is a leader in creating enabling technology used in many of the most common everyday activities.

IDEX India, a 100% subsidiary of IDEX Corp offers highly engineered industrial products and technologies such as industrial pumps & valves, compressors, firefighting tools and rescue equipment, milling equipment, dispensers, flow meters, spare parts, services and accessories in India.

Our corporate office is at Mumbai, India and our world class facility spans across 1,50,000 sq ft area @ Savli in Vadodara, India.

Name: Access Hire Middle East LLC
Description: Access Hire Middle East is a division of Access Group boasting a fleet of privately owned Elevated Working Platforms (EWP), material lifts and plant equipment.  We facilitate the hiring, selling, servicing and transporting of market leading brands in some of the world’s most remote locations, including across the Middle East region.

Name: Advansor
Description:
Our climate solutions combine cooling, freezing, air-conditioning, and heating into one system to reduce the use of fossil fuels for heating, boost energy savings, and lower the total cost of ownership. 

We use CO2 in our cooling and heating systems to fight global warming and made our vision a reality: We design and produce the world’s best sustainable CO2 climate solutions. 
 
Many people associate CO2 with global warming. We’re cool with that. Literally. Because CO2 is the most climate-friendly refrigerant:

•	It doesn't contribute to global warming
•	It doesn't affect the ozone layer
•	It’s non-toxic
•	It´s non-flammable
•	It doesn't harm our drinking water
•	It’s very energy efficient 

We have always focused exclusively on CO2, and we will continue to do so in the future and for our future. 

Today, as a market-leading manufacturer, we have delivered more than 20,000 CO2 systems for commercial and industrial cooling, freezing, air-conditioning, and heating around the world.

We manufacture our own systems in Denmark, where our unique hallmark is close collaboration between design and production. We have an international set-up for servicing our customers in 10 languages.

Our driving forces are technology, knowledge, sustainability, and a desire to win – both as a team and in close, honest partnership with our customers and suppliers. 


Please read our privacy policy:
https://www.advansor.com/privacy-policy

Name: BLM GROUP
Description:
BLM GROUP is a global partner for metal processing: whether it's disc cutting or laser cutting, tube bending and forming, or robotic laser welding, we offer our customers cutting-edge solutions for every production environment.
At the core of this wide range of solutions are specialized industrial entities (BLM, Adige, Adige-sys, BGS), each with a high level of expertise and professionalism developed over more than 60 years of dedication and technological innovation.
With over 1,000 employees, BLM GROUP is proud to represent "Made in Italy" around the world, thanks to its international offices and its partnership with Hypertherm.

Worldwide, the selection process is managed directly by the Recruiting team in collaboration with department managers, ensuring a successful outcome for both the Group and the candidates.
The innovative drive behind our products is reflected in the continuous training we offer to all our employees—tailored to individual needs and guided by Group-wide principles. Every company member is encouraged and trained to perform their tasks with a clear understanding of the impact their contribution makes.

We are BLM GROUP: https://youtu.be/EpiQjS1Y2PI

Name: ANCA CNC Machines
Description:
Do you want a chance to shape the future of technology? Are you interested in working with people from all over the globe? Does a challenging workplace and not sticking to the status quo motivate you? If these three things sound interesting -  ANCA is the place for you. 

Working at ANCA is an opportunity to be part of a truly global team. Our thriving culture of innovation delivers a competitive advantage and we are extremely proud of our market leading position. Operating in over twelve countries and with customers in over fifty other countries our products touch almost everything you touch in your daily life. From smart phones to the car you drive to space exploration, ANCA is helping solve every day problems to extraordinary challenges.

Name: Iguaçu Máquinas Agrícolas
Description:
Concessionário oficial John Deere e Wirtgen.
Excelência em soluções para Agricultura, Construção, Pavimentação, Mineração e Florestal.
Presente nas regiões de GO, MT, MS e DF.
Paixão em servir

Name: JBT Marel Poultry
Description:
JBT Marel Poultry is the leading global provider of integrated poultry processing systems, services, and software. Guided by a strong commitment to sustainability and close collaboration with our customers, we develop innovative solutions that move the industry forward. We partner with poultry processors worldwide, driven by a shared ambition to transform the future of food and help businesses stay ahead in a rapidly evolving market.

By combining advanced technology, deep industry knowledge, and a holistic approach, we deliver custom end-to-end solutions that address your most pressing challenges and support your most ambitious goals. Our state-of-the-art innovative systems—global in scale, local in approach—provide exactly the right levels of automation, robotization and digitization for every poultry processing operation. We enable our customers to increase yield, throughput and profitability, while safeguarding animal well-being, food safety and sustainability. For each process stage, from live bird supply to packing and labeling, and at capacities ranging from 1,000 to 15,000 bph, our made-to-measure concepts help poultry processors of all sizes, in all markets, to operate at peak productivity.

With a global team of highly skilled professionals operating in nearly every country, JBT Marel offers unmatched expertise and service excellence, ensuring you receive precisely the poultry processing solutions your operations demand.

Name: ANDRITZ Metals
Description:
We are one of the leading global suppliers of complete lines for the production and processing of cold-rolled strip made of carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and other non-ferrous metals. The lines comprise equipment for pickling, cold rolling, annealing and heat treatment, surface finishing, strip coating and finishing, punching and deep drawing, and regeneration of pickling acids.

We also supply turnkey furnace systems for the steel, copper, and aluminum industries, burners and refractory products, welding systems, as well as comprehensive services for the metal working industry.

In addition, we are the technology and global market leader in forming equipment through the Schuler Group.

Name: Empire Cat
Description:
MORE THAN GREAT MACHINES

Empire Southwest is a top authorized Caterpillar dealer for heavy equipment and power generation throughout Arizona, Nevada, and Southeastern California.  In addition, Empire is a provider of commercial SunPower solar products and an authorized dealer for agriculture equipment from AGCO, Challenger, Massey Ferguson and other leading manufacturers. 

The third-generation, family owned company was founded in 1950 and has over 2,000 employees across 22 locations. Empire’s affiliate companies include Empire Truck & Trailer, Empire Renewable Energy, SITECH Southwest, and Take-off Professionals (TOPS.)

Empire is committed to treating our clients, employees, and everyone we deal with in a fair and ethical manner. That commitment is reflected in the Empire Values — the cornerstone for every decision made on behalf of the company.

Learn more about Empire's complete portfolio of products, services, and partnerships at www.empirecat.com.

Name: LEITNER
Description: LEITNER – one of the world’s leading developers and producers of ropeways – has always relied on its unique strengths that customers around the world appreciate: Premium development quality meets peerless design and outstanding comfort, safety and reliability standards. The company focuses in particular on the perfect overall package, developed in-house and tailored to the customer’s specific requirements: from the drive system and control technologies right up to the cabins and station buildings. Besides being used for winter sports, demand for this expertise is also growing strongly in cities and the tourism sector.

Name: ACMI
Description:
ACMI is an Italian manufacturer of high technology and high flexibility bottling and packaging lines. 

ACMI is organized with three business units highly specialized in the production of all the machines that make up the bottling line: ACMI Blowing & Filling, ACMI Labelling Solutions and ACMI Packaging Systems.

Thanks to its 100% Italian technology, its flexibility and tailor-made solutions, ACMI is the ideal partner for the large multinational groups along with the national bottlers and food companies.

Since June 2024 ACMI has been part of the Omnia Technologies Group and is now able to supply complete systems to the beverage industry, from processing to packaging.

Name: ProMach
Description:
ProMach is a family of best-in-class packaging and processing solution brands serving manufacturers of all sizes and geographies in the food, beverage, pharmaceutical, personal care, and household and industrial goods industries. ProMach brands operate across the entire production line: filling, bottling and capping, decorative labeling, flexibles and trays, pharma, handling and sterilizing, labeling and coding, and robotics and end of line. ProMach also provides systems and integration including turnkey solutions, design/build, engineering services, and productivity software to optimize production line design and deliver maximum uptime.

ProMach designs, manufactures, integrates, and supports the most sophisticated and advanced packaging and processing solutions in the global marketplace. Its diverse customer base, from Fortune 500 companies to smaller, privately-held businesses worldwide, depends on reliable, flexible, technologically advanced equipment and integrated solutions. ProMach is headquartered near Cincinnati, Ohio, with manufacturing facilities and offices throughout North America, Europe, South America, and Asia. For more information about ProMach, visit www.ProMachBuilt.com and for more information on ProMach Careers, visit www.ProMachCareers.com.

Name: Arabian Machinery & Heavy Equipment Co.
Description:
ARABIAN MACHINERY & HEAVY EQUIPMENT CO. (AMHEC) is working in the field of Crane Hiring, Heavy lifting, Transportation and Heavy Equipment Rental Services. Established in 2007 based in Al Khobar, K.S.A
 
We are highly specialized in supply of Mobile Cranes with various capacities ranging from 50 Ton to 500 Ton, Heavy &Transport Equipment like Low bed & Flatbed Trailers, Trucks head, Wheel Loaders,  Forklifts,  Man lifts, Tele-handlers. Air Compressors, Welding Machines, Power Generators, and Tower Lights etc., to suit the customer’s needs.

Our manpower consists of qualified crane operators, trailer drivers, heavy equipment operators and riggers. All our operators & drivers are highly trained, qualified and certified by Saudi ARAMCO. 

Since through our service, we have been involved in the development of Petrochemical Industries, Rig Operations and other Infrastructure developments as we contribute to the growth of the Kingdom. We continue to incorporate new ideas and modernization efforts, whilst drawing simultaneously on the experience. Industry knowledge and customer loyalty build up over the years.

AMHEC stands in the market active and have a buildup reputation with rich management experience & highly trained and experienced professionals endeavors to serve and satisfy our customers to the optimal and achieve par excellence through quality service. Quality & Commitment is our continuous aim to be recognized by our clients as the most reliable equipment rental partner.

AMHEC, We Partner You To Success...

Name: Neemba Guinée
Description:
Avec la naissance de notre nouvelle marque Atiko, nous avons fait le choix de la cohésion. Désormais nos équipes et nos expertises pluridisciplinaires sont rassemblées dans une entreprise unique. Cette mutualisation des compétences nous apporte solidité et confiance pour les années à venir.

La force Neemb Guinée et de ses 130 collaborateurs ce sont ses valeurs et son histoire. Présents en Guinée depuis 70 ans, nous avons su nous adapter dans un pays en pleine mutation. Aujourd’hui, à travers ce nouveau nom, nous prouvons notre capacité à nous réinventer pour répondre aux demandes de nos clients et du marché.

Name: RENK Group
Description:
RENK. We are the world’s leading specialists for pioneering solutions to control extreme forces throughout the drive train: In industrial applications, during energy production, in demanding naval applications, and tracked vehicles.
The result is innovative products and solutions that set standards when it comes to quality, precision, and reliability and represent the cutting edge of technology on the global market.

www.renk.com/en/data-protection/

Name: OCME
Description:
Founded in 1954, OCME is among the most reliable and innovative leaders in automated packaging machinery and solutions. OCME's productions are designed and manufactured in the Packaging Valley, the land par excellence of the world's most famous packaging machines.

The Parma-based company's wide and deep experience in the beverage sector meets all customer needs in terms of quality, advanced technology and flexibility. Whatever the container to be filled - PET bottles, glass bottles, Tetra bricks or cans - OCME is able to find the right solution through a team of engineers who develop tailor-made solutions with the customer, with a view to energy saving, system safety and efficiency.

Since 2018, the company has become part of Aetna Group, an end-of-line packaging giant with production facilities in Italy, the United States, Brazil, China and Germany.

The Group is also active with 12 subsidiaries in major business areas, employs more than 2,000 people, including more than 280 technicians engaged in after-sales service, and has a 24/7 service network. It has a turnover of more than 400 million euros and invests more than 7 percent annually in R&D

Name: Tornos Group
Description:
Headquartered in Moutier, Switzerland, Tornos Group is a global leader in the development, production and distribution of Swiss-type automatic lathes and multispindle machines. With a legacy of more than 125 years, Tornos is a pioneer of Swiss-type lathe technology. Tornos manufactures computer numerically controlled (CNC) Swiss-type (sliding headstock) turning machines, multispindle machines with numerical or cam control and micro-milling machines. Through a global sales and service network—and with a focus on dialogue with customers as well as consistently high quality worldwide—Tornos delivers unique solutions and service to customers in dedicated market segments such as Automotive, Medical and Dental technology, Micromechanics, and Electronics.
 
With a presence in more than 80 countries around the world, Tornos looks for talented people to grow the business, develop products, and contribute to its unique team culture. Customers are at the heart of every Tornos undertaking, so it’s only natural that working at Tornos requires a 100 percent commitment to customers and their satisfaction. As the foundation of our customers’ satisfaction and success, our employees are our most valuable asset. That’s why we emphasize the importance of work/life balance and strive to develop our employees and accelerate their careers. By investing in our employees and supporting them in living Tornos core values, we continue to build up team Tornos as a real asset to our customers.

Get in touch today to talk with us about the value you can bring to Tornos and its customers—and the value we can add to your career.

Name: Hurco Companies, Inc.
Description:
Your expertise combined with our technology to produce quality parts more proﬁtably—that’s mind over metal. 
That’s Hurco.

Hurco Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ:  HURC) is an industrial technology company that designs and produces interactive computer controls, software and computerized machine tools for the worldwide metal cutting and metal forming industry. The end market for the Company's products consists primarily of independent job shops and short-run manufacturing operations within large corporations in industries such as aerospace, defense, medical equipment, energy, transportation and computer equipment. The Company is based in Indianapolis, Indiana, with manufacturing operations in Taiwan and China, and sells its products through direct and indirect sales forces throughout North America, Europe, and Asia. The company has sales, application engineering support and service subsidiaries in Canada, China, England, France, Germany, India, Italy, Poland, Singapore, South Africa, and the United States of America.

Name: Angelini Technologies - FAMECCANICA
Description:
Angelini Technologies is the dedicated industrial technologies division of Angelini Industries, an Italian multi-business group with a solid presence in several sectors and a portfolio of market-leading brands. 

Its mission is to bring together an ecosystem of excellences dedicated to the design, development and implementation of technologies, products and services aimed at improving industrial processes and production.

Angelini Technologies’ main company is Fameccanica, an International Group specializing in Automation and Robotics for the consumer goods industry. 
Since its establishment in 1975, Fameccanica has been able to innovate in the field of industrial technology by developing cutting-edge solutions with high productivity and digital services. 

Today, as a leading player in the Factory Automation field, Fameccanica designs and develops technologies, robotics, and services for the industrial production of FMCG products, sustainable packaging, automated handling and recognition for logistics, and digital services dedicated to process optimization, with a constant focus on sustainability and innovation.

Name: SENNEBOGEN
Description:
SENNEBOGEN anchored worldwide as a leading innovator and manufacturer of material handlers and has achieved a leading position in crane technology.

As an international company, SENNEBOGEN develops and produces complete model ranges for duty cycle cranes, crawler-, telescopic- and harbour cranes, material handling machines, telehandlers as well as electric excavators. The largest mobile material handler in the world is produced by SENNEBOGEN. In addition to flexible machines from series production, SENNEBOGEN also designs individual specialized machines in close collaboration with its clients. 

SENNEBOGEN remains a family run company for over 70 years. The history of the company shows that, since it was founded in 1952, the development of the family-run organization has been based on new ideas, continuity and consistent globalization. At the same time, the SENNEBOGEN name also stands for long-term stability and profitable, organic growth.

Production takes place in plants in Bavaria and in Hungary. The final assembly of the machines is completed to the highest quality and made only in German sites in Straubing and Wackersdorf. The company also has partnerships in key regions such as the USA and Singapore.

SENNEBOGEN guarantees with more than 120 international sales partners and with over 300 service support centers worldwide presence.

More info about career possibilities can be found online: www.sennebogen.com/en/careers

Imprint: www.sennebogen.com/en/imprint

Data protection: www.sennebogen.com/en/privacy

Name: AAON, Inc.
Description: Driving the industry forward through the design, manufacturing, and rigorous testing of premium HVAC equipment. We provide highly configurable solutions to meet customer-specific needs in commercial and industrial environments.

Name: Elgin Fastener Group, Now MW Components
Description:
Now part of MW Components, EFG is North America’s leading provider of system-critical engineered fastening solutions serving blue-chip wholesalers, distributors, and original equipment manufacturers.

In September 2023 Elgin Fastener Group and all its locations were acquired by MW Components. All Elgin Fastener products, services, and facilities are now available via MW Components and our website, mwcomponents.com.

Over a decade ago, Elgin Fastener Group was formed with your best interests at heart. With a total of 7 domestic fastener manufacturing locations in the United States, aligned with one common goal – to simplify your ordering process and grow your business – EFG is now the largest single-source supplier of specialty fasteners in the nation.

EFG has a deep team of experts to help you overcome any fastening challenge. With an extensive range of materials, automated machinery, and deeply disciplined processes, we can make your parts right the first time. Our dedicated team of Sales and Service professionals ensures that you get the products you need when you need them exactly as you wanted. This means your search for the right fastener right now can begin with one click or phone call – without the need to cross borders and overcome barriers. And by contracting domestically, you not only simplify your ordering process, but save on the total cost of production, too.

Name: ITM LATIN AMERICA
Description:
A ITM, instalada no Brasil desde 1952, possui ampla rede de distribuidores em todos países da América Latina e equipe própria de profissionais qualificados para prestar suporte comercial e técnico aos seus clientes.

Possui manufatura própria de material rodante para máquinas e sistemas de movimentação com aplicação em construção, mineração, agricultura e florestal.

Nossa linha de produtos cobre diversos modelos de máquinas, como tratores de esteira, escavadeiras, perfuratrizes, colhedoras de cana, etc. Somos líder global com soluções inovadoras para todas as necessidades do mercado com produtos originais de qualidade.

Confira nossa Política de privacidade: https://itm.mangha.com.br/lgpd/

Name: PCM
Description:
PCM was founded in 1932 by René Moineau, the inventor of the Progressing Cavity Pump (PCP). PCM Group is today a world leading supplier of solutions and fluid handling equipment for the Energies, Food, Personal care and Pharmaceutical and Industry. Our specialty is developing pumping solutions for the transfer and dosing of abrasive, fragile, viscous, corrosive, hot and heavy products.

Present around the world, PCM provides a wide range of products including transfer, dosing, mixing and filling systems, progressing cavity pumps, peristaltic pumps for the Food and Industry markets as well as artificial lift and surface transfer pumps for the Oil & Gas sector.

PCM services include engineering, commissioning, maintenance, co-development, consulting, training, spare parts, repairing and upgrading.

PCM, whose headquarters is based in Levallois-Perret (France) operates on all continents in more than 90 countries through 6 industrial manufacturing sites, and more than 20 subsidiaries. The international development of the Group is constantly pursuing.

The core of our business is the satisfaction of our customers, the health and the safety of our employees and the sustainability of the natural environments where we operate. Our ambition is to attain the highest level of quality within the Oil & Gas and Food & Industry markets and for all our products and services.

Name: New Holland CE - CNH - Fiat Industrial
Bakheet Machinery  بخيــت المعـدات
Description:
Since its inception in 1974, Bakheet Machinery has been dedicated to providing only the highest quality earth moving, road, concrete, crane, and light equipment  to our valued customers.

We began as a smaller operation over 50 years ago in the Madinah, KSA and have sense grown to employee over 200 people and now have full service operations spread across The Kingdom. These include Riyadh, Abha, Madinah, and our two newest, state of the art, facilities in Jeddah, and Dammam. Beyond these full service centers we have also opened 6 additional stores solely devoted to providing spare parts.


our growth and business achievements have been surprising but not to those that have been associated with us. From the beginning we have focused not simply on making a profit but on the building of long term, mutually beneficial, relationships with both our suppliers and our clients.

This attention to ethical business practices has enabled us to come to represent some of the biggest names in the construction machinery industry (SCHWING, KOBELCO, Wirtgen, VÖGELE, Hamm, Kleeman, Link-Belt, O.Cuoghi, Kaeser, Weber & Stahlwillie, etc.) while still maintaining our core mission of being a benefit to both the development of our beloved kingdom and our individual customers.


Bakheet has always strived to follow a customer-focused approach and with your help we will achieve our goal of being the recognized leader of Construction Equipment Dealer in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

We will remain dedicated to providing you with cost effective solutions to meet your needs; the companies we represent with a contentious face in our country and our company as the business standard that others will wish to emulate.  

Bakheet has a vast experience helping its Kingdom wide customers with optimized solutions for their business needs and wants which makes Bakheet a reliable and trusted name in the Saudi market.

Name: ETA Technology Pvt. Ltd.
Description: ETA Technology is a Machine Tool Manufacturer based out of India with a customer base across 20+ countries. We design and manufacture high end friction welding machines, advanced simulation & testing machines, special purpose machines, Electrical Upsetters (Metal Gathering) and machines for Engine Valve industry.

Name: Marispan
Description:
Our Company
We are synonymous with progress in the field. We walk alongside the rural producer to provide the best solutions, regardless of the size of the property. What motivates us is seeing our customers satisfied and helping them increase the yield of their businesses.

The Founder's Story
Paulo Augusto do Nascimento, born in Batatais-SP and the son of farmers, always had a dream: to develop improvements for work in the field. Graduated from the Technical School of Aviation of the Brazilian Air Force (FAB), he decided to use his knowledge in aeronautical technology to make the dream a reality.

A Dream Called Marispan
This story began in 1972 with the creation of Marispan in his hometown. Initially, the goal was to assist farmers in combating soil erosion through technology.

One of the first implements in Brazil for contour farming was born there. However, as Batatais is in a region with a coffee tradition, Marispan soon started developing a weeder that mechanized coffee plantation operations.

A New Marispan
Continuous improvement made Marispan a specialist in coffee crop fertilizer spreaders and front loaders for agricultural tractors, becoming present throughout the national territory.

Marispan offers a wide range of products and accessories, serving both small properties and those with a high volume of activities.

Mission: To develop solutions and manufacture agricultural implements to increase productivity in the field.

Vision: To be a nationally recognized company for providing the best solutions for agribusiness.

Values: Ethics. Safety and Development for People. Continuous Evolution with Excellence and Quality. Customer Focus.

Name: JASO Industrial Cranes
Description:
JASO Industrial Cranes is the JASO Group´s Company dedicated to design, manufacture, erection and after sales service of industrial cranes, especially EOT (Electric Overhead Travelling) Cranes and Gantry Cranes.
More than 350 people and 33.500 m2 of production surface worldwide. 6 production facilities in Spain (Itsasondo-Gipuzkoa and Palencia), Mexico, Argentina and India. 
More than 50.000 units supplied in more than 50 countries across 5 continents since 1965.

Name: Crane Certification Association of America-The Future of Crane Safety
Description:
The purpose of the Association is to promote crane safety, improve the certification profession and address the subject of crane safety in governmental forums.

In fulfilling its purposes, the Association shall have the following objectives:

    To develop and/or promote educational information for increasing the knowledge and capabilities of the membership.
    To develop and/or disseminate information and materials that will carry out the purposes of the Association and serve the public.
    To provide and/or support forums for the interchange and acquisition of professional knowledge among its members.
    To foster liaison with governmental agencies that implement such other programs and projects that are consisted with the purpose of the Association.
    To conduct its affairs in a manner that will reflect the standards, purposes and objectives of the Association.
    Provide testing for practicing crane surveyors.
    Provide a professional designation to all members who successfully pass the Certified Crane Surveyors (CCS) test.

Name: Kernium S.A.
Description:
Kernium S.A. was founded in July 2010 with the goal of becoming a Total Solution Supplier in the field of intralogistics.

Industrial trucks and solutions for stacking, transporting, storing and order picking
- Exclusive representative of Jungheinrich from Germany. One of the most important and recognized industrial trucks manufacturers in the world.
- Own brand UNIONBull
Location: Don Torcuato, Provincia de Buenos Aires

Name: International Equipment Solutions
Description:
International Equipment Solutions, LLC is a global engineered equipment company that focuses our extensive resources on supporting our customers with strong value propositions and outstanding customer service across domestic and international markets. We focus on long-term global growth strategies that generate and promote future success and stability
International Equipment Solutions, LLC (IES) was formed in September 2011 through the support of KPS Capital Partners, LP (KPS). Our companies employ more than 2,800 people and operate 18 manufacturing facilities throughout North America and other parts of the world. Our customers include major OEMs, national rental and retail fleet companies and hundreds of OEM-aligned and independent dealers serving a wide range of global markets. IES also focuses on direct sales to highly specialized customers.
 
IES is backed by strong leadership and a collective pool of highly experienced and successful management teams at each of our operating businesses. We achieve global expansion both organically and through acquisition. Contact us to explore how we may work together to achieve your goals.

Name: EB Bombas
Description: Há mais de 35 anos no mercado, a empresa EB BOMBAS E EQUIPAMENTOS, trabalha com fabricação de bombas, sobressalentes, serviços de manutenção em bombas centrífugas e equipamentos rotativos em geral. Desenvolvemos engenharia e projetos especiais de equipamentos, sobressalentes e reformas.

Name: Finlay
Description: Finlay have been manufacturing a comprehensive range of tracked mobile crushing, screening and recycling equipment for 60 years. Terex Finlay are global pioneers in tracked mobile solutions and offer a comprehensive range of equipment to the quarrying, mining, construction, demolition and recycling industries. Our range of innovative machines are manufactured to provide efficient production, low operational costs and ease of maintenance.

Name: Regal Rexnord Brasil
Description:
A Rexnord mantém a indústria em movimento com um amplo portfólio de produtos, incluindo #redutores de velocidade, #rolamentos, #acoplamentos, #correntes industriais, #limitadores de torque e uma ampla gama de #componentes para transporte de materiais e transmissão de potência #Flattop. Os produtos e serviços da Rexnord aumentam a confiabilidade dos equipamentos usados em todo o mundo, apoiando setores como transporte, cimento e agregados, mineração, energia, papel e celulose, alimentos e bebidas. Nossa experiência e foco no atendimento ao cliente garantem que você tenha a solução certa na hora certa.

Estamos comprometidos e fundamentados com nossos valores sempre colocando nossos clientes em primeiro lugar, com integridade em tudo o que fazemos, engajamento total dos nossos colaboradores, melhoria contínua e uma cultura de vencer.

Nosso objetivo é criar valor para nossos clientes, acionistas e colaboradores de forma consistente e sustentável.
Location: São Leopoldo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Handtmann Inc.
Description:
Handtmann is a leading global technology solutions provider to the food processing industry that specializes in best-in-class portioning, dividing, depositing, forming and filling equipment for meat, bakery, dairy and pet food processors. Handtmann solutions provide practical value with innovative design, the strictest manufacturing standards and rugged processing technology known for operational accuracy, safety and reliability.  

 

Handtmann, Inc., serving the United States food processing industry since 1990, is a wholly-owned independent sales and service subsidiary of the Handtmann Group, a family owned business established and headquartered in Biberach, Germany since 1873.

Name: Amada (India) Private Limited
Description: Amada India mainly focuses on the sheet metal fabrication machine business and offers a wide range of products specializing in cutting, bending and joining, such as laser machines, bending machines, punch/laser combination machines and welding machines.

Name: TESYA Group
Description:
TESYA Group is an international family of 28 companies and over 4,000 people, united by strong values, a shared vision, and a spirit of local entrepreneurship across 15 European countries. Our brands include Alayan, Alax Automation, Alfaproject.net, CGT, CGT Trucks, CLS, Degro Solutions, Finanzauto, Sitech, STET, Teknoxgroup and Xiber.

We work side by side with our customers to understand their needs and deliver innovative B2B solutions: from sales, rental and remanufacturing, to fleet and asset management services. Our expertise spans multiple industries and applications — earthmoving and construction, cogeneration, warehouse equipment and intralogistics automation, marine propulsion and energy transition.

By becoming part of our customers’ strategic journey, we design solutions that maximize productivity and return on investment, while promoting sustainability and the adoption of cutting-edge technologies.

At the heart of our business are people and relationships. We invest in training, well-being and engagement of our employees, while building lasting trust and satisfaction with our customers.

TESYA: people, growth, sustainability. YOU.

Name: Davis-Standard
Description: Davis-Standard (www.davis-standard.com), headquartered in Pawcatuck, Conn., is a global leader in the design, development and distribution of extrusion and converting technology. Davis-Standard systems encompass over 14 product lines to support manufacturing applications and customers within every major industry. This includes the agriculture, automotive, construction, healthcare, energy, electronics, food and beverage packaging, and retail industries, among others. With more than 1400 employees worldwide and a network of independent sales agents and suppliers in nearly every country, Davis-Standard is committed to engineering equipment that is cost-effective, environmentally friendly, and offers a high return on investment. The company has three manufacturing and technical facilities in the United States, as well as subsidiaries with facilities in China, Germany and the United Kingdom.

Name: AMADA Italia
Description:
AMADA Italia è leader di mercato nella produzione e distribuzione di macchine e sistemi per la lavorazione della lamiera.

Da quasi 40 anni sul mercato italiano, ti offriamo una vasta gamma di soluzioni orientate alla gestione dell’intero processo produttivo: punzonatrici, piegatrici, macchine da taglio laser, dispositivi di carico e scarico dei materiali, sistemi di saldatura in fibra, magazzini automatici, software e utensili.

Oggi AMADA Italia copre tutto il territorio italiano, più Slovenia, Croazia, Serbia, Bosnia ed Erzegovina, Macedonia del Nord, Montenegro, Kosovo, Albania, Malta, Somalia, Eritrea ed Etiopia.

I nostri valori? Affidabilità, tecnologia, precisione e rispetto dell’ambiente.

Name: FLOVEL Energy Private Limited
Description:
FLOVEL name has been synonymous with the hydropower sector for over four decades. FLOVEL is a full-line supplier of Electromechanical Equipment and Services for Small and Medium sized Hydro Power Plants, manufacturer of hydraulic turbines, valves and turnkey supplier of electro mechanical packages.  FLOVEL ranks amongst the top 5 leading players globally.

FLOVEL manufacturers complete range of Pelton, Francis, Kaplan, Axial Flow turbines and Valves for hydropower projects. The strength of FLOVEL is in its ability to offer all-inclusive solutions (Electro Mechanical-Turnkey Packages).

Name: Anglo Belgian Corporation
Description:
Anglo Belgian Corporation (ABC), located in Ghent since 1912, is one of Europe's leading manufacturers of medium-speed internal combustion engines, with a power range from 600 kW to 10.5 MW per engine.

Our innovative power generation solutions are used in heavy-duty applications across shipping, locomotives, and (nuclear) power plants worldwide.

With more than 110 years of international experience in engine production, ABC has built exceptional expertise and competence. Research, development, and innovation play a crucial role in our work, and we place great importance on durability, reliability, and the simplicity of our engine designs.

Our specialisation lies in the development of medium-speed internal combustion engines running on conventional and alternative fuels, with a strong focus on minimising the carbon footprint. Our goal is to develop the most efficient engines, delivering more power with lower fuel consumption, while significantly or even completely reducing emissions.

For more information on our products and services, visit www.abc-engines.com.

Anglo Belgian Corporation
We power your future

Name: MS Automation
Description:
MS Automation builds custom advanced manufacturing systems with a focus on high speed assembly, test, and inspection of automotive electronics components. 

**We also offer subcontract manufacturing out of our dedicated production facility in Cookeville, TN as of June 2022.

As a full-service automation provider we partner with precision manufacturers to design, build, debug, and install turn-key advanced manufacturing systems that make products faster, more safely, with improved quality, and at lower cost per unit.

With a reputation for quality and craftsmanship, we strive to provide innovative, cost-effective solutions that are customized to meet and exceed any product manufacturing needs. 

Our experience and expertise span a wide range of manufacturing applications:

•Assembly, Test, and Inspection
  -High speed dial tables, palletized assembly lines - free & powered
  -Functional testing - mechanical, electrical, leak
  -Data collection, RFID, barcoding, part marking & tracking
•Machine Vision Integration - Cognex & Keyence
•Material Handling - part feed & transfer, packaging, palletizing, rack / de-rack
•Machine Tending - die cast, machining, IMM / press, other / custom
•Part Finishing - trimming, deburring, sanding, grinding, polishing
•Robotic Welding - MIG / TIG, resistance, laser

We have been fortunate to support a myriad of industries:
•Aerospace •Alternative Energy •Agriculture •Appliance •Automotive •Battery
•Construction •Consumer Goods •Electronics •Food •Life Sciences •Marine •Medical •Music •Ordinance •Power Transmission •Telecommunications 

****Please send resumes to careers@msautomation.com***

Name: Descon Conveyor Systems, A Pacteon Company
Description:
Descon has been providing integrated packaging solutions for the food and beverage industries since 1993. 

We specialize in efficient systems using great products and innovative solutions and with experience handling complex containers utilizing the latest technology. From start to finish, we guide our clients through implementing an integrated packaging solution.

Leveraging the collective expertise and resources of our parent company, Pacteon Group, Descon designs and builds premium processing & packaging equipment for leading global brands in soda, bottled water, beer, frozen food, bread, energy drinks, and other RTD industries.  

Descon’s conveyors and equipment are backed with the Pacteon Promise:  We Make It Right!

Name: Thompson Machinery
Description:
For over 80 years, Thompson Machinery has been committed to offering the best in equipment, as well as the most complete, most innovative, customer support services. Founded in Nashville in 1944, Thompson Machinery is the exclusive Caterpillar dealer for Middle Tennessee, West Tennessee, and North Mississippi.

Through our Cat Rental Store operations, we also offer allied equipment brands such as Genie, JLG, Skyjack, Sullair, and more.

Thompson Machinery serves the broad range of needs for customers in a geographically diverse territory, which encompasses construction, forestry, mining, industrial, and governmental operations. Additionally, our Thompson Power division serves trucking, marine, and power generation businesses throughout the area and beyond.

With 24/7 parts and service support – including full-service branches equipped with the most up-to-date diagnostic and repair equipment, factory-trained technicians, and the area’s largest fleet of field service trucks – Thompson Machinery can be your total equipment solution provider.

Name: Angelo Po Grandi Cucine S.p.a.
Description:
A kitchen is not just a workplace. It is a crucible for ideas, a space for relationships, where precision and efficiency acquire meaning when they culminate in memorable experiences.

Angelo Po has been reconciling functionality and beauty for more than 100 years, innovating solutions and design through a flow of inspirations, generated by a sincere commitment to sustainability and an active dialogue with customers.  

From horizontal and vertical cooking lines to food storage systems, Angelo Po designs and builds complete catering sector installations, delivering solutions and services for kitchens where you can express yourself to the full, from the very first day.

Angelo Po belongs to Marmon Foodservice Technologies, a group headed by US holding Berkshire Hathaway Inc., and it operates on a worldwide scale through offices abroad and a widespread sales network.

https://marmonfoodservice.com/

Name: Robot-Coupe
Description:
It is in France, in the heart of Burgundy, a well-known region for its gastronomy, that Robot-coupe has created more than 40 years ago the Robot-Coupe food processor.

As precursor and incontested leader, Robot-coupe, manufacturer of food preparation equipment, offers a wide range of machines adapted to each professional needs (restaurants, institutions, delicatessens, caterers...).

Name: UNITED GRINDING North America
Description:
A member of the United Grinding Group

UNITED GRINDING North America is your grinding solutions partner. We offer services that will assist you throughout the entire life cycle of your grinding machine. Our services include machine installation, training, applications support, preventive maintenance, parts and repair services. We are here to promote your success! A brief road map of the services we offer can be found at www.grinding.com. UNITED GRINDING has 3 Product Technology Groups that support 8 brands of grinding machines. The cylindrical grinding product technology group represents STUDER, SCHAUDT, and MIKROSA. Our surface and profile grinding product technology group represents MÄGERLE, BLOHM, and JUNG; and the tool and measurement product technology group represents WALTER and EWAG.

With its eight company brands, the UNITED GRINDING GROUP is one of the world's leading suppliers of precision machines for grinding, eroding, lasering, measuring as well as combination machining. Own branches and distribution partners ensure local presence for our customer around the world.

Name: Schnell spa
Description:
Schnell is the world leading company in the production of automatic machines for reinforcement processing, for the production of electro-welded mesh and software technologies for all shaping centers. 
Schnell was founded in 1962 by the intuition of a group of entrepreneurs coming from Fano, a success that a team of partners and co-operators still carries on with passion and determination. 

Today, Schnell is the leader of a multinational industrial group. It is the main research and manufacturing center providing technological, organizational and commercial support to the whole Group. 

Schnell operates in over 150 countries worldwide thanks to its 11 branches, more than 50 agents and dealers and many assistance centers. 
130 types of customizable machines are produced in a production area of over 40.000 sqm, 4 factories around the world and thanks to 350 employees. 

Schnell’s attention to the continuous improvement of the organizational processes, to the quality and reliability of its products, has led the company to obtain the ISO 9001 Quality System Certification, with the prestigious Institution TÜV Italy.

SHARING EXPERIENCE 
Able to design and build innovative products, Schnell has developed over the years a complete range of machines to meet all the needs of the industrialized reinforcement processing market. 

This has radically changed the approach with customers: increasing the range has not only meant to have more machines to offer, but it has also turned the company from supplier of machines to supplier of integrated and customized solutions. 

The ability to share knowledge and experiences with our customers in a creative and open-minded environment is definitely the basis of our success.

Name: BIG DAISHOWA-Europe
Description:
BIG DAISHOWA Europe is part of the BIG DAISHOWA Group. Headquartered in Osaka, Japan, with a robust global presence supported by facilities in Europe, North America and Asia, BIG DAISHOWA operates with a team of 900 skilled professionals dedicated to the advancement of the metalworking industry. BIG DAISHOWA continues to set new standards in the global boring tool industry by designing and manufacturing state-of-the-art electrical and electronic auxiliary equipment, including wireless control and monitoring systems. The comprehensive product range includes over 20,000 precision tools such as collet chucks, hydraulic chucks, boring heads, indexable inserts and measuring tools, all manufactured to the highest standards of quality and precision. 

What we offer:

BIG Daishowa's collet chucks, mills and special solutions "Profit Maker":

The product line BIG contains collet chucks and cutting tools of the latest generation. More than 2000 different collet chucks with a guaranteed runout of max. 0.003mm at 4xD or mills for glassy surfaces of highest material removals are some of the highlights. Moreover, the special solutions such as angle heads or high-speed spindles with a revolution of up to 120'000 give you the chance to upgrade your machine at low cost.

Name: GROB MACHINE TOOLS (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
GROB universal machining centres offer you almost limitless possibilities for the milling and mill-turn machining of parts from the most diverse materials. Thanks to their compact design, high productivity and maximum stability, these machining centers guarantee effective manufacture and adapt, through extensive configuration options, ideally to suit individual requirements.

 GROB universal machining centers are perfectly suited to the 5-sided machining of parts with chamber holes and chamfers, as well as form and flow profiles. Their unique machine concept makes them ideally equipped for state-of-the-art automation technology.

 The GROB system machines, universal machining centers and assembly lines are among the best in the world – our matching automation solutions make them even more efficient. To maintain the highest quality standard, all components are produced in-house and are optimally matched to our customers' specific needs. GROB's semi-automated to fully automated technology guarantees optimized part handling and efficient production.

Name: GREEFA
Description:
GREEFA is the pioneer and current benchmark in the world of sorting technology. From our HQ in the Netherlands we design and develop innovative and high-tech grading and packaging solutions for fruit and vegetables. Virtually all new technologies, both hardware and software, are developed by our own R&D department. we have been at the top of the market for decades and we are active in more than 40 countries.

For more information, check out our brand-new website: www.greefa.com (available in English, Dutch, German, French, Italian and Spanish). If you are interested in working with us, please check our vacancies: www.werkenbijgreefa.nl (Dutch).

Name: JTEKT Machinery Americas Corporation
Description:
From two-man job shops to high-volume production lines, manufacturing facilities have relied on JTEKT Machinery (formerly known as Toyoda Americas) for over 30 years. Our extensive lineup includes horizontal and vertical machining centers, bridge-type mills, grinding machines, and automation solutions. JTEKT machines are engineered for innovators, and built with the speed, strength, and capacity to get you there. 

We understand our success lies not only with our machines, but with our dedicated Engineering and Support departments. Whether it’s our ability to do high-speed and heavy-duty machining with ease, or because we repeatedly hit tight tolerances and time studies, JTEKT Machinery remains at the forefront of industry. Look no further to see the technology of tomorrow, because at JTEKT, that ingenuity begins here.

For more information regarding JTEKT Machinery's full lineup of machine tool solutions, visit our website (www.jtektmachinery.com) or reach out to our Support team by phone (800.257.2985) or email (service@jtektmachinery.com) today!

Learn about our employment opportunities by visiting our career website: https://www.toyoda.com/about-toyoda/careers

Name: SAMM TEST & AUTOMATION
Description:
We are Automatic Test Equipment (ATE) integrator, Special Machine and Assembly Workstation Builder.
Based on customer's specification and through a multidisciplinary team Mechanics, Software and Hardware design) we offer a turnkey solution.

We offer a Functional Test solution (FCT) and In Circuit test (ICT) for electronic boards.

Name: ILPRA
Description: ILPRA stands as a global leader in packaging machine manufacturing, with 10 branches all over the world and a listing on the Italian Stock Exchange. We specialize in offering top-tier solutions for tray sealing, fill seal, thermoforming, and horizontal form fill seal (HFFS), catering to both small and large-scale production needs. Our commitment to fostering mutual growth through customized packaging solutions ensures that we deliver high-quality products across the global food industry

Name: Salford Group
Description:
Salford Group manufactures tillage and application equipment - consistently setting industry standards for power, precision, and performance.

Salford Group is a global company that markets machinery through a worldwide distribution network featuring hundreds of dealers in North America, South America, and Australia, with distribution in Asia as well.
To support its expanding global demand, Salford Group maintains manufacturing facilities as well as multiple parts distribution centers across the USA and Canada.

Name: Exploration Drill Masters Chile S.A.
Description:
Exploration Drill Masters (EDM) Chile S.A. is a specialist in the manufacture and repair of mineral exploration drill rigs and associated equipment.

EDM is motivated to consistently improve the safety of the work environment of mineral exploration drill projects. 

Our flexible high output production facility and inhouse engineering can produce machines and tools suitable to any mineral exploration project in the world.

EDM´s dedication to innovation often takes client’s ideas from conception to finished products operating in some of the biggest mines in the world.

Our Product Range Includes:
- Hands Free Drill Pipe Handling
- Rod Feeder, Diamond core pipe rod handler
- Drill Rigs:
   Reverse Circulation 
   Diamond Core
   Multipurpose (Diamond / Reverse Circulation / Conventional)
   Horizontal Dewatering
   Heliportable
- Worldwide Parts Sales and Aftermarket Service

Name: Twin Disc
Description:
For over 100 years Twin Disc has been developing, engineering, manufacturing and distributing power transmission products that put horsepower to work.

Twin Disc products are installed in the drivelines and powertrains of farm tractors, road pavers, cranes, mining trucks, oil rigs, logging equipment, firefighting and rescue vehicles, pleasure craft, fishing and work boats, pumps, turbines. They manage and control the horsepower generated by internal combustion engines and electric motors. They help feed us, provide natural resources, build our cities and homes, transport us, defend us and influence our lives daily in many unnoticed but critical ways.

Name: Itema Group
Description:
Itema is a leading global provider of advanced weaving solutions, including best-in-class weaving machines, spare parts and integrated services. The Company is the only manufacturer in the world to provide the top three shuttleless weft insertion technologies: rapier, air jet and projectile, with an ample product portfolio and a commitment to continuous innovation and technological advancement of its weaving machines.  Itema guarantees the right weaving machine for any type of woven fabric: from commodity to high-end fashion or industrial fabrics, Itema has the right weaving machine for any application.  Weaving machines with our well-known brand name Itema leave our assembly lines in Italy, Switzerland and China every day. Itema has a tradition of almost 200 years with an installed base of over 300,000 weaving machines in operation. A global presence in more than 100 countries ensures a fast and reliable service.  
Itema is the sole shareholder of Lamiflex, a leading producer of advanced composite products and owns majority stakes in Schoch, a manufacturer of textile industry accessories.

For more information about Itema, please visit www.itemagroup.com

Name: Pontes Máquinas
Description:
A Pontes Máquinas é distribuidora da linha mais completa de equipamentos de movimentação do mundo, representando as marcas Hyster e Yale. Somos o segundo dealer mais antigo do Brasil da marca Hyster. Hoje possuímos exclusividade na venda de máquinas Hyster no Rio Grande do Sul e em Santa Catarina e máquinas Yale em Santa Catarina, além de oferecer venda de peças, serviços, acordos de manutenção preventiva, entre outros. Nossa matriz fica situada na cidade de Porto Alegre/RS, e nossa filial em Joinville/SC. Estamos presentes em diversos estados do Brasil com atuação em Rental, sendo eles: Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina, Paraná, São Paulo e Minas Gerais.

O mercado muda constantemente, e por isso estamos sempre evoluindo, entendendo as novas necessidades dos nossos clientes e nos adaptando. Somos uma empresa certificada com o selo Great Place to Work. Nosso objetivo é oferecer as melhores e mais modernas soluções para movimentações de intralogística. Através do nosso bem mais precioso, as pessoas, estamos levando aos nossos clientes confiança, produtividade, redução de custos e parcerias duradouras, construindo projetos a quatro mãos, sempre nos adaptando ao cenário de cada cliente. #SomosPontes

Name: Belvac
Description:
For over 60 years, Belvac has been a leading supplier of metal container manufacturing solutions, consistently driving technological breakthroughs that have reshaped the industry.  Belvac’s distinguished heritage is marked by revolutionary enhancements in processing speeds and innovative technology, transforming the global can and bottle making industry. As a single-source solution provider, Belvac offers a comprehensive range of proven equipment and machinery for metal cans, bottles, food and aerosol lines.

Belvac is dedicated to providing customers with the highest performing machinery for the lowest cost of operation. With over 300 employees across eleven locations worldwide, Belvac is able to support customers in real time in over 150+ countries. 

Belvac was founded in 1962 in Lynchburg Virginia by Alphonse Stroonbants, under the name Belgium Tool and Die, specializing in high quality precision machining. Stroonbants instilled philosophies of quality, pride, work ethic and craftsmanship into his business. This provided the foundation for Belgium Tool and Die to grow and convert innovative ideas into production machinery which has revolutionized the can making industry.

Belvac is NQA certified.

Name: ABC COMPRESSORS
Description:
Founded in 1943, ABC Compressors has distinguished itself throughout its history for developing high performance and reliable products. This has been the cornerstone of its business development and geographic expansion for different industries and applications. Its international vision has characterized the growth of the company, which in the 1950s made its first exports, and now sells products and services in over 120 countries.

Similarly, ABC has adapted its product offerings to meet its customers’ needs and the demands of new markets, such as PET blowing where ABC was a pioneer in the 80s with its 4-stage PET compressor, or and has offered customized solutions for gas applications since the 70s.

In the same spirit that has made ABC a global benchmark in piston compressors, the company continues to evolve, expanding its position as a global service provider (with new factories in China and Brazil and continuously growing sales&service network), and providing the most robust and efficient compressors which lead the market in efficiency.

GLOBAL NETWORK:
* Manufacturing site and Head Quarters; Eibar (Spain)
* Assembly sites: Itupeva (Brazil), Wujiang (China).
* Worlwide sales&service offices. 

PRODUCT RANGE: air&gas reciprocating compressors, oil free, up to 1MW power, up to 170 bar

Name: Hertz Kompressoren
Description:
Hertz Kompressoren – Smart, Efficient, Sustainable.
With over 20 years of engineering excellence, Hertz Kompressoren delivers advanced compressed air systems designed for performance, reliability, and energy efficiency.

 Green is not just a colour — it's our commitment.
We power industries in 130+ countries with environmentally responsible and future-ready compressed air solutions.

Name: DOOSAN BOBCAT INDIA
Description: This is the official account of Doosan Bobcat India. Bobcat Company designs, manufactures and provides sales and service of compact construction equipment that helps you work more efficiently and effectively. Relying on the performance, toughness, comfort and versatility of our machines and attachments, stay rest assured that the machines provides the best in class value to your requirements. Our innovation drives the industry. With 50 years of experience and presence, we are proud to be the industry leader, and we're committed to transforming your work.

Name: Zeppelin Equipment NL
Description:
Pon Equipment is de oudste (sinds 1926) Cat dealer buiten de Verenigde Staten en al meer dan 85 jaar actief in Nederland. Wij bieden totaaloplossingen op het gebied van grondverzet waarbij we onze klanten voorzien van efficiënte en betrouwbare Cat machines: zowel nieuwe machines als gebruikte machines en zowel verkoop als verhuur.

Als totaalaanbieder vullen wij ons dienstenpakket aan met verschillende financieringsmogelijkheden, onderhoudscontractvormen en ruime onderdelenvoorzieningen. 

Wij geven u graag advies op maat.

Name: LiSEC Austria GmbH
Description:
LiSEC is a globally operating group which has been offering innovative individual and complete solutions in the field of flat glass processing and finishing for more than 60 years. The performance portfolio includes machines, software solutions and services. 

LiSEC develops and produces glass cutting and sorting systems, individual components and complete production lines for the production of insulating and laminated glass as well as machines for the processing of glass edges and tempering systems. With their reliable technology and intelligent automation solutions, LiSEC sets standards in terms of quality and technology and makes a substantial contribution to the success of their customers.

Name: TII SCHEUERLE
Description: Your industry specialist - ensuring that difficult tasks become easy. The tasks involved in transporting and precisely manoeuvring the heaviest and most valuable loads are becoming increasingly more complex and demanding around the world. Making difficult things easy for you is therefore our greatest motivation. We develop reliable transportation and manoeuvring solutions to make sure that you can transport heavy loads to their destinations as safely and quickly as possible. These can be configured to suit the specific application and guarantee maximum flexibility - supported by an experienced, reliable service that is in close proximity to customers worldwide.

Name: CLIMAX Portable Machining & Welding Systems
Description:
CLIMAX thrives on the Impossible.

We never stay stationary.

Every day CLIMAX advances the state of the art in powerful, precise, on-site machining. Customers with the most mission-critical, tightest-tolerance machining tasks come to us for the tools and solutions to achieve new levels of efficiency and profitability.
