Many of the largest companies on earth rely on us to solve the most complicated and challenging machining jobs imaginable. When success is non-negotiable, let CLIMAX be your partner. We’ve been there.

Name: SAER Elettropompe S.p.A.
Description:
SAER Elettropompe is an Italian manufacturer of pumps and motors established in 1951, with an export percentage higher than 90%. We are specialized in water treatment and we offer a range of surface and submersible motors up to 300kW. The range includes split case pumps for flow rates up to 5000 m3/h, high pressure pumps up to 60 bar head and end suction pumps both according to the EN 733 standard, to reach flow rates up to 10000 m3./h. Moreover we produce in-line pumps, booster sets, domestic electric pumps, waste water pumps and submersible pumps. Thanks to the multiple metallurgies available (cast iron, stainless steel, bronze, duplex and super duplex) SAER works in many sectors: HVAC, industrial, civil, O&G, mining, naval, R.O.. 
Thanks to the internal R&D department, the company is able to develop personalized solutions, with production times among the best on the market. SAER is an ISO 9001 certified company.

Name: KHS Machines Nigeria Ltd.
Description:
KHS as one of the leading international suppliers of filling and packaging systems for the beverage industry, we are oriented towards clear-cut values: Quality, customer orientation and innovative strength. These are our strong points. And that applies to all KHS sites worldwide. 

KHS relies on technologically innovative and top quality systems and solutions for the sustainable, economic success of its customers. 
The day-to-day thoughts and actions of our top-qualified employees are determined by this vision, and have been for more than 140 years. You define the content and form of your product, and we will build you a suitable, custom-made system. However, we do not just supply our customers with state-of-the-art technology; as a reliable partner we provide them with advice and support far beyond conceptual design, installation and commissioning of a system. At KHS, we attach the utmost importance to SERVICE. We are unbeatably fast especially as regards delivering original spare parts. This can minimize expensive downtimes. 

It is our aspiration to remain one of the technology leaders in our markets. We will achieve this by pressing ahead with new, market-oriented developments. On the way to achieving our objectives, we combine socially and ecologically conscientious conduct with economically successful action. Sustainability is extremely important to us, as we strive for satisfied customers and employees. 

What also distinguishes us is our line competence. No matter if you order a complete system or individual components from us, we always view your processes from a holistic perspective and assist you at all stages in optimizing your operational procedures. In this way we have a suitable solution for any challenge. KHS – Competence in Solutions.

Name: Apolo Sistemas Gráficos
Description:
A Apolo é uma tradicional fornecedora que há 38 anos ocupa uma posição importante, representando e distribuindo conceituadas marcas no mercado com milhares de unidades instaladas pelo Brasil em soluções de impressão, acabamento e embalagens. 

Nossa sede em Cotia no Parque Industrial San José, com mais de 1.200 m², reúne nossa equipe especializada de alta competência técnica e seriedade.
 
Nossos Feitos
- Milhares de equipamentos instalados
- Mais de 8.000 clientes
- Em 100% dos estados brasileiros
- Segmentos: rótulos e etiquetas, embalagens e gráfico
- Projetos com total foco no aumento da produtividade e redução de custos

Oportunidades com a Apolo
• Aumente a velocidade e sua produção
• Elimine terceirização
• Acabe com o trabalho manual e erros humanos
• Entre no processo digital
• Inicie um novo negócio 

O que entregamos?
• Trabalhamos com no sistema “Turn Key”, onde apenas a Apolo cuida da compra até a entrega final.
• Desenvolvemos projetos e aplicações de forma transparente voltados as suas expectativas de tempo, produção e financeira.
• Cuidamos de toda a importação, desde o embarque até a chegada, atualizando cada passo.
• Disponibilizamos serviços presencial e remoto de instalação, suporte, treinamento, e peças para rápido atendimento e restabelecimento dos equipamentos.
• O setor de suprimentos é eficaz e rápido no preparo de propostas, negociação, entrega, documentos, manuais e assuntos em geral.

Pós-venda
1. Suporte eficiente. Estamos SEMPRE EM ALERTA, prontos e preparados para emergências, remotamente e/ou presencial no menor tempo possível de resposta.
2. Qualidade acima da quantidade. Resolvemos os problemas com muita atenção, de maneira ativa, entregando tudo o que for solicitado e necessário.
3. Prezamos pela sua satisfação e engajamento com os produtos e serviços, oferecendo soluções aos problemas e buscando melhorias para os seus resultados.
4. Mantemos um canal aberto de comunicação direto para entender o que se passa com seus produtos.

Name: Cavanna SpA
Description:
Cavanna is a company leader in the flowpack wrapping systems field. It designs, produces and distributes worldwide automatic machines and turnkey systems for single pack and multipack wrapping of food, pharmaceutical and non food products. A Family Company, a Global Partner: a family company, a safe and reliable partner the costumer can turn to with absolute confidence to study and create together custom-made packaging solutions. The strengths of Cavanna are: competence acquired in 59-year history, a continuous and constant assistance to the customer and a DNA strongly oriented to Research and technological Innovation. Our company offers also a capillary sales network, with 42 agencies distributed in 58 countries worldwide, that guarantees global customer care. In Cavanna we fully dedicate ourselves to providing quality and technology with due respect for people, with the aim to ensure the safety of those who use our machines and the health of those who buy our customers products.
A primary objective at Cavanna is to develop the full potential of each individual employee. All new employees are giving a career path to meet the specific needs of the individual and to ensure a gratifying lifelong growth experience. Two qualities needed for a successful career at Cavanna are a high degree of international awareness and the ability to work in teams. Every year Cavanna allocates a budget that is dedicated to building internal and external specialized courses aimed at increasing the specialization of its people.

Name: Ishida
Description:
Ishida is a leading supplier of automated solutions, meeting the
ever-changing challenges presented by the processing of products in
food, retail, logistic, medical and pharmaceutical industries. We
design, manufacture and sell individual machines, as well as providing
integrated and complete packing lines for various applications. We use
equipment and software of our own patent, and also offer project
management services that deliver complete turnkey solutions embracing
both Ishida and other equipment.

Name: Marut Air
Description:
Marut Air is an India-based ventilation system manufacturer, provides ventilation solutions for big premises.

The gearless fans we supply are highly durable and last for generations with our in-house developed PMSM Technology. We provide ventilation solutions in the most cost-effective manner without compromising security and quality.


Our mission is to provide the most effective ventilation solution for every type of premises. We take care of every detail that is needed for the overall workspace and its comfort. With the delivery of our products, we ensure transparency and trust. So, it is all about productivity that counts!

Name: CURTI S.p.A. Costruzioni Meccaniche
Description: CURTI is a family company born in 1955 and active in several business segments as the manufacturing of machinery for the packaging industry, engineering and manufacturing of special mechanical parts and groups for defense, aerospace and aeronautic industry, production of wire and cable processing machines and fully automated transfer lines.

Name: Mondragon Assembly Group
Description:
Mondragon Assembly is an international group specialist in the development of automation and assembly solutions. The parent company in Spain, which is a cooperative, was created in 1977, one of the pioneers in the development of production and assembly technologies.

We are divided into three business areas: Solar, E-Mobility & Energy Storage and Automation Technologies. Our main activities in each of these business include the development of turnkey lines and machines and contract manufacturing, being able to offer solutions anywhere in the world with our six production plants and two technical and sale offices.

Name: Kubota UK
Description: Kubota UK is a market-leading manufacturer of Groundcare, Agricultural and Construction Equipment solutions. Based in the UK since 1979, Kubota UK's range of equipment is renowned for its superior build quality, unrivalled reliability and value for money. Kubota's range of liquid-cooled diesel engines also leads the market in the UK, and its complete range of solutions is supported by Kubota's first class after sales service and strong nationwide dealer network.

Name: Gravotech
Description:
The Gravotech Group designs, manufactures and distributes engraving, marking and cutting solutions.

The Gravotech group represents a global network present in 25 countries with over 650 employees to provide its customers with exceptional engraving and permanent marking solutions. 

As a world leader in durable marking technologies such as engraving, laser, micro-percussion and scratching, we use our expertise to develop and market equipment. 
We also develop software and consumables for every application, from personalization to architectural signage and industrial parts marking.

Contact us: contact@gravotech.com

Name: PPM Technologies
Description:
PPM is a market leader in the global food processing and packaging industry. With close to 100 years of experience and continued release of innovative products, PPM enhances the performance of food processing lines. From snack foods to meat, seafood and poultry, the company provides advanced technologies to global food processors within Conveying, Seasoning, and Frying.

It is our pledge not only to provide the service and support you have come to expect from PPM, but to bring additional value-added opportunities to the industry. We offer an extensive line of products and services based on the latest technologies. Our team of engineers are committed to developing solutions that optimize performance and efficiency of your line. Our aim is to provide solutions that get you into production as quickly and painlessly as possible and to ensure your factory continues running efficiently.

For inquiries please call (503) 538-3141 or visit our web site www.ppmtech.com

Name: ABG - A B Graphic International
Description:
Established in 1954, we are a leader in digital finishing equipment for labels and packaging. 

We offer an extensive range of label and packaging machinery and are constantly innovating to keep at the forefront of the market. All products are fully supported by our Service Department and worldwide distributors, giving you peace of mind.

With a purpose built manufacturing facility at our Head Office in Bridlington, we also have three other manufacturing sites, one close to the head office in Yorkshire, another in Germany near Düsseldorf and one in Girona, Spain. Each site is a centre for excellence for a specific range of products.  

We have a wealth of experience in developing digital finishing equipment, and contastantly invest in research and development to give our products the leading edge.  Since 1995 we have had a dedicated Turret Rewinder manufacturing facility, and we are the global market leader for automatic Turret Rewinders, with over 2500 installations worldwide.  

Other products in our range include laser die cutting, 100% camera inspection systems, inspection slitter rewinders, booklet label machines and other specialist applications, including RFID insertion and automated workflow solutions.

Name: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries - VST Diesel Engines Private Ltd
Description:
In 2007, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries- VST Diesel Engines Private Ltd. came to life in Mysore as Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Ltd (MHI) Japan aligned its vision with VST Tillers Tractors Ltd., India. 97% of our subsidiary is owned by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Engine & Turbocharger, Ltd, Japan.

With a combined experience of over 150+ years, we manufacture compact, rugged, and lightweight diesel engines for off-highway machinery with a maximum power output of 50 HP. Producing over 30000 off-highway diesel engines annually, we meet the demands of various industries on a global scale.

We've strategically established our presence in India, fueled with the vision of bolstering its development and its rising innovations and technology.

Our diesel engines are mainly used in Agriculture, Construction, Marine industry, light towers, Diesel generators, and Utility equipment such as refrigeration units, water jets, plastering machines, etc. Our robust and cost-effective diesel engines persist in imparting their ingenious solutions worldwide.

We at MVDE harbour a vision of making the world a better place for our future generations; thus, our products follow stringent worldwide environmental regulations.

To learn more about MVDE diesel engines, click the link below

Name: HexPro | HP
Description:
• HexPro Protection Techonologies Ltda 
• Produção, importação e comercialização de equipamentos de proteção individual de alta performance. 
• Além de inovadores, somos também especialistas em especialidades! 
• Para nós, a proteção ao usuário é prioridade absoluta!
• Nosso propósito: “antecipar o futuro do EPI, disponibilizando hoje ao trabalhador brasileiro o que existe de melhor no mundo para sua proteção e conforto”.
• Neste intuito, projetamos e fabricamos equipamentos diferenciados sob a marca HexPro | HP, além da importação e distribuição com exclusividade no Brasil das marcas Granberg Gloves,  Kozane Textiles, ESKA Gloves, DUNLOP Protective Footwear, CleanAir, FENTO e GEPPE, referências mundiais em produtos premium.
• Atendemos contas CORPORATIVAS e também à REVENDEDORES e DISTRIBUIDORES.

Name: Oxipira Soluções de Corte
Description:
A OXIPIRA é uma empresa genuinamente brasileira especializada em processos de corte.

Líder em corte a plasma no Brasil, atualmente a empresa conta com mais de 800 máquinas CNC instaladas em todo o território nacional e países da América do Sul.

Principais produtos e serviços do nosso portfólio:

- MÁQUINA DE CORTE A LASER
- MAQUINA DE CORTE A PLASMA DE ALTA DEFINIÇÃO 
- MAQUINA DE OXICORTE
- LIXADEIRAS AUTOMATIZADAS
- SOLDA LASER
- CONSUMÍVEIS PLASMA
- CONSUMÍVEIS LASER
- MODERNIZAÇÃO DE EQUIPAMENTOS
- PROGRAMAS DE MANUTENÇÕES PREVENTIVAS
- CONSULTORIAS DE PROCESSO PERSONALIZADAS

Para mais informações ligue (19) 3414-9999 ou acesse nosso site: www.oxipira.com.br

Name: ESI an MKS Brand
Description: ESI is a brand within the MKS Instruments Equipment Solutions Division. ESI systems deliver market-leading solutions for Flexible PCB laser processing, high-speed MLCC testing, and CO2-laser-based systems HDI PCB and IC substrate manufacturing. ESI solutions help manufacturers optimize production of the materials, components and systems that are an integral part of the electronic devices in use today. They deliver greater flexibility and a higher degree of processing control, enabling customers to incorporate a wider range of materials into their production processe

Name: HMD
Description:
HMD is a specialized distributor and service provider of premium heavy machinery and parts used in the mining, quarrying, construction, roadworks, recycling, transportation, and agricultural industries.

HMD’s success is driven by its team of experts whose passion is to provide genuine customer service and after-sales support.

Name: Leistritz Pump Technology
Description:
Leistritz is one of the pioneers in the field of screw pumps. We have been developing and producing our products since 1924 and have the most comprehensive production program in this field today. Let us know your pumping task and we will have the suitable solution for you - this is the credo we live by every single day. With the modular structure of our ranges and our application expertise, we offer our customers an economical and efficient solution for their pumping tasks.

Leistritz screw pumps are at the heart of a wide variety of applications and processes, and can be used in virtually all industry sectors. Modern quality and environmental management systems, the latest development tools and perfection in production engineering ensure our high quality standards.

Name: Confab Industrial S/A
Description: Sales Manager for oil and gas equipment market.

Name: ANDRITZ Brazil
Description: ANDRITZ PULP & PAPER has a complete portfolio of systems for the production of pulp, paper, tissue, and board – and in the generation of power from renewable resources. In addition, we offer comprehensive services in support of customer processes: from replacement parts to complete mill maintenance contracts.

Name: Pon Equipment Nederland
Description:
Pon Equipment is de oudste (sinds 1926) Cat dealer buiten de Verenigde Staten en al meer dan 85 jaar actief in Nederland. Wij bieden totaaloplossingen op het gebied van grondverzet waarbij we onze klanten voorzien van efficiënte en betrouwbare Cat machines: zowel nieuwe machines als gebruikte machines en zowel verkoop als verhuur.

Als totaalaanbieder vullen wij ons dienstenpakket aan met verschillende financieringsmogelijkheden, onderhoudscontractvormen en ruime onderdelenvoorzieningen. 

Wij geven u graag advies op maat.

Name: Stemmann-Technik GmbH - a Wabtec Company
Description:
The company was founded in Luxembourg in 1912.
In the first few years the company dealt with the production of power supplies to portable consumers, especially for cranes in steelworks and smelting works. Later with slip ring assemblies for rotating devices and pantograph systems for rail.

Based on creativity in development, customer-oriented quality thinking and reliable production technologies, the company's business areas have been gradually expanded since the mid-1980s.
Today, Stemmann-Technik is one of the world's leading manufacturers of components and systems for energy and data transfer in industrial and transport technology, organized and certified according to the international DIN ISO 9001 and IRIS standards.
Stemmann-Technik GmbH is now part of the Wabtec Corporation.

Slip rings, conductor lines, cable trolleys, stinger systems, cable reels, spring cable reels, pantographs, grounding contacts, third-rail pantographs, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, energy technology, shore power supply, cold ironing, container ships, cruising ships, wagons slip ring bodies, transformer slip ring bodies, slip ring assemblies, roof current collector, earthing contact, frost earthing contact, third rail, ground contacts, shoegears, crane, SCL, SACL, SICL, Line aluminum, wind turbine, shoe gear, crane systems, Pod crane system, POD drive, ICE DSA roof mounted local traffic, long-distance traffic roof mounted movable collector head, Variopanto, Interoperable pantograph for cross border travel, panto300, panto420, panto, charging, ChargingPANTO, ebus charging, FerryCHARGER, charging vessels, charging ferries, shore power, on shore power, cold ironing, OSP, , ferry-boat, container ship, ship, cruiser,

Name: Raytec Vision S.p.A.
Description:
Raytec Vision is leading expert in optical sorting technology for fruit and vegetables. 

We have long experience in x-ray technology for the inspection of canned food.

We create a unique partnership with our customers to address all of your sorting needs efficiently and accurately. Raytec Vision is able to provide a wide range of solutions in quality control. We offer bespoke solutions for specific needs.
We are the difference in your final production success.

Name: MAXI TRUST Grupos Geradores
Description: A MAXI TRUST Grupos Geradores produz de forma seriada Grupos Geradores a Diesel de 40kVA à 3000kVA e Grupos Geradores à Gás de 70 à 1000kVA, além de desenvolver projetos especiais para usinas de energia. Localizada em Curitiba/PR possui uma fábrica moderna em uma área de 84.000m². Com a tecnologia aplicada e insumos de primeira linha, os equipamentos são seguros e confiáveis e apresentam ótima relação custo-benefício, garantindo maior eficiência, economia e segurança no fornecimento de energia elétrica. A MAXI TRUST adota rígidos padrões de controle de qualidade, garantindo o padrão dos seus produtos e a certeza da satisfação dos seus clientes em todo o Brasil.

Name: Foodmate, a Duravant Company
Description:
Foodmate, a Duravant operating company, is a leading Poultry Processing Equipment manufacturer with unmatched knowledge and expertise.  The brand is known for its efficient equipment design and exceptional service. Founded by industry experts in early 2006, the company quickly expanded its worldwide distribution into North and South America with the launch of Foodmate US in 2010. Foodmate Brasil was then launched in 2015, followed by the launch of Foodmate Poland in 2017 and the acquisition of Foodmate UK in 2019. Foodmate has become the committed and reliable partner of major poultry processing companies worldwide. 


To learn more, visit our website: www.foodmateglobal.com

Name: Harris Products Group
Description:
Since 1899, the Harris name has been identified with innovative people, practices, and products. This began when John Harris invented the flame-cutting torch, leading to the founding of The Harris Calorific Company. And in 1914, Joseph W. Harris, Sr. founded the J. W. Harris Company and developed many of the brazing alloys and fluxes that are still used today.

In 2005, Lincoln Electric merged these two successful companies to become the Harris Products Group. Today, we are industry leader in the consumables and gas equipment.

Our dedication to a higher standard strategy lies within our six core values: integrity, a focus on the customer, quality, performance, commitment, and employee development. This commitment to excellence applies to all of the industries we serve: from the cutting, brazing and welding in industrial business and OEMs, to plumbing, HVAC/R and specialty gas applications like laboratories, analytical testing, food, beverage and more. 

Gas is what keeps the world running. And if you use gas, then you need Harris. We provide high-quality, innovative solutions for: 

INDUSTRIAL
o	When it comes to cutting and welding for fabricators and machine shops, we are experts on both sides of the flame. 

OEMs
o	We specialize in production brazing consumables and equipment such as our patented Perfect Flame brazing solution.  We also offer a documented cost reduction (DCR) program of brazing processes. 

HVAC/R & PLUMBING
o	Our vast network of wholesale suppliers keeps plumbers and HVAC/R technicians equipped to provide the highest quality brazing and soldering alloys and equipment. 

SPECIALTY GAS 
o	Stop losing sleep over your gas usage, because Harris has the equipment and turnkey solutions to maximize your high purity gas usage. To put the power of data in your fingertips, learn more about DataSMART, a fully automatic manifold system powered by data. 

GIVE US A CALL 
Got a gas control or gas distribution problem? Give us a call at 1.800.733.4043

Name: BW Flexible Systems
Description:
Hello!

Are you looking for an effective solution for VFFS, flow wrapping, bag filling, or palletizing - or a combination thereof?

Or maybe you're tired of working at companies that don't value their employees? 

With over 100 years of experience, thousands of installations worldwide, and expertise in diverse markets, BW Flexible Systems helps you grow your business through reliable solutions and customized support. We value our team members and consistently work on improving our company culture to make the world a better place. 

Through the synergy of our trusted brands, including Hayssen, Rose Forgrove, Sandiacre, Schib, Simionato, StreamFeeder, Symach, and Thiele, we offer industry-leading flexible solutions to the packaging world through our vast portfolio of equipment, including vertical form-fill-seal, flow wrapping, bag-filling, palletizing, feeding, and complete solutions. 

We work closely with our customers to find the ideal solution for them, ranging from requests to minimize downtime, increase output, or even offer a variety of bag types and styles or sustainable materials.  

Though we manufacture packaging machinery, our main focus is people; both our colleagues and our customers. Putting relationships first, treating everyone like family, because everybody matters. 

How we can help you? Reach out, we'd be glad to help you find the optimal flexible packaging solution. 

https://www.bwflexiblesystems.com/contact-us

Name: WFL Millturn Technologies GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
WFL Millturn Technologies GmbH&Co.KG is the leading supplier in the field of complete machining. WFL is the only manufacturer worldwide that focuses exclusively on the production of multifunctional turning-boring-milling centers. Today, in many high tech companies, the trade name MILLTURN stands for the central machine tool for the production of complex components with highest precision. 

Both the modular structure of the MILLTURN’s and the tailor-made special solutions guarantee the perfect solution for complex manufacturing tasks. With a MILLTURN the customer does not only acquire a CNC-machine which fulfils the highest quality and precision levels, but he actually gets an unbeatable competitive advantage. A Millturn of WFL is the perfect combination of a 2-4 axis turning center and a 5-axis machining center. 

The WFL product range consists by now of 13 different machine models between a turning diameter from 420mm to 1500mm and a turning length from 1000mm to 8000mm. Thousands of machining problems solved and decades of experience guarantee WFL-customers the most efficient and reliable products in this segment.

Name: Newstech India
Description:
Newstech India Pvt. Ltd. is India’s largest private supplier of integrated industrial systems, consumables, software and automation tools for the print and packaging sector. Established in 1984, we have built a multi-decade track record of delivery across 3,500+ institutions, anchored by 140+ regional channel partners and a growing global presence.

From pioneering India’s first facsimile transmission system in the 80's to introducing India to its first AI based paywall system for publishers in 2025, we’ve consistently been at the frontier of precision, integration, and scale. Our portfolio today spans:

> 14 global OEM partnerships across Germany, Japan, USA, Denmark, Singapore
> 9 offices across India + 4 active export corridors
> A diversified portfolio of machinery, consumables, and industrial software
> Embedded consulting, technical audits, and post-sale support across contracts

What sets us apart is our structure. Newstech is not a product trader—we are a full-stack systems integrator with enforceable contract architecture, a tiered margin model, and centralized receivables control. 

Now led by a second-generation management team with global MBAs and engineering depth, We operate across three integrated domains:

	•	 Large Scale Industrial Automation Systems
	•	 Premium Print Consumables 
	•	 Industrial Machine Vision & AI Software 

Newstech is now expanding across Africa, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East, while investing in AI-based diagnostics, decentralized supply monitoring, and regional fulfillment nodes.

For over 40+ years, we’ve done more than deliver systems. We’ve delivered trust, scale, continuity, and INNOVATION.

Name: TCi Industries
Description: TCi specializes in the design and manufacture of premium quality forest harvesting systems, specialized off-road industrial machines and material processing equipment.

Name: Siempelkamp Giesserei GmbH
Description: The Siempelkamp Foundry in Krefeld specialises in the production of hand-formed large castings of up to 320 tonnes made of cast iron with nodular graphite. With a casting quantity of 50,000 tonnes per year and 375 employees, it is one of the largest hand-forming foundries in the world. We are the benchmark in Germany and Europe. The comprehensive and customer-oriented service package includes the entire production process from design, calculations, pattern making, moulding and casting to mechanical processing, packaging and transport. Thanks to excellent metallurgical know-how, constant research and development, with personal commitment to every project and a passion for our craft, we produce large and heavy castings for greater performance, higher safety and future viability. We manufacture our elementary components made of nodular cast iron primarily for customers in the energy conversion, raw material processing, press construction and mechanical engineering industries. Only we have the technology in Europe to produce suitable components on such a scale.

Name: Akyapak
Description:
We Empower Industries to Contribute to a Better and Sustainable Future.
We are a machinery company that connects technology and engineering through comprehensive machinery and software solutions for metal forming and fabrication. Our innovative products and services, backed by our global dealer network, provide exceptional value that helps our customers succeed and empowers industries to contribute to a better and sustainable future.
Since 1962, the world’s leading brands have trusted us for the last six decades. Today, our machines are preferred in the factories of Mitsubishi, Mercedes, Harley Davidson, Rolls Royce and NASA.
From North America to Asia, Europe to Australia, and every corner in between, our machinery solutions are powering industries in more than 120 countries worldwide. Our global reach spans every continent with an extensive product portfolio that includes metal forming, structural steel and plate processing, machine tools and welding automation solutions.
Around the world, our customers face obstacles that make their business competitive and each year we provide a wide range of solutions to meet these challenges. Doing so, some of the most challenging structures in the world have relied on AKYAPAK machines for their construction. From the Dubai Eye in Dubai to the Ataturk Airport in Istanbul, the Turkmenbashi Port Project to the Baku Olympic Stadium, our contribution to the world of engineering is a source of pride.
With four subsidiaries: Akyapak USA, Akyapak Russia, Akyapak UK and branch offices and service points in Ireland, Germany, India and Nigeria, our unparalleled proximity to you, enables us to better understand, anticipate and react with agility to support your business.

Name: SPEE3D
Description: SPEE3D has developed a revolutionary high speed, 3D printing process for metals that makes industrial-grade metal parts at rapid build rates of up to 100g/3.5oz a minute. The technology is suited to industrial and commercial manufacturing for a wide range of material components. SPEE3D also provides deployable metal 3D printers that are used by organisations in Defence and commercial industries around the world.

Name: Neemba Bénin
Description: Depuis Octobre 1984, NEEMBA BENIN, membre du groupe NEEMBA est leader dans la vente et l’après-vente de matériel de travaux publics (TP) et industriel représentant la marque CATERPILLAR au Bénin. Neemba Group concessionnaire CATERPILLAR basé à l'île Maurice est présent dans 11 pays ouest-africains depuis 1932.

Name: Thompson Tractor Company
Description: Thompson Tractor Company, Inc. specializes in the sales, rental, leasing, service and parts for earthmoving, construction and material-handling equipment, and diesel engines used for electric power generation and marine propulsion applications. Established in 1957, Thompson is a family-owned company that delivers unrivaled customer experiences and innovative, multi-faceted technology solutions.

Name: ViscoTec
Description:
ViscoTec – Perfectly dosed!

ViscoTec Pumpen- u. Dosiertechnik GmbH is a leading system manufacturer for fluid technology: from extraction and product preparation to the dosing of medium to high-viscosity media. The product portfolio covers dosing and filling applications in the automotive, e-mobility, electronics manufacturing, food processing, aerospace, medical technology, pharmaceutical and many other industries.

The headquarters of the technological market leader is in Töging a. Inn (Bavaria, near Munich). In addition to an international distributor network, ViscoTec has subsidiaries in the USA, China, Singapore, India, France, and Denmark and employs more than 360 people worldwide. 

Numerous sales partners all over the world complete the international distribution network. Next to technically sophisticated solutions to even the most complicated application, ViscoTec is the single point of contact to deliver all components for a complete system: From emptying to preparing and to dosing. This guarantees successful interaction of all components. 

All fluids showing a viscosity of up to 7.000.000 mPas can be conveyed and dosed almost pulsation-free and with extremely low shear. 

ViscoTec offers comprehensive consulting for every application and, if required, extensive tests will be carried out in close cooperation with the customer. The dosing pumps and systems are perfectly adapted to their respective application whether it is the food sector, the e-mobility industry, the aerospace field, the medical technology, the pharmaceutical industry, electronics manufacturing or many others.

Name: TAKNEK
Description:
Taknek's experienced team combines years of experience in electrical and engineering solutions and includes the skill set to provide total engineering solutions for the most complex and challenging of systems design.

Taknek specializes in the areas of- Robotics Automation, vision systems, project management, material handling & Conveyer systems, lean manufacturing, design engineering, control integration, and CAD/CAE engineering. We provide state-of-the-art solutions which can help businesses streamline their day-to-day solutions, reduce costs, increase performance and ensure quality.

Name: Jordan Tractor and Equipment Co.
Description:
Jordan Tractor and Equipment Co. was established in 1953 as the sole dealer in Jordan for Caterpillar Inc, which is the world leader in manufacturing and support of a complete range of Reliable, Durable, Highly Productive & Cost Effective Machines & Equipment for the Mining Aggregation, Building, Construction Military, Municipality, Industrial, Marine Agriculture, tourism and hospitality.

Our dedicated and customers focused Service & Support covers the whole Life Cycle of the Equipment. It starts with the selection process to best match equipment to fulfill your requirements at lowest cost, and continue hence after through installation, start-up operation management, maintenance management, repair management and eventually the complete rebuild or replace options.

In addition to the Caterpillar Dealership, JTEC are the authorize dealers in Jordan for following world class brands:-
1)	John Deere Agricultural Tractors & Combiners.
2)	Sandvik Crushers.
3)	Sullair Air Compressors.
4)	Allmand Light Towers.

Name: Gruppo TecnoFerrari S.p.A.
Description:
Tecnoferrari is an international Group leader in automatic solutions for industry. Born in the ceramic market where it is active with all business divisions of handling, logistics, digital printing and end of line systems.

Thanks to the high-quality know-how TecnoFerrari extends its service to all manufacturing sectors with a focus on automotive, glass, pharmaceutical, food and beverage, paper and tissue.

With a strong presence in the worldwide market, we guarantee the maximum reliability of the plants and the efficiency of highly customized solutions based on the specific needs of each customer, making us a reference point throughout the world.

Name: SKC Maquinarias
Description:
Somos SKC Maquinarias S.A , líder en soluciones integrales en maquinaria pesada para las áreas de construcción, minería, industrial, y forestal.

Tenemos a disposición de nuestros clientes venta de maquinarias y servicio post venta , asegurando altos niveles de satisfacción en materias de rendimiento, productividad y tecnología.

Nuestra empresa es filial de SK Comercial fundada en el año 1975, perteneciente al holding Sigdo Koppers , uno de los más importantes grupos empresariales del país, con operaciones en Chile, Perú, Argentina, entre otros países del mundo.

Representamos marcas de prestigio mundial, como son Volvo equipos de construcción, minería y forestal, Toyota equipos industriales, Manitou equipos de manipulación todo terreno, y Timberpro , cosechadores forestales. Contamos con una red de servicio a lo largo de todo Chile, con sucursales desde Iquique hasta Puerto Montt, también tenemos presencia internacional a través de nuestra filial en Perú.

En SKC Maquinarias encontrará un grupo humano enfocado al servicio, con un alto estándar de calidad y profesionalismo, personal especializado y capacitado constantemente en Chile y el extranjero, quienes están comprometidos en cumplir satisfactoriamente con sus requerimientos.

El principal objetivo es otorgar a nuestros clientes soluciones especializadas , que se traducen en proyectos exitosos.

Name: NETZSCH Analyzing & Testing
Description:
The Analyzing & Testing business unit of the NETZSCH Group develops and manufactures a complete high-precision instrument line for thermal analysis and thermophysical properties measurement, rheology and fire testing as well as offering world class commercial testing services in our laboratories. Our instrumentation is employed for research and quality  control in the polymer sector, the chemical industry, the areas of inorganic and building materials, and environmental analysis. Instruments for controlling – such as for in-situ cure monitoring – complete our product line.

Our innovative technological leadership and uncompromising quality standards make us one of the world’s leading manufacturers in our trade. We consistently incorporate outstanding developments – often originating  in cooperation with our customers to ensure the utmost in user-pertinency – into our standard instrument series.

Stay tuned and read our blog: https://analyzing-testing.netzsch.com/en/blog

Legal Notice:
https://analyzing-testing.netzsch.com/de/meta-nav/impressum

Privacy Policy:
https://analyzing-testing.netzsch.com/de/meta-nav/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Associated Environmental Systems
Description:
AES is a leader in designing and manufacturing temperature and humidity environmental test chambers and battery testing solutions. For some of the most innovative products you hold in your hand, drive down the road, and other things we can’t divulge, we get it. We specialize in designing and manufacturing a wide range of products running from small benchtop test chambers to large walk-in or drive-in environmental rooms. Our customers come from many different industries, including aerospace, pharma, electronics, automotive, and semiconductors.
We are at the forefront of advancing the battery testing market. We are in the handheld device industry, catering to the evolving needs of mobile phones, tablets, electronics. We are also in the electric vehicle market, by helping customers produce longer-lasting and faster-charging batteries for EVs. Our solutions are integral to the research and development testing as well as production manufacturing processes. We also play a crucial role in supporting the ecosystem of technologies such as microelectromechanical systems (MEMS), including accelerometers, gyroscopes, semiconductors, materials, and energy storage. 
In response to the increasing demand for battery testing, AES has developed innovative patented and patent-pending battery testing solutions that integrate within our environmental test chambers. These solutions are equipped to handle different cell types and high amperage testing up to 1000 amps. 
Segway, Analog Devices, Whirlpool, Boeing, Honeywell, Goodyear, General Dynamics, and Teledyne are just some examples of our current customers, which number in the thousands. We strive to build a committed partnership with our customers founded on reliability, integrity, and expertise.

Name: MCM S.p.A.
Description: MCM Machining Centers Manufacturing SpA is an Italian leading company in designing and manufacturing high precision machining centers, automation and Flexible Manufacturing Systems (FMS). The company has grown over the years thanks to the acknowledgement gained on worldwide markets, with a large portfolio of international companies primarily active in the Aerospace, Automotive, Industrial, Energy, Oil & Gas and Defense. The corporate size, policies and structure are focused on offering solutions that can fulfill customers' requirements, making MCM a reliable partner.

Name: Fristam Pumps India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Fristam Pumps India Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of high-quality sanitary/hygienic stainless-steel pumps, blenders, and mixers, in India, with over 110 years of exceptional German craftsmanship in the Hygienic pumping industry. The company serves a wide range of industries, including dairy, food, beverages & brewing, chemical, and bio-pharmaceutical, cosmetics and home & personal care across the globe to adhere its industrial standards such as 3-A, and EHEDG (the European Hygienic Engineering and Design Group).
Fristam’s company history dates back to 1909 when Friedrich Stamp, the great-grandfather of the current managing director, Wolfgang Stamp, and technical director, Joachim Friedsch, began producing cream and cheese vats and refrigeration units for dairies. From the outset, Fristam prioritised meeting the unique needs of its customers and, in 1931, manufactured its first stainless steel pump, setting the stage for sustained success. 
Fristam has firmly established & expanded its footprints globally by continuing to deliver innovative and high-quality Hygienic Pumps through a robust international network of manufacturing sites, sales offices, and distributors.


FRISTAM PUMPS (INDIA) PVT LTD is a machinery company based out of 
Plot No B73/1/2 Chakan Industrial Area, Phase - II, Village Bhamboli, Dist - Pune, Maharashtra 410501

Name: BARDELLA S.A. Indústrias Mecânicas
Description: A BARDELLA é uma das mais longevas empresas do Brasil. Fundada em 1911, contribuiu fornecendo equipamentos de alta complexidade para as mais diversas indústrias do país, dentre elas as siderúrgicas, mineradoras, metalúrgicas, petróleo e gás, eólica e tantas outras.

Name: Grupo Install
Description:
Com 25 anos de expertise, o Grupo Install se tornou referência no Brasil e no exterior, com um ecossistema dedicado e desenvolvido para a Indústria, fornecendo soluções inovadoras e projetos sob medida. 

Investindo na valorização humana, através de ações sustentáveis e tendo o cliente como centro do négocio, a Install conta com mais de 400 colaboradores formando equipes de engenheiros altamente qualificados em automação, engenharia elétrica, mecânica, robótica e intralogística, a Install está localizada nas cidades de Cotia/SP e Chapecó/SC. 

Com tecnologia de ponta e uma produção verticalizada, o Grupo Install atende às demandas do mercado mundial com projetos Turn Key e On Demand, nos seguimentos de Alimentos e Bebidas, Armazenagem, Automotivo, Centros de Distribuição, Construção Civil, Farmacêutico, Frigoríficos, Moagem de Grãos, Raçoes e Vitaminas, definindo o futuro da indústria com inovação e excelência!

•	Cultura empresarial sólida
•	Processos verticalizados
•	Integração de produtos e serviços
•	Atendimento humanizado
•	Rápidas respostas

Name: iNOEX
Description:
INSPIRE BEYOND MEASUREMENT

iNOEX GmbH is the integrated solution provider for pioneering measurement and control technology for pipes, tubes, cables and profiles. iNOEX GmbH, founded in 1984, has its headquarter in Melle, Germany, and is a subsidiary of CiTEX GmbH. It employs around 150 people worldwide.

Inspiration - Innovation - Integrity

Inspiration is the source of innovation. Innovation is at the heart of everything we do. Regardless of the industry solutions, software, processes or services, we have made it our mission to exceed industry standards so that manufacturers are guaranteed to offer high quality and reliable products. Our innovative strength is characterised by commitment, structure and investment in research and development. 

We manufacture pioneering solutions that add value, increase efficiency and enable our customers to operate successfully in an increasingly competitive environment. Our fast response times, reliable and sustainable processing of customer requests as well as the dynamic development of our range of services are part of our quality management. These services distinguish iNOEX.

We are all united by success. Cooperation, collaboration and communication are another important pillar of our company. A committed team of employees is the most valuable thing for the company and carries the tasks with a sense of quality and responsibility. We act with respect, fairness and enthusiasm. The active participation of our employees in the development of the company always keeps the company‘s goals in mind. This is the only way to achieve the high quality of our products, services and processes.

Name: Ziemann Holvrieka
Description:
Ziemann Holvrieka - Tanks and process technology for the beer, hard seltzer, beverage and liquid food industries 
Within the last few years, our companies from Germany, the Netherlands, Denmark, Belgium and China have grown together under the umbrella of the CIMC Enric Tank and Process B.V. (CETP). Since October 2015 all companies present itself under the common company name Ziemann Holvrieka.
This fact emphasizes the joint activities of the companies and underlines that the brand Ziemann Holvrieka always provides individual and tailor-made solutions from a single source. The services are offered worldwide, with the highest quality and the reliability of a global group of experts. The group of Ziemann Holvrieka companies are one of the largest international suppliers for the beverages and liquid food industries. Through their brands Ziemann and Holvrieka they design and manufacture turnkey breweries, process technology and stainless steel storage tanks for the beverage and liquid food industries.

Name: Gosiger
Description: As a third-generation family-owned company, we’ve built a legacy of delivering top-tier machine tools, automation solutions, and expert support. Our team of skilled technicians and engineers provides comprehensive solutions tailored to your manufacturing needs. From installation and training to maintenance and parts, we’re committed to your success. With a nationwide network and strong industry partnerships, Gosiger is your one-stop shop for all things manufacturing.

Name: UCIMU - SISTEMI PER PRODURRE Group
Description:
UCIMU-SISTEMI PER PRODURRE is the Italian machine tool, robots, automation systems and ancillary products (NC, tools, components, accessories) manufacturers' association

The official representative of the sector, UCIMU-SISTEMI PER PRODURRE has today around two hundred associate member companies, which account for over 70% of the Made in Italy of the sector

Belonging to Confindustria, UCIMU works as a service company for its members. Through its   network UCIMU garantees specialist support for all the aspects of the company activitIes

UCIMU-SISTEMI PER PRODURRE is the world ambassador of the most advanced Made in Italy Technology, supporting and increasing the visibility of the companies of the sector in traditional and emerging markets

Company support and growth.  Taking advantage of the skills of the companies of the group, UCIMU is capable of providing associate members with specialist support on all the aspects of the company activity: from research and development to sales and marketing, from promotion and communication to training

Name: Hako Machines Ltd
Description:
At Hako Machines Ltd, we don’t just clean — we innovate. As a leading provider of high-performance industrial cleaning machines and municipal cleaning technology, we deliver reliable, efficient, and sustainable solutions to keep your spaces spotless and your operations running smoothly.

With over 75 years of global expertise as part of the Hako Group and a strong UK presence, our product range includes industrial sweepers, scrubber driers, city cleaners, and outdoor maintenance equipment — all engineered for durability, efficiency, and environmental responsibility.

Why Hako?
 Premium German-engineered cleaning technology
 Unrivalled after-sales support & service coverage across the UK
 Solutions tailored to your business — from warehouses to shopping centres, airports to municipalities
 Offering bespoke training for operators, engineers and trainers to ensure maximum efficiency
 Driving sustainability with eco-friendly, cost-effective equipment

Our Mission is to provide businesses and municipalities with intelligent cleaning solutions that enhance hygiene, safety, and operational excellence. 

Connect with Hako Machines Ltd for innovative, reliable, and sustainable cleaning technology. Follow us for industry insights, product updates, and to share in our success stories

Name: Pakmatic do Brasil
Description: Operating in the market since 2001, Pakmatic was a pioneer in Brazil in the manufacture of packaging machines. It has its own headquarters and a portfolio of more than 460 machines built. All the quality of products and services provided by Pakmatic originate from the current structure of the company. Highly qualified professionals, agile logistics and good location are part of the excellent results delivered. The entire team of Pakmatic employees is trained and prepared to always offer the best service or solution to its customers. Pakmatic has 24-hour assistance with technicians, managers and sales representatives. Always ready and willing to solve any unforeseen. The company also has a fleet that is always prepared to provide the fastest service and to collect any type of part. Currently, the company is located in the city of Santa Bárbara d’Oeste, in the interior of São Paulo. Strategically linked to the main highways in the state and 55km from Viracopos International Airport, for greater ease in logistics. The company has a space of approximately 9,000m² and has areas reserved for painting, boilermaking, laser cutting, assembly and machining.

Name: Gyptech
Description:
Since being incorporated in 1993, Gyptech has become a global leader in the design, construction, and commissioning of wallboard equipment and services. We have developed a network of highly experienced technical professionals dedicated to customer satisfaction. Our team of management, engineers, designers, operations and maintenance personnel guarantees success through state-of –the-art design and manufacturing. Many of our employees have years of experience in the gypsum industry, both making gypsum board and designing and maintaining equipment. 

With offices in North America, Europe and South America, we have been responsible for supplying the equipment for the majority of new production for over a decade. Our experience designing and commissioning equipment globally, means that we are prepared to meet the unique requirements presented by each of our customers. Our wallboard plants serve a variety of production capacities and can be tailored to surpass expectations of safety, quality and performance in any market. We look forward to partnering with you to start making gypsum products for your market today.
